sanskrit: धृतराष्ट्र उवाच धर्मक्षेत्रे कुरुक्षेत्रे समवेता युयुत्सव: । मामका: पाण्डवाश्चैव किमकुर्वत सञ्जय ॥
transliteration: dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca dharma-kṣetre kuru-kṣetre samavetā yuyutsavaḥ māmakāḥ pāṇḍavāś caiva kim akurvata sañjaya

meanings.english: Dhritarashtra said: O Sanjaya, after assembling on the holy field of Kurukshetra and desiring to fight, what did my sons and the sons of Pandu do?
meanings.hindi: धृतराष्ट्र ने कहा: हे संजय, धर्मभूमि कुरुक्षेत्र में युद्ध की इच्छा से एकत्र हुए मेरे पुत्र और पांडु के पुत्र क्या कर रहे हैं?
meanings.hinglish: Dhritarashtra pooch raha hai: Kurukshetra me ladne ke liye aaye mere aur Pandavon ke log kya kar rahe hain?
meanings.marathi: धृतराष्ट्र म्हणाला: हे संजय, धर्मभूमी कुरुक्षेत्रावर युद्धासाठी जमलेल्या माझ्या आणि पांडवांच्या पुत्रांनी काय केले?

core_meaning: The verse sets the stage of conflict, highlighting curiosity, attachment, and the beginning of a moral and emotional battle
use_cases: feeling anxious before a big conflict or decision
embedding_text: anxiety before conflict or decision, attachment influencing thinking, tension before important events, family conflict and rivalry, curiosity about outcomes, emotional pressure in difficult situations

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच दृष्ट्वा तु पाण्डवानीकं व्यूढं दुर्योधनस्तदा । आचार्यमुपसङ्गम्य राजा वचनमब्रवीत् ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca dṛṣṭvā tu pāṇḍavānīkaṁ vyūḍhaṁ duryodhanas tadā ācāryam upasaṅgamya rājā vacanam abravīt

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: King Duryodhana, seeing the well-arranged army of the Pandavas, approached his teacher Dronacharya and spoke these words.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: राजा दुर्योधन ने पाण्डवों की सुव्यवस्थित सेना को देखकर अपने गुरु द्रोणाचार्य के पास जाकर उनसे ये शब्द कहे।
meanings.hinglish: Sanjay bolta hai: Duryodhan ne Pandavo ki strong aur well-planned army dekhi aur apne teacher Dronacharya ke paas jaake baat ki.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणतो: दुर्योधनाने पांडवांची सुव्यवस्थित सेना पाहून आपल्या गुरु द्रोणाचार्यांकडे जाऊन त्यांना सांगितले.

core_meaning: Facing a strong situation can trigger strategic thinking, concern, or insecurity, leading one to seek guidance or react carefully
use_cases: feeling pressure when facing strong competition
embedding_text: facing strong competition and feeling pressure, seeing others better prepared, insecurity and anxiety in challenging situations, seeking guidance from mentor, strategic thinking before action

sanskrit: पश्यैतां पाण्डुपुत्राणामाचार्य महतीं चमूम् । व्यूढां द्रुपदपुत्रेण तव शिष्येण धीमता ॥
transliteration: paśyaitāṁ pāṇḍu-putrāṇām ācārya mahatīṁ camūm vyūḍhāṁ drupada-putreṇa tava śiṣyeṇa dhīmatā

meanings.english: O teacher, behold this mighty army of the sons of Pandu, expertly arranged by your intelligent disciple, the son of Drupada.
meanings.hindi: हे आचार्य, पाण्डु पुत्रों की इस विशाल सेना को देखिए, जिसे आपके ही बुद्धिमान शिष्य द्रुपद पुत्र ने सुव्यवस्थित किया है।
meanings.hinglish: Hey Guruji, Pandavo ki is powerful army ko dekhiye, jo aapke hi intelligent student ne bahut smartly arrange ki hai.
meanings.marathi: हे आचार्य, पांडवांची ही विशाल सेना पहा, जी तुमच्या बुद्धिमान शिष्याने कुशलतेने मांडली आहे.

core_meaning: Recognizing the strength and intelligence of others can trigger comparison, concern, or strategic awareness
embedding_text: comparing with strong competitors, recognizing others intelligence and preparation, feeling insecure and alert in competition, observing opponent strength, strategic awareness in challenging situations

sanskrit: अत्र शूरा महेष्वासा भीमार्जुनसमा युधि । युयुधानो विराटश्च द्रुपदश्च महारथः ॥
transliteration: atra śūrā maheṣv-āsā bhīmārjuna-samā yudhi yuyudhāno virāṭaś ca drupadaś ca mahā-rathaḥ

meanings.english: In this army there are many heroic bowmen equal in fighting to Bhima and Arjuna; there are also great fighters like Yuyudhana, Virata, and Drupada.
meanings.hindi: इस सेना में भीम और अर्जुन के समान युद्ध करने वाले अनेक वीर धनुर्धर हैं; युयुधान, विराट और द्रुपद जैसे महारथी भी हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Is army me Bhim aur Arjun jaisa fight karne wale bahut strong warriors hain, jaise Yuyudhan, Virat aur Drupad.
meanings.marathi: या सैन्यात भीम आणि अर्जुनासारखे लढणारे अनेक शूर धनुर्धर आहेत; युयुधान, विराट आणि द्रुपद यांसारखे महारथीही आहेत.

core_meaning: Acknowledging the strength and capability of opponents highlights the seriousness of a challenge and can intensify pressure or fear
use_cases: recognizing strong opponents in business or exams
embedding_text: facing strong and skilled competitors, recognizing powerful opponents, pressure in competitive environments, preparing for tough challenges, awareness of opponent strength and capability

sanskrit: धृष्टकेतुश्चेकितानः काशिराजश्च वीर्यवान् । पुरुजित्कुन्तिभोजश्च शैब्यश्च नरपुङ्गवः ॥
transliteration: dhṛṣṭaketuś cekitānaḥ kāśirājaś ca vīryavān purujit kuntibhojaś ca śaibyaś ca nara-puṅgavaḥ

meanings.english: There are also great warriors like Dhrishtaketu, Chekitana, the powerful King of Kashi, Purujit, Kuntibhoja, and Shaibya, all mighty heroes among men.
meanings.hindi: धृष्टकेतु, चेकितान, वीर काशी राजा, पुरुजित, कुन्तिभोज और शैब्य जैसे महान योद्धा भी हैं, जो सभी श्रेष्ठ पुरुष हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Is army me Dhrishtaketu, Chekitan, powerful Kashi king, Purujit, Kuntibhoj aur Shaibya jaise strong warriors bhi hain.
meanings.marathi: या सैन्यात धृष्टकेतु, चेकितान, पराक्रमी काशी राजा, पुरुजित, कुंतीभोज आणि शैब्य यांसारखे महान योद्धे आहेत.

core_meaning: Listing multiple strong individuals emphasizes the scale of challenge and can increase psychological pressure and seriousness
use_cases: feeling overwhelmed by multiple strong competitors
recognizing multiple skilled individuals in competition
pressure before exams, business, or sports
understanding magnitude of a difficult situation
embedding_text: facing many strong competitors, feeling overwhelmed by large scale challenge, pressure due to multiple skilled opponents, recognizing magnitude of competition, stress in high competition environment

sanskrit: युधामन्युश्च विक्रान्त उत्तमौजाश्च वीर्यवान् । सौभद्रो द्रौपदेयाश्च सर्व एव महारथाः ॥
transliteration: yudhāmanyuś ca vikrānta uttamaujāś ca vīryavān saubhadro draupadeyāś ca sarva eva mahā-rathāḥ

meanings.english: There are also powerful warriors like Yudhamanyu, Uttamauja, the son of Subhadra (Abhimanyu), and the sons of Draupadi—all of them are great chariot fighters.
meanings.hindi: युधामन्यु, वीर्यवान उत्तमौजा, सुभद्रा का पुत्र (अभिमन्यु) और द्रौपदी के पुत्र—ये सभी महारथी हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Yudhamanyu, Uttamauja, Abhimanyu aur Draupadi ke bete sabhi powerful warriors hain.
meanings.marathi: युधामन्यु, पराक्रमी उत्तमौजा, सुभद्रेचा पुत्र (अभिमन्यु) आणि द्रौपदीचे पुत्र—हे सर्व महारथी आहेत.

core_meaning: Recognizing that even younger or less experienced individuals can be powerful adds to the sense of challenge and unpredictability
use_cases: realizing that everyone can be a threat in competition
embedding_text: unexpected strong competitors including young individuals, unpredictability in competition, underestimating others can be risky, pressure from unknown strengths, facing diverse and powerful opponents

sanskrit: अस्माकं तु विशिष्टा ये तान्निबोध द्विजोत्तम । नायका मम सैन्यस्य संज्ञार्थ तान्ब्रवीमि ते ॥
transliteration: asmākaṁ tu viśiṣṭā ye tān nibodha dvijottama nāyakā mama sainyasya saṁjñārthaṁ tān bravīmi te

meanings.english: But for your information, O best of the Brahmins, let me tell you about the distinguished leaders of my army.
meanings.hindi: हे द्विजश्रेष्ठ, अब आप हमारे पक्ष के प्रमुख नेताओं के बारे में जान लीजिए, जिन्हें मैं आपको बताता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Ab main aapko apni army ke main leaders ke baare me batata hoon.
meanings.marathi: हे द्विजश्रेष्ठ, आता मी तुम्हाला आमच्या सैन्याच्या प्रमुख नेत्यांविषयी सांगतो.

core_meaning: In challenging situations, people shift focus to their own strengths to regain confidence and balance pressure
use_cases: focusing on strengths instead of fear
strategic planning based on own resources
embedding_text: focusing on own strengths in difficult situations, regaining confidence under pressure, self reassurance and motivation, strategic thinking based on strengths, balancing fear with confidence

sanskrit: भवान्भीष्मश्च कर्णश्च कृपश्च समितिंजयः । अश्वत्थामा विकर्णश्च सौमदत्तिस्तथैव च ॥
transliteration: bhavān bhīṣmaś ca karṇaś ca kṛpaś ca samitiṁ-jayaḥ aśvatthāmā vikarṇaś ca saumadattis tathaiva ca

meanings.english: There are also great personalities like yourself, Bhishma, Karna, Kripa (who is always victorious in battle), Ashwatthama, Vikarna, and the son of Somadatta.
meanings.hindi: आप स्वयं, भीष्म, कर्ण, कृपाचार्य (जो सदैव युद्ध में विजयी रहते हैं), अश्वत्थामा, विकर्ण और सोमदत्त का पुत्र भी इस सेना में हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Aap khud, Bhishma, Karna, Kripacharya, Ashwatthama, Vikarna aur Somdatt ka beta bhi hamari side me hain.
meanings.marathi: आपण स्वतः, भीष्म, कर्ण, कृपाचार्य, अश्वत्थामा, विकर्ण आणि सोमदत्ताचा पुत्र आमच्या सैन्यात आहेत.

core_meaning: Reminding oneself of strong allies and support systems helps rebuild confidence and counter fear in challenging situations
use_cases: boosting confidence by recalling support system
facing challenges with strong team support
reducing fear by focusing on allies
embedding_text: confidence from strong team and allies, recalling support system in difficult situations, reducing fear through team strength, motivation from strong backing, strategic advantage of powerful allies

sanskrit: अन्ये च बहवः शूरा मदर्थे त्यक्तजीविताः । नानाशस्त्रप्रहरणाः सर्वे युद्धविशारदाः ॥
transliteration: anye ca bahavaḥ śūrā mad-arthe tyakta-jīvitāḥ nānā-śastra-praharaṇāḥ sarve yuddha-viśāradāḥ

meanings.english: There are many other brave warriors who are ready to give up their lives for my sake. They are well-equipped with various weapons and are all skilled in warfare.
meanings.hindi: और भी अनेक वीर योद्धा हैं जो मेरे लिए अपने प्राण त्यागने को तैयार हैं। वे विभिन्न शस्त्रों से सुसज्जित हैं और सभी युद्ध में निपुण हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Aur bhi bahut saare warriors hain jo mere liye apni jaan dene ko ready hain, aur sabhi skilled aur well-equipped hain.
meanings.marathi: आणखी अनेक शूर योद्धे आहेत जे माझ्यासाठी आपले प्राण देण्यास तयार आहेत. ते विविध शस्त्रांनी सज्ज असून सर्व युद्धकुशल आहेत.

core_meaning: Loyal and committed support systems provide strength, confidence, and a sense of security in difficult situations
use_cases: trusting team or support system in difficult situations
team commitment in business or projects
embedding_text: loyal team and support system in challenges, confidence from committed people, strength through teamwork and loyalty, motivation from strong backing, secure feeling in difficult situations

sanskrit: अपर्याप्तं तदस्माकं बलं भीष्माभिरक्षितम् । पर्याप्तं त्विदमेतेषां बलं भीमाभिरक्षितम् ॥
transliteration: aparyāptaṁ tad asmākaṁ balaṁ bhīṣmābhirakṣitam paryāptaṁ tv idam eteṣāṁ balaṁ bhīmābhirakṣitam

meanings.english: Our strength, protected by Bhishma, is unlimited, whereas the strength of the Pandavas, protected by Bhima, is limited.
meanings.hindi: भीष्म द्वारा संरक्षित हमारी सेना अपर्याप्त (असीम/अजेय) है, जबकि भीम द्वारा संरक्षित उनकी सेना पर्याप्त (सीमित) है।
meanings.hinglish: Hamari army Bhishma ke protection me unlimited aur strong hai, jabki Pandavo ki army Bhim ke under limited hai.
meanings.marathi: भीष्मांच्या संरक्षणाखाली आमचे सैन्य अपरिमित आहे, तर भीमाच्या संरक्षणाखाली त्यांचे सैन्य मर्यादित आहे.

core_meaning: People often boost their confidence by favoring their own strengths while downplaying others, especially under pressure
embedding_text: overconfidence and bias in competition, overestimating own strength and underestimating others, boosting morale under pressure, psychological bias in decision making, confidence through self reassurance

sanskrit: अयनेषु च सर्वेषु यथाभागवमस्थिताः । भीष्ममेवाभिरक्षन्तु भवन्तः सर्व एव हि ॥
transliteration: ayaneṣu ca sarveṣu yathā-bhāgam avasthitāḥ bhīṣmam evābhirakṣantu bhavantaḥ sarva eva hi

meanings.english: Therefore, all of you, positioned in your respective places, must protect Bhishma at all costs.
meanings.hindi: इसलिए आप सभी अपने-अपने स्थानों पर स्थित होकर हर हाल में भीष्म की रक्षा करें।
meanings.hinglish: Sab log apni position par rehkar Bhishma ko protect karein, ye sabse important hai.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून तुम्ही सर्वजण आपल्या-आपल्या स्थानावर राहून भीष्मांचे संरक्षण करा.

core_meaning: In critical situations, leaders identify key strengths and prioritize protecting them to maintain stability and advantage
use_cases: protecting key assets in business or projects
focusing on critical priorities under pressure
embedding_text: protecting key assets and strengths, strategic focus in critical situations, team coordination and responsibility, prioritizing important elements, leadership decision making under pressure

sanskrit: तस्य सञ्जनयन्हर्षं कुरुवृद्धः पितामहः । सिंहनादं विनद्योच्चैः शङ्खं दध्मौ प्रतापवान् ॥
transliteration: tasya sañjanayan harṣaṁ kuru-vṛddhaḥ pitāmahaḥ siṁha-nādaṁ vinadyoccaiḥ śaṅkhaṁ dadhmau pratāpavān

meanings.english: Then the great elder of the Kurus, the powerful grandsire Bhishma, roared like a lion and blew his conch loudly, bringing joy to Duryodhana.
meanings.hindi: तब कुरुवंश के वृद्ध पितामह भीष्म ने सिंह के समान गर्जना करते हुए ऊँचे स्वर में शंख बजाया, जिससे दुर्योधन को हर्ष हुआ।
meanings.hinglish: Tab Bhishma ne lion ki tarah zor se garaj kar shankh bajaya, jisse Duryodhan ka confidence badh gaya.
meanings.marathi: तेव्हा कुरुवंशाचे वृद्ध पितामह भीष्म यांनी सिंहासारखी गर्जना करत मोठ्याने शंख वाजवला, ज्यामुळे दुर्योधनाला आनंद झाला.

core_meaning: Strong leadership actions can boost morale and confidence in a team, especially during tense or uncertain situations
use_cases: boosting team morale before a challenge
creating energy and confidence in groups
starting a project or competition with strong intent
embedding_text: leader boosting morale and confidence, motivation through strong actions, energizing team in pressure situations, leadership influence on group psychology, inspiring others through bold behavior

sanskrit: ततः शङ्खाश्च भेर्यश्च पणवानकगोमुखाः । सहसैवाभ्यहन्यन्त स शब्दस्तुमुलोऽभवत् ॥
transliteration: tataḥ śaṅkhāś ca bheryaś ca paṇavānaka-gomukhāḥ sahasaivābhyahanyanta sa śabdas tumulo ’bhavat

meanings.english: Then, suddenly, conches, drums, cymbals, trumpets, and horns were all sounded together, creating a loud and overwhelming noise.
meanings.hindi: तब अचानक शंख, नगाड़े, मृदंग, भेरी और अन्य वाद्य एक साथ बज उठे, जिससे अत्यधिक गूंजने वाला शब्द उत्पन्न हुआ।
meanings.hinglish: Phir achanak sabhi shankh aur drums ek saath bajne lage, aur bahut loud aur powerful sound create hua.
meanings.marathi: नंतर अचानक शंख, नगारे, मृदंग आणि इतर वाद्य एकत्र वाजू लागले आणि मोठा गोंगाट निर्माण झाला.

core_meaning: Collective energy and coordinated action amplify impact, creating a powerful and overwhelming environment
use_cases: high-energy environments like events or matches
coordinated action in projects or teams
embedding_text: collective team energy and synchronization, coordinated action creating strong impact, group motivation and excitement, overwhelming environment in competition, team collaboration for maximum effect

sanskrit: ततः श्वेतैर्हयैर्युक्ते महति स्यन्दने स्थितौ । माधवः पाण्डवश्चैव दिव्यौ शङ्खौ प्रदध्मतुः ॥
transliteration: tataḥ śvetair hayair yukte mahati syandane sthitau mādhavaḥ pāṇḍavaś caiva divyau śaṅkhau pradadhmatuḥ

meanings.english: Then, seated in a magnificent chariot drawn by white horses, Krishna and Arjuna blew their divine conches.
meanings.hindi: तब श्वेत घोड़ों से युक्त महान रथ पर स्थित भगवान कृष्ण और अर्जुन ने अपने दिव्य शंख बजाए।
meanings.hinglish: Tab Krishna aur Arjun, white horses wale grand chariot me baithkar apne divine shankh bajate hain.
meanings.marathi: तेव्हा पांढऱ्या घोड्यांनी युक्त भव्य रथावर बसलेले कृष्ण आणि अर्जुन यांनी आपले दिव्य शंख वाजवले.

core_meaning: Calm and composed strength, backed by clarity and purpose, creates a powerful and confident presence
use_cases: maintaining calm confidence in high-pressure situations
embedding_text: calm and confident presence in pressure situations, clarity and purpose driven action, composed leadership and strength, facing challenges with calmness, strong but balanced mindset

sanskrit: पाञ्चजन्यं हृषीकेशो देवदत्तं धनञ्जयः । पौण्ड्रं दध्मौ महाशङ्खं भीमकर्मा वृकोदरः ॥
transliteration: pāñcajanyaṁ hṛṣīkeśo devadattaṁ dhanañ-jayaḥ pauṇḍraṁ dadhmau mahā-śaṅkhaṁ bhīma-karmā vṛkodaraḥ

meanings.english: Lord Krishna blew His conch Panchajanya, Arjuna blew Devadatta, and Bhima, the doer of mighty deeds, blew the great conch Paundra.
meanings.hindi: भगवान कृष्ण ने पाञ्चजन्य शंख बजाया, अर्जुन ने देवदत्त शंख और भीम ने अपने महान पौण्ड्र शंख का निनाद किया।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna ne Panchajanya shankh bajaya, Arjun ne Devdatt aur Bhim ne powerful Paundra shankh bajaya.
meanings.marathi: भगवान कृष्णांनी पाञ्चजन्य, अर्जुनाने देवदत्त आणि भीमाने महान पौण्ड्र शंख वाजवला.

core_meaning: Each individual expressing their unique strength and identity contributes to a powerful and unified presence
use_cases: expressing individual strengths in a team
embedding_text: individual strengths contributing to team success, identity and self expression in groups, confidence through personal abilities, teamwork with unique contributions, unity through diversity of strengths

sanskrit: अनन्तविजयं राजा कुन्तीपुत्रो युधिष्ठिरः । नकुलः सहदेवश्च सुघोषमणिपुष्पकौ ॥
transliteration: anantavijayaṁ rājā kuntī-putro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca sughoṣa-maṇipuṣpakau

meanings.english: King Yudhishthira, the son of Kunti, blew his conch Anantavijaya, and Nakula and Sahadeva blew their conches Sughosha and Manipushpaka.
meanings.hindi: कुन्तीपुत्र राजा युधिष्ठिर ने अनन्तविजय शंख बजाया, और नकुल तथा सहदेव ने सुघोष और मणिपुष्पक शंख बजाए।
meanings.hinglish: Yudhishthir ne Anantvijay shankh bajaya, aur Nakul-Sahdev ne Sughosh aur Manipushpak shankh bajaye.
meanings.marathi: कुंतीपुत्र राजा युधिष्ठिराने अनंतविजय शंख वाजवला आणि नकुल व सहदेव यांनी सुघोष व मणिपुष्पक शंख वाजवले.

core_meaning: Leadership combined with coordinated support from team members creates a balanced and powerful collective presence
use_cases: leader guiding team with strong support
coordinated efforts in projects or competitions
embedding_text: leadership with team support and coordination, balanced teamwork and roles, confidence through unity and organization, collaborative strength in groups, effective team structure and leadership

sanskrit: काश्यश्च परमेष्वासः शिखण्डी च महारथः । धृष्टद्युम्नो विराटश्च सात्यकिश्चापराजितः ॥
transliteration: kāśyaś ca parameṣv-āsaḥ śikhaṇḍī ca mahā-rathaḥ dhṛṣṭadyumno virāṭaś ca sātyakiś cāparājitaḥ

meanings.english: There are also great fighters like the King of Kashi, the mighty archer; Shikhandi, a great warrior; Dhrishtadyumna, Virata, and the undefeated Satyaki.
meanings.hindi: काशी के महान धनुर्धर राजा, शिखंडी महारथी, धृष्टद्युम्न, विराट और अपराजित सात्यकि भी इस सेना में हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Kashi ke powerful king, Shikhandi, Dhrishtadyumna, Virat aur undefeated Satyaki jaise strong warriors bhi hain.
meanings.marathi: काशीचा महान धनुर्धर राजा, शिखंडी, धृष्टद्युम्न, विराट आणि अपराजित सात्यकि हे देखील या सैन्यात आहेत.

core_meaning: A strong team includes diverse and highly capable individuals, each adding unique strength and reinforcing overall confidence
use_cases: building strong teams with diverse skills
confidence from having capable team members
team composition in business or projects
embedding_text: strong team with diverse skilled individuals, confidence from capable team members, importance of diversity in team building, leveraging different strengths for success, building powerful team structure

sanskrit: द्रुपदो द्रौपदेयाश्च सर्वशः पृथिवीपते । सौभद्रश्च महाबाहुः शङ्खान् दध्मुः पृथक्पृथक् ॥
transliteration: drupado draupadeyāś ca sarvaśaḥ pṛthivī-pate saubhadraś ca mahā-bāhuḥ śaṅkhān dadhmuḥ pṛthak pṛthak

meanings.english: O King, Drupada, the sons of Draupadi, and the mighty-armed Abhimanyu all blew their conches individually.
meanings.hindi: हे राजन्, द्रुपद, द्रौपदी के पुत्र और महाबाहु अभिमन्यु—इन सभी ने अलग-अलग अपने शंख बजाए।
meanings.hinglish: Drupad, Draupadi ke bete aur Abhimanyu sabne apne-apne shankh alag-alag bajaye.
meanings.marathi: हे राजन्, द्रुपद, द्रौपदीचे पुत्र आणि महाबाहू अभिमन्यु यांनी वेगवेगळे शंख वाजवले.

core_meaning: Individual contributions within a unified system strengthen overall impact while maintaining unique identity
use_cases: team members contributing individually to a shared goal
embedding_text: individual contributions in team environment, balancing individuality and unity, coordinated teamwork with personal roles, distributed responsibility in projects, collaboration with independent effort

sanskrit: स घोषो धार्तराष्ट्राणां हृदयानि व्यदारयत् । नभश्च पृथिवीं चैव तुमुलोऽभ्यनुनादयन् ॥
transliteration: sa ghoṣo dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṁ hṛdayāni vyadārayat nabhaś ca pṛthivīṁ caiva tumulo ’bhyanunādayan

meanings.english: That tremendous sound shattered the hearts of the sons of Dhritarashtra and echoed throughout the sky and the earth.
meanings.hindi: उस भयंकर ध्वनि ने धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्रों के हृदय को कंपा दिया और आकाश तथा पृथ्वी में गूंज उठी।
meanings.hinglish: Us powerful sound ne Kauravo ke hearts ko hila diya aur pura environment me ghoonj gaya.
meanings.marathi: त्या प्रचंड आवाजाने धृतराष्ट्राच्या पुत्रांच्या हृदयाला धक्का बसला आणि तो आकाश व पृथ्वीवर घुमला.

core_meaning: Strong and confident actions can psychologically impact opponents, creating fear and shifting the balance of power
embedding_text: psychological impact on opponents through strong actions, intimidation and fear in competition, confidence shifting power balance, mental pressure in high stakes situations, strategic dominance through presence

sanskrit: अथ व्यवस्थितान्दृष्ट्वा धार्तराष्ट्रान्कपिध्वजः । प्रवृत्ते शस्त्रसम्पाते धनुरुद्यम्य पाण्डवः । हृषीकेशं तदा वाक्यमिदमाह महीपते ॥
transliteration: atha vyavasthitān dṛṣṭvā dhārtarāṣṭrān kapi-dhvajaḥ pravṛtte śastra-sampāte dhanur udyamya pāṇḍavaḥ hṛṣīkeśaṁ tadā vākyam idam āha mahī-pate

meanings.english: O King, at that moment, seeing the sons of Dhritarashtra ready for battle, Arjuna, whose flag bore Hanuman, lifted his bow and spoke these words to Lord Krishna.
meanings.hindi: हे राजन्, उस समय जब धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्र युद्ध के लिए तैयार खड़े थे, तब हनुमान ध्वजधारी अर्जुन ने अपना धनुष उठाकर भगवान कृष्ण से यह कहा।
meanings.hinglish: Jab Arjun ne Kauravo ko battle ke liye ready dekha, tab usne apna dhanush uthaya aur Krishna se baat karne laga.
meanings.marathi: हे राजन्, जेव्हा अर्जुनाने धृतराष्ट्राच्या पुत्रांना युद्धासाठी सज्ज पाहिले, तेव्हा त्याने आपले धनुष्य उचलून श्रीकृष्णाशी संवाद सुरू केला.

core_meaning: Facing reality directly can trigger reflection and internal questioning before taking action
use_cases: pausing before making a big decision
reflecting before taking action in high-pressure situations
embedding_text: facing reality before action, reflection in high pressure situations, pausing before decision making, seeking guidance before acting, awareness before taking important steps

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये रथं स्थापय मेऽच्युत । यावदेतान्निरीक्षेऽहं योद्धुकामानवस्थितान् ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca senayor ubhayor madhye rathaṁ sthāpaya me ’cyuta yāvad etān nirīkṣe ’haṁ yoddhu-kāmān avasthitān

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Krishna, please place my chariot between the two armies so that I may observe those who stand here eager to fight.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे कृष्ण, मेरा रथ दोनों सेनाओं के बीच में खड़ा करें ताकि मैं उन लोगों को देख सकूं जो युद्ध करने के लिए खड़े हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun bolta hai: Krishna, mera rath dono armies ke beech me le chalo taki main dekh saku kaun log fight karne ke liye ready hain.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणतो: हे कृष्ण, माझा रथ दोन्ही सैन्यांच्या मध्ये उभा करा, जेणेकरून मी युद्धासाठी उभे असलेल्या लोकांना पाहू शकेन.

core_meaning: Before taking action, it is important to fully understand the situation and observe all factors clearly
use_cases: analyzing a situation before making decisions
taking time to observe before reacting
clarity before action in complex situations
embedding_text: analyzing situation before decision, observing both sides before acting, strategic thinking and clarity, decision making with awareness, understanding context before taking action

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये रथं स्थापय मेऽच्युत । यावदेतान्निरीक्षेऽहं योद्धुकामानवस्थितान् ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca senayor ubhayor madhye rathaṁ sthāpaya me ’cyuta yāvad etān nirīkṣe ’haṁ yoddhu-kāmān avasthitān

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Krishna, please place my chariot between the two armies so that I may observe those who stand here eager to fight.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे कृष्ण, मेरा रथ दोनों सेनाओं के बीच में खड़ा करें ताकि मैं उन लोगों को देख सकूं जो युद्ध करने के लिए खड़े हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun bolta hai: Krishna, mera rath dono armies ke beech me le chalo taki main dekh saku kaun log fight karne ke liye ready hain.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणतो: हे कृष्ण, माझा रथ दोन्ही सैन्यांच्या मध्ये उभा करा, जेणेकरून मी युद्धासाठी उभे असलेल्या लोकांना पाहू शकेन.

core_meaning: Before taking action, it is important to fully understand the situation and observe all factors clearly
use_cases: analyzing a situation before making decisions
taking time to observe before reacting
clarity before action in complex situations
embedding_text: analyzing situation before decision, observing both sides before acting, strategic thinking and clarity, decision making with awareness, understanding context before taking action

sanskrit: योत्स्यमानानवेक्षेऽहं य एतेऽत्र समागताः । धार्तराष्ट्रस्य दुर्बुद्धेर्युद्धे प्रियचिकीर्षवः ॥
transliteration: yotsyamānān avekṣe ’haṁ ya ete ’tra samāgatāḥ dhārtarāṣṭrasya durbuddher yuddhe priya-cikīrṣavaḥ

meanings.english: I wish to observe those who have gathered here to fight, wishing to please the evil-minded son of Dhritarashtra.
meanings.hindi: मैं उन लोगों को देखना चाहता हूँ जो यहाँ युद्ध करने के लिए एकत्र हुए हैं और जो दुर्योधन की प्रसन्नता के लिए लड़ना चाहते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Main dekhna chahta hoon ki kaun log yahan aaye hain jo Duryodhan ko khush karne ke liye fight kar rahe hain.
meanings.marathi: मी पाहू इच्छितो की येथे कोण लोक जमले आहेत जे दुर्योधनाला आनंद देण्यासाठी युद्ध करणार आहेत.

core_meaning: Understanding the intentions and motivations of others is crucial before making decisions or taking action
use_cases: analyzing intentions of people in a situation
embedding_text: understanding intentions and motives of people, analyzing why others act in certain ways, evaluating trust and alignment in decisions, strategic thinking based on motivations, awareness before action in conflicts

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच एवमुक्तो हृषीकेशो गुडाकेशेन भारत । सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये स्थापयित्वा रथोत्तमम् ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca evam ukto hṛṣīkeśo guḍākeśena bhārata senayor ubhayor madhye sthāpayitvā rathottamam

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: O King, having been addressed by Arjuna, Lord Krishna placed the magnificent chariot between the two armies.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: हे राजन्, अर्जुन के कहने पर भगवान कृष्ण ने श्रेष्ठ रथ को दोनों सेनाओं के बीच में खड़ा कर दिया।
meanings.hinglish: Sanjay bolta hai: Arjun ke kehne par Krishna ne rath ko dono armies ke beech me le jaakar khada kar diya.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणतो: अर्जुनाच्या सांगण्यावरून श्रीकृष्णाने रथ दोन्ही सैन्यांच्या मध्ये उभा केला.

core_meaning: A true guide or leader helps you face reality directly, even when it may lead to discomfort or emotional challenge
use_cases: seeking guidance before facing difficult situations
mentors helping you see reality clearly
embedding_text: mentor guiding to face reality, leadership support in difficult situations, clarity through guidance, facing truth with help, decision making with trusted support

sanskrit: भीष्मद्रोणप्रमुखतः सर्वेषां च महीक्षिताम् । उवाच पार्थ पश्यैतान्समवेतान्कुरूनिति ॥
transliteration: bhīṣma-droṇa-pramukhataḥ sarveṣāṁ ca mahī-kṣitām uvāca pārtha paśyaitān samavetān kurūn iti

meanings.english: In the presence of Bhishma, Drona, and all the kings, Lord Krishna said: O Arjuna, behold these assembled Kurus.
meanings.hindi: भीष्म, द्रोण और अन्य सभी राजाओं के सामने भगवान कृष्ण ने कहा: हे अर्जुन, इन एकत्रित कुरुओं को देखो।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna ne Arjun se kaha: dekho in sab Kuruvanshiyon ko jo yahan ekattha hue hain.
meanings.marathi: भीष्म, द्रोण आणि इतर सर्व राजांच्या समोर श्रीकृष्ण म्हणाले: हे अर्जुन, या एकत्र जमलेल्या कुरूंना पाहा.

core_meaning: Facing personal reality—especially involving loved ones—can trigger deep emotional conflict and challenge decision-making
use_cases: facing difficult decisions involving family or close people
emotional conflict between duty and relationships
struggling to act against loved ones
realizing the true impact of a situation
decision paralysis due to emotional attachment
embedding_text: emotional conflict involving family and duty, facing reality involving loved ones, attachment affecting decision making, difficult choices between relationships and responsibility, internal emotional struggle in critical situations

sanskrit: तत्रापश्यत्स्थितान्पार्थः पितॄनथ पितामहान् । आचार्यान्मातुलान्भ्रातॄन्पुत्रान्पौत्रान्सखींस्तथा । श्वशुरान्सुहृदश्चैव सेनयोरुभयोरपि ॥
transliteration: tatrāpaśyat sthitān pārthaḥ pitṝn atha pitāmahān ācāryān mātulān bhrātṝn putrān pautrān sakhīṁs tathā śvaśurān suhṛdaś caiva senayor ubhayor api

meanings.english: Arjuna saw in both armies his fathers, grandfathers, teachers, uncles, brothers, sons, grandsons, friends, fathers-in-law, and well-wishers.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने दोनों सेनाओं में अपने पिता, पितामह, गुरु, मामा, भाई, पुत्र, पौत्र, मित्र, ससुर और शुभचिंतकों को देखा।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun ne dono sides me apne family members, teachers, friends aur relatives ko dekha.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुनाने दोन्ही सैन्यांमध्ये आपले वडील, आजोबा, गुरु, मामा, भाऊ, पुत्र, नातू, मित्र, सासरे आणि सुहृद पाहिले.

core_meaning: When a situation directly involves loved ones, emotional attachment can overpower logic and make decisions extremely difficult
use_cases: making decisions involving family or close relationships
emotional conflict between duty and attachment
difficulty in acting against loved ones
embedding_text: emotional conflict involving family and loved ones, attachment overpowering logic in decisions, difficulty acting against close relationships, compassion and emotional pain in conflicts, internal struggle between duty and relationships

sanskrit: तान्समीक्ष्य स कौन्तेयः सर्वान्बन्धूनवस्थितान् । कृपया परयाविष्टो विषीदन्निदमब्रवीत् ॥
transliteration: tān samīkṣya sa kaunteyaḥ sarvān bandhūn avasthitān kṛpayā parayāviṣṭo viṣīdann idam abravīt

meanings.english: Seeing all his relatives standing before him, Arjuna was filled with deep compassion and sorrowfully spoke these words.
meanings.hindi: अपने सभी संबंधियों को सामने खड़े देखकर अर्जुन अत्यधिक करुणा से भर गया और दुखी होकर यह कहने लगा।
meanings.hinglish: Apne relatives ko dekhkar Arjun bahut emotional ho gaya aur dukhi hokar bolne laga.
meanings.marathi: आपल्या सर्व नातलगांना समोर पाहून अर्जुन करुणेने भरून गेला आणि दुःखी होऊन बोलू लागला.

core_meaning: Strong emotional attachment and compassion can overwhelm a person, making it difficult to act rationally in critical situations
use_cases: feeling emotionally overwhelmed in difficult situations
struggling to act due to emotional attachment
embedding_text: emotional overwhelm due to compassion, attachment affecting rational decisions, sadness and internal conflict in difficult situations, emotional breakdown before action, heart vs duty conflict

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच दृष्ट्वेमं स्वजनं कृष्ण युयुत्सुं समुपस्थितम् । सीदन्ति मम गात्राणि मुखं च परिशुष्यति ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca dṛṣṭvemaṁ sva-janaṁ kṛṣṇa yuyutsuṁ samupasthitam sīdanti mama gātrāṇi mukhaṁ ca pariśuṣyati

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Krishna, seeing my own people eager to fight, my limbs are weakening and my mouth is drying up.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे कृष्ण, अपने ही लोगों को युद्ध के लिए खड़ा देखकर मेरे अंग शिथिल हो रहे हैं और मेरा मुख सूख रहा है।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun kehta hai: apne logon ko fight ke liye ready dekhkar mera body weak ho raha hai aur muh sukh raha hai.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणतो: आपल्या लोकांना युद्धासाठी उभे पाहून माझे अंग शिथिल होत आहे आणि माझे तोंड कोरडे पडत आहे.

core_meaning: Intense emotional stress can manifest as physical symptoms, showing how deeply the mind and body are connected
use_cases: physical symptoms of anxiety (dry mouth, weakness)
embedding_text: physical symptoms of anxiety and stress, emotional overwhelm affecting body, panic and fear reactions, mind body connection in high stress situations, anxiety before important decisions

sanskrit: वेपथुश्च शरीरे मे रोमहर्षश्च जायते । गाण्डीवं स्रंसते हस्तात्त्वक्चैव परिदह्यते ॥
transliteration: vepathuś ca śarīre me roma-harṣaś ca jāyate gāṇḍīvaṁ sraṁsate hastāt tvak caiva paridahyate

meanings.english: My body trembles, my hair stands on end, my bow Gandiva slips from my hand, and my skin burns.
meanings.hindi: मेरा शरीर कांप रहा है, रोंगटे खड़े हो रहे हैं, गाण्डीव धनुष हाथ से छूट रहा है और त्वचा जल रही है।
meanings.hinglish: Mera body kaanp raha hai, goosebumps aa rahe hain, haath se bow gir raha hai aur skin jal rahi hai.
meanings.marathi: माझे शरीर थरथरत आहे, रोमांच होत आहेत, गाण्डीव हातातून सुटत आहे आणि त्वचा जळत आहे.

core_meaning: Severe emotional stress can cause intense physical reactions, leading to loss of control and inability to act effectively
use_cases: panic attacks or extreme anxiety situations
embedding_text: panic and anxiety causing physical reactions, loss of control under stress, inability to act due to fear, body responses in extreme emotional situations, performance breakdown in high pressure

sanskrit: न च शक्नोम्यवस्थातुं भ्रमतीव च मे मनः । निमित्तानि च पश्यामि विपरीतानि केशव ॥
transliteration: na ca śaknomy avasthātuṁ bhramatīva ca me manaḥ nimittāni ca paśyāmi viparītāni keśava

meanings.english: I am unable to stand steady; my mind is spinning, and I see only negative signs, O Krishna.
meanings.hindi: मैं खड़ा भी नहीं रह पा रहा हूँ, मेरा मन भ्रमित हो रहा है और मुझे केवल अशुभ संकेत दिखाई दे रहे हैं, हे कृष्ण।
meanings.hinglish: Main khada bhi nahi reh paa raha, mera mind ghoom raha hai aur mujhe sab kuch negative hi dikh raha hai.
meanings.marathi: मी उभाही राहू शकत नाही, माझे मन भ्रमित झाले आहे आणि मला सर्व काही अशुभच दिसत आहे.

core_meaning: Extreme stress and emotional overload can distort perception, making everything seem negative and overwhelming
use_cases: seeing everything negatively in difficult situations
loss of clarity during emotional overwhelm
embedding_text: negative thinking due to stress and anxiety, mental confusion and panic, distorted perception in emotional overload, overthinking and hopelessness, inability to think clearly under pressure

sanskrit: न च श्रेयोऽनुपश्यामि हत्वा स्वजनमाहवे । न काङ्क्षे विजयं कृष्ण न च राज्यं सुखानि च ॥
transliteration: na ca śreyo ’nupaśyāmi hatvā sva-janam āhave na kāṅkṣe vijayaṁ kṛṣṇa na ca rājyaṁ sukhāni ca

meanings.english: I do not see any good in killing my own people in this battle, O Krishna. I do not desire victory, kingdom, or happiness.
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, अपने ही लोगों को मारकर मुझे कोई भलाई नहीं दिखती। मैं न विजय चाहता हूँ, न राज्य और न ही सुख।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, apne hi logon ko maarne me mujhe koi fayda nahi dikhta. Mujhe na jeet chahiye, na rajya, na sukh.
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, आपल्या लोकांना मारण्यात मला काहीही कल्याण दिसत नाही. मला विजय, राज्य किंवा सुख काहीच नको आहे.

core_meaning: In emotional conflict, people may reject external rewards (success, power, happiness) when they feel morally or emotionally conflicted
use_cases: rejecting success due to ethical concerns
loss of motivation due to emotional stress
embedding_text: moral dilemma in decision making, rejecting success due to emotional conflict, loss of motivation under stress, choosing values over rewards, questioning purpose of achievement

sanskrit: किं नो राज्येन गोविन्द किं भोगैर्जीवितेन वा । येषामर्थे काङ्क्षितं नो राज्यं भोगाः सुखानि च ॥
transliteration: kiṁ no rājyena govinda kiṁ bhogair jīvitena vā yeṣām arthe kāṅkṣitaṁ no rājyaṁ bhogāḥ sukhāni ca

meanings.english: O Krishna, what is the use of a kingdom, enjoyment, or even life itself, when those for whom we desire these are standing here on the battlefield?
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, जब वे लोग ही सामने खड़े हैं जिनके लिए हम राज्य, भोग और सुख चाहते हैं, तो इन सबका क्या उपयोग है?
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, jab jin logon ke liye hum ye sab chahte hain woh hi saamne khade hain, to phir rajya, sukh aur life ka kya fayda?
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, ज्यांच्यासाठी आपण राज्य, भोग आणि सुख इच्छितो तेच लोक समोर उभे असतील, तर त्याचा काय उपयोग?

core_meaning: Success and rewards lose meaning when the people or values they are meant for are no longer present or are harmed
use_cases: questioning purpose of success and achievements
realizing importance of relationships over material gain
embedding_text: meaning of success and purpose, value conflict between relationships and achievements, questioning material goals, importance of people over rewards, emotional reasoning in decisions

sanskrit: त इमेऽवस्थिता युद्धे प्राणांस्त्यक्त्वा धनानि च । आचार्याः पितरः पुत्रास्तथैव च पितामहाः ॥
transliteration: ta ime ’vasthitā yuddhe prāṇāṁs tyaktvā dhanāni ca ācāryāḥ pitaraḥ putrās tathaiva ca pitāmahāḥ

meanings.english: Those for whom we desire kingdom, enjoyment, and happiness are now standing here in battle, ready to give up their lives and wealth—teachers, fathers, sons, and grandfathers.
meanings.hindi: जिनके लिए हम राज्य, भोग और सुख चाहते हैं, वे ही यहाँ युद्ध में अपने प्राण और धन त्यागने के लिए खड़े हैं—गुरु, पिता, पुत्र और पितामह।
meanings.hinglish: Jinke liye hum ye sab chahte hain, wahi log yahan apni jaan dene ke liye ready khade hain—guru, father, sons aur grandfathers.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांच्यासाठी आपण राज्य, भोग आणि सुख इच्छितो तेच लोक येथे युद्धात आपले प्राण आणि धन देण्यासाठी उभे आहेत—गुरु, वडील, पुत्र आणि आजोबा.

core_meaning: When loved ones are directly involved in conflict, emotional attachment intensifies and makes decision-making even more difficult
use_cases: emotional difficulty in acting against close people
embedding_text: family and emotional conflict in decisions, attachment making decisions difficult, ethical dilemma involving loved ones, compassion and sadness in conflict situations, internal struggle between relationships and duty

sanskrit: मातुलाः श्वशुराः पौत्राः श्यालाः सम्बन्धिनस्तथा । एतान्न हन्तुमिच्छामि घ्नतोऽपि मधुसूदन ॥
transliteration: mātulāḥ śvaśurāḥ pautrāḥ śyālāḥ sambandhinas tathā etān na hantum icchāmi ghnato ’pi madhusūdana

meanings.english: I do not wish to kill these relatives—uncles, fathers-in-law, grandsons, brothers-in-law, and other kinsmen—even if they kill me, O Krishna.
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, मैं इन संबंधियों—मामा, ससुर, पौत्र, साले और अन्य रिश्तेदारों को मारना नहीं चाहता, भले ही वे मुझे मार दें।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, main in sab relatives ko nahi maarna chahta—even agar woh mujhe maar dein tab bhi.
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, मी या सर्व नातेवाईकांना—मामा, सासरे, नातू, मेहुणे आणि इतर संबंधी—मारू इच्छित नाही, जरी ते मला मारले तरीही.

core_meaning: Deep emotional attachment can lead to complete rejection of action, even when facing personal risk or opposition
use_cases: refusing to act due to emotional or ethical reasons
choosing relationships over personal safety or gain
non-violence or avoidance in conflict situations
embedding_text: refusing action due to emotional attachment, choosing relationships over conflict, moral and ethical refusal, compassion overriding logic, avoiding harm even at personal cost

sanskrit: अपि त्रैलोक्यराज्यस्य हेतोः किं नु महीकृते । निहत्य धार्तराष्ट्रान्नः का प्रीतिः स्याज्जनार्दन ॥
transliteration: api trailokya-rājyasya hetoḥ kiṁ nu mahī-kṛte nihatya dhārtarāṣṭrān naḥ kā prītiḥ syāj janārdana

meanings.english: O Krishna, even for the sovereignty of the three worlds, what pleasure would we gain by killing the sons of Dhritarashtra? What then to speak of ruling this earth?
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, तीनों लोकों के राज्य के लिए भी यदि हम धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्रों को मार दें, तो हमें क्या आनंद मिलेगा? फिर पृथ्वी के राज्य की तो बात ही क्या है?
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, agar teenon lok ka rajya bhi mil jaye, tab bhi apne logon ko maar kar kya fayda? Phir earth ka rajya to kuch bhi nahi hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, तीनही लोकांचे राज्य मिळाले तरी धृतराष्ट्राच्या पुत्रांना मारून आपल्याला काय आनंद मिळेल? मग पृथ्वीच्या राज्याचे काय महत्त्व?

core_meaning: No amount of success or power is worth achieving if it comes at the cost of harming loved ones or violating core values
use_cases: rejecting success due to strong personal values
ethical decision making over material gain
embedding_text: choosing values over power and success, rejecting unethical gains, moral conviction in decisions, questioning purpose of achievements, integrity over material rewards

sanskrit: पापमेवाश्रयेदस्मान्हत्वैतानाततायिनः । तस्मान्नार्हा वयं हन्तुं धार्तराष्ट्रान्सबान्धवान् । स्वजनं हि कथं हत्वा सुखिनः स्याम माधव ॥
transliteration: pāpam evāśrayed asmān hatvaitān ātatāyinaḥ tasmān nārhā vayaṁ hantuṁ dhārtarāṣṭrān sa-bāndhavān sva-janaṁ hi kathaṁ hatvā sukhinaḥ syāma mādhava

meanings.english: Sin will overcome us if we kill these aggressors. Therefore, it is not right for us to kill the sons of Dhritarashtra along with our relatives. How can we be happy after killing our own people, O Krishna?
meanings.hindi: इन आक्रमणकारियों को मारने पर भी हमें पाप ही लगेगा। इसलिए धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्रों और अपने संबंधियों को मारना उचित नहीं है। अपने ही लोगों को मारकर हम कैसे सुखी रह सकते हैं, हे कृष्ण?
meanings.hinglish: Agar hum inhe maarenge to paap lagega. Apne hi logon ko maar kar hum kaise happy reh sakte hain?
meanings.marathi: या आक्रमकांना मारले तरी आपल्यावर पाप येईल. त्यामुळे धृतराष्ट्राचे पुत्र आणि आपल्या नातलगांना मारणे योग्य नाही. आपल्या लोकांना मारून आपण कसे सुखी राहू शकतो?

core_meaning: Actions that violate moral values and harm loved ones lead to guilt and prevent true happiness, even if justified externally
use_cases: fear of guilt after making wrong decisions
ethical dilemmas involving harm to others
inner conflict about right and wrong
embedding_text: guilt and moral consequences of actions, ethical conflict involving harm to others, long term impact of wrong decisions, choosing morality over outcomes, inner struggle between right and wrong

sanskrit: यद्यप्येते न पश्यन्ति लोभोपहतचेतसः । कुलक्षयकृतं दोषं मित्रद्रोहे च पातकम् ॥
transliteration: yady apy ete na paśyanti lobhopahata-cetasaḥ kula-kṣaya-kṛtaṁ doṣaṁ mitra-drohe ca pātakam

meanings.english: Although they, whose minds are overcome by greed, do not see the fault in destroying families or the sin in betraying friends,
meanings.hindi: यद्यपि ये लोग लोभ से अंधे होकर कुल के नाश और मित्रों के साथ विश्वासघात के दोष को नहीं देखते,
meanings.hinglish: Chahe ye log greed ki wajah se family destruction aur betrayal ka nuksaan nahi samajh pa rahe ho,
meanings.marathi: जरी हे लोक लोभामुळे अंध झाले आहेत आणि कुलनाश व मित्रद्रोहाचा दोष पाहू शकत नाहीत,

core_meaning: Greed and self-interest can cloud judgment, preventing people from recognizing the long-term harm of their actions
use_cases: recognizing how greed affects decision making
embedding_text: greed clouding judgment and decision making, ethical awareness in difficult situations, recognizing long term consequences of selfish actions, moral clarity vs ignorance, identifying blind spots in thinking

sanskrit: कथं न ज्ञेयमस्माभिः पापादस्मान्निवर्तितुम् । कुलक्षयकृतं दोषं प्रपश्यद्भिर्जनार्दन ॥
transliteration: kathaṁ na jñeyam asmābhiḥ pāpād asmān nivartitum kula-kṣaya-kṛtaṁ doṣaṁ prapaśyadbhir janārdana

meanings.english: O Krishna, why should we not turn away from this sin, when we clearly see the evil in destroying our family?
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, जब हम कुल के नाश के दोष को स्पष्ट रूप से देख रहे हैं, तो हमें इस पाप से क्यों नहीं बचना चाहिए?
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, jab hume clearly pata hai ki ye galat hai, to phir hume is paap se bachna nahi chahiye?
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, जेव्हा आपण कुलनाशाचा दोष स्पष्टपणे पाहतो, तेव्हा आपण या पापापासून दूर का राहू नये?

core_meaning: When one is aware of the consequences of wrongdoing, there is a responsibility to avoid it, regardless of others' actions
use_cases: making ethical decisions even when others don’t
embedding_text: ethical responsibility and awareness, avoiding wrong actions despite pressure, acting with integrity and clarity, responsibility in decision making, moral leadership and conscious choices

sanskrit: कुलक्षये प्रणश्यन्ति कुलधर्माः सनातनाः । धर्मे नष्टे कुलं कृत्स्नमधर्मोऽभिभवत्युत ॥
transliteration: kula-kṣaye praṇaśyanti kula-dharmāḥ sanātanāḥ dharme naṣṭe kulaṁ kṛtsnam adharmo ’bhibhavaty uta

meanings.english: When a family is destroyed, its timeless traditions perish. With the loss of these values, irreligion prevails in the entire family.
meanings.hindi: जब कुल का नाश होता है, तो उसके सनातन धर्म नष्ट हो जाते हैं। धर्म के नष्ट होने पर पूरे कुल में अधर्म फैल जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab family system destroy hota hai, to uske values bhi khatam ho jaate hain, aur phir adharm (wrong behavior) spread ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: कुलाचा नाश झाल्यावर त्याचे सनातन धर्म नष्ट होतात आणि धर्म नष्ट झाल्यावर संपूर्ण कुलात अधर्म वाढतो.

core_meaning: The destruction of foundational values leads to a breakdown of systems, allowing disorder and unethical behavior to spread
use_cases: understanding importance of family or organizational values
impact of losing core principles in society
preventing system breakdown due to value loss
long-term consequences of ignoring traditions or ethics
embedding_text: loss of values leading to system breakdown, importance of traditions and ethics, spread of unethical behavior in absence of structure, maintaining values in society or organization, long term consequences of moral decline

sanskrit: अधर्माभिभवात्कृष्ण प्रदुष्यन्ति कुलस्त्रियः । स्त्रीषु दुष्टासु वार्ष्णेय जायते वर्णसङ्करः ॥
transliteration: adharmābhibhavāt kṛṣṇa praduṣyanti kula-striyaḥ strīṣu duṣṭāsu vārṣṇeya jāyate varṇa-saṅkaraḥ

meanings.english: With the rise of irreligion, O Krishna, the women of the family become corrupted, and when women are degraded, unwanted social disorder arises.
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, अधर्म के बढ़ने से कुल की स्त्रियाँ भ्रष्ट हो जाती हैं और जब स्त्रियाँ भ्रष्ट होती हैं, तब समाज में अव्यवस्था उत्पन्न होती है।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, jab adharm badhta hai to family system disturb hota hai, aur usse society me disorder create hota hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, अधर्म वाढल्याने कुलातील स्त्रिया दूषित होतात आणि त्यामुळे समाजात अव्यवस्था निर्माण होते.

core_meaning: When ethical foundations weaken, it leads to a chain reaction that disrupts social structure and stability
use_cases: understanding impact of moral decline in society
embedding_text: moral decline leading to social disorder, chain reaction of value breakdown, importance of maintaining ethical foundations, impact of losing structure in society, long term consequences of unethical behavior

sanskrit: सङ्करो नरकायैव कुलघ्नानां कुलस्य च । पतन्ति पितरो ह्येषां लुप्तपिण्डोदकक्रियाः ॥
transliteration: saṅkaro narakāyaiva kula-ghnānāṁ kulasya ca patanti pitaro hy eṣāṁ lupta-piṇḍodaka-kriyāḥ

meanings.english: Such social disorder leads the destroyers of the family and the family itself to hell. The ancestors also fall, as the traditional offerings to them cease.
meanings.hindi: ऐसी सामाजिक अव्यवस्था से कुल का नाश करने वाले और उनका कुल दोनों नरक में जाते हैं। उनके पितर भी पतित हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके लिए किए जाने वाले संस्कार समाप्त हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Aisi social disorder se na sirf family destroy hoti hai, balki unke ancestors ka bhi respect aur rituals khatam ho jaate hain.
meanings.marathi: अशा सामाजिक अव्यवस्थेमुळे कुलनाश करणारे आणि त्यांचे कुल नरकात जातात. त्यांच्या पितरांचेही पतन होते कारण त्यांच्या विधींचा लोप होतो.

core_meaning: The breakdown of values and traditions not only affects the present but also disrupts generational continuity and respect for the past
use_cases: understanding long-term impact of actions on future generations
importance of preserving traditions and values
embedding_text: long term generational consequences of actions, preserving traditions and values, intergenerational responsibility, impact of ethical breakdown on future and past, cultural continuity and responsibility

sanskrit: दोषैरेतैः कुलघ्नानां वर्णसङ्करकारकैः । उत्साद्यन्ते जातिधर्माः कुलधर्माश्च शाश्वताः ॥
transliteration: doṣair etaiḥ kula-ghnānāṁ varṇa-saṅkara-kārakaiḥ utsādyante jāti-dharmāḥ kula-dharmāś ca śāśvatāḥ

meanings.english: By these faults of those who destroy the family and create social disorder, the eternal duties of both family and society are lost.
meanings.hindi: इन दोषों के कारण, जो कुल का नाश करते हैं और सामाजिक अव्यवस्था उत्पन्न करते हैं, जाति और कुल के सनातन धर्म नष्ट हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: In galtiyon ki wajah se family aur society ke long-term values aur systems completely destroy ho jaate hain.
meanings.marathi: या दोषांमुळे, जे कुलनाश करतात आणि सामाजिक अव्यवस्था निर्माण करतात, जातिधर्म आणि कुलधर्म नष्ट होतात.

core_meaning: When destructive actions disrupt foundational systems, both family and societal structures lose their guiding principles and stability
use_cases: understanding breakdown of systems due to unethical actions
importance of preserving institutional and cultural values
impact of disruptive behavior in organizations
long-term societal consequences of poor decisions
embedding_text: collapse of family and societal systems due to unethical actions, importance of preserving values and traditions, long term impact of destructive behavior, maintaining structure and stability, consequences of breaking foundational systems

sanskrit: उत्सन्नकुलधर्माणां मनुष्याणां जनार्दन । नरके नियतं वासो भवतीत्यनुशुश्रुम ॥
transliteration: utsanna-kula-dharmāṇāṁ manuṣyāṇāṁ janārdana narake niyataṁ vāso bhavatīty anuśuśruma

meanings.english: O Krishna, we have heard that those whose family traditions are destroyed dwell in hell for a long time.
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण, हमने सुना है कि जिन लोगों के कुलधर्म नष्ट हो जाते हैं, वे लंबे समय तक नरक में रहते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, humne suna hai ki jinke family values destroy ho jaate hain, unka life long negative consequences me chala jata hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्ण, आम्ही ऐकले आहे की ज्यांचे कुलधर्म नष्ट होतात ते लोक दीर्घकाळ नरकात राहतात.

core_meaning: The loss of core values and traditions leads to long-term suffering and irreversible negative consequences
use_cases: understanding long-term consequences of ethical failure
importance of preserving values and traditions
fear of irreversible damage in decision making
learning from past wisdom and teachings
avoiding actions that lead to long-term harm
embedding_text: long term consequences of losing values and traditions, irreversible damage due to ethical failure, importance of preserving moral systems, learning from past teachings, avoiding harmful decisions

sanskrit: अहो बत महत्पापं कर्तुं व्यवसिता वयम् । यद्राज्यसुखलोभेन हन्तुं स्वजनमुद्यताः ॥
transliteration: aho bata mahat pāpaṁ kartuṁ vyavasitā vayam yad rājya-sukha-lobhena hantuṁ sva-janam udyatāḥ

meanings.english: Alas! We are determined to commit a great sin, driven by the desire for royal pleasures, by preparing to kill our own people.
meanings.hindi: हाय! हम कितने बड़े पाप को करने के लिए तैयार हो गए हैं, जो राज्य और सुख के लोभ में अपने ही लोगों को मारने को तैयार हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Hume realize ho raha hai ki hum kitni badi galti karne ja rahe hain—sirf rajya aur sukh ke liye apne hi logon ko maarne.
meanings.marathi: हाय! आपण किती मोठे पाप करायला निघालो आहोत—राज्य आणि सुखाच्या लोभासाठी आपल्या लोकांना मारायला तयार झालो आहोत.

core_meaning: Realization of one’s own flawed intentions can lead to deep regret, especially when driven by greed or desire
use_cases: realizing mistakes driven by greed or desire
learning from emotional or impulsive choices
correcting course after recognizing wrong intent
embedding_text: realization of mistakes due to greed, regret and guilt after wrong decisions, self awareness and reflection, ethical awakening, learning from poor judgment

sanskrit: यदि मामप्रतीकारमशस्त्रं शस्त्रपाणयः । धार्तराष्ट्रा रणे हन्युस्तन्मे क्षेमतरं भवेत् ॥
transliteration: yadi mām apratīkāram aśastraṁ śastra-pāṇayaḥ dhārtarāṣṭrā raṇe hanyus tan me kṣema-taraṁ bhavet

meanings.english: If the sons of Dhritarashtra, weapons in hand, kill me unarmed and unresisting in battle, that would be better for me.
meanings.hindi: यदि धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्र हथियार लेकर युद्ध में मुझे बिना प्रतिकार और बिना हथियार के मार दें, तो वह मेरे लिए अधिक कल्याणकारी होगा।
meanings.hinglish: Agar Kaurav mujhe bina fight kiye hi maar dein, to woh mere liye better hoga.
meanings.marathi: जर धृतराष्ट्राचे पुत्र मला शस्त्रांशिवाय आणि प्रतिकार न करता युद्धात मारतील, तर ते माझ्यासाठी अधिक योग्य ठरेल.

core_meaning: In extreme emotional conflict, a person may prefer avoidance or surrender over taking action, even at personal cost
embedding_text: emotional surrender and avoidance behavior, giving up under stress, decision paralysis and inaction, preferring loss over conflict, emotional shutdown in difficult situations

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच एवमुक्त्वार्जुनः संख्ये रथोपस्थ उपाविशत् । विसृज्य सशरं चापं शोकसंविग्नमानसः ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca evam uktvārjunaḥ saṅkhye rathopastha upāviśat visṛjya sa-śaraṁ cāpaṁ śoka-saṁvigna-mānasaḥ

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: Having spoken thus, Arjuna cast aside his bow and arrows and sat down on the chariot, his mind overwhelmed with grief.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: ऐसा कहकर अर्जुन ने अपने धनुष-बाण त्याग दिए और रथ पर बैठ गया, उसका मन शोक से व्याकुल था।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun ne apna bow aur arrows chhod diye aur rath par baith gaya, pura emotional breakdown ho gaya tha.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणतो: असे बोलून अर्जुनाने आपले धनुष्य-बाण सोडून दिले आणि रथावर बसला, त्याचे मन शोकाने व्याकुळ झाले होते.

core_meaning: When emotional overwhelm reaches its peak, it can lead to complete inaction and shutdown, requiring guidance for recovery
use_cases: importance of support systems in crisis
embedding_text: emotional shutdown and breakdown, grief and overwhelm leading to inaction, need for guidance after crisis, decision paralysis at peak stress, importance of support systems

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच । तं तथा कृपयाविष्टमश्रुपूर्णाकुलेक्षणम् । विषीदन्तमिदं वाक्यमुवाच मधुसूदनः ॥ १ ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca taṁ tathā kṛpayāviṣṭam aśru-pūrṇākulekṣaṇam viṣīdantam idaṁ vākyam uvāca madhusūdanaḥ

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: Seeing Arjuna full of compassion, his mind depressed, his eyes full of tears, Krishna (Madhusudana) spoke these words.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: अर्जुन को करुणा से व्याप्त, शोकयुक्त और अश्रुपूरित नेत्रों वाला देखकर भगवान मधुसूदन ने ये वचन कहे।
meanings.hinglish: Sanjaya ne kaha: Arjun ko itna emotional, dukhi aur rota hua dekh kar, Krishna ne usse ye baatein kahi.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणाला: अर्जुनाला करुणेने ग्रासलेले, डोळ्यांत अश्रू आणि अत्यंत दुःखी पाहून भगवान श्रीकृष्णांनी हे शब्द उच्चारले.

core_meaning: Being overwhelmed by emotion and sorrow in a moment of duty
use_cases: crying due to stress or confusion
feeling depressed when facing a hard task
losing clarity due to personal attachment
embedding_text: overwhelmed by compassion and grief, eyes full of tears, mind depressed in crisis, losing clarity due to emotions, Arjuna's lamentation before Krishna

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । कुतस्त्वा कश्मलमिदं विषमे समुपस्थितम् । अनार्यजुष्टमस्वर्ग्यकीर्तिकरमर्जुन ॥ २ ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca kutas tvā kaśmalam idaṁ viṣame samupasthitam anārya-juṣṭam asvargyam akīrti-karam arjuna

meanings.english: The Supreme Lord said: My dear Arjuna, how has this impurity come upon you in this hour of crisis? It is not befitting a noble person; it leads not to heaven but to infamy.
meanings.hindi: श्री भगवान ने कहा: हे अर्जुन! इस संकट के समय तुम्हारे मन में यह मोह (अशुद्धि) कहाँ से आया? यह श्रेष्ठ पुरुषों के योग्य नहीं है, और न ही यह स्वर्ग या कीर्ति दिलाने वाला है।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan ne kaha: Arjun, is mushkil time pe ye kamzori tere andar kahan se aayi? Ye tere jaise noble insaan ko suit nahi karti aur isse teri badnami hogi.
meanings.marathi: श्री भगवान म्हणाले: हे अर्जुना, या संकटकाळी तुझ्या मनात हा मोह कोठून आला? हे श्रेष्ठ पुरुषांना शोभणारे नाही आणि यामुळे कीर्ती किंवा स्वर्ग प्राप्त होत नाही.

core_meaning: Confronting weakness and impurities that arise during a crisis
use_cases: acting out of character during stress
giving up when things get tough
impurity of thought in a critical moment
facing criticism for running away from duty
realizing that cowardice leads to a bad reputation
embedding_text: impurity in hour of crisis, unbefitting a noble man, leading to infamy not heaven, Krishna questioning Arjuna's weakness, facing tough times with the wrong mindset

sanskrit: क्ल‍ैब्यं मा स्म गमः पार्थ नैतत्त्वय्युपपद्यते । क्षुद्रं हृदयदौर्बल्यं त्यक्त्वोत्तिष्ठ परन्तप ॥ ३ ॥
transliteration: klaibyaṁ mā sma gamaḥ pārtha naitat tvayy upapadyate kṣudraṁ hṛdaya-daurbalyaṁ tyaktvottiṣṭha paran-tapa

meanings.english: O son of Pritha, do not yield to this degrading impotence. It does not befit you. Give up such petty weakness of heart and arise, O scorcher of enemies!
meanings.hindi: हे पृथापुत्र! इस नपुंसकता को प्राप्त मत हो, यह तुम्हें शोभा नहीं देता। हृदय की इस तुच्छ कमजोरी को त्याग कर युद्ध के लिए खड़े हो जाओ।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun, ye buzinepanti (weakness) mat dikhao, ye tumhe suit nahi karta. Dil ki is chhoti si kamzori ko chhodo aur khade ho jao.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुना, या नपुंसकतेला बळी पडू नकोस, हे तुला शोभत नाही. हृदयाचा हा तुच्छ कमकुवतपणा सोडून दे आणि युद्धासाठी उभा राहा.

core_meaning: A call to action and overcoming internal weakness or fear
use_cases: needing a push to stop being weak
motivation to stand up and face challenges
finding inner strength when feeling paralyzed
embedding_text: do not yield to impotence, petty weakness of heart, arise and act, overcoming internal fear, Krishna's direct call to Arjuna to fight

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । कथं भीष्ममहं संख्ये द्रोणं च मधुसूदन । इषुभिः प्रतियोत्स्यामि पूजार्हावरिसूदन ॥ ४ ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca kathaṁ bhīṣmam ahaṁ saṅkhye droṇaṁ ca madhusūdana iṣubhiḥ pratiyotsyāmi pūjārhāv ari-sūdana

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O killer of Madhu, how can I counter-attack with arrows in battle men like Bhishma and Drona, who are worthy of my worship?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे मधुसूदन! मैं युद्ध में भीष्म पितामह और द्रोणाचार्य जैसे पूजनीय व्यक्तियों पर बाणों से कैसे प्रहार कर सकता हूँ?
meanings.hinglish: Arjun bola: Krishna, main Bhishma aur Drona jaise logon par kaise hamla kar sakta hoon jinko mujhe respect deni chahiye?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: हे मधुसूदना, जे माझ्यासाठी पूजनीय आहेत अशा भीष्म आणि द्रोणाचार्यांवर मी युद्धात बाणांनी कसा हल्ला करू?

core_meaning: Conflict between personal respect/relationships and professional duty
use_cases: struggling to go against a mentor or elder
conflict between family and work duty
feeling guilty about competing with respected figures
difficulty in setting boundaries with elders
embedding_text: how to fight worshipable superiors, arrows against Bhishma and Drona, ethical dilemma in duty, personal respect vs professional requirement, Arjuna's hesitation to fight elders

sanskrit: गुरूनहत्वा हि महानुभावान् श्रेयो भोक्तुं भैक्ष्यमपीह लोके । हत्वार्थकामांस्तु गुरूनिहैव भुञ्जीय भोगान्रुधिरप्रदिग्धान् ॥ ५ ॥
transliteration: gurūn ahatvā hi mahānubhāvān śreyo bhoktuṁ bhaikṣyam apīha loke hatvārtha-kāmāṁs tu gurūn ihaiva bhuñjīya bhogān rudhira-pradigdhān

meanings.english: It would be better to live in this world by begging than to live at the cost of the lives of great souls who are my teachers. If they are killed, everything we enjoy will be tainted with blood.
meanings.hindi: अपने गुरुजनों और महानुभावों को मारने से अच्छा है कि मैं इस संसार में भीख मांग कर अपना जीवन बिताऊँ। यदि मैं उन्हें मारता हूँ, तो हमारा हर सुख खून से सना होगा।
meanings.hinglish: Apne gurus ko maarne se accha hai ki main bheekh maang kar reh loon. Agar unhe maar kar mujhe raaj-paat mila bhi, toh wo sab khoon se sana hoga.
meanings.marathi: माझ्या थोर गुरूंना मारण्यापेक्षा या जगात भिक्षा मागून जगणे मला अधिक श्रेयस्कर वाटते. त्यांना मारून मिळालेले सर्व भोग हे रक्ताने माखलेले असतील.

core_meaning: Moral conflict regarding achieving success at the cost of harming respected figures
use_cases: feeling that success is not worth the harm it causes others
struggling with professional competition against mentors
remorse over potential actions that hurt loved ones
embedding_text: better to beg than kill teachers, enjoyment tainted with blood, moral dilemma of worldly gain vs ethics, Arjuna's respect for Drona and Bhishma, avoiding success through violence

sanskrit: न चैतद्विद्मः कतरन्नो गरीयो यद्वा जयेम यदि वा नो जयेयुः । यानेव हत्वा न जिजीविषामस्तेऽवस्थिताः प्रमुखे धार्तराष्ट्राः ॥ ६ ॥
transliteration: na caitad vidmaḥ kataran no garīyo yad vā jayema yadi vā no jayeyuḥ yān eva hatvā na jijīviṣāmas te ’vasthitāḥ pramukhe dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ

meanings.english: Nor do we know which is better—conquering them or being conquered by them. If we killed them, we would not care to live, yet they stand before us now.
meanings.hindi: हमें यह भी नहीं पता कि हमारे लिए क्या बेहतर है—उन्हें जीतना या उनसे हार जाना। जिन्हें मारकर हम जीना भी नहीं चाहते, वही धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्र हमारे सामने खड़े हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Hume nahi pata ki kya sahi hai—jeetna ya haarna. Jinhe maar kar hum jeena bhi nahi chahte, wahi saamne khade hain.
meanings.marathi: आम्हाला हे देखील माहित नाही की आमच्यासाठी काय श्रेष्ठ आहे—त्यांच्यावर विजय मिळवणे की त्यांनी आमच्यावर विजय मिळवणे. ज्यांना मारून आम्हाला जगण्याची इच्छा नाही, तेच समोर उभे आहेत.

core_meaning: Extreme indecision and the feeling that victory might be as bad as defeat
use_cases: not knowing if winning a fight is worth the loss of relationship
feeling that both options in a situation are bad
paralysis by analysis during a crisis
questioning the value of a goal when it involves personal loss
total confusion about the right course of action
embedding_text: uncertainty of victory or defeat, better to win or lose, no desire to live after killing kinsmen, paralysis of decision making, Arjuna's confusion on the battlefield

sanskrit: कार्पण्यदोषोपहतस्वभावः पृच्छामि त्वां धर्मसम्मूढचेताः । यच्छ्रेयः स्यान्निश्चितं ब्रूहि तन्मे शिष्यस्तेऽहं शाधि मां त्वां प्रपन्नम् ॥ ७ ॥
transliteration: kārpaṇya-doṣopahata-svabhāvaḥ pṛcchāmi tvāṁ dharma-sammūḍha-cetāḥ yac chreyaḥ syān niścitaṁ brūhi tan me śiṣyas te ’haṁ śādhi māṁ tvāṁ prapannam

meanings.english: I am confused about my duty and have lost all composure because of weakness. I am Your disciple and a soul surrendered unto You. Please instruct me.
meanings.hindi: कायरता रूपी दोष से मेरा स्वभाव ढँक गया है और मैं धर्म के विषय में मोहित हूँ। मैं आपका शिष्य हूँ और आपकी शरण में हूँ, कृपया मुझे निश्चित रूप से बताएं कि मेरे लिए क्या श्रेयस्कर है।
meanings.hinglish: Main confuse ho gaya hoon aur apni himmat kho chuka hoon. Main aapka student ban kar aapki sharan me hoon, please mujhe guide kariye ki mere liye kya best hai.
meanings.marathi: कायरतेमुळे माझा स्वभाव भ्रमिष्ट झाला आहे आणि कर्तव्याच्या बाबतीत मी गोंधळलो आहे. मी आपला शिष्य आहे आणि आपल्याला शरण आलो आहे, जे माझ्यासाठी हिताचे आहे ते मला सांगा.

core_meaning: The pivotal moment of total surrender to a teacher/mentor for guidance
use_cases: seeking mentorship when stuck in life
admitting one's own confusion and weakness
asking for clear direction in a complex situation
surrendering ego to learn from a master
needing an expert's advice to resolve an internal conflict
embedding_text: confused about duty, surrendered as a disciple, tell me what is best, kārpaṇya doṣa, seeking instruction from Krishna, turning point from friend to disciple

sanskrit: न हि प्रपश्यामि ममापनुद्याद् यच्छोकमुच्छोषणमिन्द्रियाणाम् । अवाप्य भूभावसपत्‍नमृद्धं राज्यं सुराणामपि चाधिपत्यम् ॥ ८ ॥
transliteration: na hi prapaśyāmi mamāpanudyād yac chokam ucchoṣaṇam indriyāṇām avāpya bhūmāv asapatnam ṛddhaṁ rājyaṁ surāṇām api cādhipatyam

meanings.english: I find no means to drive away this grief which is drying up my senses, even if I win an unrivaled kingdom on earth or supremacy like the gods in heaven.
meanings.hindi: मुझे ऐसा कोई उपाय नहीं सूझ रहा जो मेरी इन्द्रियों को सुखाने वाले इस शोक को दूर कर सके, चाहे मुझे पृथ्वी का निष्कंटक राज्य मिले या स्वर्ग का आधिपत्य।
meanings.hinglish: Mujhe koi rasta nahi dikh raha jo mere is dukh ko khatam kar sake, bhale hi mujhe puri duniya ka raja bana diya jaye ya swarg mil jaye.
meanings.marathi: माझ्या इंद्रियांना सुकवून टाकणारा हा शोक दूर होईल असा कोणताही मार्ग मला दिसत नाही, मग मला पृथ्वीवरचे निष्कंटक राज्य मिळो किंवा देवांचे अधिपत्य मिळो.

core_meaning: Material success cannot cure deep internal emotional pain or existential grief
use_cases: feeling empty despite having money or success
realizing that external achievements don't fix internal sadness
intense emotional pain that physical comfort cannot heal
grief that feels like it's consuming one's senses
seeking spiritual peace over material gains
embedding_text: grief drying up the senses, material success cannot cure sorrow, kingdom on earth vs internal peace, unrivaled prosperity cannot stop lamentation, need for higher solution

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच । एवमुक्त्वा हृषीकेशं गुडाकेशः परन्तपः । न योत्स्य इति गोविन्दमुक्त्वा तूष्णीं बभूव ह ॥ ९ ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca evam uktvā hṛṣīkeśaṁ guḍākeśaḥ paran-tapaḥ na yotsya iti govindam uktvā tūṣṇīṁ babhūva ha

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: Having spoken thus, Arjuna, the chastiser of enemies, told Krishna, 'Govinda, I shall not fight,' and fell silent.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: शत्रुता का दमन करने वाले अर्जुन ने हृषीकेश (कृष्ण) से 'हे गोविन्द, मैं युद्ध नहीं करूँगा' ऐसा कहकर मौन धारण कर लिया।
meanings.hinglish: Sanjaya ne kaha: Arjun ne Krishna se kaha, 'Govinda, main nahi ladunga,' aur itna bol kar wo ekdum chup ho gaya.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणाला: शत्रूंचा नाश करणाऱ्या अर्जुनाने श्रीकृष्णांना 'हे गोविंदा, मी युद्ध करणार नाही' असे सांगितले आणि तो शांत झाला.

core_meaning: Total withdrawal and declaration of non-action due to emotional overwhelm
use_cases: shutting down during a difficult conversation
giving up on a task due to lack of clarity
declaring 'I can't do this' in a high-pressure situation
choosing silence after expressing deep distress
moments of complete mental and physical withdrawal
embedding_text: Arjuna says I shall not fight, falling silent before Krishna, na yotsya iti, Govinda, total resignation, withdrawal from duty, emotional shutdown

sanskrit: तमुवाच हृषीकेशः प्रहसन्निव भारत । सेनयोरुभयोर्मध्ये विषीदन्तमिदं वचः ॥ १० ॥
transliteration: tam uvāca hṛṣीkeśaḥ prahasann iva bhārata senayor ubhayor madhye viṣīdantam idaṁ vacaḥ

meanings.english: O descendant of Bharata, at that time Krishna, smiling, in the midst of both the armies, spoke the following words to the grief-stricken Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे धृतराष्ट्र! उस समय दोनों सेनाओं के बीच शोकग्रस्त अर्जुन को भगवान कृष्ण ने मुस्कुराते हुए ये वचन कहे।
meanings.hinglish: Dono armies ke beech me khade hokar, Krishna ne muskurate hue dukh me doobe Arjun se ye baatein kahi.
meanings.marathi: हे धृतराष्ट्रा, दोन्ही सैन्यांच्या मध्यभागी शोक करणाऱ्या अर्जुनाला भगवान श्रीकृष्णांनी हसतमुखाने हे शब्द उच्चारले.

core_meaning: The presence of calm wisdom and a lighthearted smile in the face of intense grief
use_cases: maintaining a calm smile when others are panicking
a mentor's gentle approach to a student's distress
the transition from emotional talk to serious guidance
finding a balanced perspective in a high-stress environment
the importance of a composed leader during a crisis
embedding_text: Krishna smiling in the midst of armies, speaking to grief-stricken Arjuna, composure in crisis, teacher's perspective on student's sorrow, transition to wisdom

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अशोच्यानन्वशोचस्त्वं प्रज्ञावादांश्च भाषसे । गतासूनगतासूंश्च नानुश‍ोचन्ति पण्डिताः ॥ ११ ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca aśocyān anvaśocas tvaṁ prajñā-vādāṁś ca bhāṣase gatāsūn agatāsūmś ca nānuśocanti paṇḍitāḥ

meanings.english: The Supreme Lord said: While speaking learned words, you are mourning for what is not worthy of grief. Those who are wise lament neither for the living nor for the dead.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: तुम विद्वानों जैसी बातें तो कर रहे हो, लेकिन शोक उनके लिए कर रहे हो जो शोक के योग्य नहीं हैं। बुद्धिमान व्यक्ति न जीवितों के लिए शोक करते हैं और न ही मृतकों के लिए।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan ne kaha: Tum baatein toh badi-badi kar rahe ho par dukh un cheezon ka kar rahe ho jo dukh ke layak hi nahi hain. Samajhdar log na toh jeene walon ka dukh karte hain na marne walon ka.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: तू विद्वानांसारखे बोलत आहेस, पण ज्या गोष्टीं बद्दल शोक करणे योग्य नाही त्यांच्यासाठी शोक करत आहेस. ज्ञानी लोक जिवंत किंवा मृत कोणासाठीही शोक करत नाहीत.

core_meaning: Distinguishing between superficial intellectualism and actual spiritual wisdom
use_cases: correcting someone who is overthinking or worrying unnecessarily
shifting focus from the temporary body to the eternal truth
overcoming grief by understanding the cycle of life and death
realizing that logic without depth can lead to more confusion
dealing with loss using a philosophical mindset
embedding_text: mourning for what is not worthy of grief, wise do not lament for living or dead, superficial vs deep knowledge, Krishna's first instruction on grief, the perspective of a pandit

sanskrit: न त्वेवाहं जातु नासं न त्वं नेमे जनाधिपाः । न चैव न भविष्यामः सर्वे वयमतः परम् ॥ १२ ॥
transliteration: na tv evāhaṁ jātu nāsaṁ na tvaṁ neme janādhipāḥ na caiva na bhaviṣyāmaḥ sarve vayam ataḥ param

meanings.english: Never was there a time when I did not exist, nor you, nor all these kings; nor in the future shall any of us cease to be.
meanings.hindi: ऐसा कभी नहीं हुआ कि मैं न रहा हूँ, या तुम न रहे हो, या ये समस्त राजा न रहे हों; और न ही भविष्य में हम में से कोई समाप्त होगा।
meanings.hinglish: Aisa koi waqt nahi tha jab main, tum ya ye raja nahi the; aur na hi aisa koi waqt aayega jab hum nahi rahenge. Hum sab hamesha se hain aur hamesha rahenge.
meanings.marathi: अशी कोणतीही वेळ नव्हती जेव्हा मी नव्हतो, किंवा तू नव्हतास, किंवा हे राजे नव्हते; आणि भविष्यातही आपण सर्वजण राहणार नाही असे कधीही होणार नाही.

core_meaning: The concept of the eternal nature of the soul and individual existence
use_cases: understanding the continuity of life beyond the physical body
coping with the loss of a loved one by recognizing their eternal nature
finding stability in the idea of permanent existence
embedding_text: eternity of the soul, we all existed in the past and will exist in the future, individuality is eternal, overcoming fear of non-existence, Krishna's teaching on the soul's permanence

sanskrit: देहिनोऽस्मिन्यथा देहे कौमारं यौवनं जरा । तथा देहान्तरप्राप्तिर्धीरस्तत्र न मुह्यति ॥ १३ ॥
transliteration: dehino ’smin yathā deहे kaumāraṁ yauvanaṁ jarā tathā dehāntara-prāptir dhīras tatra na muhyati

meanings.english: As the embodied soul continuously passes, in this body, from boyhood to youth to old age, the soul similarly passes into another body at death. A sober person is not bewildered by such a change.
meanings.hindi: जैसे इस देह में देहधारी आत्मा बचपन, युवावस्था और वृद्धावस्था से गुजरती है, वैसे ही मृत्यु के समय आत्मा दूसरे शरीर में प्रवेश करती है। धीर व्यक्ति ऐसे परिवर्तन से भ्रमित नहीं होता।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise hum bacche se jawaan aur phir boodhe hote hain, waise hi soul ek body se dusri body me chali jaati hai. Jo samajhdar log hain wo is badlav se pareshan nahi hote.
meanings.marathi: ज्याप्रमाणे देहधारी आत्मा या शरीरात बालपण, तारुण्य आणि वृद्धत्वातून प्रवास करतो, त्याचप्रमाणे मृत्यूच्या वेळी आत्मा दुसऱ्या शरीरात प्रवेश करतो. ज्ञानी पुरुष या बदलामुळे मोहित होत नाही.

core_meaning: The soul is constant while the body undergoes continuous transformation and eventual replacement
use_cases: understanding aging as a natural process
coping with the death of a loved one by recognizing the soul's journey
realizing that the 'I' remains the same even as the body changes
overcoming the mid-life crisis or fear of growing old
maintaining stability during major life transitions
embedding_text: soul passing from boyhood to youth to old age, transmigration of soul, dhira is not bewildered, body changes but soul is constant, perspective on death and aging

sanskrit: मात्रास्पर्शास्तु कौन्तेय शीतोष्णसुखदुःखदाः । आगमापायिनोऽनित्यास्तांस्तितिक्षस्व भारत ॥ १४ ॥
transliteration: mātrā-sparśās tu kaunteya śītoṣṇa-sukha-duḥkha-dāḥ āgamāpāyino ’nityās tāṁs titikṣasva bhārata

meanings.english: O son of Kunti, the nonpermanent appearance of happiness and distress, and their disappearance in due course, are like the appearance and disappearance of winter and summer seasons. One must learn to tolerate them.
meanings.hindi: हे कुन्तीपुत्र! सुख और दुख का क्षणिक आना-जाना सर्दी और गर्मी की ऋतुओं के आने-जाने के समान है। वे इन्द्रिय बोध से उत्पन्न होते हैं, और मनुष्य को उन्हें बिना विचलित हुए सहना सीखना चाहिए।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun, sukh aur dukh ka aana-jaana mausam ki tarah hai, jaise garmi aur sardi aati-jaati rehti hai. Ye permanent nahi hain, isliye inko bardasht karna seekho.
meanings.marathi: हे कुंतीपुत्रा, सुख आणि दुःखाचे येणे-जाणे हे हिवाळा आणि उन्हाळ्याच्या ऋतूंप्रमाणे तात्पुरते असते. ती इंद्रियांच्या अनुभवातून निर्माण होतात, म्हणून ती सहन करायला शिकले पाहिजे.

core_meaning: Emotional and physical fluctuations are temporary and should be met with endurance
use_cases: dealing with temporary setbacks and successes
managing mood swings or emotional highs and lows
building mental toughness during physical discomfort
reminding oneself that 'this too shall pass'
staying focused on duty regardless of comfort
embedding_text: happiness and distress like winter and summer, temporary nature of emotions, sense perception, titiksasva, learning to tolerate temporary fluctuations

sanskrit: यं हि न व्यथयन्त्येते पुरुषं पुरुषर्षभ । समदुःखसुखं धीरं सोऽमृतत्वाय कल्पते ॥ १५ ॥
transliteration: yaṁ hi na vyathayanty ete puruṣaṁ puruṣarṣabha sama-duḥkha-sukhaṁ dhīraṁ so ’mṛtatvāya kalpate

meanings.english: O best among men, the person who is not disturbed by happiness and distress and is steady in both is certainly eligible for liberation.
meanings.hindi: हे पुरुषश्रेष्ठ! जो व्यक्ति सुख और दुख में विचलित नहीं होता और दोनों में समान रहता है, वह निश्चित रूप से मोक्ष का पात्र है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan sukh aur dukh dono me steady rehta hai aur disturb nahi hota, wahi asli kamyabi ya moksha tak pahunch sakta hai.
meanings.marathi: हे पुरुषश्रेष्ठा, जो मनुष्य सुख आणि दुःखाने विचलित होत नाही आणि दोघांमध्ये स्थिर राहतो, तोच मोक्षासाठी पात्र ठरतो.

core_meaning: Steadfastness in all conditions is the key to spiritual and mental liberation
use_cases: preparing for high-level leadership requiring cool-headedness
reducing over-excitement in success and over-depression in failure
seeking long-term peace over short-term pleasure
embedding_text: steady in happiness and distress, eligible for liberation, dhira person, internal stability, overcoming the duality of life

sanskrit: नासतो विद्यते भावो नाभावो विद्यते सतः । उभयोरपि दृष्टोऽन्तस्त्वनयोस्तत्त्वदर्शिभिः ॥ १६ ॥
transliteration: nāsato vidyate bhāvo nābhāvo vidyate sataḥ ubhayor api dṛṣṭo ’ntas tv anayos tattva-darśibhiḥ

meanings.english: The seers of the truth have concluded that of the nonexistent [the material body] there is no endurance and of the eternal [the soul] there is no change.
meanings.hindi: तत्त्वदर्शियों ने यह निष्कर्ष निकाला है कि जो असत्य (शरीर) है उसका कोई स्थायित्व नहीं है, और जो सत्य (आत्मा) है उसमें कोई परिवर्तन नहीं होता।
meanings.hinglish: Sach jaanne walon ne kaha hai ki jo temporary hai (body) wo hamesha nahi rahega, aur jo permanent hai (soul) wo kabhi badalta nahi.
meanings.marathi: सत्य जाणणाऱ्यांनी असा निष्कर्ष काढला आहे की, जे असत्य (नाशवंत शरीर) आहे त्याला अस्तित्व नाही आणि जे सत्य (आत्मा) आहे त्याचा कधीही अभाव होत नाही.

core_meaning: The distinction between the temporary material world and the eternal spiritual reality
use_cases: distinguishing between what matters long-term vs short-term
not getting too attached to physical appearance or possessions
finding security in the unchanging soul
reducing anxiety about the decay of material things
embedding_text: non-existent has no endurance, eternal has no change, nature of soul vs body, seers of truth, sat vs asat

sanskrit: अविनाशि तु तद्विद्धि येन सर्वमिदं ततम् । विनाशमव्ययस्यास्य न कश्चित्कर्तुमर्हति ॥ १७ ॥
transliteration: avināśi tu tad viddhi yena sarvam idaṁ tatam vināśam avyayasyāsya na kaścit kartum arhati

meanings.english: Know that which pervades the entire body to be indestructible. No one is able to destroy that imperishable soul.
meanings.hindi: उसे अविनाशी समझो जिससे यह सारा शरीर व्याप्त है। उस अविनाशी आत्मा को नष्ट करने में कोई भी समर्थ नहीं है।
meanings.hinglish: Samajh lo ki jo tumhare pure sharir me faila hua hai (consciousness/soul), usey koi khatam nahi kar sakta. Wo amar hai.
meanings.marathi: ज्याने हे सर्व शरीर व्यापलेले आहे, त्याला अविनाशी समज. त्या अव्यय आत्म्याचा नाश करण्यास कोणीही समर्थ नाही.

core_meaning: Consciousness as the symptom of the indestructible soul pervading the body
use_cases: feeling spiritually secure against physical threats
understanding that the core of our being cannot be harmed
meditation on the all-pervasive nature of the soul in the body
embedding_text: soul is indestructible, pervades entire body, consciousness as symptom, imperishable soul, no one can destroy the soul

sanskrit: अन्तवन्त इमे देहा नित्यस्योक्ताः शरीरिणः । अनाशिनोऽप्रमेयस्य तस्माद्युध्यस्व भारत ॥ १८ ॥
transliteration: antavanta ime dehā nityasyoktāḥ śarīriṇaḥ anāśino ’prameyasya tasmād yudhyasva bhārata

meanings.english: The material body of the indestructible and eternal living entity is sure to come to an end; therefore, fight, O descendant of Bharata.
meanings.hindi: अविनाशी और अनंत जीवात्मा के ये भौतिक शरीर नाशवान हैं; इसलिए हे भरतवंशी, युद्ध करो।
meanings.hinglish: Ye body toh khatam honi hi hai, par soul hamesha rahegi. Isliye bina dare apne farz ko pura karo aur laddo.
meanings.marathi: अविनाशी आणि अनंत अशा आत्म्याचे हे शरीर नाशवंत आहे; म्हणून हे अर्जुना, तू युद्ध कर.

core_meaning: The inevitability of bodily death should not prevent one from performing their duty
use_cases: taking necessary risks for a higher cause
not letting health anxieties stop important work
understanding the timeline of the material body
finding motivation to act in a crisis
embedding_text: body is perishable, soul is eternal and immeasurable, therefore fight, performing duty despite bodily loss, Krishna's call to action

sanskrit: य एनं वेत्ति हन्तारं यश्चैनं मन्यते हतम् । उभौ तौ न विजानीतो नायं हन्ति न हन्यते ॥ १९ ॥
transliteration: ya enaṁ vetti hantāraṁ yaś cainaṁ manyate hatam ubhau tau na vijānīto nāyṁ hanti na hanyate

meanings.english: Neither he who thinks the living entity the slayer nor he who thinks it slain is in knowledge, for the self slays not nor is slain.
meanings.hindi: जो आत्मा को मारने वाला समझता है और जो इसे मरा हुआ मानता है, वे दोनों ही नहीं जानते, क्योंकि आत्मा न तो किसी को मारती है और न ही किसी के द्वारा मारी जाती है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo soche ki soul marti hai ya maar sakti hai, wo galat hai. Soul na marti hai na maari jaati hai.
