core_meaning: True wisdom guides others gently through example rather than confusing or forcing them
use_cases: leading by example instead of forcing
guiding people in workplace or family
embedding_text: guiding others through example not confusion, patient leadership and mentoring, teaching without overwhelming, empathy in leadership, helping others learn through action, gentle guidance approach

sanskrit: प्रकृतेः क्रियमाणानि गुणैः कर्माणि सर्वशः । अहङ्कारविमूढात्मा कर्ताहमिति मन्यते ॥
transliteration: prakṛteḥ kriyamāṇāni guṇaiḥ karmāṇi sarvaśaḥ ahaṅkāra-vimūḍhātmā kartāham iti manyate

meanings.english: All actions are carried out by the qualities of nature, but one whose mind is deluded by ego thinks, 'I am the doer.'
meanings.hindi: सभी कर्म प्रकृति के गुणों द्वारा किए जाते हैं, लेकिन अहंकार से भ्रमित व्यक्ति सोचता है कि 'मैं ही कर्ता हूँ।'
meanings.hinglish: Sab actions nature ke through hote hain, par ego wala insaan sochta hai ki 'maine hi sab kiya hai'.
meanings.marathi: सर्व कर्म प्रकृतीच्या गुणांद्वारे होतात, पण अहंकाराने भ्रमित मनुष्य 'मीच कर्ता आहे' असे मानतो.

core_meaning: Ego creates the illusion that we are the sole doers, ignoring the larger forces influencing our actions
use_cases: ego issues in success or failure
lack of awareness about external influences
embedding_text: ego and illusion of control, thinking I am the only doer, understanding external influences on actions, humility and self awareness, overcoming ego in success and failure, balanced mindset about achievements

sanskrit: तत्त्ववित्तु महाबाहो गुणकर्मविभागयोः । गुणा गुणेषु वर्तन्त इति मत्वा न सज्जते ॥
transliteration: tattva-vit tu mahā-bāho guṇa-karma-vibhāgayoḥ guṇā guṇeṣu vartanta iti matvā na sajjate

meanings.english: But one who understands the truth about the divisions of qualities and actions knows that the senses act upon the sense objects, and therefore does not become attached.
meanings.hindi: हे महाबाहो, जो व्यक्ति गुण और कर्म के भेद को जानता है, वह समझता है कि गुण ही गुणों में प्रवृत्त होते हैं, इसलिए वह आसक्त नहीं होता।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan samajhta hai ki actions aur reactions nature ke through ho rahe hain, wo attach nahi hota aur balanced rehta hai.
meanings.marathi: हे महाबाहो, जो मनुष्य गुण आणि कर्म यांचा भेद समजतो, तो जाणतो की गुणच गुणांमध्ये कार्य करतात आणि त्यामुळे तो आसक्त होत नाही.

core_meaning: Understanding the true nature of actions removes attachment and brings inner balance
use_cases: not getting emotionally attached to outcomes
embedding_text: understanding nature of actions and reactions, staying detached and calm, reducing emotional attachment, balanced mindset and clarity, awareness of behavior and responses, avoiding overreaction and stress

sanskrit: प्रकृतेर्गुणसम्मूढाः सज्जन्ते गुणकर्मसु । तानकृत्स्नविदो मन्दान्कृत्स्नविन्न विचालयेत् ॥
transliteration: prakṛter guṇa-sammūḍhāḥ sajjante guṇa-karmasu tān akṛtsna-vido mandān kṛtsna-vin na vicālayet

meanings.english: Those who are deluded by the qualities of nature become attached to their actions. The wise should not disturb the understanding of such people who lack complete knowledge.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग प्रकृति के गुणों से मोहित हैं, वे अपने कर्मों में आसक्त हो जाते हैं। ज्ञानी को चाहिए कि वह ऐसे अज्ञान लोगों को विचलित न करे।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log nature ke influence me aakar actions me attach ho jate hain, unhe disturb nahi karna chahiye; wise log unhe gently guide karte hain.
meanings.marathi: जे लोक प्रकृतीच्या गुणांनी मोहित होतात, ते कर्मांमध्ये आसक्त होतात. ज्ञानी व्यक्तीने अशा अज्ञान लोकांना विचलित करू नये.

core_meaning: People act based on their nature and understanding; the wise should guide them patiently without disturbing them
use_cases: dealing with people who think differently
embedding_text: people act based on their nature and understanding, patience and empathy in dealing with others, not forcing opinions on others, guiding without disturbing, tolerance and understanding differences, handling ignorance wisely

sanskrit: मयि सर्वाणि कर्माणि सन्न्यस्याध्यात्मचेतसा । निराशीर्निर्ममो भूत्वा युध्यस्व विगतज्वरः ॥
transliteration: mayi sarvāṇi karmāṇi sannyasyādhyātma-cetasā nirāśīr nirmamo bhūtvā yudhyasva vigata-jvaraḥ

meanings.english: Dedicate all your actions to Me with a focused spiritual mind, free from expectations and possessiveness, and fight without anxiety.
meanings.hindi: अपने सभी कर्म मुझे अर्पित करते हुए, आत्मभाव से युक्त होकर, बिना आशा और ममता के, और चिंता से मुक्त होकर अपना कर्तव्य करो।
meanings.hinglish: Apne saare kaam higher purpose ko dedicate karke, bina expectation aur attachment ke, bina tension ke apna duty karo.
meanings.marathi: सर्व कर्म मला अर्पण करून, आत्मभावाने, अपेक्षा आणि ममत्व सोडून, चिंता न करता आपले कर्तव्य करा.

core_meaning: Surrender your actions to a higher purpose, act without expectation or attachment, and perform your duties without stress
embedding_text: working without stress and expectation, surrendering actions to higher purpose, reducing anxiety and overthinking, performing duties calmly, detachment from results, peaceful action mindset

sanskrit: ये मे मतमिदं नित्यमनुतिष्ठन्ति मानवाः । श्रद्धावन्तोऽनसूयन्तो मुच्यन्ते तेऽपि कर्मभिः ॥
transliteration: ye me matam idaṁ nityam anutiṣṭhanti mānavāḥ śraddhāvanto ’nasūyanto mucyante te ’pi karmabhiḥ

meanings.english: Those who follow this teaching faithfully and without doubt are freed from the bondage of actions.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग श्रद्धा और बिना दोष-दृष्टि के इस उपदेश का पालन करते हैं, वे कर्मों के बंधन से मुक्त हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log faith ke saath aur bina doubt ke in teachings ko follow karte hain, wo karm ke bandhan se free ho jate hain.
meanings.marathi: जे लोक श्रद्धेने आणि दोष न शोधता या शिकवणीचे पालन करतात, ते कर्मबंधनातून मुक्त होतात.

core_meaning: Faithfully following wisdom without doubt leads to freedom from stress and consequences of actions
use_cases: lack of trust in guidance or process
overthinking instead of trusting the path
wanting clarity and peace in actions
seeking freedom from stress of results
embedding_text: faith and trust in guidance, following path without doubt, reducing overthinking and confusion, freedom from stress and consequences, trusting process in life decisions, clarity through belief

sanskrit: ये त्वेतदभ्यसूयन्तो नानुतिष्ठन्ति मे मतम् । सर्वज्ञानविमूढांस्तान्विद्धि नष्टानचेतसः ॥
transliteration: ye tv etad abhyasūyanto nānutiṣṭhanti me matam sarva-jñāna-vimūḍhāṁs tān viddhi naṣṭān acetasaḥ

meanings.english: But those who disregard these teachings out of envy or doubt and do not follow them are deluded and lost, lacking true understanding.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग इन उपदेशों का अनादर करते हैं और उनका पालन नहीं करते, वे मोह में पड़े हुए और ज्ञान से वंचित होकर नष्ट हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log in teachings ko ignore karte hain ya doubt karte hain, wo confused rehte hain aur life me clarity nahi paate.
meanings.marathi: जे लोक या शिकवणीचा तिरस्कार करतात आणि पालन करत नाहीत, ते अज्ञानाने भ्रमित होतात आणि त्यांचे नुकसान होते.

core_meaning: Ignoring wisdom due to ego or doubt leads to confusion and loss of direction
use_cases: ignoring good advice due to ego
constant doubt and confusion in life
not following guidance and feeling lost
lack of clarity in decision making
embedding_text: ignoring wisdom due to ego or doubt, confusion and lack of direction in life, not following guidance leads to problems, overconfidence and ignorance issues, feeling lost without clear path

sanskrit: सदृशं चेष्टते स्वस्याः प्रकृतेर्ज्ञानवानपि । प्रकृतिं यान्ति भूतानि निग्रहः किं करिष्यति ॥
transliteration: sadṛśaṁ ceṣṭate svasyāḥ prakṛter jñānavān api prakṛtiṁ yānti bhūtāni nigrahaḥ kiṁ kariṣyati

meanings.english: Even a person of knowledge acts according to their own nature. All beings follow their nature; what can repression accomplish?
meanings.hindi: ज्ञानी व्यक्ति भी अपनी प्रकृति के अनुसार ही कार्य करता है। सभी प्राणी अपनी प्रकृति का अनुसरण करते हैं; दमन करने से क्या लाभ?
meanings.hinglish: Even knowledgeable log bhi apni nature ke according hi act karte hain. Sirf force ya control se kuch change nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: ज्ञानी माणूससुद्धा आपल्या स्वभावानुसार वागतो. सर्व जीव आपल्या प्रकृतीनुसारच वागतात; दडपणाने काही साध्य होत नाही.

core_meaning: Everyone acts according to their nature, and forcing suppression does not lead to true change
use_cases: struggling with habits or personality traits
realizing limits of control and suppression
embedding_text: people act according to their nature, cannot force change through suppression, understanding habits and personality, self acceptance and awareness, natural tendencies in behavior, limits of control and discipline

sanskrit: इन्द्रियस्येन्द्रियस्यार्थे रागद्वेषौ व्यवस्थितौ । तयोर्न वशमागच्छेत्तौ ह्यस्य परिपन्थिनौ ॥
transliteration: indriyasyendriyasyārthe rāga-dveṣau vyavasthitau tayor na vaśam āgacchet tau hy asya paripanthinau

meanings.english: Attachment and aversion arise from the interaction of the senses with their objects. One should not come under their control, as they are obstacles on the path.
meanings.hindi: इन्द्रियों और उनके विषयों के संपर्क से राग (आसक्ति) और द्वेष (घृणा) उत्पन्न होते हैं। मनुष्य को इनके वश में नहीं होना चाहिए, क्योंकि ये उसके मार्ग में बाधा हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Attachment aur dislike naturally aate hain, par unke control me nahi aana chahiye kyunki ye progress ke raaste me rukavat hain.
meanings.marathi: इंद्रिये आणि विषय यांच्या संपर्कातून राग आणि द्वेष उत्पन्न होतात. माणसाने त्यांच्या वशात जाऊ नये, कारण ते प्रगतीच्या मार्गात अडथळा आहेत.

core_meaning: Attachment and aversion are natural but should not control decisions, as they block growth and clarity
use_cases: avoiding bias in thinking and actions
embedding_text: attachment and aversion affect decisions, emotional bias in thinking, controlling impulses and reactions, balanced mindset and clarity, avoiding likes and dislikes influence, self control in decision making

sanskrit: श्रेयान्स्वधर्मो विगुणः परधर्मात्स्वनुष्ठितात् । स्वधर्मे निधनं श्रेयः परधर्मो भयावहः ॥
transliteration: śreyān sva-dharmo viguṇaḥ para-dharmāt sv-anuṣṭhitāt sva-dharme nidhanaṁ śreyaḥ para-dharmo bhayāvahaḥ

meanings.english: It is better to follow one's own path imperfectly than to follow another's path perfectly. It is better to fail in one's own duty than to succeed in another's, as another's path brings fear.
meanings.hindi: अपने धर्म (कर्तव्य) को अपूर्ण रूप से करना भी दूसरे के धर्म को पूर्ण रूप से करने से श्रेष्ठ है। अपने धर्म में मरना भी अच्छा है, क्योंकि दूसरे का धर्म भय उत्पन्न करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Apna path imperfectly follow karna better hai dusron ka perfectly follow karne se. Apni life jeena hi best hai, copy karna nahi.
meanings.marathi: स्वधर्म अपूर्णपणे करणे हे परधर्म उत्तमपणे करण्यापेक्षा श्रेष्ठ आहे. स्वतःच्या धर्मात मृत्यूही श्रेष्ठ आहे, कारण परधर्म भय निर्माण करतो.

core_meaning: Following your own path, even imperfectly, is better than imitating others, as authenticity leads to growth while comparison creates fear
use_cases: copying others' career or life choices
fear of failure in own path
embedding_text: follow your own path instead of copying others, self acceptance and confidence, comparison creates fear, finding personal purpose and direction, being authentic in life choices, overcoming fear of failure

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच अथ केन प्रयुक्तोऽयं पापं चरति पूरुषः । अनिच्छन्नपि वार्ष्णेय बलादिव नियोजितः ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca atha kena prayukto ’yaṁ pāpaṁ carati pūruṣaḥ anicchann api vārṣṇeya balād iva niyojitaḥ

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Krishna, what force drives a person to commit wrong actions, even against their own will, as if compelled by force?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन कहते हैं: हे कृष्ण, ऐसा कौन सा बल है जो मनुष्य को उसकी इच्छा के विरुद्ध भी पाप करने के लिए प्रेरित करता है, मानो वह किसी बल द्वारा मजबूर किया गया हो?
meanings.hinglish: Arjun pooch raha hai: insaan galat kaam kyun karta hai, jabki wo khud nahi karna chahta, jaise koi force usse push kar rahi ho?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन विचारतो: माणूस स्वतःची इच्छा नसतानाही चुकीचे कर्म का करतो, जणू काही त्याला जबरदस्तीने तसे करायला लावले जाते?

core_meaning: People sometimes act against their own will, driven by unseen inner forces or impulses
use_cases: doing things you know are wrong
embedding_text: why people act against their will, lack of self control and impulse behavior, doing wrong despite knowing it, guilt and confusion about actions, understanding bad habits and inner forces, psychological conflict in decisions

sanskrit: श्री भगवानुवाच काम एष क्रोध एष रजोगुणसमुद्भवः । महाशनो महापाप्मा विद्ध्येनमिह वैरिणम् ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca kāma eṣa krodha eṣa rajo-guṇa-samudbhavaḥ mahāśano mahā-pāpmā viddhy enam iha vairiṇam

meanings.english: The Supreme Lord said: It is desire, it is anger, born of the mode of passion. It is all-devouring and sinful—know this to be the enemy.
meanings.hindi: भगवान कहते हैं: यह काम (इच्छा) और क्रोध है, जो रजोगुण से उत्पन्न होते हैं। यह सब कुछ निगलने वाला और पाप का कारण है—इसे ही अपना शत्रु जानो।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna kehte hain: ye desire aur anger hi hai jo insaan ko control karta hai. Ye hi sabse bada enemy hai.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणतात: हे काम (इच्छा) आणि क्रोध आहे, जे रजोगुणातून उत्पन्न होते. हे सर्व काही नष्ट करणारे आणि पापाचे कारण आहे—यालाच शत्रू समजा.

core_meaning: Desire and anger are the root causes of wrong actions and act as the greatest inner enemies
embedding_text: desire and anger as root cause of problems, losing control due to emotions, impulsive decisions from craving and anger, inner enemy psychology, understanding human behavior and mistakes, controlling desire and anger

sanskrit: धूमेनाव्रियते वह्निर्यथादर्शो मलेन च । यथोल्बेनावृतो गर्भस्तथा तेनेदमावृत्तम् ॥
transliteration: dhūmenāvriyate vahnir yathādarśo malena ca yatholbenāvṛto garbhas tathā tenedam āvṛtam

meanings.english: Just as fire is covered by smoke, a mirror by dust, and a fetus by the womb, similarly, knowledge is covered by desire.
meanings.hindi: जैसे अग्नि धुएं से, दर्पण धूल से और गर्भ गर्भाशय से ढका रहता है, वैसे ही ज्ञान इच्छा (काम) से ढका रहता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise fire smoke se cover ho jati hai, waise hi desire humari clarity ko cover kar deta hai.
meanings.marathi: जसे अग्नी धुराने, आरसा धुळीने आणि गर्भ गर्भाशयाने झाकला जातो, तसेच ज्ञान इच्छेमुळे झाकले जाते.

core_meaning: Desire clouds clarity and hides true understanding, just like coverings obscure what is pure underneath
use_cases: not thinking clearly due to strong desires
making wrong decisions under emotional influence
losing clarity because of cravings or attachment
feeling confused despite knowing the right thing
embedding_text: desire clouds clarity and judgment, emotional influence on decision making, lack of clear thinking due to attachment, confusion caused by strong desires, hidden knowledge due to cravings, understanding mental blockage

sanskrit: आवृतं ज्ञानमेतेन ज्ञानिनो नित्यवैरिणा । कामरूपेण कौन्तेय दुष्पूरेणानलेन च ॥
transliteration: āvṛtaṁ jñānam etena jñānino nitya-vairiṇā kāma-rūpeṇa kaunteya duṣpūreṇānalena ca

meanings.english: O Arjuna, this constant enemy in the form of desire covers the knowledge of even the wise. It is like an insatiable fire that can never be satisfied.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, यह काम (इच्छा) रूपी शत्रु ज्ञान को ढक देता है, यहाँ तक कि ज्ञानी व्यक्ति का भी। यह ऐसी अग्नि है जो कभी तृप्त नहीं होती।
meanings.hinglish: Desire ek aisi fire hai jo kabhi satisfy nahi hoti, aur ye even wise logon ki clarity bhi destroy kar deti hai.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, कामरूपी शत्रू ज्ञानाला झाकतो, अगदी ज्ञानी लोकांचेसुद्धा. तो कधीही न भरून निघणाऱ्या अग्नीसारखा आहे.

core_meaning: Desire is an endless and destructive force that continuously covers knowledge and disturbs even the wise
use_cases: never feeling satisfied despite achieving goals
struggling with endless wants and distractions
embedding_text: desire is endless and never satisfied, constant craving and restlessness, desire destroys clarity and focus, never feeling fulfilled despite success, controlling desires and distractions, psychological loop of wanting more

sanskrit: इन्द्रियाणि मनो बुद्धिरस्याधिष्ठानमुच्यते । एतैर्विमोहयत्येष ज्ञानमावृत्य देहिनम् ॥
transliteration: indriyāṇi mano buddhir asyādhiṣṭhānam ucyate etair vimohayaty eṣa jñānam āvṛtya dehinam

meanings.english: The senses, mind, and intellect are said to be the seats of desire. Through them, desire deludes a person by covering their knowledge.
meanings.hindi: इन्द्रियां, मन और बुद्धि को काम (इच्छा) का निवास स्थान कहा गया है। इनके माध्यम से यह इच्छा मनुष्य के ज्ञान को ढककर उसे भ्रमित कर देती है।
meanings.hinglish: Desire humari senses, mind aur intellect me rehta hai, aur ye sab milkar insaan ki clarity ko confuse kar dete hain.
meanings.marathi: इंद्रिये, मन आणि बुद्धी हे कामाचे स्थान मानले जातात. यांच्यामार्फत इच्छा ज्ञान झाकून मनुष्याला भ्रमित करते.

core_meaning: Desire operates through the senses, mind, and intellect, clouding judgment and leading to confusion
use_cases: losing control over thoughts and actions
embedding_text: desire operates through senses mind and intellect, losing control over thoughts and actions, confusion due to internal conflict, impulse vs logic decision making, understanding how desire controls behavior, mental distraction and lack of clarity

sanskrit: तस्मात्त्वमिन्द्रियाण्यादौ नियम्य भरतर्षभ । पाप्मानं प्रजहि ह्येनं ज्ञानविज्ञाननाशनम् ॥
transliteration: tasmāt tvam indriyāṇy ādau niyamya bharatarṣabha pāpmānaṁ prajahi hy enaṁ jñāna-vijñāna-nāśanam

meanings.english: Therefore, O Arjuna, control the senses first and eliminate this enemy called desire, which destroys knowledge and wisdom.
meanings.hindi: इसलिए, हे अर्जुन, पहले अपनी इन्द्रियों को नियंत्रित करो और इस पाप रूपी इच्छा को नष्ट करो, जो ज्ञान और विज्ञान का नाश करती है।
meanings.hinglish: Isliye sabse pehle apni senses ko control karo aur desire ko khatam karo, kyunki ye hi knowledge ko destroy karta hai.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून हे अर्जुन, प्रथम इंद्रियांना नियंत्रित करा आणि या पापरूपी इच्छेला नष्ट करा, जी ज्ञान आणि विज्ञानाचा नाश करते.

core_meaning: The first step to overcoming desire and confusion is controlling the senses, as they are the entry point of distraction
embedding_text: control senses to overcome desire, first step of self discipline, removing distractions and bad habits, improving focus and clarity, managing impulses and cravings, self control and mental strength

sanskrit: इन्द्रियाणि पराण्याहुरिन्द्रियेभ्यः परं मनः । मनसस्तु परा बुद्धिर्यो बुद्धेः परतस्तु सः ॥
transliteration: indriyāṇi parāṇy āhur indriyebhyaḥ paraṁ manaḥ manasas tu parā buddhir yo buddheḥ paratas tu saḥ

meanings.english: The senses are superior to the body, the mind is higher than the senses, the intellect is higher than the mind, and the self is higher than the intellect.
meanings.hindi: इन्द्रियां शरीर से श्रेष्ठ हैं, मन इन्द्रियों से श्रेष्ठ है, बुद्धि मन से श्रेष्ठ है, और आत्मा बुद्धि से भी श्रेष्ठ है।
meanings.hinglish: Senses body se upar hain, mind senses se upar hai, intellect mind se upar hai, aur self sabse upar hai.
meanings.marathi: इंद्रिये शरीरापेक्षा श्रेष्ठ आहेत, मन इंद्रियांपेक्षा श्रेष्ठ आहे, बुद्धी मनापेक्षा श्रेष्ठ आहे आणि आत्मा बुद्धीपेक्षाही श्रेष्ठ आहे.

core_meaning: There is a hierarchy within us—self > intellect > mind > senses—and true control comes from operating at the highest level
embedding_text: hierarchy of senses mind intellect and self, how to control impulses and emotions, improving decision making through awareness, self control and discipline system, understanding inner human psychology structure

sanskrit: एवं बुद्धेः परं बुद्ध्वा संस्तभ्यात्मानमात्मना । जहि शत्रुं महाबाहो कामरूपं दुरासदम् ॥
transliteration: evaṁ buddheḥ paraṁ buddhvā saṁstabhyātmānam ātmanā jahi śatruṁ mahā-bāho kāma-rūpaṁ durāsadam

meanings.english: Thus knowing the self to be superior to the intellect, control the mind with the self and destroy this powerful enemy in the form of desire.
meanings.hindi: इस प्रकार आत्मा को बुद्धि से श्रेष्ठ जानकर, आत्मा द्वारा मन को नियंत्रित करो और इस दुर्जेय काम रूपी शत्रु का नाश करो।
meanings.hinglish: Apne higher self ko samajhkar mind ko control karo aur desire jaise strong enemy ko defeat karo.
meanings.marathi: अशा प्रकारे आत्मा बुद्धीपेक्षा श्रेष्ठ आहे हे जाणून, आत्म्याने मनाला नियंत्रित करा आणि या बलवान कामरूपी शत्रूचा नाश करा.

core_meaning: By realizing the higher self and using it to control the mind, one can overcome the powerful enemy of desire
embedding_text: use higher self to control mind and desires, overcoming inner enemy desire, self mastery and discipline, controlling thoughts and emotions, personal growth and inner strength, defeating impulses and temptations

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच इमं विवस्वते योगं प्रोक्तवानहमव्ययम् । विवस्वान्मनवे प्राह मनुरिक्ष्वाकवेऽब्रवीत् ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca imaṁ vivasvate yogaṁ proktavān aham avyayam vivasvān manave prāha manur ikṣvākave ’bravīt

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: I taught this imperishable yoga to the sun-god Vivasvan; Vivasvan taught it to Manu, and Manu taught it to Ikshvaku.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: मैंने इस अविनाशी योग को सूर्यदेव विवस्वान को सिखाया, विवस्वान ने इसे मनु को बताया और मनु ने इसे इक्ष्वाकु को बताया।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan kehte hain: maine ye eternal yoga Vivasvan ko sikhaya, phir usne Manu ko aur Manu ne Ikshvaku ko diya.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: मी हा अविनाशी योग विवस्वानाला सांगितला, विवस्वानाने तो मनुला आणि मनुने इक्ष्वाकुला सांगितला.

core_meaning: True knowledge is timeless and is passed down through generations, maintaining continuity and authenticity
use_cases: importance of mentorship and knowledge transfer
building systems based on validated knowledge
embedding_text: timeless knowledge passed through generations, importance of mentorship and knowledge transfer, continuity of wisdom, learning from tradition and authority, preserving authentic teachings

sanskrit: एवं परम्पराप्राप्तमिमं राजर्षयो विदुः । स कालेनेह महता योगे नष्टः परन्तप ॥
transliteration: evaṁ paramparā-prāptam imaṁ rājarṣayo viduḥ sa kāleneha mahatā yogo naṣṭaḥ paran-tapa

meanings.english: This supreme science was thus received through the chain of disciplic succession, and the saintly kings understood it in that way. But over time, this knowledge was lost.
meanings.hindi: यह परम ज्ञान परंपरा के माध्यम से प्राप्त हुआ था और राजर्षियों ने इसे समझा था। लेकिन समय के साथ यह ज्ञान लुप्त हो गया।
meanings.hinglish: Ye knowledge parampara se aaya tha aur rishiyo ne samjha tha, lekin time ke saath ye knowledge lost ho gaya.
meanings.marathi: हे ज्ञान परंपरेने प्राप्त झाले होते आणि राजर्षींनी ते समजले होते, पण काळानुसार ते हरवले.

core_meaning: Even valuable and authentic knowledge can be lost over time if it is not properly preserved and transmitted
use_cases: loss of knowledge in organizations over time
need for proper documentation and transfer
maintaining continuity in systems and processes
embedding_text: loss of knowledge over time, importance of preserving and transferring knowledge, continuity in systems and traditions, learning from past wisdom, maintaining knowledge integrity

sanskrit: स एवायं मया तेऽद्य योगः प्रोक्तः पुरातनः । भक्तोऽसि मे सखा चेति रहस्यं ह्येतदुत्तमम् ॥
transliteration: sa evāyaṁ mayā te ’dya yogaḥ proktaḥ purātanaḥ bhakto ’si me sakhā ceti rahasyaṁ hy etad uttamam

meanings.english: That very ancient science of yoga has today been explained by Me to you because you are My devotee and My friend; therefore you can understand this supreme mystery.
meanings.hindi: वही प्राचीन योग आज मैंने तुम्हें बताया है क्योंकि तुम मेरे भक्त और मित्र हो; इसलिए तुम इस श्रेष्ठ रहस्य को समझ सकते हो।
meanings.hinglish: Ye ancient knowledge main tumhe isliye bata raha hoon kyunki tum mere dost aur devotee ho, isliye tum isko samajh paoge.
meanings.marathi: हा प्राचीन योग मी तुला सांगत आहे कारण तू माझा भक्त आणि मित्र आहेस; त्यामुळे तू हे सर्वोत्तम रहस्य समजू शकतोस.

core_meaning: Deep and valuable knowledge is shared with those who have trust, connection, and the right intent to understand it
use_cases: sharing sensitive or advanced knowledge with trusted individuals
learning based on readiness and intent
embedding_text: sharing knowledge based on trust and relationship, importance of mentorship and connection, access control in knowledge systems, learning based on readiness and intent, trusted knowledge transfer

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच अपरं भवतो जन्म परं जन्म विवस्वतः । कथमेतद्विजानीयां त्वमादौ प्रोक्तवानिति ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca aparaṁ bhavato janma paraṁ janma vivasvataḥ katham etad vijānīyāṁ tvam ādau proktavān iti

meanings.english: Arjuna said: Your birth is recent, whereas the birth of the sun-god Vivasvan is ancient. How am I to understand that You taught this yoga in the beginning?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: आपका जन्म तो अभी हुआ है और सूर्यदेव विवस्वान का जन्म बहुत पहले हुआ था। फिर मैं यह कैसे समझूं कि आपने उन्हें प्रारंभ में यह योग सिखाया?
meanings.hinglish: Arjun kehta hai: aapka janm abhi hua hai aur Vivasvan ka bahut pehle, to aapne unhe kaise sikhaya?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणतो: तुमचा जन्म अलीकडचा आहे आणि विवस्वानाचा खूप जुना, मग तुम्ही त्यांना सुरुवातीला कसे शिकवले?

core_meaning: Questioning and seeking clarity when something seems logically inconsistent is essential for true understanding
embedding_text: critical thinking and questioning inconsistencies, logical reasoning and inquiry, seeking clarity in complex knowledge, challenging assumptions respectfully, curiosity driven understanding

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच बहूनि मे व्यतीतानि जन्मानि तव चार्जुन । तान्यहं वेद सर्वाणि न त्वं वेत्थ परन्तप ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca bahūni me vyatītāni janmāni tava cārjuna tāny ahaṁ veda sarvāṇi na tvaṁ vettha paran-tapa

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: Many births of Mine and yours have passed, O Arjuna. I know them all, but you do not know them.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: हे अर्जुन, मेरे और तुम्हारे अनेक जन्म बीत चुके हैं। मैं उन सभी को जानता हूँ, परंतु तुम उन्हें नहीं जानते।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan kehte hain: Arjun, hum dono ke kai janm ho chuke hain, mujhe sab yaad hain lekin tumhe nahi.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: हे अर्जुन, माझे आणि तुझे अनेक जन्म झाले आहेत. मला ते सर्व माहीत आहेत, पण तुला माहित नाहीत.

core_meaning: Different levels of awareness lead to different understandings of reality; higher knowledge includes perspectives beyond ordinary perception
embedding_text: different levels of awareness and knowledge, accepting higher perspectives, recognizing limits of understanding, learning from experienced sources, humility in knowledge and learning

sanskrit: अजोऽपि सन्नव्ययात्मा भूतानामीश्वरोऽपि सन् । प्रकृतिं स्वामधिष्ठाय सम्भवाम्यात्ममायया ॥
transliteration: ajo ’pi sann avyayātmā bhūtānām īśvaro ’pi san prakṛtiṁ svām adhiṣṭhāya sambhavāmy ātma-māyayā

meanings.english: Although I am unborn and My transcendental body never deteriorates, and although I am the Lord of all beings, I still appear in every age by My own divine power.
meanings.hindi: यद्यपि मैं अजन्मा और अविनाशी हूँ तथा समस्त प्राणियों का ईश्वर हूँ, फिर भी मैं अपनी दिव्य शक्ति से युग-युग में प्रकट होता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan kehte hain: main janm nahi leta, phir bhi apni divine power se duniya me prakat hota hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी अजन्मा आणि अविनाशी असूनही, सर्वांचा ईश्वर असूनही, माझ्या दिव्य शक्तीने मी युगानुयुगे प्रकट होतो.

core_meaning: Higher realities can operate beyond normal rules, appearing in forms that serve a purpose while remaining fundamentally unchanged
use_cases: learning about leadership appearing in different forms
understanding adaptive presence in different situations
embedding_text: higher reality beyond normal logic, divine or abstract concepts of existence, appearing in different forms while remaining constant, adaptive presence and purpose driven manifestation, understanding symbolic knowledge

sanskrit: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत । अभ्युत्थानमधर्मस्य तदात्मानं सृजाम्यहम् ॥
transliteration: yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānir bhavati bhārata abhyutthānam adharmasya tadātmānaṁ sṛjāmy aham

meanings.english: Whenever righteousness declines and unrighteousness rises, O Arjuna, at that time I manifest Myself.
meanings.hindi: हे भारत, जब-जब धर्म की हानि और अधर्म की वृद्धि होती है, तब-तब मैं स्वयं प्रकट होता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Jab bhi dharm kam ho jata hai aur adharm badhta hai, tab main prakat hota hoon.
meanings.marathi: हे भारत, जेव्हा जेव्हा धर्माची हानी होते आणि अधर्म वाढतो, तेव्हा मी प्रकट होतो.

core_meaning: Intervention happens when imbalance crosses a threshold, restoring stability and order in a system
use_cases: maintaining balance in organizations or processes
embedding_text: intervention when imbalance occurs, restoring system stability, leadership action during crisis, trigger based decision making, maintaining balance between opposing forces

sanskrit: परित्राणाय साधुनां विनाशाय च दुष्कृताम् । धर्मसंस्थानार्थाय सम्भवामि युगे युगे ॥
transliteration: paritrāṇāya sādhūnāṁ vināśāya ca duṣkṛtām dharma-saṁsthāpanārthāya sambhavāmi yuge yuge

meanings.english: To protect the righteous, to destroy the wicked, and to re-establish dharma, I appear age after age.
meanings.hindi: साधुओं की रक्षा, दुष्टों का विनाश और धर्म की पुनः स्थापना के लिए मैं युग-युग में प्रकट होता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main achhe logon ki protection, bure logon ka removal aur system ko balance karne ke liye baar-baar aata hoon.
meanings.marathi: साधूंचे रक्षण, दुष्टांचा नाश आणि धर्माची पुनर्स्थापना करण्यासाठी मी युगानुयुगे प्रकट होतो.

core_meaning: Effective intervention requires three actions: protecting what is right, removing what is harmful, and restoring balance in the system
use_cases: leadership decision making in difficult situations
balancing systems by removing harmful elements
restoring order in organizations or processes
embedding_text: protecting good and removing harmful elements, restoring balance in systems, leadership intervention framework, crisis management and correction, maintaining system integrity and stability

sanskrit: जन्म कर्म च मे दिव्यमेवं यो वेत्ति तत्त्वतः । त्यक्त्वा देहं पुनर्जन्म नैति मामेति सोऽर्जुन ॥
transliteration: janma karma ca me divyam evaṁ yo vetti tattvataḥ tyaktvā dehaṁ punar janma naiti mām eti so ’rjuna

meanings.english: One who truly understands the divine nature of My birth and actions does not take birth again after leaving the body, but attains Me, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, जो मेरे जन्म और कर्म के दिव्य स्वरूप को तत्त्व से जानता है, वह शरीर त्यागने के बाद पुनर्जन्म नहीं लेता, बल्कि मुझे प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan mere divine nature ko samajh leta hai, wo phir life cycle se free ho jata hai aur higher state ko achieve karta hai.
meanings.marathi: जो माझ्या जन्म आणि कर्माच्या दिव्य स्वरूपाला तत्त्वतः जाणतो, तो शरीर सोडल्यानंतर पुनर्जन्म घेत नाही आणि मला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: Deep understanding of truth transforms a person’s state, freeing them from repeated cycles of confusion and limitation
use_cases: achieving clarity and transformation through knowledge
deep learning leading to behavioral change
embedding_text: deep understanding leading to transformation, breaking repetitive cycles, achieving clarity and freedom, knowledge driven personal growth, escaping limitations through awareness

sanskrit: वीतरागभयक्रोधा मन्मया मामुपाश्रिताः । बहवो ज्ञानतपसा पूता मद्भावमागताः ॥
transliteration: vīta-rāga-bhaya-krodhā man-mayā mām upāśritāḥ bahavo jñāna-tapasā pūtā mad-bhāvam āgatāḥ

meanings.english: Freed from attachment, fear, and anger, fully absorbed in Me, taking refuge in Me, many have been purified by knowledge and austerity and have attained My state.
meanings.hindi: राग, भय और क्रोध से मुक्त होकर, मुझमें स्थित होकर, मेरी शरण लेकर, अनेक लोग ज्ञान और तप से शुद्ध होकर मेरी स्थिति को प्राप्त हुए हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Attachment, fear aur anger se free hoke, focus aur discipline se log higher state achieve karte hain.
meanings.marathi: राग, भय आणि क्रोध यांपासून मुक्त होऊन, माझ्यात स्थित राहून, ज्ञान आणि तपाने शुद्ध होऊन अनेकांनी माझी अवस्था प्राप्त केली आहे.

core_meaning: Transformation requires letting go of negative emotions, maintaining focus, and consistently applying knowledge with discipline
use_cases: managing emotions like fear, anger, and attachment
embedding_text: letting go of attachment fear and anger, focus and discipline for transformation, personal growth through knowledge and practice, emotional control and mental clarity, achieving higher state through consistency

sanskrit: ये यथा मां प्रपद्यन्ते तांस्तथैव भजाम्यहम् । मम वर्त्मानुवर्तन्ते मनुष्याः पार्थ सर्वशः ॥
transliteration: ye yathā māṁ prapadyante tāṁs tathaiva bhajāmy aham mama vartmānuvartante manuṣyāḥ pārtha sarvaśaḥ

meanings.english: As people approach Me, I reciprocate with them accordingly. Everyone follows My path in all respects, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, जो लोग मुझे जिस प्रकार से प्राप्त होते हैं, मैं भी उन्हें उसी प्रकार फल देता हूँ। सभी लोग मेरे ही मार्ग का अनुसरण करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Log jaise approach karte hain, waise hi unhe response milta hai. Har koi apne tareeke se same path follow karta hai.
meanings.marathi: लोक ज्या प्रकारे माझ्याकडे येतात, त्यांना मी तसाच प्रतिसाद देतो. सर्वजण माझ्याच मार्गाचे अनुसरण करतात.

core_meaning: Outcomes and responses are shaped by one's approach, intention, and effort; the system adapts based on input behavior
use_cases: adaptive systems responding to user input
leadership responding based on individual effort
embedding_text: adaptive response based on input behavior, cause and effect relationship, system responding according to user approach, personal responsibility for outcomes, customized interaction logic

sanskrit: काङ्क्षन्तः कर्मणां सिद्धिं यजन्त इह देवताः । क्षिप्रं हि मानुषे लोके सिद्धिर्भवति कर्मजा ॥
transliteration: kāṅkṣantaḥ karmaṇāṁ siddhiṁ yajanta iha devatāḥ kṣipraṁ hi mānuṣe loke siddhir bhavati karma-jā

meanings.english: Those who desire success in their actions worship the gods, because in this world, success from actions comes quickly.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग अपने कर्मों में सफलता चाहते हैं, वे देवताओं की पूजा करते हैं, क्योंकि इस संसार में कर्मों से मिलने वाली सफलता शीघ्र प्राप्त होती है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log quick success chahte hain, wo uske liye specific actions ya shortcuts follow karte hain, kyunki unhe fast results milte hain.
meanings.marathi: जे लोक कर्मांची सिद्धी इच्छितात ते देवतांची पूजा करतात, कारण या जगात कर्मांपासून मिळणारी सिद्धी लवकर मिळते.

core_meaning: People choose actions based on their goals—those seeking quick results often follow paths that provide immediate rewards
use_cases: understanding short-term vs long-term decision making
quick wins vs sustainable growth strategies
designing systems for different user intents
embedding_text: short term vs long term goals, motivation based decision making, desire for quick results, action driven outcomes, understanding user intent and behavior

sanskrit: चातुर्वर्ण्यं मया सृष्टं गुणकर्मविभागशः । तस्य कर्तारमपि मां विद्ध्यकर्तारमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: cātur-varṇyaṁ mayā sṛṣṭaṁ guṇa-karma-vibhāgaśaḥ tasya kartāram api māṁ viddhy akartāram avyayam

meanings.english: The fourfold order of society was created by Me according to the division of qualities and actions. Although I am its creator, know Me as the non-doer and eternal.
meanings.hindi: गुण और कर्म के आधार पर मैंने चार वर्णों की रचना की है। यद्यपि मैं इसका कर्ता हूँ, फिर भी मुझे अकर्ता और अविनाशी जानो।
meanings.hinglish: System qualities aur actions ke basis par bana hai, lekin creator hone ke baad bhi main directly attached nahi hoon.
meanings.marathi: गुण आणि कर्म यांच्या विभागानुसार मी चार वर्णांची निर्मिती केली आहे. जरी मी त्याचा कर्ता असलो तरी मला अकर्ता आणि अविनाशी समज.

core_meaning: Effective systems are designed based on individual qualities and actions, while the creator remains neutral and detached from outcomes
use_cases: assigning tasks based on skills and capabilities
embedding_text: system design based on qualities and actions, role based structure and organization, assigning tasks based on capabilities, neutral leadership and detachment, scalable and fair system design

sanskrit: न मां कर्माणि लिम्पन्ति न मे कर्मफले स्पृहा । इति मां योऽभिजानाति कर्मभिर्न स बध्यते ॥
transliteration: na māṁ karmāṇi limpanti na me karma-phale spṛhā iti māṁ yo ’bhijānāti karmabhir na sa badhyate

meanings.english: Actions do not bind Me, nor do I have any desire for the fruits of actions. One who understands this truth about Me is also not bound by actions.
meanings.hindi: मुझे कर्मों से बंधन नहीं होता और न ही मुझे कर्मों के फल की इच्छा है। जो इस सत्य को समझता है, वह भी कर्मों से नहीं बंधता।
meanings.hinglish: Main actions karta hoon par results se attached nahi hoon, aur jo ye samajh leta hai wo bhi actions se bind nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: माझ्यावर कर्मांचा परिणाम होत नाही आणि मला कर्मफळाची इच्छा नाही. जो हे समजतो तोही कर्मांनी बांधला जात नाही.

core_meaning: Performing actions without attachment to results leads to freedom from stress and limitations caused by outcomes
use_cases: improving performance by focusing on process
embedding_text: detached action without attachment to results, process focused execution, reducing stress and anxiety in work, freedom from outcome dependency, consistent performance through detachment

sanskrit: एवं ज्ञात्वा कृतं कर्म पूर्वैरपि मुमुक्षुभिः । कुरु कर्मैव तस्मात्त्वं पूर्वैः पूर्वतरं कृतम् ॥
transliteration: evaṁ jñātvā kṛtaṁ karma pūrvair api mumukṣubhiḥ kuru karmaiva tasmāt tvaṁ pūrvaiḥ pūrva-taraṁ kṛtam

meanings.english: Knowing this, the seekers of liberation in ancient times also performed action. Therefore, you should act as the ancients did.
meanings.hindi: इस ज्ञान को जानकर प्राचीन काल के मुमुक्षुओं ने भी कर्म किए। इसलिए तुम्हें भी पूर्वजों की तरह कर्म करना चाहिए।
meanings.hinglish: Purane log bhi ye samajh kar kaam karte the, isliye tumhe bhi action lena chahiye.
meanings.marathi: हे जाणून पूर्वीचे मुमुक्षूही कर्म करत होते. त्यामुळे तूही पूर्वजांप्रमाणे कर्म कर.

core_meaning: Proven knowledge should be applied in action, following the example of those who successfully used it before
use_cases: applying learned knowledge in real situations
taking action based on validated methods
building systems based on tested approaches
embedding_text: applying knowledge through action, following proven methods and practices, learning from historical success, taking action based on validated systems, execution based on experience

sanskrit: किं कर्म किमकर्मेति कवयोऽप्यत्र मोहिताः । तत्ते कर्म प्रवक्ष्यामि यज्ज्ञात्वा मोक्ष्यसेऽशुभात् ॥
transliteration: kiṁ karma kim akarmeti kavayo ’py atra mohitāḥ tat te karma pravakṣyāmi yaj jñātvā mokṣyase ’śubhāt

meanings.english: Even the wise are confused about what is action and what is inaction. Therefore, I will explain to you what action is, knowing which you will be freed from evil.
meanings.hindi: कर्म क्या है और अकर्म क्या है, इस विषय में बुद्धिमान लोग भी भ्रमित हो जाते हैं। इसलिए मैं तुम्हें कर्म का ज्ञान दूँगा, जिसे जानकर तुम अशुभ से मुक्त हो जाओगे।
meanings.hinglish: Kya sahi action hai aur kya nahi, isme intelligent log bhi confuse ho jaate hain. Main tumhe clear samjhata hoon.
meanings.marathi: कर्म काय आणि अकर्म काय याबद्दल ज्ञानी लोकही गोंधळतात. म्हणून मी तुला कर्म समजावून सांगतो.

core_meaning: Understanding the true nature of action is complex, and clarity in action leads to freedom from negative consequences
use_cases: clarifying what actions are right or wrong
embedding_text: understanding right and wrong actions, confusion in decision making, clarity in complex situations, structured thinking for actions, resolving ethical dilemmas and consequences

sanskrit: कर्मणो ह्यपि बोद्धव्यं बोद्धव्यं च विकर्मणः । अकर्मणश्च बोद्धव्यं गहना कर्मणो गतिः ॥
transliteration: karmaṇo hy api boddhavyaṁ boddhavyaṁ ca vikarmaṇaḥ akarmaṇaś ca boddhavyaṁ gahanā karmaṇo gatiḥ

meanings.english: One must understand what action is, what wrong action is, and what inaction is. The nature of action is very deep and difficult to understand.
meanings.hindi: कर्म क्या है, विकर्म क्या है और अकर्म क्या है, यह जानना आवश्यक है। कर्म की गति अत्यंत गूढ़ और समझने में कठिन है।
meanings.hinglish: Action, wrong action aur inaction—teeno ko samajhna zaroori hai, kyunki action ka system bahut complex hai.
meanings.marathi: कर्म, विकर्म आणि अकर्म हे समजून घेणे आवश्यक आहे, कारण कर्माची गती अत्यंत गूढ आहे.

core_meaning: Actions must be understood in categories—right action, wrong action, and inaction—because outcomes depend on subtle differences
use_cases: understanding consequences of different types of actions
embedding_text: classification of actions into right wrong and inaction, understanding complexity of decisions, ethical reasoning and consequences, distinguishing action types, structured action decision system

sanskrit: कर्मण्यकर्म यः पश्येदकर्मणि च कर्म यः । स बुद्धिमान्मनुष्येषु स युक्तः कृत्स्नकर्मकृत् ॥
transliteration: karmaṇy akarma yaḥ paśyed akarmaṇi ca karma yaḥ sa buddhimān manuṣyeṣu sa yuktaḥ kṛtsna-karma-kṛt

meanings.english: One who sees inaction in action and action in inaction is truly wise among humans; such a person is integrated and performs all actions perfectly.
meanings.hindi: जो कर्म में अकर्म और अकर्म में कर्म देखता है, वही मनुष्यों में बुद्धिमान है; वह योगयुक्त होकर समस्त कर्म करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan action ke andar non-action aur non-action ke andar action samajhta hai, wahi truly intelligent hai.
meanings.marathi: जो कर्मात अकर्म आणि अकर्मात कर्म पाहतो तोच खरा बुद्धिमान आहे.

core_meaning: True intelligence lies in understanding deeper layers of action—sometimes doing is not acting, and not doing is also a form of action
use_cases: strategic decision making (when to act or not act)
embedding_text: seeing deeper meaning of action and inaction, strategic decision making, understanding hidden effects of actions, advanced reasoning and paradox thinking, indirect consequences of behavior

sanskrit: यस्य सर्वे समारम्भाः कामसंकल्पवर्जिताः । ज्ञानाग्निदग्धकर्माणं तमाहुः पण्डितं बुधाः ॥
transliteration: yasya sarve samārambhāḥ kāma-saṅkalpa-varjitāḥ jñānāgni-dagdha-karmāṇaṁ tam āhuḥ paṇḍitaṁ budhāḥ

meanings.english: One whose actions are free from desire and selfish intentions, and whose actions are burned by the fire of knowledge, is considered wise by the learned.
meanings.hindi: जिसके सभी कर्म कामना और संकल्प से रहित हैं और जो ज्ञान की अग्नि से कर्मों को जला चुका है, उसे ज्ञानी लोग पंडित कहते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jiske actions desire aur selfish intention se free hote hain aur knowledge se guided hote hain, wahi truly wise hai.
meanings.marathi: ज्याचे सर्व कर्म कामना आणि संकल्प यांपासून मुक्त आहेत आणि ज्ञानाच्या अग्नीने जळले आहेत, तोच खरा पंडित आहे.

core_meaning: The highest level of action is performed without selfish desire and is guided by knowledge, leading to optimal and pure outcomes
use_cases: high-performance work without ego or attachment
decision making based on knowledge rather than desire
embedding_text: action without desire and selfish intent, knowledge driven decision making, removing bias in actions, optimal performance through clarity, expert level execution and wisdom

sanskrit: त्यक्त्वा कर्मफलासङ्गं नित्यतृप्तो निराश्रयः । कर्मण्यभिप्रवृत्तोऽपि नैव किञ्चित्करोति सः ॥
transliteration: tyaktvā karma-phalāsaṅgaṁ nitya-tṛpto nirāśrayaḥ karmaṇy abhipravṛtto ’pi naiva kiñcit karoti saḥ

meanings.english: Having given up attachment to the results of actions, always satisfied and independent, one does not act at all, even while engaged in action.
meanings.hindi: कर्मों के फल के प्रति आसक्ति त्यागकर, सदा संतुष्ट और निराश्रित होकर, मनुष्य कर्म करते हुए भी वास्तव में कुछ नहीं करता।
meanings.hinglish: Jo result se attached nahi hota aur andar se satisfied rehta hai, wo kaam karte hue bhi stress-free rehta hai.
meanings.marathi: कर्मफळाची आसक्ति सोडून, नेहमी संतुष्ट आणि निराश्रित राहून, तो कर्म करत असूनही काहीच करत नाही असे होते.

core_meaning: True efficiency comes from inner satisfaction and independence, allowing one to act fully without psychological burden
use_cases: maintaining inner satisfaction regardless of results
embedding_text: detached action without dependency on results, inner satisfaction and independence, stress free work and productivity, sustainable performance mindset, freedom from external validation

sanskrit: निराशीर्यतचित्तात्मा त्यक्तसर्वपरिग्रहः । शारीरं केवलं कर्म कुर्वन्नाप्नोति किल्बिषम् ॥
transliteration: nirāśīr yata-cittātmā tyakta-sarva-parigrahaḥ śārīraṁ kevalaṁ karma kurvan nāpnoti kilbiṣam

meanings.english: One who is free from expectations, self-controlled, and free from possessiveness, performing only necessary actions for the body, incurs no wrongdoing.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति आशा से मुक्त, मन और आत्मा को संयमित रखने वाला और संग्रह से रहित है, वह केवल शरीर के लिए आवश्यक कर्म करते हुए पाप से मुक्त रहता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo expectations aur possessions se free hai, disciplined hai aur sirf zaroori kaam karta hai, wo stress aur galti se bachta hai.
meanings.marathi: जो आशारहित, संयमी आणि सर्व संग्रह सोडून फक्त आवश्यक कर्म करतो, तो पापाला बळी पडत नाही.

core_meaning: Living with discipline, minimalism, and without expectations allows one to act efficiently without negative consequences
embedding_text: minimalist and disciplined action, reducing distractions and expectations, efficient task execution, self control and simplicity, sustainable productivity and focus

sanskrit: यदृच्छालाभसंतुष्टो द्वन्द्वातीतो विमत्सरः । समः सिद्धावसिद्धौ च कृत्वापि न निबध्यते ॥
transliteration: yadṛcchā-lābha-santuṣṭo dvandvātīto vimatsaraḥ samaḥ siddhāv asiddhau ca kṛtvāpi na nibadhyate

meanings.english: One who is satisfied with whatever comes by chance, free from dualities, without envy, and steady in both success and failure is never bound, even while acting.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति अपने आप प्राप्त होने वाले में संतुष्ट रहता है, द्वन्द्वों से परे है, ईर्ष्या से मुक्त है और सफलता-असफलता में समान रहता है, वह कर्म करते हुए भी बंधन में नहीं पड़ता।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan jo milta hai usme satisfied rehta hai, jealousy se free hai aur success-failure me same rehta hai, wo stress-free kaam karta hai.
meanings.marathi: जो माणूस जे मिळते त्यात समाधानी असतो, द्वंद्वांपासून मुक्त असतो, मत्सररहित असतो आणि यश-अपयशात समान राहतो, तो कर्म करत असूनही बांधला जात नाही.

core_meaning: Maintaining balance, contentment, and freedom from comparison allows consistent action without being affected by outcomes
use_cases: handling success and failure with stability
maintaining emotional balance in uncertain environments
embedding_text: emotional balance in success and failure, contentment with outcomes, freedom from jealousy and comparison, stable performance under uncertainty, resilience and equanimity in actions

sanskrit: गतसङ्गस्य मुक्तस्य ज्ञानावस्थितचेतसः । यज्ञायाचरतः कर्म समग्रं प्रविलीयते ॥
transliteration: gata-saṅgasya muktasya jñānāvasthita-cetasaḥ yajñāyācarataḥ karma samagraṁ pravilīyate

meanings.english: For one who is free from attachment, liberated, and established in knowledge, performing actions as a sacrifice, all actions are completely dissolved.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति आसक्ति से मुक्त, ज्ञान में स्थित और कर्म को यज्ञ रूप में करता है, उसके सभी कर्म समाप्त हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan attachment se free hai, knowledge me stable hai aur kaam ko higher purpose ke liye karta hai, uska kaam usse bind nahi karta.
meanings.marathi: जो आसक्तीपासून मुक्त, ज्ञानात स्थित आणि कर्म यज्ञरूपाने करतो, त्याचे सर्व कर्म विलीन होतात.

core_meaning: When actions are performed with detachment, awareness, and a higher purpose, they no longer create burden or consequences
use_cases: working with purpose instead of pressure
detaching from stress while staying productive
embedding_text: detached action with higher purpose, working without stress or burden, aligning actions with purpose and knowledge, achieving flow state, freedom from consequences of action

sanskrit: ब्रह्मार्पणं ब्रह्म हविर्ब्रह्माग्नौ ब्रह्मणा हुतम् । ब्रह्मैव तेन गन्तव्यं ब्रह्मकर्मसमाधिना ॥
transliteration: brahmārpaṇaṁ brahma havir brahmāgnau brahmaṇā hutam brahmaiva tena gantavyaṁ brahma-karma-samādhinā

meanings.english: The offering is Brahman, the oblation is Brahman, it is offered by Brahman into the fire of Brahman. One who sees everything as Brahman attains Brahman.
meanings.hindi: अर्पण ब्रह्म है, हवन सामग्री ब्रह्म है, ब्रह्म के अग्नि में ब्रह्म द्वारा आहुति दी जाती है। जो सब कुछ ब्रह्म के रूप में देखता है, वह ब्रह्म को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Sab kuch ek hi system ka part hai—action, doer, process aur result sab connected hain.
meanings.marathi: अर्पण, हवन, अग्नि आणि करणारा सर्व ब्रह्म आहे. जो हे पाहतो तो ब्रह्माला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: When one perceives all parts of action—doer, process, and outcome—as a unified whole, complete alignment and integration are achieved
use_cases: seeing systems as interconnected rather than separate
aligning actions with purpose and awareness
achieving flow and unity in work
embedding_text: unified system thinking, integration of action doer and outcome, holistic understanding of processes, interconnected systems, achieving alignment and flow in actions

sanskrit: दैवमेवापरे यज्ञं योगिनः पर्युपासते । ब्रह्माग्नावपरे यज्ञं यज्ञेनैवोपजुह्वति ॥
transliteration: daivam evāpare yajñaṁ yoginaḥ paryupāsate brahmāgnāv apare yajñaṁ yajñenaivopajuhvati

meanings.english: Some yogis perform sacrifice by worshiping the gods, while others offer the self as a sacrifice into the fire of the Absolute.
meanings.hindi: कुछ योगी देवताओं की पूजा रूप में यज्ञ करते हैं, जबकि अन्य ब्रह्माग्नि में आत्मा को यज्ञ रूप में अर्पित करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Kuch log external methods follow karte hain aur kuch log internal transformation par kaam karte hain.
meanings.marathi: काही योगी देवपूजा करून यज्ञ करतात, तर काही आत्म्याला ब्रह्माग्नीत अर्पण करतात.

core_meaning: Different individuals follow different paths—external practices or internal transformation—to achieve growth and alignment
use_cases: customizing strategies based on individual preferences
embedding_text: multiple approaches to achieving goals, external vs internal transformation methods, adaptive strategies for different users, flexible system design, diverse paths to growth and alignment

sanskrit: श्रोत्रादीनीन्द्रियाण्यन्ये संयमाग्निषु जुह्वति । शब्दादीन्विषयानन्य इन्द्रियाग्निषु जुह्वति ॥
transliteration: śrotrādīnīndriyāṇy anye saṁyamāgniṣu juhvati śabdādīn viṣayān anya indriyāgniṣu juhvati

meanings.english: Some offer the senses, such as hearing, into the fire of restraint, while others offer sound and other sense objects into the fire of the senses.
meanings.hindi: कुछ लोग इन्द्रियों को संयम की अग्नि में अर्पित करते हैं, जबकि अन्य लोग शब्द आदि विषयों को इन्द्रियों की अग्नि में अर्पित करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Kuch log apni senses ko control karte hain, aur kuch log apne environment ko control karte hain.
meanings.marathi: काही लोक इंद्रियांचे संयम करतात, तर काही लोक विषयांचे नियंत्रण करतात.

core_meaning: Self-discipline can be achieved either by controlling internal impulses or by managing external inputs and environments
embedding_text: self discipline through internal and external control, managing distractions and inputs, improving focus and productivity, controlling habits and behavior, attention management systems

sanskrit: सर्वाणीन्द्रियकर्माणि प्राणकर्माणि चापरे । आत्मसंयमयोगाग्नौ जुह्वति ज्ञानदीपिते ॥
transliteration: sarvāṇīndriya-karmāṇi prāṇa-karmāṇi cāpare ātma-saṁyama-yogāgnau juhvati jñāna-dīpite

meanings.english: Others offer all activities of the senses and the life-force into the fire of self-control, kindled by knowledge.
meanings.hindi: कुछ लोग इन्द्रियों और प्राणों के सभी कर्मों को ज्ञान से प्रकाशित आत्मसंयम की अग्नि में अर्पित करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Kuch log apni saari senses aur energy ko control karke disciplined aur focused life jeete hain.
meanings.marathi: काही लोक सर्व इंद्रिय आणि प्राण कर्म ज्ञानाने प्रज्वलित आत्मसंयमाच्या अग्नीत अर्पण करतात.

core_meaning: Complete discipline involves integrating control over senses, energy, and actions under the guidance of knowledge
use_cases: deep focus and flow state development
embedding_text: complete self control and discipline, integrating senses energy and actions, deep focus and productivity, energy management and awareness, high performance self regulation

sanskrit: द्रव्ययज्ञास्तपोयज्ञा योगयज्ञास्तथापरे । स्वाध्यायज्ञानयज्ञाश्च यतयः संशितव्रताः ॥
transliteration: dravya-yajñās tapo-yajñā yoga-yajñās tathāpare svādhyāya-jñāna-yajñāś ca yatayaḥ saṁśita-vratāḥ

meanings.english: Some perform sacrifice by giving material possessions, others by austerity, others by yoga practice, and still others by study and knowledge; all are disciplined and committed.
meanings.hindi: कुछ लोग द्रव्य से यज्ञ करते हैं, कुछ तप से, कुछ योग से और कुछ स्वाध्याय तथा ज्ञान से यज्ञ करते हैं; ये सभी दृढ़ संकल्प वाले साधक हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Koi resources use karta hai, koi discipline (tapas), koi practice (yoga) aur koi learning (knowledge) se growth karta hai.
meanings.marathi: काही लोक द्रव्ययज्ञ, काही तपयज्ञ, काही योगयज्ञ आणि काही स्वाध्याय-ज्ञानयज्ञ करतात; हे सर्व दृढनिश्चयी साधक आहेत.

core_meaning: Growth and transformation can be achieved through multiple disciplined approaches—resources, effort, practice, or knowledge
use_cases: choosing methods based on personal strengths
embedding_text: multiple paths for growth and transformation, resource based discipline practice and knowledge based systems, flexible strategies for self improvement, combining approaches for development, structured growth systems

sanskrit: अपाने जुह्वति प्राणं प्राणेऽपानं तथापरे । प्राणापानगती रुद्ध्वा प्राणायामपरायणाः । अपरे नियताहाराः प्राणान्प्राणेषु जुह्वति ॥
transliteration: apāne juhvati prāṇaṁ prāṇe ’pānaṁ tathāpare prāṇāpāna-gatī ruddhvā prāṇāyāma-parāyaṇāḥ apare niyatāhārāḥ prāṇān prāṇeṣu juhvati

meanings.english: Some offer the outgoing breath into the incoming breath, and others offer the incoming breath into the outgoing breath, controlling the flow of breath and practicing pranayama; others regulate their diet and offer vital energies into one another.
meanings.hindi: कुछ लोग प्राण को अपान में और अपान को प्राण में अर्पित करते हैं, प्राण और अपान की गति को रोककर प्राणायाम का अभ्यास करते हैं; कुछ लोग नियंत्रित आहार द्वारा प्राणों को संतुलित करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Kuch log breathing control (pranayama) se apni energy manage karte hain, aur kuch log diet aur lifestyle se apna balance maintain karte hain.
meanings.marathi: काही लोक प्राण आणि अपान यांचे नियंत्रण करून प्राणायाम करतात, तर काही लोक आहार नियंत्रणाने प्राणांचे संतुलन राखतात.

core_meaning: Advanced self-regulation involves managing breath, energy flow, and lifestyle to maintain balance and optimize performance
embedding_text: breath control and energy regulation, pranayama and mindfulness, lifestyle and diet optimization, stress management and balance, internal energy optimization systems

sanskrit: सर्वेऽप्येते यज्ञविदो यज्ञक्षपितकल्मषाः । यज्ञशिष्टामृतभुजो यान्ति ब्रह्म सनातनम् ॥
transliteration: sarve ’py ete yajña-vido yajña-kṣapita-kalmaṣāḥ yajña-śiṣṭāmṛta-bhujo yānti brahma sanātanam

meanings.english: All these performers who understand sacrifice are purified of their sins, and having tasted the nectar of sacrifice, they attain the eternal Absolute.
meanings.hindi: ये सभी यज्ञ को जानने वाले लोग यज्ञ द्वारा अपने पापों को नष्ट कर देते हैं और यज्ञ के अमृत का अनुभव करके सनातन ब्रह्म को प्राप्त करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log disciplined practices follow karte hain, wo apne negative patterns ko remove karke higher state achieve karte hain.
meanings.marathi: हे सर्व यज्ञ जाणणारे लोक यज्ञाने पाप नष्ट करून अमृताचा अनुभव घेतात आणि सनातन ब्रह्म प्राप्त करतात.

core_meaning: Consistent disciplined practice leads to purification, removing negative patterns and enabling higher states of clarity and fulfillment
embedding_text: purification through disciplined practice, removing negative patterns and habits, achieving higher states of clarity and fulfillment, long term transformation systems, consistent growth and improvement

sanskrit: नायं लोकोऽस्त्ययज्ञस्य कुतोऽन्यः कुरुसत्तम ॥
transliteration: nāyaṁ loko ’sty ayajñasya kuto ’nyaḥ kuru-sattama

meanings.english: For one who performs no sacrifice (disciplined effort), even this world is not attainable—how then the next, O best of the Kurus?
meanings.hindi: हे कुरुओं में श्रेष्ठ, जो यज्ञ (अनुशासित प्रयास) नहीं करता, उसके लिए यह लोक भी नहीं है, तो फिर अन्य लोक कैसे मिलेगा?
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan effort aur discipline nahi lagata, wo basic life me bhi success nahi paa sakta—higher level to door ki baat hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कुरुश्रेष्ठ, जो यज्ञ (अनुशासन) करत नाही त्याला हा लोकही मिळत नाही, तर दुसरा लोक कसा मिळेल?

core_meaning: Without consistent effort and discipline, even basic success is unattainable, let alone higher achievement
use_cases: importance of consistent effort in achieving goals
discipline as a foundation for success
embedding_text: importance of discipline and effort, consequences of lack of action, foundation for success and growth, accountability and responsibility systems, necessity of consistent practice

sanskrit: एवं बहुविधा यज्ञा वितता ब्रह्मणो मुखे । कर्मजान्विद्धि तान्सर्वानेवं ज्ञात्वा विमोक्ष्यसे ॥
transliteration: evaṁ bahu-vidhā yajñā vitatā brahmaṇo mukhe karma-jān viddhi tān sarvān evaṁ jñātvā vimokṣyase

meanings.english: Thus, many types of sacrifices are described in the Vedas. Know that all of them arise from action, and understanding this, you will be liberated.
meanings.hindi: इस प्रकार अनेक प्रकार के यज्ञ वेदों में वर्णित हैं। इन्हें कर्म से उत्पन्न जानो और इस प्रकार समझकर तुम मुक्त हो जाओगे।
meanings.hinglish: Different methods sab action-based hain—ye samajh lo, to tum free ho jaoge.
meanings.marathi: अशा अनेक प्रकारच्या यज्ञांचे वर्णन वेदांत आहे. हे सर्व कर्मातून उत्पन्न झाले आहेत हे जाणून तू मुक्त होशील.

core_meaning: All paths and practices originate from action, and understanding this unifies knowledge, leading to freedom
use_cases: understanding different methods as part of one system
unifying multiple strategies into a single framework
embedding_text: integration of multiple action systems, understanding different methods as one framework, simplifying complexity into unified model, action based systems leading to freedom, holistic knowledge integration

sanskrit: श्रेयान्द्रव्यमयाद्यज्ञाज्ज्ञानयज्ञः परन्तप । सर्वं कर्माखिलं पार्थ ज्ञाने परिसमाप्यते ॥
transliteration: śreyān dravya-mayād yajñāj jñāna-yajñaḥ paran-tapa sarvaṁ karmākhilaṁ pārtha jñāne parisamāpyate

meanings.english: O Arjuna, sacrifice performed with knowledge is superior to material offerings, because all actions ultimately culminate in knowledge.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, द्रव्य से किए गए यज्ञ से ज्ञानयज्ञ श्रेष्ठ है, क्योंकि सभी कर्म अंततः ज्ञान में समाप्त होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Knowledge-based action material action se better hai, kyunki sab kuch finally understanding par aake end hota hai.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, द्रव्ययज्ञापेक्षा ज्ञानयज्ञ श्रेष्ठ आहे, कारण सर्व कर्म शेवटी ज्ञानात संपतात.

core_meaning: Knowledge-driven action is superior because understanding is the ultimate goal and foundation of all actions
embedding_text: knowledge driven action vs blind execution, importance of understanding before acting, strategic decision making through insight, learning as foundation of action, prioritizing wisdom in systems

sanskrit: तद्विद्धि प्रणिपातेन परिप्रश्नेन सेवया । उपदेक्ष्यन्ति ते ज्ञानं ज्ञानिनस्तत्त्वदर्शिनः ॥
transliteration: tad viddhi praṇipātena paripraśnena sevayā upadekṣyanti te jñānaṁ jñāninas tattva-darśinaḥ

meanings.english: Learn this knowledge by approaching wise teachers with humility, asking sincere questions, and serving them. They will impart true knowledge to you.
meanings.hindi: इस ज्ञान को जानने के लिए विनम्रता से गुरु के पास जाओ, प्रश्न करो और उनकी सेवा करो; वे तुम्हें सत्य ज्ञान देंगे।
meanings.hinglish: Knowledge paane ke liye humility, genuine questions aur guidance lena zaroori hai.
meanings.marathi: हे ज्ञान मिळवण्यासाठी नम्रतेने गुरुंकडे जा, प्रश्न विचारा आणि सेवा करा; ते तुम्हाला खरे ज्ञान देतील.

core_meaning: True knowledge is gained through humility, inquiry, and guidance from experienced individuals
embedding_text: learning through humility and questioning, mentorship and guidance systems, seeking knowledge from experts, effective learning process, building strong mentor student relationships

sanskrit: यज्ज्ञात्वा न पुनर्मोहमेवं यास्यसि पाण्डव । येन भूतान्यशेषाणि द्रक्ष्यस्यात्मन्यथो मयि ॥
transliteration: yaj jñātvā na punar moham evaṁ yāsyasi pāṇḍava yena bhūtāny aśeṣāṇi drakṣyasy ātmany atho mayi

meanings.english: Having gained this knowledge, O Arjuna, you will not fall into confusion again. You will see all beings within yourself and also within Me.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, इस ज्ञान को प्राप्त करके तुम फिर कभी मोह में नहीं पड़ोगे और सभी प्राणियों को अपने में और मुझमें देखोगे।
meanings.hinglish: True knowledge milne ke baad confusion khatam ho jata hai aur tum sabko ek connected system ki tarah dekhte ho.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, हे ज्ञान मिळाल्यावर तू पुन्हा मोहात पडणार नाहीस आणि सर्व प्राण्यांना स्वतःमध्ये आणि माझ्यात पाहशील.

core_meaning: True knowledge removes confusion and enables a unified understanding of all existence
embedding_text: knowledge removes confusion and creates clarity, unified understanding of systems, seeing interconnectedness, deep awareness and insight, holistic thinking and decision clarity

sanskrit: अपि चेदसि पापेभ्यः सर्वेभ्यः पापकृत्तमः । सर्वं ज्ञानप्लवेनैव वृजिनं सन्तरिष्यसि ॥
transliteration: api ced asi pāpebhyaḥ sarvebhyaḥ pāpa-kṛt-tamaḥ sarvaṁ jñāna-plavenaiva vṛjinaṁ santariṣyasi

meanings.english: Even if you are the most sinful of all sinners, you will cross over all sins by the boat of knowledge.
meanings.hindi: यदि तुम सभी पापियों में भी सबसे बड़े पापी हो, तो भी ज्ञान की नाव से तुम सभी पापों को पार कर जाओगे।
meanings.hinglish: Chahe tumne kitni bhi galtiyan ki ho, knowledge tumhe un sabse bahar nikal sakta hai.
meanings.marathi: तू सर्वात मोठा पापी असलास तरी ज्ञानाच्या नावेद्वारे सर्व पापांवर मात करू शकतोस.

core_meaning: Knowledge has the power to overcome even the greatest mistakes and transform a person’s path
embedding_text: knowledge as error correction system, overcoming mistakes and failures, transformation through learning, recovering from past errors, resilience and growth through understanding

sanskrit: यथैधांसि समिद्धोऽग्निर्भस्मसात्कुरुतेऽर्जुन । ज्ञानाग्निः सर्वकर्माणि भस्मसात्कुरुते तथा ॥
transliteration: yathaidhāṁsi samiddho ’gnir bhasma-sāt kurute ’rjuna jñānāgniḥ sarva-karmāṇi bhasma-sāt kurute tathā

meanings.english: Just as a blazing fire reduces wood to ashes, O Arjuna, the fire of knowledge burns all actions to ashes.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, जैसे प्रज्वलित अग्नि लकड़ी को भस्म कर देती है, वैसे ही ज्ञान की अग्नि सभी कर्मों को भस्म कर देती है।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise fire sab kuch jala deti hai, waise hi knowledge ignorance aur past effects ko destroy kar deta hai.
meanings.marathi: जसा प्रज्वलित अग्नी लाकूड जाळतो, तसाच ज्ञानाचा अग्नी सर्व कर्मांना भस्म करतो.

core_meaning: True knowledge has the power to completely eliminate ignorance and neutralize the effects of past actions
embedding_text: knowledge destroys ignorance and confusion, transforming mindset through understanding, eliminating past limitations, building strong knowledge foundation, clarity through deep insight

sanskrit: न हि ज्ञानेन सदृशं पवित्रमिह विद्यते । तत्स्वयं योगसंसिद्धः कालेनात्मनि विन्दति ॥
transliteration: na hi jñānena sadṛśaṁ pavitram iha vidyate tat svayaṁ yoga-saṁsiddhaḥ kālenātmani vindati

meanings.english: In this world, there is nothing as pure as knowledge. One who is perfected in yoga realizes this knowledge within themselves in due time.
meanings.hindi: इस संसार में ज्ञान के समान पवित्र कुछ भी नहीं है। जो योग में सिद्ध होता है, वह समय के साथ इस ज्ञान को अपने भीतर प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Is duniya me knowledge se zyada powerful aur pure kuch nahi hai, aur time ke saath ye andar develop hota hai.
meanings.marathi: या जगात ज्ञानासारखे पवित्र काहीच नाही. योगसिद्ध व्यक्ती वेळेनुसार हे ज्ञान स्वतःमध्ये प्राप्त करतो.

core_meaning: Knowledge is the highest form of purification, gradually realized through consistent practice and inner development
embedding_text: knowledge as highest purification, long term learning and growth, clarity through consistent practice, deep understanding over time, self realization and awareness

sanskrit: श्रद्धावाँल्लभते ज्ञानं तत्परः संयतेन्द्रियः । ज्ञानं लब्ध्वा परां शान्तिमचिरेणाधिगच्छति ॥
transliteration: śraddhāvān labhate jñānaṁ tat-paraḥ saṁyatendriyaḥ jñānaṁ labdhvā parāṁ śāntim acireṇādhigacchati

meanings.english: A faithful person who is dedicated and has control over the senses attains knowledge; having gained knowledge, they quickly achieve supreme peace.
meanings.hindi: श्रद्धावान, इन्द्रियों को संयमित रखने वाला और समर्पित व्यक्ति ज्ञान प्राप्त करता है; ज्ञान प्राप्त करके वह शीघ्र ही परम शांति को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan belief, focus aur discipline rakhta hai, wo knowledge paata hai aur phir inner peace achieve karta hai.
meanings.marathi: श्रद्धावान, संयमी आणि तत्पर व्यक्ती ज्ञान प्राप्त करतो आणि त्यानंतर लवकरच परम शांती प्राप्त करतो.

core_meaning: Knowledge requires faith, dedication, and discipline, and once attained, it leads to deep inner peace
use_cases: importance of belief in achieving goals
focus and consistency in personal growth
embedding_text: faith dedication and discipline for gaining knowledge, importance of focus and consistency, achieving inner peace through learning, structured self development, eligibility conditions for knowledge

sanskrit: अज्ञश्चाश्रद्दधानश्च संशयात्मा विनश्यति । नायं लोकोऽस्ति न परो न सुखं संशयात्मनः ॥
transliteration: ajñaś cāśraddadhānaś ca saṁśayātmā vinaśyati nāyaṁ loko ’sti na paro na sukhaṁ saṁśayātmanaḥ

meanings.english: The ignorant, the faithless, and the doubting person is ruined. For such a person, there is neither this world, nor the next, nor happiness.
meanings.hindi: अज्ञानी, श्रद्धा रहित और संदेह से भरा व्यक्ति नष्ट हो जाता है; ऐसे व्यक्ति के लिए न यह लोक है, न परलोक, और न ही सुख।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan ignorant, faithless aur doubt me rehta hai, wo progress nahi kar pata aur na hi peace milti hai.
meanings.marathi: अज्ञानी, श्रद्धारहित आणि संशयी मनुष्य नष्ट होतो; त्याला ना हा लोक, ना परलोक, आणि ना सुख मिळते.

core_meaning: Lack of knowledge, faith, and clarity leads to confusion, failure, and absence of fulfillment
use_cases: understanding consequences of doubt and indecision
importance of clarity and belief in progress
developing trust in learning and growth processes
embedding_text: lack of knowledge faith and clarity leads to failure, consequences of doubt and indecision, importance of belief and confidence, avoiding confusion and overthinking, building trust in learning and growth

sanskrit: योगसन्न्यस्तकर्माणं ज्ञानसञ्छिन्नसंशयम् । आत्मवन्तं न कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनञ्जय ॥
transliteration: yoga-sannyasta-karmāṇaṁ jñāna-sañchinna-saṁśayam ātmavantaṁ na karmāṇi nibadhnanti dhanañ-jaya

meanings.english: One who has renounced actions through yoga, whose doubts are destroyed by knowledge, and who is self-controlled, is not bound by actions, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे धनंजय, जिसने योग के द्वारा कर्मों का त्याग किया है, जिसका संदेह ज्ञान से नष्ट हो गया है और जो आत्मसंयमी है, उसे कर्म बांध नहीं सकते।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan knowledge se apne doubts clear karta hai, disciplined rehta hai aur attachment se free hai, wo actions se bind nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: हे धनंजय, ज्याने योगाने कर्मांचा त्याग केला आहे, ज्याचे संशय ज्ञानाने नष्ट झाले आहेत आणि जो आत्मसंयमी आहे, त्याला कर्म बांधत नाहीत.

core_meaning: When actions are performed with discipline, clarity, and without doubt, they no longer create bondage or negative consequences
use_cases: achieving freedom from stress and overthinking
embedding_text: freedom from action through knowledge and discipline, removing doubt for confident decisions, self control and clarity in execution, stress free performance, acting without hesitation or fear

sanskrit: तस्मादज्ञानसम्भूतं हृत्स्थं ज्ञानासिनात्मनः । छित्त्वैनं संशयं योगमातिष्ठोत्तिष्ठ भारत ॥
transliteration: tasmād ajñāna-sambhūtaṁ hṛt-sthaṁ jñānāsinātmanaḥ chittvainaṁ saṁśayaṁ yogam ātiṣṭhottiṣṭha bhārata

meanings.english: Therefore, with the sword of knowledge, cut off this doubt born of ignorance in your heart. Take refuge in yoga and arise, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: अतः अपने हृदय में उत्पन्न अज्ञानजनित संदेह को ज्ञानरूपी तलवार से काटकर योग में स्थित हो जाओ और उठ खड़े हो, हे भारत।
meanings.hinglish: Apne doubt ko knowledge se remove karo, action lo aur confidently aage badho.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून अज्ञानातून निर्माण झालेला संशय ज्ञानरूपी तलवारीने कापून योगात स्थिर हो आणि उठ, हे भारत.

core_meaning: Eliminate doubt through knowledge and take decisive, confident action
embedding_text: removing doubt through knowledge and taking action, confident decision making, overcoming indecision, clarity leading to action, determination and forward movement

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । सन्न्यासं कर्मणां कृष्ण पुनर्योगं च शंससि । यच्छ्रेय एतयोरेकं तन्मे ब्रूहि सुनिश्चितम् ॥ १ ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca sannyāsaṁ karmaṇāṁ kṛṣṇa punar yogaṁ ca śaṁsasi yac chreya etayor ekaṁ tan me brūhi su-niścitam

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Krishna, first of all You ask me to renounce work, and then again You recommend work with devotion. Now will You kindly tell me definitely which of the two is more beneficial?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे कृष्ण! पहले आप मुझे कर्म त्यागने के लिए कहते हैं और फिर भक्तिपूर्वक कर्म करने की सलाह देते हैं। क्या आप अब कृपा करके निश्चित रूप से मुझे बताएंगे कि इन दोनों में से कौन सा अधिक लाभदायक है?
meanings.hinglish: Arjun ne pucha: Krishna, pehle aapne kaha kaam chhod do (Sannyasa), fir aap keh rahe ho kaam karo par devotion ke saath (Karma-yoga). In dono me se mere liye best kya hai, ye clear bataiye.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: हे कृष्णा, आपण प्रथम कर्मांच्या संन्यासाची प्रशंसा करता आणि पुन्हा कर्मयोगाची प्रशंसा करता. या दोन्हींपैकी जे माझ्यासाठी निश्चितपणे श्रेयस्कर असेल, ते मला सांगा.

core_meaning: The fundamental dilemma between 'Renunciation' (quitting action) and 'Action in Devotion' (doing action without attachment).
use_cases: resolving the conflict between professional life and spiritual growth
choosing between a life of quiet isolation and active social contribution
clarifying whether one needs to 'leave the world' to find peace
addressing the feeling of being overwhelmed by contradictory advice
seeking a practical path for self-improvement
embedding_text: renunciation vs action in devotion, which is better, sannyasa vs karma yoga, arjuna's confusion, seeking definitive path

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । सन्न्यास: कर्मयोगश्च नि:श्रेयसकरावुभौ । तयोस्तु कर्मसन्न्यासात्कर्मयोगो विशिष्यते ॥ २ ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca sannyāsaḥ karma-yogaś ca niḥśreyasa-karāv ubhau tayos tu karma-sannyāsāt karma-yogo viśiṣyate

meanings.english: The Personality of Godhead replied: The renunciation of work and work in devotion are both good for liberation. But, of the two, work in devotional service is better than renunciation of work.
meanings.hindi: श्रीभगवान ने उत्तर दिया: मुक्ति के लिए कर्म का त्याग और भक्तिमय कर्म, दोनों ही उत्तम हैं। किन्तु इन दोनों में से, कर्म का त्याग करने की अपेक्षा भक्तिमय कर्म (कर्मयोग) श्रेष्ठ है।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna ne kaha: Kaam chhodna aur devotion ke saath kaam karna, dono hi tumhe freedom dilayenge. Par kaam chhodne se zyada better hai ki tum sahi attitude ke saath kaam karte raho.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान म्हणाले: कर्मसंन्यास आणि कर्मयोग हे दोन्हीही परम कल्याणाचे मार्ग आहेत. परंतु या दोघांमध्ये कर्मसंन्यासापेक्षा कर्मयोग श्रेष्ठ आहे.

core_meaning: Krishna's verdict: While both lead to the goal, 'Karma Yoga' (Active Service) is superior to 'Sannyasa' (Passive Renunciation) because it is more practical and purifying.
use_cases: understanding that spirituality is lived in the office/home, not just temples
choosing to face responsibilities rather than running away from them
learning that 'doing good' is more effective than 'doing nothing'
integrating work-life balance with spiritual values
prioritizing active contribution over dry theoretical knowledge
embedding_text: karma yoga is better than sannyasa, work in devotion is superior, both lead to liberation, active service over passive renunciation

sanskrit: ज्ञेय: स नित्यसन्न्यासी यो न द्वेष्टि न काङ्‍क्षति । निर्द्वन्द्वो हि महाबाहो सुखं बन्धात्प्रमुच्यते ॥ ३ ॥
transliteration: jñeyaḥ sa nitya-sannyāsī yo na dveṣṭi na kāṅkṣati nirdvandvo hi mahā-bāho sukhaṁ bandhāt pramucyate

meanings.english: One who neither hates nor desires the fruits of his activities is known to be always renounced. Such a person, free from all dualities, easily overcomes material bondage and is completely liberated, O mighty-armed Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: जो मनुष्य अपने कर्मों के फलों से न तो घृणा करता है और न ही उनकी इच्छा करता है, वह सदैव संन्यासी माना जाता है। ऐसा व्यक्ति समस्त द्वंद्वों से मुक्त होकर भौतिक बंधन को आसानी से पार कर जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Asli sannyasi wo hai jise na kisi se nafrat hai na kisi result ka lalach. Jo in dono ke beech me balance bana leta hai, wo life ki tension se azaad ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: जो कोणाचा द्वेष करत नाही आणि कशाची आकांक्षा धरत नाही, तो नित्य संन्यासीच जाणावा. कारण द्वंद्वापलीकडे असलेला मनुष्य सुखाने संसाराच्या बंधनातून मुक्त होतो.

core_meaning: Internal Renunciation: You don't need to change your clothes or home; true renunciation is a state of mind free from 'likes' (desire) and 'dislikes' (hatred).
use_cases: practicing emotional neutrality during workplace conflicts
reducing anxiety about future results (desires) and past regrets (hatred)
becoming a 'monk in a suit' by managing internal states
breaking free from the cycle of 'mood swings' based on circumstances
attaining a steady state of mind regardless of external success or failure
embedding_text: true sannyasi neither hates nor desires, nitya sannyasi, free from dualities, overcoming material bondage through neutral mind

sanskrit:
सांख्ययोगौ पृथग्बाला: प्रवदन्ति न पण्डिता: |
एकमप्यास्थित: सम्यगुभयोर्विन्दते फलम् ॥ ४ ॥
transliteration:
sāṅkhya-yogau pṛthag bālāḥ pravadanti na paṇḍitāḥ
ekam apy āsthitaḥ samyag ubhayor vindate phalam

meanings.english: Only the ignorant speak of analytical study (Sāṅkhya) and devotional action (Karma-yoga) as being different. The truly learned say that by correctly following even one of these paths, one achieves the results of both.
meanings.hindi: अज्ञानी लोग ही सांख्य (ज्ञान) और कर्मयोग को अलग-अलग कहते हैं, विद्वान नहीं। जो किसी एक में भी अच्छी तरह स्थित हो जाता है, वह दोनों के फल प्राप्त कर लेता है।
meanings.hinglish: Sirf nadan log hi 'Gyan' aur 'Karma' ko alag samajhte hain. Jo kisi ek raste ko bhi sahi se follow karta hai, use dono ka result mil jata hai.
meanings.marathi: अज्ञानी लोक सांख्य आणि कर्मयोग वेगवेगळे आहेत असे म्हणतात, पंडित नाही. यापैकी एकाही मार्गाचे नीट आचरण केले तरी दोन्हीचे फळ मिळते.

core_meaning: Unity of Theory and Practice: Intellectual understanding (Sāṅkhya) and practical action (Yoga) are not contradictory; they are two sides of the same coin leading to the same destination.
use_cases: balancing deep research with hands-on project execution
realizing that studying technology and actually building apps are interdependent
avoiding 'analysis paralysis' by understanding that action is a form of learning
bridging the gap between academic theory and industry practice
seeing how 'finding the root' and 'watering the root' serve the same tree
embedding_text: sankhya and yoga are not different, results of both from one, learned see unity

sanskrit:
यत्सांख्यै: प्राप्यते स्थानं तद्योगैरपि गम्यते |
एकं सांख्यं च योगं च य: पश्यति स पश्यति ॥ ५ ॥
transliteration:
yat sāṅkhyaiḥ prāpyate sthānaṁ tad yogair api gamyate
ekaṁ sāṅkhyaṁ ca yogaṁ ca yaḥ paśyati sa paśyati

meanings.english: One who knows that the position reached by means of analytical study can also be attained by devotional service, and who therefore sees them to be on the same level, sees things as they are.
meanings.hindi: जो यह जानता है कि सांख्य द्वारा प्राप्त स्थान कर्मयोग द्वारा भी प्राप्त किया जा सकता है, और जो इन दोनों को एक समान देखता है, वही वास्तव में देखता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo ye samajhta hai ki gyan se jo jagah milti hai wahi kaam (devotion) se bhi milti hai, wahi asliyat dekh raha hai. Dono ek hi hain.
meanings.marathi: सांख्ययोग्यांनी जे स्थान मिळवले जाते, तेच कर्मयोग्यांकडूनही मिळवले जाते. जो सांख्य आणि योग यांना एक मानतो, तोच खरा पाहणारा होय.

core_meaning: The Singular Goal: True vision is the ability to see beyond superficial methods and realize that detachment from matter (Sāṅkhya) and attachment to the Divine (Yoga) are the exact same state.
use_cases: developing a holistic perspective on complex systems
recognizing that 'logic' and 'service' end at the same truth
understanding that removing a bug (detachment) and writing clean code (action) are parts of one goal
finding peace in work by realizing it is as spiritual as meditation
valuing different professional roles as equally contributing to a final vision
embedding_text: position reached by sankhya and yoga is same, seeing gyan and karma as one

sanskrit: सन्न्यासस्तु महाबाहो दु:खमाप्‍तुमयोगत: । योगयुक्तो मुनिर्ब्रह्म न चिरेणाधिगच्छति ॥ ६ ॥
transliteration: sannyāsas tu mahā-bāho duḥkham āptum ayogataḥ yoga-yukto munir brahma na cireṇādhigacchati

meanings.english: Merely renouncing all activities yet not engaging in the devotional service of the Lord cannot make one happy. But a thoughtful person engaged in devotional service can achieve the Supreme without delay.
meanings.hindi: भक्ति में लगे बिना केवल कर्मों का त्याग दुःख का कारण बनता है। किन्तु भक्ति में लगा हुआ विचारवान व्यक्ति शीघ्र ही परब्रह्म को प्राप्त कर लेता है।
meanings.hinglish: Bina kisi bade purpose ke kaam chhod dena sirf dukh deta hai. Par agar tum devotion ke saath kaam karte ho, toh tum bahut jaldi peace aur perfection paa lete ho.
meanings.marathi: हे महाबाहो अर्जुना, कर्मयोगाशिवाय संन्यास प्राप्त होणे कठीण आहे. परंतु कर्मयोगाने युक्त असलेला मुनी शीघ्रच ब्रह्माला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: The Danger of Vacuity: Renouncing action without a positive spiritual engagement leads to distress. Service is the shortcut to peace.
use_cases: understanding why 'early retirement' without a purpose often leads to depression
realizing that staying busy with a good cause is a form of meditation
avoiding the trap of 'lazy spirituality' or escapism
accelerating personal growth through selfless service
finding happiness through engagement rather than withdrawal
embedding_text: renunciation without service causes distress, yoga-yukto attains brahma quickly, service as a shortcut, danger of passive withdrawal

sanskrit: योगयुक्तो विश‍ुद्धात्मा विजितात्मा जितेन्द्रिय: । सर्वभूतात्मभूत‍ात्मा कुर्वन्नपि न लिप्यते ॥ ७ ॥
transliteration: yoga-yukto viśuddhātmā vijitātmā jitendriyaḥ sarva-bhūtātma-bhūtātmā kurvann api na lipyate

meanings.english: One who works in devotion, who is a pure soul, and who controls his mind and senses is dear to everyone, and everyone is dear to him. Though always working, such a man is never entangled.
meanings.hindi: जो भक्तिभाव से कर्म करता है, जो विशुद्ध आत्मा है और जो अपने मन तथा इन्द्रियों को वश में रखता है, वह सबों को प्रिय होता है और सभी उसे प्रिय होते हैं। ऐसा व्यक्ति कर्म करते हुए भी कभी उनमें नहीं बँधता।
