aprāpya yoga-saṁsiddhiṁ kāṁ gatiṁ kṛṣṇa gacchati

meanings.english: Arjuna asks: O Kṛṣṇa, what is the destination of the unsuccessful transcendentalist, who begins with faith but later deviates due to worldly-mindedness?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने पूछा: हे कृष्ण! उस व्यक्ति का क्या होता है जो श्रद्धा से योग शुरू तो करता है, पर बाद में सांसारिक मोह के कारण भटक जाता है और सिद्धि प्राप्त नहीं कर पाता?
meanings.hinglish: Arjun ne pucha: Krishna, us insaan ka kya hota hai jo bharose ke sath shuru karta hai par beech mein bhatak jata hai?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला, हे कृष्णा, ज्याला श्रद्धा आहे परंतु जो योगापासून विचलित झाला आहे, त्याला कोणती गती प्राप्त होते?

core_meaning: The Fear of Falling Short: A very human worry—'What if I try to be a good person/meditator and fail? Did I just waste my time?'
use_cases: addressing the anxiety of failing at a noble pursuit
questioning if 'halfway' spiritual progress is worth anything
seeking assurance for an uncertain future
embedding_text: Arjuna asks destination of unsuccessful transcendentalist who has faith but deviates

sanskrit:
कच्च‍िन्नोभयविभ्रष्टश्छिन्नाभ्रमिव नश्यति |
अप्रतिष्ठो महाबाहो विमूढो ब्रह्मण: पथि ॥ ३८ ॥
transliteration:
kaccin nobhaya-vibhraṣṭaś chinnābhram iva naśyati
apratiṣṭho mahā-bāho vimūḍho brahmaṇaḥ pathi

meanings.english: Does not such a man, bewildered from the path of transcendence, fall away from both spiritual and material success and perish like a riven cloud?
meanings.hindi: क्या ऐसा व्यक्ति, जो आध्यात्मिक पथ से भटक गया है, आध्यात्मिक और भौतिक दोनों तरह की सफलता से गिरकर फटे हुए बादल की तरह नष्ट नहीं हो जाता?
meanings.hinglish: Kya aisa insaan 'fate hue baadal' (riven cloud) ki tarah dono jagah se barbaad nahi ho jata? Na usse duniya milti hai na bhagwan.
meanings.marathi: हे महाबाहो, तो निराधार आणि विमूढ झालेला पुरुष छिन्नविच्छिन्न झालेल्या ढगाप्रमाणे दोन्हीकडून भ्रष्ट होऊन नष्ट तर होत नाही ना?

core_meaning: The 'Riven Cloud' Metaphor: A cloud that detaches from one mass but fails to join another simply evaporates. Arjuna fears losing worldly comfort without gaining spiritual peace.
use_cases: the fear of leaving a stable job for a passion project and failing
worrying that being 'too ethical' will make you lose in the business world
feeling like you belong nowhere when you are in a transition phase
embedding_text: Does unsuccessful yogi perish like a riven cloud losing both successes?

sanskrit:
एतन्मे संशयं कृष्ण छेत्तुमर्हस्यशेषत: |
त्वदन्य: संशयस्यास्य छेत्ता न ह्युपपद्यते ॥ ३९ ॥
transliteration:
etan me saṁśayaṁ kṛṣṇa chettum arhasy aśeṣataḥ
tvad-anyaḥ saṁśayasyāsya chettā na hy upपद्यते

meanings.english: This is my doubt, O Kṛṣṇa, and I ask You to dispel it completely. For but You, no one can destroy this doubt.
meanings.hindi: हे कृष्ण! यह मेरा संदेह है और मैं चाहता हूँ कि आप इसे पूरी तरह मिटा दें। आपके अलावा इस संदेह को कोई और दूर नहीं कर सकता।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, mera ye doubt sirf aap hi door kar sakte ho. Aapke alawa koi dusra iska jawab nahi de sakta.
meanings.marathi: हे कृष्णा, माझा हा संशय आपण पूर्णपणे दूर करावा; कारण आपल्याशिवाय हा संशय घालविणारा दुसरा कोणी मिळणे शक्य नाही.

core_meaning: Total Surrender to Wisdom: Arjuna recognizes that only a Master (who knows past, present, and future) can answer the existential fear of the soul's destination.
use_cases: seeking a mentor for the most difficult life questions
trusting that there is a definitive answer to spiritual doubts
acknowledging the limits of human logic and seeking higher guidance
embedding_text: Arjuna asks Kṛṣṇa to dispel his doubt completely

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच |
पार्थ नैवेह नामुत्र विनाशस्तस्य विद्यते |
न हि कल्याणकृत्कश्चिद्दुर्गतिं तात गच्छति ॥ ४० ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca: pārtha naiveha nāmutra vināśas tasya vidyate
na hi kalyāṇa-kṛt kaścid durgatim tāta gacchati

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: Son of Pṛthā, a transcendentalist engaged in auspicious activities does not meet with destruction either in this world or in the next; one who does good, My friend, is never overcome by evil.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: हे पार्थ! शुभ कार्य करने वाले का विनाश न तो इस लोक में होता है और न ही परलोक में। मेरे मित्र! अच्छा करने वाले की कभी दुर्गति नहीं होती।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna ne kaha: Arjun, accha karne wale ka bura kabhi nahi hota, na is janam mein na agle janam mein. Jo bhala kaam karta hai, wo kabhi dukh mein nahi doobta.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान म्हणाले, हे पार्था, त्या पुरुषाचा विनाश या लोकी किंवा परलोकीही होत नाही; कारण हे कल्याणा, शुभ कर्म करणाऱ्याची कधीही दुर्गती होत नाही.

core_meaning: The Divine Guarantee: This is the 'Insurance Policy' of the soul. No effort toward goodness is ever wasted. Even if you fail today, the 'points' you earned for your soul are safe forever.
use_cases: finding peace when a project aimed at helping others fails
trusting that 'doing the right thing' is its own protection
reducing the fear of the afterlife by focusing on 'Kalyāṇa' (auspicious work) now
embedding_text: one who does good is never overcome by evil, no destruction for transcendentalist

sanskrit:
प्राप्य पुण्यकृतां लोकानुषित्वा शाश्वती: समा: |
श‍ुचीनां श्रीमतां गेहे योगभ्रष्टोऽभिजायते ॥ ४१ ॥
transliteration:
prāpya puṇya-kṛtāṁ lokān uṣitvā śāśvatīḥ samāḥ
śucīnāṁ śrīmatāṁ gehe yoga-bhraṣṭo ’bhijāyate

meanings.english: The unsuccessful yogī, after many, many years of enjoyment on the planets of the pious living entities, is born into a family of righteous people, or into a family of rich aristocracy.
meanings.hindi: असफल योगी पवित्र लोकों में वर्षों तक सुख भोगने के बाद या तो सदाचारी लोगों के परिवार में या समृद्ध (अमीर) परिवार में जन्म लेता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo yogi raste mein bhatak jata hai, wo pehle swarg jaisa sukh pata hai aur fir ya toh kisi sanskaari ya kisi bade ameer parivar mein dobara janam leta hai.
meanings.marathi: योगभ्रष्ट पुरुष पुण्यवानांच्या लोकात जाऊन तिथे पुष्कळ काळ राहतो आणि नंतर श्रीमंत किंवा सदाचारी लोकांच्या घरी जन्म घेतो.

core_meaning: The Comforting Detour: If you start the path but get distracted by material desires, your effort isn't wasted. You get to fulfill those desires in higher realms first, then return to an environment that gives you a 'privileged' fresh start.
use_cases: understanding that material success can be a result of past spiritual effort
realizing that a 'good start' in life is a responsibility to continue one's inner journey
releasing the fear that spiritual failure leads to immediate 'downfall'
embedding_text: unsuccessful yogi born in righteous or prosperous family after heavenly enjoyment

sanskrit:
अथवा योगिनामेव कुले भवति धीमताम् |
एतद्धि दुर्लभतरं लोके जन्म यदीदृशम् ॥ ४२ ॥
transliteration:
atha vā yoginām eva kule bhavati dhīmatām
etad dhi durlabha-taraṁ loke janma yad īdṛśam

meanings.english: Or [if unsuccessful after long practice] he takes his birth in a family of transcendentalists who are surely great in wisdom. Certainly, such a birth is rare in this world.
meanings.hindi: अथवा (यदि वह लंबे अभ्यास के बाद असफल हुआ हो तो) वह ज्ञानी योगियों के परिवार में जन्म लेता है। वास्तव में, इस संसार में ऐसा जन्म अत्यंत दुर्लभ है।
meanings.hinglish: Ya phir wo aise parivar mein janam leta hai jahan sab gyaani aur yogi ho. Aisa janam milna bahut badi baat hai.
meanings.marathi: किंवा ज्ञानी योग्यांच्या कुळातच त्याचा जन्म होतो. असा जन्म मिळणे या लोकात खरोखर अत्यंत कठीण आहे.

core_meaning: The Fast Track: For those who were very close to perfection but failed at the last minute, Kṛṣṇa gives them a birth in a family of 'Wisdom.' They are born into environments where spirituality is the air they breathe from day one.
use_cases: recognizing that being born into a spiritual environment is a 'rare' gift
valuing wisdom and spiritual background over mere material wealth
identifying the 'rare' opportunity of having spiritual mentors since childhood
embedding_text: advanced unsuccessful yogi born in wise family, very rare birth

sanskrit:
तत्र तं बुद्धिसंयोगं लभते पौर्वदेहिकम् |
यतते च ततो भूय: संसिद्धौ कुरुनन्दन ॥ ४३ ॥
transliteration:
tatra taṁ buddhi-saṁyogaṁ labhate paurva-dehikam
yatate ca tato bhūyaḥ saṁsiddhau kuru-nandana

meanings.english: On taking such a birth, he revives the divine consciousness of his previous life, and he again tries to make further progress in order to achieve complete success, O son of Kuru.
meanings.hindi: नया जन्म लेने पर उनके पिछले जीवन की चेतना फिर से जागृत हो जाती है और वे फिर से पूर्णता के लिए प्रयास करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Naye janam mein pichle janam ki spiritual knowledge wapas yaad aane lagti hai aur wo insaan firse apni journey puri karne mein lag jata hai.
meanings.marathi: तिथे त्याला पूर्वजन्मीची बुद्धी प्राप्त होते आणि तो पुन्हा सिद्धीसाठी प्रयत्न करू लागतो.

core_meaning: Spiritual Resume: Your 'progress bar' is saved. In the new life, the soul feels a familiar pull toward previous knowledge, allowing you to pick up exactly where you left off without starting from zero.
use_cases: understanding why some things feel 'familiar' without ever learning them in this life
trusting that spiritual effort is a permanent asset
approaching self-improvement as an ongoing multi-life project
embedding_text: revival of previous life's consciousness and further progress toward success

sanskrit:
पूर्वाभ्यासेन तेनैव ह्रियते ह्यवशोऽपि स: |
जिज्ञासुरपि योगस्य शब्दब्रह्मातिवर्तते ॥ ४४ ॥
transliteration:
pūrvābhyāsena tenaiva hriyate hy avaśo ’pi saḥ
jijñāsur api yogasya śabda-brahmātivartate

meanings.english: By virtue of the divine consciousness of his previous life, he automatically becomes attracted to the yogic principles—even without seeking them. Such an inquisitive transcendentalist stands always above the ritualistic principles of the scriptures.
meanings.hindi: पिछले अभ्यास के कारण वे स्वतः ही योग की ओर खिंचे चले आते हैं—बिना किसी विशेष प्रयास के। ऐसा जिज्ञासु व्यक्ति शास्त्रों के कर्मकांडों से ऊपर उठ जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Pichli practice ki wajah se wo apne aap yoga ki taraf attract hota hai, bhale hi wo dhoond na raha ho. Aisa insaan sirf dikhawe ke rituals se upar hota hai.
meanings.marathi: पूर्व अभ्यासामुळे तो न कळत योगमार्गाकडे ओढला जातो. योगाची जिज्ञासा असलेला पुरुष सुद्धा वेदांतील कर्मकांडांच्या पलीकडे जातो.

core_meaning: Automatic Attraction: Ever met someone who is 'naturally' wise or ethical? That's 'Pūrvābhyāsa'. Their past life's momentum is so strong that they gravitate toward truth automatically, bypassing empty rituals.
use_cases: trusting your 'natural' inclination toward goodness or meditation
moving past mindless rituals to find the core logic of spirituality
realizing that past hard work is now your current 'instinct'
embedding_text: automatically attracted to yoga principles due to past practice, transcends rituals

sanskrit:
प्रयत्‍नाद्यतमानस्तु योगी संश‍ुद्धकिल्बिष: |
अनेकजन्मसंसिद्धस्ततो याति परां गतिम् ॥ ४५ ॥
transliteration:
prayatnād yatamānas tu yogī saṁśuddha-kilbiṣaḥ
aneka-janma-saṁsiddhas tato yāti parāṁ gatim

meanings.english: And when the yogī engages himself with sincere endeavor in making further progress, being washed of all contaminations, then ultimately, achieving perfection after many, many births of practice, he attains the supreme goal.
meanings.hindi: जब योगी निष्ठा के साथ प्रयास करता है, तो अनेक जन्मों के अभ्यास से पवित्र होकर वह अंततः परम सिद्धि और लक्ष्य को प्राप्त कर लेता है।
meanings.hinglish: Mehnat karne wala yogi jab kayi janmon ki practice se saaf ho jata hai, toh wo finally God ko paa leta hai.
meanings.marathi: अनेक जन्मांच्या अभ्यासाने शुद्ध झालेला योगी प्रयत्नपूर्वक सिद्धी मिळवून शेवटी परम गतीला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: The Compounding Effect: Spirituality is the ultimate 'long game.' Every lifetime of effort cleanses the soul. Perfection isn't an instant event but the result of 'compounding' sincerity over time.
use_cases: staying motivated when spiritual progress feels slow
focusing on cleaning internal habits step-by-step
valuing long-term consistency over occasional intensity
embedding_text: perfection after many births, washed of all contaminations, attains supreme goal

sanskrit:
तपस्विभ्योऽधिको योगी ज्ञानिभ्योऽपि मतोऽधिक: |
कर्मिभ्यश्चाधिको योगी तस्माद्योगी भवार्जुन ॥ ४६ ॥
transliteration:
tapasvibhyo ’dhiko yogī jñānibhyo ’pi mato ’dhikaḥ
karmibhyaś cādhiko yogī tasmād yogī bhavārjuna

meanings.english: A yogī is greater than the ascetic, greater than the empiricist and greater than the fruitive worker. Therefore, O Arjuna, in all circumstances, be a yogī.
meanings.hindi: एक योगी तपस्वी से श्रेष्ठ है, ज्ञानी से श्रेष्ठ है और सकाम कर्मी से भी श्रेष्ठ है। इसलिए हे अर्जुन! तुम हर परिस्थिति में एक योगी बनो।
meanings.hinglish: Yogi wo hai jo sirf kasht nahi jhelta (tapasvi), sirf kitabi gyaan nahi rakhta (gyani) aur sirf phal ke liye kaam nahi karta (karmi). Isliye Arjun, tum Yogi bano.
meanings.marathi: योगी हा तपस्व्यांपेक्षा श्रेष्ठ आहे, ज्ञान्यांपेक्षाही श्रेष्ठ मानला जातो आणि कर्मकांडी लोकांपेक्षाही श्रेष्ठ आहे; म्हणून हे अर्जुना, तू योगी हो.

core_meaning: The Superiority of Connection: A 'Yogi' is anyone who links their actions to the Divine. Kṛṣṇa argues that 'Connection' (Yoga) is better than just 'Dry Knowledge' or 'Hard Penance' or 'Greedy Work.'
use_cases: choosing a lifestyle that balances work, knowledge, and inner peace
adding a higher purpose to daily tasks to avoid 'burnout'
integrating mindfulness into every role you play
embedding_text: yogī greater than ascetic wise and worker, in all circumstances be a yogi

sanskrit:
योगिनामपि सर्वेषां मद्ग‍तेनान्तरात्मना |
श्रद्धावान्भजते यो मां स मे युक्ततमो मत: ॥ ४७ ॥
transliteration:
yoginām api sarveṣāṁ mad-gatenāntar-ātmanā
śraddhāvān bhajate yo māṁ sa me yukta-tamo mataḥ

meanings.english: And of all yogīs, the one with great faith who always abides in Me, thinks of Me within himself and renders transcendental loving service to Me—he is the most intimately united with Me in yoga and is the highest of all.
meanings.hindi: और समस्त योगियों में भी जो अत्यंत श्रद्धापूर्वक मेरे परायण होकर, अपने अंतःकरण से मुझमें लगा रहता है और मेरी प्रेममयी सेवा करता है, वही मेरे विचार में सबसे श्रेष्ठ योगी है।
meanings.hinglish: Saare yogiyon mein wo best hai jo poore bharose ke saath mere (Krishna) baare mein sochta hai aur mujhse pyaar karta hai. Wo sabse top level ka yogi hai.
meanings.marathi: सर्व योग्यांमध्येही जो अत्यंत श्रद्धेने माझ्या ठिकाणी मन लावून मला भजतो, तो माझ्या मते सर्वश्रेष्ठ योगी होय.

core_meaning: The Ultimate Peak - Bhakti: This is the 'Mount Everest' of the chapter. Kṛṣṇa concludes that while meditation and knowledge are good, the highest connection (Yoga) is simply loving Devotion (Bhakti).
use_cases: focusing on the 'heart' of spiritual practice rather than just the mechanics
viewing God as a personal friend or master rather than an abstract concept
turning every action into a loving offering
embedding_text: bhakti yogi is the highest, always thinking of Me with faith, most intimately united

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच मय्यासक्तमनाः पार्थ योगं युञ्जन्मदाश्रयः । असंशयं समग्रं मां यथा ज्ञास्यसि तच्छृणु ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca mayy āsakta-manāḥ pārtha yogaṁ yuñjan mad-āśrayaḥ asaṁśayaṁ samagraṁ māṁ yathā jñāsyasi tac chṛṇu

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: O Arjuna, with your mind attached to Me, practicing yoga under My guidance, you will know Me completely and without doubt—now hear how.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: हे पार्थ, मुझमें मन लगाकर और मेरी शरण में योग का अभ्यास करते हुए, तुम मुझे पूर्ण रूप से और बिना किसी संदेह के जानोगे—अब इसे सुनो।
meanings.hinglish: Agar tum focus, connection aur guidance ke saath practice karoge, to tum complete understanding bina doubt ke paoge.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्थ, माझ्यात मन लावून आणि माझ्या आश्रयाने योगाचा अभ्यास केल्यास तू मला पूर्णपणे आणि निःसंशय जाणशील.

core_meaning: Complete understanding requires focused attention, guidance, and consistent practice, leading to knowledge without doubt
use_cases: deep learning with focus and guidance
embedding_text: focused learning with guidance and practice, achieving complete understanding without doubt, deep concentration and expertise development, structured learning systems, clarity through consistent practice

sanskrit: ज्ञानं तेऽहं सविज्ञानमिदं वक्ष्याम्यशेषतः । यज्ज्ञात्वा नेह भूयोऽन्यज्ज्ञातव्यमवशिष्यते ॥
transliteration: jñānaṁ te ’haṁ sa-vijñānam idaṁ vakṣyāmy aśeṣataḥ yaj jñātvā neha bhūyo ’nyaj jñātavyam avaśiṣyate

meanings.english: I shall now declare to you in full this knowledge together with realization, knowing which nothing more remains to be known in this world.
meanings.hindi: मैं तुम्हें यह ज्ञान और विज्ञान सहित पूर्ण रूप से बताऊँगा, जिसे जानने के बाद इस संसार में जानने योग्य कुछ भी शेष नहीं रहेगा।
meanings.hinglish: Main tumhe theory + practical understanding dono dunga, jise jaanne ke baad kuch bhi baaki nahi rahega seekhne ke liye.
meanings.marathi: मी तुला ज्ञान आणि विज्ञान पूर्णपणे सांगणार आहे, जे जाणल्यानंतर काहीही उरलेले राहणार नाही.

core_meaning: True knowledge includes both theoretical understanding and practical realization, leading to complete comprehension
embedding_text: complete knowledge including theory and practical understanding, deep learning and mastery, full comprehension of systems, combining knowledge with experience, achieving expertise and clarity

sanskrit: मनुष्याणां सहस्रेषु कश्चिद्यतति सिद्धये । यततामपि सिद्धानां कश्चिन्मां वेत्ति तत्त्वतः ॥
transliteration: manuṣyāṇāṁ sahasreṣu kaścid yatati siddhaye yatatām api siddhānāṁ kaścin māṁ vetti tattvataḥ

meanings.english: Among thousands of people, hardly one strives for perfection; and among those who strive and succeed, hardly one truly understands Me in essence.
meanings.hindi: हजारों मनुष्यों में कोई एक सिद्धि के लिए प्रयास करता है, और उन प्रयास करने वालों में भी कोई एक ही मुझे तत्त्व से जान पाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Hazaron me se kuch hi log mastery ke liye effort karte hain, aur unme se bhi bahut kam log true understanding tak pahuchte hain.
meanings.marathi: हजारो लोकांमध्ये एखादाच सिद्धीसाठी प्रयत्न करतो, आणि त्यामधूनही एखादाच मला तत्त्वतः जाणतो.

core_meaning: True mastery and deep understanding are rare because they require consistent effort, discipline, and deeper inquiry beyond surface-level knowledge
embedding_text: rarity of true mastery and deep understanding, importance of consistent effort and discipline, developing mastery mindset, deep learning beyond surface level, achieving expertise through dedication

sanskrit: भूमिरापोऽनलो वायुः खं मनो बुद्धिरेव च । अहङ्कार इतीयं मे भिन्ना प्रकृतिरष्टधा ॥
transliteration: bhūmir āpo ’nalo vāyuḥ khaṁ mano buddhir eva ca ahaṅkāra itīyaṁ me bhinnā prakṛtir aṣṭadhā

meanings.english: Earth, water, fire, air, ether, mind, intellect, and ego—these eight constitute My separated material nature.
meanings.hindi: पृथ्वी, जल, अग्नि, वायु, आकाश, मन, बुद्धि और अहंकार—ये आठ मेरी भिन्न प्रकृति के रूप हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Physical elements + mind + intellect + ego milkar reality ka base system banate hain.
meanings.marathi: पृथ्वी, जल, अग्नी, वायु, आकाश, मन, बुद्धी आणि अहंकार—हे आठ माझ्या भिन्न प्रकृतीचे भाग आहेत.

core_meaning: Reality is composed of both physical elements and internal cognitive components, forming a complete system of existence
use_cases: understanding physical and mental systems together
designing systems combining external and internal factors
embedding_text: eight components of nature including physical elements and mind intellect ego, holistic system of reality, combining internal and external systems, understanding human cognition and environment, structure of existence

sanskrit: अपरेयमितस्त्वन्यां प्रकृतिं विद्धि मे पराम् । जीवभूतां महाबाहो ययेदं धार्यते जगत् ॥
transliteration: apareyam itas tv anyāṁ prakṛtiṁ viddhi me parām jīva-bhūtāṁ mahā-bāho yayedaṁ dhāryate jagat

meanings.english: Besides this inferior nature, know My higher nature, O Arjuna—the living entities (consciousness) which sustain this universe.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, इस निम्न प्रकृति के अतिरिक्त मेरी एक उच्च प्रकृति भी है—जीव रूप में, जो इस जगत को धारण करती है।
meanings.hinglish: Physical system ke alawa ek higher system hai—consciousness jo sabko sustain karta hai.
meanings.marathi: या भौतिक प्रकृतीशिवाय माझी एक उच्च प्रकृती आहे—जीवस्वरूप, जी संपूर्ण जगाला धारण करते.

core_meaning: Beyond physical and mental systems, consciousness is the higher force that sustains and gives life to the entire system
use_cases: designing systems with awareness and intelligence
embedding_text: higher nature consciousness beyond physical elements, life force sustaining the universe, difference between matter and consciousness, awareness based systems, deep understanding of existence

sanskrit: एतद्योनीनि भूतानि सर्वाणीत्युपधारय । अहं कृत्स्नस्य जगतः प्रभवः प्रलयस्तथा ॥
transliteration: etad-yonīni bhūtāni sarvāṇīty upadhāraya ahaṁ kṛtsnasya jagataḥ prabhavaḥ pralayas tathā

meanings.english: Know that all beings have these two (material and spiritual natures) as their source. I am the origin and dissolution of the entire universe.
meanings.hindi: यह समझो कि सभी प्राणी इन दोनों (प्रकृतियों) से उत्पन्न होते हैं। मैं सम्पूर्ण जगत का उद्गम और प्रलय हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Saari existence matter aur consciousness se bani hai, aur unka source aur end ek hi system hai.
meanings.marathi: सर्व भूत या दोन प्रकृतींपासून उत्पन्न होतात. मी संपूर्ण जगाचा उद्गम आणि प्रलय आहे.

core_meaning: All existence arises from and dissolves back into a single unified source, integrating both matter and consciousness
use_cases: understanding origin and lifecycle of systems
modeling systems with creation and destruction phases
holistic system design with source and termination
embedding_text: origin and dissolution of systems, unified source of matter and consciousness, lifecycle of existence, system creation and destruction models, holistic and integrated frameworks

sanskrit: मत्तः परतरं नान्यत्किञ्चिदस्ति धनञ्जय । मयि सर्वमिदं प्रोतं सूत्रे मणिगणा इव ॥
transliteration: mattaḥ parataraṁ nānyat kiñcid asti dhanañ-jaya mayi sarvam idaṁ protaṁ sūtre maṇi-gaṇā iva

meanings.english: O Arjuna, there is nothing higher than Me. Everything rests upon Me, like pearls strung on a thread.
meanings.hindi: हे धनंजय, मुझसे बढ़कर कुछ भी नहीं है। जैसे धागे में मोती पिरोए होते हैं, वैसे ही सब कुछ मुझमें स्थित है।
meanings.hinglish: Sab kuch ek central system se connected hai—jaise pearls ek thread par lage hote hain.
meanings.marathi: हे धनंजय, माझ्यापेक्षा श्रेष्ठ काहीही नाही. सर्व काही माझ्यात मोत्यांच्या माळेसारखे ओवलेले आहे.

core_meaning: All elements of existence are interconnected and depend on a single underlying reality that holds everything together
embedding_text: everything connected through a central source, interconnected systems like pearls on a thread, dependency based architecture, unified system thinking, network and relationship modeling

sanskrit: रसोऽहमप्सु कौन्तेय प्रभास्मि शशिसूर्ययोः । प्रणवः सर्ववेदेषु शब्दः खे पौरुषं नृषु ॥
transliteration: raso ’ham apsu kaunteya prabhāsmi śaśi-sūryayoḥ praṇavaḥ sarva-vedeṣu śabdaḥ khe pauruṣaṁ nṛṣu

meanings.english: O Arjuna, I am the taste in water, the light of the sun and the moon, the sacred syllable Om in the Vedas, the sound in space, and the ability in humans.
meanings.hindi: हे कौन्तेय, मैं जल में रस हूँ, सूर्य और चन्द्रमा का प्रकाश हूँ, वेदों में प्रणव (ॐ) हूँ, आकाश में ध्वनि हूँ और मनुष्यों में पुरुषार्थ हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main nature ke har basic element me hoon—water ka taste, sun-moon ki light, sound aur human ability sab me.
meanings.marathi: हे कौन्तेय, मी पाण्यातील रस, सूर्य-चंद्राचा प्रकाश, वेदांतील ओंकार, आकाशातील ध्वनी आणि मनुष्यातील पुरुषार्थ आहे.

core_meaning: The divine essence is present in fundamental qualities of nature and human abilities, making it accessible through everyday experiences
use_cases: recognizing deeper meaning in everyday experiences
connecting abstract concepts to real-world examples
designing systems based on core properties
embedding_text: divine presence in everyday elements like water light sound and human ability, recognizing fundamental qualities in systems, connecting abstract ideas to real world examples, awareness and mindfulness, core properties of nature and humans

sanskrit: पुण्यो गन्धः पृथिव्यां च तेजश्चास्मि विभावसौ । जीवनं सर्वभूतेषु तपश्चास्मि तपस्विषु ॥
transliteration: puṇyo gandhaḥ pṛthivyāṁ ca tejaś cāsmi vibhāvasau jīvanaṁ sarva-bhūteṣu tapaś cāsmi tapasviṣu

meanings.english: I am the pure fragrance in the earth, the brilliance in fire, the life in all beings, and the austerity in ascetics.
meanings.hindi: मैं पृथ्वी में पवित्र सुगंध हूँ, अग्नि में तेज हूँ, सभी प्राणियों में जीवन हूँ और तपस्वियों में तप हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main nature ke core qualities me hoon—earth ki fragrance, fire ki energy, life force aur discipline sab me.
meanings.marathi: मी पृथ्वीतील पवित्र सुगंध, अग्नीतील तेज, सर्व प्राण्यांतील जीवन आणि तपस्व्यांतील तप आहे.

core_meaning: The divine essence is present in the core qualities of nature, life force, and disciplined effort
use_cases: connecting abstract ideas to physical properties
embedding_text: divine presence in natural qualities like fragrance energy life and discipline, recognizing core properties of systems, understanding life force and vitality, awareness of natural and human qualities, mapping abstract concepts to real world

sanskrit: बीजं मां सर्वभूतानां विद्धि पार्थ सनातनम् । बुद्धिर्बुद्धिमतामस्मि तेजस्तेजस्विनामहम् ॥
transliteration: bījaṁ māṁ sarva-bhūtānāṁ viddhi pārtha sanātanam buddhir buddhimatām asmi tejas tejasvinām aham

meanings.english: O Arjuna, know Me as the eternal seed of all beings. I am the intelligence of the intelligent and the brilliance of the brilliant.
meanings.hindi: हे पार्थ, मुझे सभी प्राणियों का सनातन बीज जानो। मैं बुद्धिमानों की बुद्धि और तेजस्वियों का तेज हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main sabka root cause hoon—intelligence, brilliance aur growth ka source.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्थ, मला सर्व प्राण्यांचा सनातन बीज समज. मी बुद्धिमानांची बुद्धी आणि तेजस्वींचे तेज आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate source exists as the seed of all creation and expresses itself as intelligence and brilliance in beings
use_cases: recognizing intelligence as a fundamental force
building systems based on core principles
identifying sources of creativity and brilliance
embedding_text: source of all beings as seed principle, intelligence and brilliance as fundamental forces, understanding root causes of systems, foundational thinking and origin modeling, creativity and intelligence mapping

sanskrit: बलं बलवतां चाहं कामरागविवर्जितम् । धर्माविरुद्धो भूतेषु कामोऽस्मि भरतर्षभ ॥
transliteration: balaṁ balavatāṁ cāhaṁ kāma-rāga-vivarjitam dharmāviruddho bhūteṣu kāmo ’smi bharatarṣabha

meanings.english: I am the strength of the strong, free from desire and attachment; and I am desire that is not opposed to dharma, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठ, मैं बलवानों का वह बल हूँ जो काम और आसक्ति से रहित है, और मैं वह इच्छा हूँ जो धर्म के विरुद्ध नहीं है।
meanings.hinglish: True power wo hai jo selfish desire se free ho, aur desire bhi tabhi sahi hai jab wo ethical ho.
meanings.marathi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठ, मी काम-आसक्तीपासून मुक्त असलेले बल आहे आणि धर्माच्या विरुद्ध नसलेली इच्छा आहे.

core_meaning: True strength is free from selfish desire, and desire is valid only when aligned with ethical principles
embedding_text: ethical strength without selfish desire, aligning desire with values and principles, responsible use of power, integrity based decision making, controlling impulses and maintaining balance

sanskrit: ये चैव सात्त्विका भावा राजसास्तामसाश्च ये । मत्त एवेति तान्विद्धि न त्वहं तेषु ते मयि ॥
transliteration: ye caiva sāttvikā bhāvā rājasās tāmasāś ca ye matta eveti tān viddhi na tv ahaṁ teṣu te mayi

meanings.english: Know that all states of being—sattva (purity), rajas (activity), and tamas (inertia)—come from Me; yet I am not in them, they are in Me.
meanings.hindi: सात्त्विक, राजस और तामस—ये सभी भाव मुझसे ही उत्पन्न होते हैं; परन्तु मैं उनमें नहीं हूँ, वे मुझमें हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Sab qualities (positive, active, negative) ek source se aati hain, lekin source unse bound nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: सात्त्विक, राजस आणि तामस हे सर्व गुण माझ्याकडून उत्पन्न होतात; पण मी त्यांच्यात नाही, ते माझ्यात आहेत.

core_meaning: All qualities originate from a single source, but the source itself remains beyond and unaffected by them
use_cases: classifying states of mind and actions
building systems with multiple modes or states
embedding_text: three qualities sattva rajas tamas originating from one source, classification of behaviors and states, understanding human psychology and system modes, maintaining neutrality beyond conditions, multi state system design

sanskrit: त्रिभिर्गुणमयैर्भावैरेभिः सर्वमिदं जगत् । मोहितं नाभिजानाति मामेभ्यः परमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: tribhir guṇa-mayair bhāvair ebhiḥ sarvam idaṁ jagat mohitaṁ nābhijānāti mām ebhyaḥ param avyayam

meanings.english: Deluded by these three qualities (sattva, rajas, tamas), the whole world does not recognize Me, who am beyond them and imperishable.
meanings.hindi: इन तीन गुणों से मोहित होकर यह सम्पूर्ण जगत मुझे नहीं पहचानता, जो इनसे परे और अविनाशी हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Teen qualities ke effect me log itne involve ho jaate hain ki wo real truth ko nahi dekh paate.
meanings.marathi: या तीन गुणांनी मोहित झाल्यामुळे जग मला ओळखत नाही, जो या गुणांपलीकडे आणि अविनाशी आहे.

core_meaning: Attachment to different states and qualities creates illusion, preventing recognition of the deeper, unchanging reality
embedding_text: illusion caused by three qualities sattva rajas tamas, cognitive bias and misperception, recognizing deeper reality beyond states, avoiding distraction and confusion, building unbiased decision systems

sanskrit: दैवी ह्येषा गुणमयी मम माया दुरत्यया । मामेव ये प्रपद्यन्ते मायामेतां तरन्ति ते ॥
transliteration: daivī hy eṣā guṇa-mayī mama māyā duratyayā mām eva ye prapadyante māyām etāṁ taranti te

meanings.english: This divine illusion of Mine, made of the three qualities, is difficult to overcome. But those who surrender to Me cross over this illusion.
meanings.hindi: यह मेरी गुणमयी दैवी माया अत्यंत कठिन है, परंतु जो मेरी शरण में आते हैं, वे इस माया को पार कर जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Ye illusion system bahut powerful hai, lekin jo higher truth par focus karte hain wo isse escape kar sakte hain.
meanings.marathi: ही माझी गुणमयी दैवी माया अत्यंत कठीण आहे, पण जे माझ्या शरण येतात ते तिच्यावर मात करतात.

core_meaning: Illusion created by qualities is difficult to overcome, but alignment with the higher truth enables one to transcend it
use_cases: aligning with core truth in decision making
embedding_text: overcoming illusion and cognitive bias through alignment with truth, escaping confusion caused by multiple states, clarity and focus based decision systems, transcending distractions and misperception, higher alignment for better reasoning

sanskrit: न मां दुष्कृतिनो मूढाः प्रपद्यन्ते नराधमाः । माययापहृतज्ञानाः आसुरं भावमाश्रिताः ॥
transliteration: na māṁ duṣkṛtino mūḍhāḥ prapadyante narādhamāḥ māyayāpahṛta-jñānā āsuraṁ bhāvam āśritāḥ

meanings.english: Those who are deluded, sinful, lowest among humans, whose knowledge is stolen by illusion, and who follow demonic tendencies do not surrender to Me.
meanings.hindi: मूर्ख, पापी, मनुष्यों में अधम, जिनका ज्ञान माया ने छीन लिया है और जो आसुरी भाव को अपनाते हैं, वे मेरी शरण में नहीं आते।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log ignorance, negativity aur ego me rehte hain, wo truth ko accept nahi karte aur illusion me hi fase rehte hain.
meanings.marathi: मूर्ख, पापी, अधम मनुष्य, ज्यांचे ज्ञान मायेने हरवले आहे आणि जे आसुरी भाव स्वीकारतात, ते माझ्या शरण येत नाहीत.

core_meaning: Negative tendencies, ignorance, and ego-driven behavior prevent individuals from recognizing truth and overcoming illusion
use_cases: building systems to avoid bias and ignorance
embedding_text: failure to overcome illusion due to ignorance ego and negative tendencies, resistance to truth and clarity, identifying biased and flawed decision making, avoiding negative behavioral patterns, improving awareness and correction systems

sanskrit: चतुर्विधा भजन्ते मां जनाः सुकृतिनोऽर्जुन । आर्तो जिज्ञासुरर्थार्थी ज्ञानी च भरतर्षभ ॥
transliteration: catur-vidhā bhajante māṁ janāḥ su-kṛtino ’rjuna ārto jijñāsur arthārthī jñānī ca bharatarṣabha

meanings.english: O Arjuna, four kinds of virtuous people worship Me: the distressed, the seeker of knowledge, the seeker of wealth, and the wise.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, चार प्रकार के पुण्यात्मा लोग मेरी भक्ति करते हैं—दुःखी, जिज्ञासु, अर्थ की इच्छा रखने वाला और ज्ञानी।
meanings.hinglish: Log alag-alag reasons se seek karte hain—problem solving, curiosity, gain ya pure understanding ke liye.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, चार प्रकारचे पुण्यवान लोक माझी भक्ति करतात—दुःखी, जिज्ञासू, अर्थार्थी आणि ज्ञानी.

core_meaning: People approach higher understanding with different motivations—need, curiosity, desire, or wisdom
embedding_text: four types of seekers distressed curious wealth seeking and wise, user segmentation based on motivation, understanding human intent and behavior, personalized and adaptive systems, classification of users by goals

sanskrit: तेषां ज्ञानी नित्ययुक्त एकभक्तिर्विशिष्यते । प्रियो हि ज्ञानिनोऽत्यर्थमहं स च मम प्रियः ॥
transliteration: teṣāṁ jñānī nitya-yukta eka-bhaktir viśiṣyate priyo hi jñānino ’tyartham ahaṁ sa ca mama priyaḥ

meanings.english: Of these, the wise one, who is always united and devoted to the One, is the best. I am very dear to such a person, and they are very dear to Me.
meanings.hindi: इनमें ज्ञानी, जो नित्य मुझसे जुड़ा रहता है और एकनिष्ठ भक्ति करता है, श्रेष्ठ है। वह मुझे अत्यंत प्रिय है और मैं भी उसे प्रिय हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Jo insaan pure understanding aur consistency ke saath connected rehta hai, wahi highest level par hota hai.
meanings.marathi: यांच्यामध्ये ज्ञानी, जो नेहमी जोडलेला आणि एकनिष्ठ आहे, तो श्रेष्ठ आहे; तो मला प्रिय आहे आणि मी त्याला प्रिय आहे.

core_meaning: Among all types of seekers, the one who seeks with consistent focus and deep understanding is the most advanced
embedding_text: wise seeker as highest level user with consistent focus and understanding, prioritizing deep engagement and expertise, long term learning and connection, identifying advanced users, optimizing for mastery behavior

sanskrit: उदारा: सर्व एवैते ज्ञानी त्वात्मैव मे मतम् । आस्थित: स हि युक्तात्मा मामेवानुत्तमां गतिम् ॥
transliteration: udārāḥ sarva evaite jñānī tv ātmaiva me matam āsthitaḥ sa hi yuktātmā mām evānuttamāṁ gatim

meanings.english: All these seekers are noble, but the wise one is as My very self. Being steadfast, they are established in Me and attain the highest goal.
meanings.hindi: ये सभी भक्त उदार हैं, परंतु ज्ञानी तो मेरा ही स्वरूप है। वह मुझमें स्थित होकर सर्वोच्च लक्ष्य को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Sab seekers ache hain, lekin jo deep understanding aur connection rakhta hai, wo highest level par hota hai.
meanings.marathi: हे सर्व भक्त उदार आहेत, पण ज्ञानी माझ्यासारखाच आहे. तो माझ्यात स्थित राहून सर्वोच्च गती प्राप्त करतो.

core_meaning: All paths are valuable, but the one rooted in deep understanding and steady connection reaches the highest state
embedding_text: all user types are valuable but knowledge driven user is highest, balanced evaluation and prioritization, inclusive yet optimized systems, rewarding depth and consistency, achieving highest outcomes through understanding

sanskrit: बहूनां जन्मनामन्ते ज्ञानवान्मां प्रपद्यते । वासुदेवः सर्वमिति स महात्मा सुदुर्लभः ॥
transliteration: bahūnāṁ janmanām ante jñānavān māṁ prapadyate vāsudevaḥ sarvam iti sa mahātmā su-durlabhaḥ

meanings.english: After many births, a person of true knowledge realizes that everything is the Divine and surrenders to Me; such a great soul is very rare.
meanings.hindi: अनेक जन्मों के बाद ज्ञानवान व्यक्ति यह समझता है कि सब कुछ भगवान ही हैं और मेरी शरण में आता है; ऐसा महात्मा अत्यंत दुर्लभ है।
meanings.hinglish: Bahut long journey ke baad hi koi samajhta hai ki sab ek hi source se hai—aur aisa insaan bahut rare hota hai.
meanings.marathi: अनेक जन्मांनंतर ज्ञानी व्यक्ती जाणतो की सर्व काही वासुदेव आहे आणि त्याच्यात शरण जातो; असा महात्मा अत्यंत दुर्मिळ आहे.

core_meaning: Ultimate realization of unity comes after long-term growth and is extremely rare
embedding_text: ultimate realization after long term growth and evolution, rarity of deep understanding and unity, patience in learning and mastery, recognizing high level expertise, gradual development of knowledge and insight

sanskrit: कामैस्तैस्तैर्हृतज्ञानाः प्रपद्यन्तेऽन्यदेवताः । तं तं नियममास्थाय प्रकृत्या नियताः स्वया ॥
transliteration: kāmais tais tair hṛta-jñānāḥ prapadyante ’nya-devatāḥ taṁ taṁ niyamam āsthāya prakṛtyā niyatāḥ svayā

meanings.english: Those whose knowledge is carried away by various desires surrender to other powers, following specific rules according to their own nature.
meanings.hindi: जिनका ज्ञान विभिन्न इच्छाओं से हर लिया गया है, वे अपनी प्रकृति के अनुसार अलग-अलग देवताओं की उपासना करते हैं और उनके नियमों का पालन करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jab desires control karte hain, to log apni nature ke hisaab se alag-alag paths follow karte hain.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांचे ज्ञान विविध इच्छांनी हरवले आहे, ते आपल्या स्वभावानुसार वेगवेगळ्या देवतांची उपासना करतात.

core_meaning: Desires influence perception and choices, leading individuals to follow different paths based on their nature
use_cases: analyzing user behavior based on motivations
building personalized systems based on preferences
detecting bias caused by personal goals
improving clarity by reducing desire-driven distortion
embedding_text: desire driven decision making and behavior, how motivations influence choices and perception, personalized paths based on nature, bias caused by desires, understanding user intent and preference patterns

sanskrit: यो यो यां यां तनुं भक्तः श्रद्धयार्चितुमिच्छति । तस्य तस्याचलां श्रद्धां तामेव विदधाम्यहम् ॥
transliteration: yo yo yāṁ yāṁ tanuṁ bhaktaḥ śraddhayārcitum icchati tasya tasyācalāṁ śraddhāṁ tām eva vidadhāmy aham

meanings.english: Whatever form a devotee desires to worship with faith, I make that faith steady and strong.
meanings.hindi: जो भक्त जिस रूप की श्रद्धा से उपासना करना चाहता है, मैं उसकी उसी श्रद्धा को स्थिर और दृढ़ कर देता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Insaan jisme belief rakhta hai, uska belief aur strong ho jata hai—system usko reinforce karta hai.
meanings.marathi: भक्त ज्या रूपाची श्रद्धेने उपासना करू इच्छितो, त्याची ती श्रद्धा मी दृढ करतो.

core_meaning: Belief and focus strengthen over time, reinforcing the path an individual chooses based on their intentions
use_cases: designing systems that adapt to user preferences
embedding_text: belief reinforcement based on focus and desire, strengthening of faith through repeated attention, reinforcement learning in human behavior, habit and consistency building systems, adapting systems to user belief patterns

sanskrit: स तया श्रद्धया युक्तस्तस्याराधनमीहते । लभते च ततः कामान्मयैव विहितान्हि तान् ॥
transliteration: sa tayā śraddhayā yuktas tasyārādhanam īhate labhate ca tataḥ kāmān mayaiva vihitān hi tān

meanings.english: Endowed with that faith, a person engages in worship and obtains their desired results, which are granted by Me alone.
meanings.hindi: उस श्रद्धा से युक्त होकर व्यक्ति उपासना करता है और अपने इच्छित फल प्राप्त करता है, जो वास्तव में मेरे द्वारा ही प्रदान किए जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jis belief ke saath effort kiya jata hai, uske according result milta hai—lekin system level par sab ek hi source se aata hai.
meanings.marathi: त्या श्रद्धेने युक्त होऊन व्यक्ती उपासना करतो आणि इच्छित फल प्राप्त करतो, जे प्रत्यक्षात माझ्याद्वारेच दिले जाते.

core_meaning: Focused belief combined with effort leads to desired outcomes, all ultimately governed by a unified source
use_cases: designing systems that reward focused effort
predicting outcomes based on intent and action
embedding_text: belief and effort leading to results, goal oriented behavior and outcomes, relationship between intention and reward, system governed results, predicting outcomes based on focus and action

sanskrit: अन्तवत्तु फलं तेषां तद्भवत्यल्पमेधसाम् । देवान्देवयजो यान्ति मद्भक्ता यान्ति मामपि ॥
transliteration: antavat tu phalaṁ teṣāṁ tad bhavaty alpa-medhasām devān deva-yajo yānti mad-bhaktā yānti mām api

meanings.english: The results obtained by those of limited understanding are temporary. Those who worship lesser powers go to them, but My devotees come to Me.
meanings.hindi: अल्प बुद्धि वाले लोगों के फल नाशवान होते हैं। देवताओं की पूजा करने वाले देवताओं के पास जाते हैं, लेकिन मेरे भक्त मेरे पास आते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Short-term goals wale results temporary hote hain, lekin jo higher understanding follow karte hain wo permanent result paate hain.
meanings.marathi: अल्प बुद्धी असलेल्या लोकांचे फळ तात्पुरते असते. देवतांची उपासना करणारे देवांकडे जातात, पण माझे भक्त माझ्याकडे येतात.

core_meaning: Desire-driven results are temporary, while higher understanding leads to lasting outcomes
embedding_text: temporary vs permanent results, short term gains vs long term outcomes, strategic decision making and prioritization, sustainable goal setting, understanding limitations of desire driven systems

sanskrit: अव्यक्तं व्यक्तिमापन्नं मन्यन्ते मामबुद्धयः । परं भावमजानन्तो ममाव्ययमनुत्तमम् ॥
transliteration: avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ manyante mām abuddhayaḥ paraṁ bhāvam ajānanto mamāvyayam anuttamam

meanings.english: The unintelligent think that I, the unmanifest, have become manifest. They do not know My higher, immutable, and supreme nature.
meanings.hindi: अज्ञानी लोग मुझे, जो अव्यक्त हूँ, व्यक्त मानते हैं और मेरे उच्च, अविनाशी और परम स्वरूप को नहीं जानते।
meanings.hinglish: Log surface level par dekhte hain aur deeper reality ko samajh nahi paate.
meanings.marathi: अज्ञानी लोक मला अव्यक्त असूनही व्यक्त समजतात आणि माझे उच्च, अविनाशी स्वरूप ओळखत नाहीत.

core_meaning: Superficial perception leads to misunderstanding, preventing recognition of deeper and unchanging reality
embedding_text: misinterpretation due to surface level perception, deeper reality vs superficial understanding, recognizing hidden layers of systems, improving insight and perception, avoiding incomplete analysis

sanskrit: नाहं प्रकाशः सर्वस्य योगमायासमावृतः । मूढोऽयं नाभिजानाति लोको मामजमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: nāhaṁ prakāśaḥ sarvasya yoga-māyā-samāvṛtaḥ mūḍho ’yaṁ nābhijānāti loko mām ajam avyayam

meanings.english: I am not manifest to everyone, being covered by divine illusion. The deluded world does not know Me, who am unborn and imperishable.
meanings.hindi: मैं अपनी योगमाया से आच्छादित होने के कारण सभी के लिए प्रकट नहीं हूँ। यह मोहग्रस्त संसार मुझे, जो अजन्मा और अविनाशी हूँ, नहीं जानता।
meanings.hinglish: Reality sabke liye visible nahi hoti—illusion usko hide kar deta hai.
meanings.marathi: मी योगमायेमुळे सर्वांना दिसत नाही. मोहग्रस्त लोक मला, जो अजन्मा आणि अविनाशी आहे, ओळखत नाहीत.

core_meaning: Deeper reality remains hidden due to illusion, and only those with clarity and awareness can perceive it
use_cases: building systems that reveal hidden insights
embedding_text: hidden reality due to illusion, unseen layers affecting perception and decisions, improving awareness beyond surface, revealing hidden insights in systems, understanding perception limitations and clarity

sanskrit: वेदाहं समतीतानि वर्तमानानि चार्जुन । भविष्याणि च भूतानि मां तु वेद न कश्चन ॥
transliteration: vedāhaṁ samatītāni vartamānāni cārjuna bhaviṣyāṇi ca bhūtāni māṁ tu veda na kaścana

meanings.english: O Arjuna, I know all beings—past, present, and future—but no one truly knows Me.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, मैं भूत, वर्तमान और भविष्य के सभी प्राणियों को जानता हूँ, परन्तु मुझे कोई वास्तव में नहीं जानता।
meanings.hinglish: System sab kuch jaanta hai—past, present, future—but log usko fully samajh nahi paate.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, मी भूत, वर्तमान आणि भविष्य जाणतो, पण मला कोणी पूर्णपणे ओळखत नाही.

core_meaning: Complete knowledge spans across time, but limited perception prevents full understanding of the ultimate reality
embedding_text: complete knowledge across past present and future, temporal pattern analysis and prediction, limitations of human perception, understanding time based systems, comprehensive knowledge modeling

sanskrit: इच्छाद्वेषसमुत्थेन द्वन्द्वमोहेन भारत । सर्वभूतानि सम्मोहं सर्गे यान्ति परन्तप ॥
transliteration: icchā-dveṣa-samutthena dvandva-mohena bhārata sarva-bhūtāni sammohaṁ sarge yānti paran-tapa

meanings.english: O Arjuna, all beings fall into delusion at birth due to the dualities arising from desire and aversion.
meanings.hindi: हे भारत, इच्छा और द्वेष से उत्पन्न द्वंद्व के कारण सभी प्राणी जन्म से ही मोह में पड़ जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Desire aur dislike milkar dual thinking create karte hain, jo confusion ka root hai.
meanings.marathi: हे भारत, इच्छा आणि द्वेषामुळे निर्माण झालेल्या द्वंद्वामुळे सर्व प्राणी जन्मतः मोहात पडतात.

core_meaning: Desire and aversion create duality, which leads to confusion and distorted perception
use_cases: understanding root cause of bias and confusion
embedding_text: desire and aversion creating duality and confusion, root cause of bias and distorted perception, reducing emotional influence in decision making, neutral and balanced reasoning systems, understanding psychological patterns

sanskrit: येषां त्वन्तगतं पापं जनानां पुण्यकर्मणाम् । ते द्वन्द्वमोहनिर्मुक्ता भजन्ते मां दृढव्रताः ॥
transliteration: yeṣāṁ tv anta-gataṁ pāpaṁ janānāṁ puṇya-karmaṇām te dvandva-moha-nirmuktā bhajante māṁ dṛḍha-vratāḥ

meanings.english: Those whose sins have been eradicated by righteous actions become free from the delusion of duality and engage in devotion with firm determination.
meanings.hindi: जिन लोगों के पाप पुण्य कर्मों से नष्ट हो चुके हैं, वे द्वंद्व रूपी मोह से मुक्त होकर दृढ़ निश्चय के साथ मेरी भक्ति करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log apne negative patterns ko correct kar lete hain, wo confusion se free ho kar clarity ke saath aage badhte hain.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांचे पाप पुण्यकर्मांनी नष्ट झाले आहेत, ते द्वंद्वमोहातून मुक्त होऊन दृढनिश्चयाने भक्ति करतात.

core_meaning: Purification through right actions removes confusion and duality, enabling clarity and steady commitment
embedding_text: purification through right actions removes confusion and duality, overcoming bias and emotional distortion, achieving clarity and steady focus, disciplined behavior and commitment, improving mental stability and decision making

sanskrit: जरामरणमोक्षाय मामाश्रित्य यतन्ति ये । ते ब्रह्म तद्विदुः कृत्स्नमध्यात्मं कर्म चाखिलम् ॥
transliteration: jarā-maraṇa-mokṣāya mām āśritya yatanti ye te brahma tad viduḥ kṛtsnam adhyātmaṁ karma cākhilam

meanings.english: Those who strive for freedom from old age and death by taking refuge in Me come to know the Absolute, the self, and all actions completely.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग जरा और मृत्यु से मुक्ति के लिए मेरी शरण में प्रयास करते हैं, वे ब्रह्म, आत्मा और सम्पूर्ण कर्म को जान लेते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log ultimate freedom ke liye seek karte hain, wo full system—self, reality aur actions—sab samajh lete hain.
meanings.marathi: जे लोक जरा आणि मृत्यूपासून मुक्तीसाठी माझ्या शरण येतात, ते ब्रह्म, आत्मा आणि सर्व कर्म जाणतात.

core_meaning: Those who seek ultimate freedom gain complete understanding of reality, self, and actions
embedding_text: advanced seekers aiming for liberation and complete knowledge, understanding reality self and actions fully, holistic system integration, deep purpose driven learning, mastery and ultimate goals

sanskrit: साधिभूताधिदैवं मां साधियज्ञं च ये विदुः । प्रयाणकालेऽपि च मां ते विदुर्युक्तचेतसः ॥
transliteration: sādhibhūtādhidaivaṁ māṁ sādhiyajñaṁ ca ye viduḥ prayāṇa-kāle ’pi ca māṁ te vidur yukta-cetasaḥ

meanings.english: Those who know Me as the governing principle of the material world, the divine, and sacrifice—such integrated minds recognize Me even at the time of death.
meanings.hindi: जो मुझे अधिभूत, अधिदैव और अधियज्ञ के रूप में जानते हैं, वे स्थिर चित्त वाले लोग मृत्यु के समय भी मुझे जानते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log system ke sab layers (matter, divine, action) ko samajh lete hain, wo end tak clarity maintain karte hain.
meanings.marathi: जे मला अधिभूत, अधिदैव आणि अधियज्ञ म्हणून जाणतात, ते स्थिरचित्त लोक मृत्युसमयीही मला जाणतात.

core_meaning: Complete and integrated understanding leads to unwavering awareness, even in the most critical moments
embedding_text: complete integrated understanding of material divine and action systems, maintaining clarity under extreme conditions, stable and resilient awareness, critical decision making with full knowledge, consistent consciousness and focus

sanskrit:
अर्जुन उवाच |
किं तद्ब्रह्म किमध्यात्मं किं कर्म पुरुषोत्तम |
अधिभूतं च किं प्रोक्तमधिदैवं किमुच्यते ॥ १ ॥
transliteration:
arjuna uvāca: kiṁ tad brahma kim adhyātmaṁ kiṁ karma puruṣottama
adhibhūtaṁ ca kiṁ proktam adhidaivaṁ kim ucyate

meanings.english: Arjuna inquired: O my Lord, O Supreme Person, what is Brahman? What is the self? What are fruitive activities? What is this material manifestation? And what are the demigods? Please explain this to me.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने पूछा: हे पुरुषोत्तम! ब्रह्म क्या है? अध्यात्म क्या है? कर्म क्या है? अधिभूत क्या है? और अधिदैव किसे कहते हैं?
meanings.hinglish: Arjun ne pucha: Krishna, ye 'Brahman' kya hai? 'Adhyatma' aur 'Karma' kise kehte hain? Ye duniya (Adhibhuta) aur Devi-Devta (Adhidaiva) kya hain?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला, हे पुरुषोत्तमा, ते ब्रह्म काय? अध्यात्म काय? कर्म काय? अधिभूत कशाला म्हणतात आणि अधिदैव कोणाला म्हणतात?

core_meaning: The Fundamental Inquiry: Arjuna isn't asking as a friend here, but as a student seeking the technical definitions of reality. He wants to know the 'What' behind the universe.
use_cases: defining the basic terminology of spirituality
starting a deep dive into the nature of existence
approaching a mentor with structured questions
embedding_text: Arjuna asks about Brahman, adhyatma, karma, adhibhuta, and adhidaiva

sanskrit:
अधियज्ञ: कथं कोऽत्र देहेऽस्मिन्मधुसूदन |
प्रयाणकाले च कथं ज्ञेयोऽसि नियतात्मभि: ॥ २ ॥
transliteration:
adhiyajñaḥ kathaṁ ko ’tra dehe ’smin madhusūdana
prayāṇa-kāle ca kathaṁ jñeyo ’si niyatātmabhiḥ

meanings.english: Who is the Lord of sacrifice, and how does He live in the body, O Madhusūdana? And how can those engaged in devotional service know You at the time of death?
meanings.hindi: हे मधुसूदन! इस शरीर में अधियज्ञ कौन है और वह कैसे रहता है? और मृत्यु के समय आपको कैसे जाना जा सकता है?
meanings.hinglish: Madhusudana, is sharir ke andar 'Adhiyajna' kaun hai? Aur maut ke waqt aapko kaise yaad rakha ja sakta hai?
meanings.marathi: हे मधुसूदना, या देहात अधियज्ञ कोण आणि तो कसा आहे? आणि देह सोडून जाण्याच्या वेळी नियतचित्त पुरुषांना तू कसा ज्ञात होतोस?

core_meaning: The Final Exam: Arjuna hits the most critical point—the moment of death (Prayāṇa-kāle). He asks how one stays connected to the Divine when the body is failing.
use_cases: understanding the internal presence of God (Supersoul)
embedding_text: Arjuna asks about adhiyajna and how to know Krishna at death

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच |
अक्षरं ब्रह्म परमं स्वभावोऽध्यात्ममुच्यते |
भूतभावोद्भ‍वकरो विसर्ग: कर्मसंज्ञित: ॥ ३ ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca: akṣaraṁ brahma paramaṁ svabhāvo ’dhyātmam ucyate
bhūta-bhāvodbhava-karo visargaḥ karma-saṁjñitaḥ

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: The indestructible, transcendental living entity is called Brahman, and his eternal nature is called adhyātma, the self. Action pertaining to the development of the material bodies of the living entities is called karma, or fruitive activities.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: अविनाशी जीव 'ब्रह्म' है और उसका नित्य स्वभाव 'अध्यात्म' है। जीवों के शरीर की उत्पत्ति से संबंधित कार्य 'कर्म' कहलाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna ne kaha: Jo kabhi khatam nahi hota wo tum ho (Brahman), tumhara nature 'Adhyatma' hai, aur jo naye sharir banata hai wo 'Karma' hai.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान म्हणाले, परम अक्षर म्हणजे ब्रह्म, स्वभाव म्हणजे अध्यात्म आणि प्राण्यांच्या उत्पत्तीला कारणीभूत होणारा जो त्याग, त्याला कर्म असे नाव आहे.

core_meaning: The Dictionary of the Soul: Kṛṣṇa defines 'Brahman' as your indestructible self. 'Karma' is the law of cause and effect that forces the soul to keep taking new physical bodies.
use_cases: distinguishing between the physical body and the eternal soul
understanding the mechanical nature of karma
embedding_text: Krishna defines Brahman, adhyatma, and karma

sanskrit:
अधिभूतं क्षरो भाव: पुरुषश्चाधिदैवतम् |
अधियज्ञोऽहमेवात्र देहे देहभृतां वर ॥ ४ ॥
transliteration:
adhibhūtaṁ kṣaro bhāvaḥ puruṣaś cādhidaivatam
adhiyajño ’ham evātra dehe deha-bhṛtāṁ vara

meanings.english: O best of the embodied beings, the physical nature, which is constantly changing, is called adhibhūta. The universal form of the Lord is called adhidaiva. And I, the Supreme Lord inside the heart, am called adhiyajña.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन! नाशवान प्रकृति 'अधिभूत' है, विराट पुरुष 'अधिदैव' है और इस शरीर के भीतर परमात्मा के रूप में मैं 'अधियज्ञ' हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Ye badalti hui duniya 'Adhibhuta' hai, Universe ka master 'Adhidaiva' hai, aur tumhare dil mein baitha hua main 'Adhiyajna' hoon.
meanings.marathi: हे देहधाऱ्यांमध्ये श्रेष्ठा, नाशवंत भाव म्हणजे अधिभूत, विराट पुरुष म्हणजे अधिदैव आणि या देहामध्ये मीच अधियज्ञ आहे.

core_meaning: The Triad of Reality: 1. The physical world (constantly changing). 2. The Universal Power (controlling the cosmos). 3. The Indwelling Presence (Krishna in the heart).
use_cases: visualizing God in different forms (nature, universe, heart)
accepting the changing nature of the material world
connecting with the silent witness inside oneself
embedding_text: Krishna defines adhibhuta, adhidaiva, and adhiyajna

sanskrit:
अन्तकाले च मामेव स्मरन्मुक्त्वा कलेवरम् |
य: प्रयाति स मद्भ‍ावं याति नास्त्यत्र संशय: ॥ ५ ॥
transliteration:
anta-kāle ca mām eva smaran muktvā kalevaram
yaḥ prayāti sa mad-bhāvaṁ yāti nāsty atra saṁśayaḥ

meanings.english: And whoever, at the end of his life, quits his body remembering Me alone at once attains My nature. Of this there is no doubt.
meanings.hindi: जो मृत्यु के समय केवल मेरा स्मरण करते हुए शरीर छोड़ता है, वह तुरंत मेरे स्वभाव को प्राप्त होता है। इसमें कोई संदेह नहीं है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo maut ke waqt sirf mujhe yaad karte hue sharir chhodta hai, wo seedha mere paas aata hai. Isme koi doubt nahi hai.
meanings.marathi: आणि जो अंतकाळी माझेच स्मरण करीत देह सोडून जातो, तो माझ्या स्वरूपाला प्राप्त होतो; यात संशय नाही.

core_meaning: The Final Thought Rule: Your last conscious thought determines your destination. If you think of the Divine, you become Divine. This makes lifelong practice essential so that the last thought is automatic.
use_cases: understanding the importance of mental discipline
preparing for the 'final exit' from the material body
finding the ultimate shortcut to liberation
embedding_text: remembering Krishna at death leads to attaining His nature

sanskrit:
यं यं वापि स्मरन्भावं त्यजत्यन्ते कलेवरम् |
तं तमेवैति कौन्तेय सदा तद्भ‍ावभावित: ॥ ६ ॥
transliteration:
yaṁ yaṁ vāpi smaran bhāvaṁ tyajaty ante kalevaram
taṁ tam evaiti kaunteya sadā tad-bhāva-bhāvitaḥ

meanings.english: Whatever state of being one remembers when he quits his body, O son of Kuntī, that state he will attain without fail.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन! मनुष्य अंत समय में जिस किसी भाव का स्मरण करते हुए शरीर त्यागता है, वह उसी अवस्था को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Maut ke time tum jo bhi soch rahe hoge, agle janam mein wahi ban jaoge. Ye automatic process hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कौन्तेया, मनुष्य अंतकाळी ज्या ज्या भावाचे स्मरण करीत देह सोडतो, त्या त्या भावालाच तो पावतो.

core_meaning: The Law of Attraction (Final Edition): Your next life is a direct reflection of your current life's dominant thoughts. You don't just get what you want; you get what you *are* at the moment of death.
use_cases: recognizing that current habits build the future body
practicing positive and spiritual thinking daily
understanding the psychological basis of rebirth
embedding_text: last thought at death determines the next state of being

sanskrit:
तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु मामनुस्मर युध्य च |
मय्यर्पितमनोबुद्धिर्मामेवैष्यस्यसंशय: ॥ ७ ॥
transliteration:
tasmāt sarveṣu kāleṣu mām anusmara yudhya ca
mayy arpita-mano-buddhir mām evaiṣyasy asaṁśayaḥ

meanings.english: Therefore, Arjuna, you should always think of Me in the form of Kṛṣṇa and at the same time carry out your prescribed duty of fighting. With your mind and intelligence fixed on Me, you will attain Me without doubt.
meanings.hindi: इसलिए तुम हर समय मेरा स्मरण करो और युद्ध भी करो। अपने मन और बुद्धि को मुझमें लगाकर तुम निश्चित ही मुझे प्राप्त करोगे।
meanings.hinglish: Isliye, har waqt mujhe yaad rakho aur apni duty (jung) bhi karo. Jab mann aur dimaag mujhpe hoga, toh tum mere paas hi aaoge.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून तू सर्वकाळी माझे स्मरण कर आणि युद्धही कर. अशा प्रकारे माझ्याठायी मन आणि बुद्धी अर्पण केलीस, तर तू मलाच येऊन मिळशील.

core_meaning: The Active Meditator: Krishna's most practical advice for busy people. Don't quit your job; just do it while remembering Him. 'Mām anusmara yudhya ca' — Remember Me AND fight.
use_cases: balancing professional career with spiritual growth
dedicating everyday work to a higher purpose
embedding_text: remember Me and fight, fix mind and intelligence on Me

sanskrit:
अभ्यासयोगयुक्तेन चेतसा नान्यगामिना |
परमं पुरुषं दिव्यं याति पार्थानुचिन्तयन् ॥ ८ ॥
transliteration:
abhyāsa-yoga-yuktena cetasā nānya-gāminā
paramaṁ puruṣaṁ divyaṁ yāti pārthānucintayan

meanings.english: He who meditates on Me as the Supreme Personality of Godhead, his mind constantly engaged in remembering Me, undeviated from the path, he, O Pārtha, is sure to reach Me.
meanings.hindi: जो अभ्यास योग के द्वारा अपने मन को कहीं और भटकने नहीं देता और निरंतर मेरा चिंतन करता है, वह मुझे प्राप्त कर लेता है।
meanings.hinglish: Practice se jab dimaag bhatakna band kar deta hai aur sirf mujhe yaad karta hai, toh wo insaan seedha mujhtak pahunch jata hai.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्था, अभ्यासरूप योगाने युक्त असलेल्या आणि इकडे तिकडे न धावणाऱ्या चित्ताने परम दिव्य पुरुषाचे चिंतन करणारा त्यालाच जाऊन मिळतो.

core_meaning: The Power of Practice (Abhyāsa): Meditation is a skill. By constantly bringing the mind back to Krishna, you create a groove in the consciousness that leads straight to the Divine.
use_cases: training the mind to focus through meditation
embedding_text: practice of constant remembrance leads to the Supreme Person

sanskrit:
कविं पुराणमनुशासितार- |
मणोरणीयांसमनुस्मरेद्य: |
सर्वस्य धातारमचिन्त्यरूप- |
मादित्यवर्णं तमस: परस्तात् ॥ ९ ॥
transliteration:
kaviṁ purāṇam anuśāsitāram aṇor aṇīyāṁsam anusmared yaḥ
sarvasya dhātāram acintya-rūpam āditya-varṇaṁ tamasaḥ parastāt

meanings.english: One should meditate upon the Supreme Person as the one who knows everything, as He who is the oldest, the controller, smaller than the smallest, the maintainer of everything, inconceivable, and luminous like the sun.
meanings.hindi: मनुष्य को उस परमात्मा का चिंतन करना चाहिए जो सर्वज्ञ, अनादि, सबका नियंता, सूक्ष्म से भी सूक्ष्म, सबका आधार और सूर्य के समान प्रकाशमान है।
meanings.hinglish: Wo jo sab jaanta hai, sabse purana hai, sabka boss hai, atom se bhi chota hai aur sooraj ki tarah chamak raha hai—uska dhyan karo.
meanings.marathi: जो सर्वज्ञ, अनादि, जगाचे शासन करणारा, अणूहूनही लहान, सर्वांचे धारणपोषण करणारा, अचिन्त्य रूप असलेला आणि सूर्यप्रकाशित व अंधाराच्या पलीकडे आहे, त्याचे चिंतन करावे.

core_meaning: The Profile of God: Krishna gives specific attributes to meditate on. He is 'Acintya' (Inconceivable) yet 'Kavim' (All-knowing). He maintains the galaxies while being smaller than an atom.
use_cases: visualizing the vastness and precision of the Divine
understanding that God is a Person, not just a void
replacing dark thoughts with 'sun-like' divine light
embedding_text: attributes of the Supreme Person for meditation

sanskrit:
प्रयाणकाले मनसाचलेन |
भक्त्य‍ा युक्तो योगबलेन चैव |
भ्रुवोर्मध्ये प्राणमावेश्य सम्य- |
क्स तं परं पुरुषमुपैति दिव्यम् ॥ १० ॥
transliteration:
prayāṇa-kāle manasācalena bhaktyā yukto yoga-balena caiva
bhruvor madhye prāṇam āveśya samyak sa taṁ paraṁ puruṣam upaiti divyam

meanings.english: One who, at the time of death, fixes his life air between the eyebrows and, by the strength of yoga, remembers the Supreme Lord in full devotion, will certainly attain to the Supreme.
meanings.hindi: जो मृत्यु के समय योगबल से प्राणों को भौंहों के बीच स्थिर करके पूर्ण भक्ति के साथ मेरा स्मरण करता है, वह निश्चित ही परम दिव्य पुरुष को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Maut ke waqt jo yog-shakti se apne praano ko eyebrows ke beech (Third Eye) laakar mujhe yaad karta hai, wo seedha mere paas aata hai.
meanings.marathi: जो अंतकाळी अविचल मनाने, भक्तीने आणि योगबलाने दोन्ही भुवयांच्या मध्ये प्राण चांगल्या प्रकारे स्थिर करून चिंतन करतो, तो त्या दिव्य परम पुरुषाला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: The Technical Exit: For the yogis, this is the 'Third Eye' technique. By focusing the life-force (Prana) between the eyebrows during the final breath, the soul exits through the highest portal toward the Supreme.
use_cases: learning the advanced 'exit' strategy of yoga
understanding the connection between breath and consciousness
applying 'Yoga-bala' (strength of yoga) for the final journey
embedding_text: fixing life air between eyebrows at death to attain the Supreme

sanskrit:
यदक्षरं वेदविदो वदन्ति
विशन्ति यद्यतयो वीतरागा: |
यदिच्छन्तो ब्रह्मचर्यं चरन्ति
तत्ते पदं सङ्ग्रहेण प्रवक्ष्ये ॥ ११ ॥
transliteration:
yad akṣaraṁ veda-vido vadanti
viśanti yad yatayo vīta-rāgāḥ
yad icchanto brahma-caryaṁ caranti
tat te padaṁ saṅgraheṇa pravakṣye

meanings.english: Persons who are learned in the Vedas, who utter oṁ-kāra, and who are great sages in the renounced order enter into Brahman. Desiring such perfection, one practices celibacy. I shall now briefly explain to you this process by which one may attain salvation.
meanings.hindi: वेदों के ज्ञाता जिसे 'अक्षर' कहते हैं, जिसमें त्यागी मुनि प्रवेश करते हैं और जिसकी इच्छा से लोग ब्रह्मचर्य का पालन करते हैं, उस मार्ग को मैं अब तुम्हें संक्षेप में बताऊंगा।
meanings.hinglish: Vedas ke jaankar jise 'Akshar' (Om) kehte hain aur jise paane ke liye log brahmacharya follow karte hain, us raste ke baare mein main ab tumhe short mein bataunga.
meanings.marathi: वेदाभ्यास करणारे ज्याला अक्षर म्हणतात, वीतरागी यती ज्याच्यात प्रवेश करतात आणि ज्याच्या इच्छेने ब्रह्मचर्य पाळले जाते, ते पद मी तुला संक्षेपाने सांगेन.

core_meaning: The Goal of the Vedas: Kṛṣṇa acknowledges the traditional path of austerity and 'Om-kara' meditation used by sages to reach the impersonal Brahman, promising to summarize this process for Arjuna.
use_cases: recognizing 'Om' as a vibration of the Absolute
learning the summary of spiritual salvation
embedding_text: Vedic scholars and sages enter Brahman through Om and celibacy

sanskrit:
सर्वद्वाराणि संयम्य मनो हृदि निरुध्य च |
मूध्‍न्‍‍र्याधायात्मन: प्राणमास्थितो योगधारणाम् ॥ १२ ॥
transliteration:
sarva-dvārāṇi saṁyamya mano hṛdi nirudhya ca
mūrdhny ādhāyātmanaḥ prāṇam āsthito yoga-dhāraṇām

meanings.english: The yogic situation is that of detachment from all sensual engagements. Closing all the doors of the senses and fixing the mind on the heart and the life air at the top of the head, one establishes himself in yoga.
meanings.hindi: इन्द्रियों के सभी द्वारों को रोककर, मन को हृदय में स्थिर करके और प्राणवायु को सिर के ऊपरी भाग में स्थापित करके मनुष्य योग में स्थित होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Saari senses ko bahar ki duniya se kaat kar, dimaag ko dil mein rok kar aur apne 'Prana' ko sir ke upar (head) set karke insaan yog mein fix hota hai.
meanings.marathi: सर्व इंद्रियांच्या द्वारांचा संयम करून, मनाला हृदयात निरुद्ध करून आणि आपला प्राण मस्तकात धारण करून योगाभ्यासात स्थिर व्हावे.

core_meaning: Sensory Shutdown: This is the physical 'how-to' of classical yoga. You pull your attention away from eyes, ears, and skin (Pratyahara), focus inward on the heart, and push your energy upward.
use_cases: understanding the mechanics of kundalini or breath-based yoga
learning to internalize focus during stress
embedding_text: closing sense doors, fixing mind in heart and prana in head

sanskrit:
ॐ इत्येकाक्षरं ब्रह्म व्याहरन्मामनुस्मरन् |
य: प्रयाति त्यजन्देहं स याति परमां गतिम् ॥ १३ ॥
transliteration:
oṁ ity ekākṣaraṁ brahma vyāharan mām anusmaran
yaḥ prayāti tyajan dehaṁ sa yāti paramāṁ gatim

meanings.english: After being situated in this yoga practice and vibrating the sacred syllable oṁ, if one thinks of the Supreme Personality of Godhead and quits his body, he will certainly reach the spiritual planets.
meanings.hindi: जो इस योग में स्थित होकर और पवित्र अक्षर 'ॐ' का उच्चारण करते हुए मेरा (परमात्मा का) स्मरण करता है और शरीर त्यागता है, वह निश्चित रूप से परम गति को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: 'Om' bolte hue aur mera (Krishna) dhyan karte hue jo insaan apna sharir chhodta hai, wo seedha spiritual world pahunchta hai.
meanings.marathi: 'ॐ' या एकाक्षरी ब्रह्माचा उच्चार करीत आणि माझे स्मरण करीत जो देह सोडतो, तो परम गतीला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: The Master Vibration: Combining the physical yoga of Verse 12 with the sound of 'Om' and the remembrance of Krishna creates the 'perfect exit' for a soul seeking liberation.
use_cases: focusing on the final destination of life
aligning sound vibration with mental focus
embedding_text: vibrating Om and remembering Krishna at death leads to supreme goal

sanskrit:
अनन्यचेता: सततं यो मां स्मरति नित्यश: |
तस्याहं सुलभ: पार्थ नित्ययुक्तस्य योगिन: ॥ १४ ॥
transliteration:
ananya-cetāḥ satataṁ yo māṁ smarati nityaśaḥ
tasyāhaṁ su-labhaḥ pārtha nitya-yuktasya yoginaḥ

meanings.english: For one who always remembers Me without deviation, I am easy to obtain, O son of Pṛthā, because of his constant engagement in devotional service.
meanings.hindi: हे पार्थ! जो बिना किसी भटकाव के निरंतर मेरा स्मरण करता है, उसके लिए मैं बहुत सुलभ (आसानी से प्राप्त) हूँ, क्योंकि वह हमेशा मुझमें लगा रहता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo bina bhatke roz hamesha mujhe yaad karta hai, uske liye main bahut easily mil jata hoon.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्था, जो अनन्य चित्ताने सतत माझे नित्य स्मरण करतो, त्या नित्ययुक्त योग्याला मी सहज सुलभ होतो.

core_meaning: The Easy Path (Su-labhaḥ): While the breathing exercises of Verses 12-13 are hard, simply being 'Ananya-cetāḥ' (undeviatingly focused) on Krishna through love makes the Divine easily accessible.
use_cases: realizing that love is faster than complex yoga
building a habit of constant daily mindfulness
embedding_text: Krishna is easy to obtain for those who hink of Him always

sanskrit:
मामुपेत्य पुनर्जन्म दु:खालयमशाश्वतम् |
नाप्‍नुवन्ति महात्मान: संसिद्धिं परमां गता: ॥ १५ ॥
transliteration:
mām upetya punar janma duḥkhālayam aśāśvatam
nāpnuvanti mahātmānaḥ saṁsiddhim paramām gatāḥ

meanings.english: After attaining Me, the great souls, who are yogīs in devotion, never return to this temporary world, which is full of miseries, because they have attained the highest perfection.
meanings.hindi: मुझे प्राप्त करने के बाद, वे महापुरुष इस दुखों से भरे अस्थायी संसार में दोबारा जन्म नहीं लेते, क्योंकि उन्होंने परम सिद्धि प्राप्त कर ली है।
meanings.hinglish: Mere paas aane ke baad, bade-bade mahatma is dukh bhari duniya mein wapas nahi aate kyunki wo perfection paa chuke hain.
meanings.marathi: मला प्राप्त करून घेतल्यावर ते महात्मे दुःखाचे घर असलेल्या या अशाश्वत पुनर्जन्माला प्राप्त होत नाहीत, कारण त्यांना परम सिद्धी मिळालेली असते.

core_meaning: The Misery of Rebirth: Kṛṣṇa calls the material world 'Duḥkhālayam' (a house of miseries) and 'Aśāśvatam' (temporary). Returning here is like going back to a burning house once you've reached safety.
use_cases: developing a realistic view of material suffering
aiming for the highest permanent state of being
understanding why 'liberation' is the ultimate goal
embedding_text: attaining Krishna means no return to this temporary world of misery

sanskrit:
आब्रह्मभुवनाल्ल‍ोका: पुनरावर्तिनोऽर्जुन |
मामुपेत्य तु कौन्तेय पुनर्जन्म न विद्यते ॥ १६ ॥
transliteration:
ā-brahma-bhuvanāl lokāḥ punar āvartino ’rjuna
mām upetya tu kaunteya punar janma na vidyate

meanings.english: From the highest planet in the material world down to the lowest, all are places of misery wherein repeated birth and death take place. But one who attains to My abode, O son of Kuntī, never takes birth again.
meanings.hindi: इस ब्रह्मांड के सबसे ऊंचे लोक (ब्रह्मलोक) से लेकर सबसे नीचे के लोक तक सभी पुनरावृत्ति वाले हैं। लेकिन हे अर्जुन! मुझे प्राप्त करने पर दोबारा जन्म नहीं होता।
meanings.hinglish: Is universe ke top level (Brahmaloka) se lekar bottom tak, sab jagah log aate-jaate rehte hain (birth/death). Par jo mere paas aa gaya, uska system end ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुना, ब्रह्मलोकापासून खालचे सर्व लोक पुनरावृत्ती होणारे आहेत; परंतु हे कौन्तेया, मला प्राप्त झाल्यावर पुनर्जन्म नसतो.

core_meaning: The Cosmic Trap: Even 'Heaven' (Brahmaloka) is temporary. You go up, your 'merit' runs out, and you fall back down. Only reaching Krishna's spiritual abode breaks the gravity of the cycle.
use_cases: realizing that even 'success' in this universe is temporary
seeking a permanent solution to life's problems
embedding_text: all planets up to Brahmaloka lead to rebirth, except Krishna's abode

sanskrit:
सहस्रयुगपर्यन्तमहर्यद्ब्रह्मणो विदु: |
रात्रिं युगसहस्रान्तां तेऽहोरात्रविदो जना: ॥ १७ ॥
transliteration:
sahasra-yuga-paryantam ahar yad brahmaṇo viduḥ
rātriṁ yuga-sahasrāntāṁ te ’ho-rātra-vido janāḥ

meanings.english: By human calculation, a thousand ages taken together form the duration of Brahmā’s one day. And such also is the duration of his night.
meanings.hindi: मनुष्यों की गणना के अनुसार, एक हजार युगों को मिलाकर ब्रह्मा का एक दिन बनता है, और इतनी ही लंबी उनकी रात होती है।
meanings.hinglish: Insaano ke hisaab se, 1000 yug milakar Brahma ka sirf ek din banta hai. Aur unki raat bhi itni hi badi hoti hai.
meanings.marathi: हजार युगे ही ज्याची एक दिवसाची मर्यादा आहे आणि हजार युगे हीच ज्याच्या रात्रीची मर्यादा आहे, असे जे जाणतात, तेच काळाचे मर्म जाणणारे लोक होत.

core_meaning: Vedic Time Scales: Krishna introduces the staggering scale of cosmic time. One day of Brahmā is trillions of human years. This helps put our own 'short' lives into perspective.
use_cases: learning about Vedic cosmology and time
humbling the ego by realizing how tiny human time is
understanding the cyclic nature of the universe
embedding_text: Brahma's day and night last for 1000 ages each

sanskrit:
अव्यक्ताद्‍ व्यक्तय: सर्वा: प्रभवन्त्यहरागमे |
रात्र्यागमे प्रलीयन्ते तत्रैवाव्यक्तसंज्ञके ॥ १८ ॥
transliteration:
avyaktād vyaktayaḥ sarvāḥ prabhavanty ahar-āgame
rātry-āgame pralīyante tatraivāvyakta-saṁjñake

meanings.english: At the beginning of Brahmā’s day, all living entities become manifest from the unmanifest state, and thereafter, when the night falls, they are merged into the unmanifest again.
meanings.hindi: ब्रह्मा के दिन की शुरुआत में सभी जीव 'अव्यक्त' से प्रकट होते हैं, और रात होने पर वे फिर से उसी 'अव्यक्त' (अदृश्य अवस्था) में विलीन हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jab Brahma ka din hota hai, tab sab log paida hote hain. Jab unki raat hoti hai, tab sab wapas invisible form mein gayab ho jate hain.
meanings.marathi: ब्रह्माचा दिवस सुरू झाला की सर्व जीव अव्यक्तातून प्रकट होतात आणि रात्रीचा काळ आला की त्याच अव्यक्त संज्ञक तत्त्वात विलीन होतात.

core_meaning: The Cosmic Breathing: The universe is like a lung. It breathes out (creation) when the sun rises for Brahmā, and breathes in (destruction) when he sleeps.
use_cases: understanding the cyclic nature of creation and destruction
accepting that all manifest things must eventually disappear
viewing the universe as a rhythmic process
embedding_text: entities manifest at Brahma's day and unmanifest at his night

sanskrit:
भूतग्राम: स एवायं भूत्वा भूत्वा प्रलीयते |
रात्र्यागमेऽवश: पार्थ प्रभवत्यहरागमे ॥ १९ ॥
transliteration:
bhūta-grāmaḥ sa evāyaṁ bhūtvā bhūtvā pralīyate
rātry-āgame ’vaśaḥ pārtha prabhavaty ahar-āgame

meanings.english: Again and again, when Brahmā’s day arrives, all living entities come into being, and with the arrival of Brahmā’s night they are helplessly annihilated.
meanings.hindi: हे पार्थ! यही जीवों का समूह बार-बार पैदा होता है और ब्रह्मा की रात होने पर विवश होकर विलीन हो जाता है, और दिन आने पर फिर से प्रकट होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Wahi log baar-baar janam lete hain aur maut ko prapt hote hain. Brahma ki raat aate hi sab helplessly gayab ho jate hain.
meanings.marathi: तोच हा प्राणीसमूह वारंवार जन्माला येऊन हतबल होऊन रात्रीच्या वेळी विलीन होतो आणि दिवसाच्या प्रारंभी पुन्हा प्रकट होतो.

core_meaning: The Infinite Loop: 'Bhūtvā bhūtvā pralīyate'—repeatedly being born and destroyed. Unless one practices Yoga, they are stuck in this loop 'helplessly' (avaśaḥ), pushed by their karma.
use_cases: realizing the futility of staying in the material cycle
finding the motivation to seek permanent freedom
understanding the power of karmic momentum
embedding_text: living entities are repeatedly manifest and annihilated helplessly

sanskrit:
परस्तस्मात्तु भावोऽन्योऽव्यक्तोऽव्यक्तात्सनातन: |
य: स सर्वेषु भूतेषु नश्यत्सु न विनश्यति ॥ २० ॥
transliteration:
paras tasmāt tu bhāvo ’nyo ’vyakto ’vyaktāt sanātanaḥ
yaḥ sa sarveṣu bhūteṣu naśyatsu na vinaśyati

meanings.english: Yet there is another unmanifest nature, which is eternal and is transcendental to this manifested and unmanifested matter. It is supreme and is never annihilated. When all in this world is annihilated, that part remains as it is.
meanings.hindi: लेकिन इस व्यक्त और अव्यक्त प्रकृति के परे एक दूसरी सनातन अव्यक्त प्रकृति है। जब इस संसार का सब कुछ नष्ट हो जाता है, तब भी वह स्थान सुरक्षित रहता है।
meanings.hinglish: Is dikhne wali aur na-dikhne wali duniya ke peeche ek aur permanent duniya hai. Jab sab kuch khatam ho jata hai, tab bhi wo 'Sanatan' jagah baki rehti hai.
meanings.marathi: परंतु त्या अव्यक्तापेक्षाही पलीकडचा असा दुसरा एक सनातन अव्यक्त भाव आहे, जो सर्व प्राणी नष्ट झाले तरी नष्ट होत नाही.

core_meaning: The Eternal Reality: Beyond the"breathing" universe of Brahma lies the Spiritual Sky. It doesn't follow the laws of entropy or destruction. It is the 'Permanent Address' of the soul.
use_cases: finding stability in a changing world
understanding the concept of the Spiritual World
realizing that something in us survives cosmic destruction
embedding_text: another eternal unmanifest nature remains when all else is destroyed

sanskrit:
अव्यक्तोऽक्षर इत्युक्तस्तमाहु: परमां गतिम् |
यं प्राप्य न निवर्तन्ते तद्धाम परमं मम ॥ २१ ॥
transliteration:
avyakto ’kṣara ity uktas tam āhuḥ paramāṁ gatim
yaṁ prāpya na nivartante tad dhāma paramaṁ mama

meanings.english: That which the Vedāntists describe as unmanifest and infallible, that which is known as the supreme destination, that place from which, having attained it, one never returns – that is My supreme abode.
meanings.hindi: जिसे 'अव्यक्त' और 'अक्षर' कहा गया है, वही परम गति है। जहाँ पहुँचकर मनुष्य कभी वापस नहीं आता, वही मेरा परम धाम है।
meanings.hinglish: Jise 'Akshar' (jo kabhi khatam na ho) kehte hain, wahi asli destination hai. Wahan pahunchne ke baad koi wapas is dukh bhari duniya mein nahi aata. Wo mera ghar hai.
meanings.marathi: ज्याला अव्यक्त आणि अक्षर असे म्हटले आहे, त्यालाच परम गती म्हणतात; ज्याला प्राप्त करून घेतल्यावर लोक परत येत नाहीत, ते माझे परम धाम होय.

core_meaning: The Point of No Return: Once a soul reaches Krishna's abode, the cycle of birth and death (Samsara) ends forever. This is the ultimate "graduation" from material life.
use_cases: setting the highest goal for spiritual life
ending the anxiety of repeated rebirth
embedding_text: attaining Krishna's supreme abode means never returning to material world

sanskrit:
पुरुष: स पर: पार्थ भक्त्य‍ा लभ्यस्त्वनन्यया |
यस्यान्त:स्थानि भूतानि येन सर्वमिदं ततम् ॥ २२ ॥
transliteration:
puruṣaḥ sa paraḥ pārtha bhaktyā labhyas tv ananyayā
yasyāntaḥ-sthāni bhūtāni yena sarvam idaṁ tatam

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is greater than all, is attainable by unalloyed devotion. Although He is present in His abode, He is all-pervading, and everything is situated within Him.
meanings.hindi: हे पार्थ! वह परम पुरुष, जिसके भीतर सब कुछ स्थित है और जो सबमें व्याप्त है, केवल अनन्य भक्ति (Pure Devotion) द्वारा ही प्राप्त किया जा सकता है।
meanings.hinglish: Wo Supreme God jiske andar saari duniya hai, usse sirf sacchi 'Bhakti' se hi paya ja sakta hai. Wo apne ghar mein hote hue bhi har jagah maujood hai.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्था, ज्याच्यामध्ये सर्व भूतमात्र आहेत आणि ज्याने हे सर्व विश्व व्यापलेले आहे, तो परम पुरुष अनन्य भक्तीनेच प्राप्त होण्याजोगा आहे.

core_meaning: The Key is Love: How do you reach this indestructible place? Not by just logic or strength, but by 'Ananya Bhakti' (one-pointed love). Krishna is simultaneously far away in His abode and closer than your own breath.
use_cases: learning the primary method to reach God
balancing the concepts of God's form and His all-pervading nature
focusing on unalloyed love in spiritual practice
embedding_text: Supreme Person is attainable by unalloyed devotion and pervades everything

sanskrit:
यत्र काले त्वनावृत्तिमावृत्तिं चैव योगिन: |
प्रयाता यान्ति तं कालं वक्ष्यामि भरतर्षभ ॥ २३ ॥
transliteration:
yatra kāle tv anāvṛttim āvṛttiṁ caiva yoginaḥ
prayātā yānti tam kālam vakṣyāmi bharatarṣabha

meanings.english: O best of the Bhāratas, I shall now explain to you the different times at which, passing away from this world, the yogī does or does not come back.
meanings.hindi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठ! अब मैं तुम्हें उन समयों के बारे में बताऊंगा जिनमें शरीर छोड़ने पर योगी वापस आता है या फिर कभी वापस नहीं आता।
meanings.hinglish: Ab main tumhe bataunga ki kaunse 'time' par death hone se insaan wapas aata hai aur kab jane se hamesha ke liye mukt ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठा, ज्या काळी देह सोडून गेलेले योगी परत न येणाऱ्या गतीला किंवा परत येणाऱ्या गतीला प्राप्त होतात, तो काळ मी तुला सांगेन.

core_meaning: The Path of Departure: Krishna introduces the concept of 'Auspicious' vs 'Inauspicious' timing for leaving the body, a technical detail for those practicing mechanical yoga.
use_cases: distinguishing between different results of the soul's journey
embedding_text: times of passing away that lead to return or no return

sanskrit:
अग्न‍िर्ज्योतिरह: शुक्ल‍ः षण्मासा उत्तरायणम् |
तत्र प्रयाता गच्छन्ति ब्रह्म ब्रह्मविदो जना: ॥ २४ ॥
transliteration:
agnir jyotir ahaḥ śuklaḥ ṣaṇ-māsā uttarāyaṇam
tatra prayātā gacchanti brahma brahma-vido janāḥ

meanings.english: Those who know the Supreme Brahman attain that Supreme by passing away from the world during the influence of the fiery god, in the light, at an auspicious moment of the day, during the fortnight of the waxing moon, or during the six months when the sun travels in the north.
meanings.hindi: अग्नि, ज्योति, दिन, शुक्लपक्ष और उत्तरायण के छह महीनों में शरीर त्यागने वाले ब्रह्मवेत्ता पुरुष ब्रह्म को प्राप्त होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Light, din (day), Shukla Paksha (waxing moon) aur Uttarayan (6 months of northern sun) mein jo sharir chhodte hain, wo seedha Brahman ko paate hain.
meanings.marathi: अग्नी, प्रकाश, दिवस, शुक्लपक्ष आणि उत्तरायणाचे सहा महिने या मार्गाने गेलेले ब्रह्मवेत्ते पुरुष ब्रह्माप्रत जातात.

core_meaning: The Path of Light (Shukla Gati): Departing during periods associated with light and the northern course of the sun (Uttarayan) leads to liberation. This is why Bhishma Pitamah waited on his bed of arrows for Uttarayan to begin.
use_cases: understanding the significance of 'Uttarayan' (e.g. Makar Sankranti)
learning the auspicious conditions for leaving the body
symbolizing the journey from darkness to light
embedding_text: passing away during light, waxing moon, and northern sun leads to Brahman

sanskrit:
धूमो रात्रिस्तथा कृष्ण: षण्मासा दक्षिणायनम् |
तत्र चान्द्रमसं ज्योतिर्योगी प्राप्य निवर्तते ॥ २५ ॥
transliteration:
dhūmaḥ rātriḥ tathā kṛṣṇaḥ ṣaṇ-māsā dakṣiṇāyanam
tatra cāndramasaṁ jyotir yogī prāpya nivartate
