meanings.english: The mystic who passes away from this world during the smoke, the night, the fortnight of the waning moon, or the six months when the sun passes to the south reaches the moon planet but again comes back.
meanings.hindi: धुआँ, रात्रि, कृष्णपक्ष और दक्षिणायन के छह महीनों में शरीर त्यागने वाला योगी चंद्रमा के प्रकाश को प्राप्त होकर फिर वापस संसार में आता है।
meanings.hinglish: Dhuaan (smoke), raat, Krishna Paksha (dark moon) aur Dakshinayan mein jo jate hain, wo Chandraloka jaakar wapas dharti par aa jate hain.
meanings.marathi: धूर, रात्र, कृष्णपक्ष आणि दक्षिणायनाचे सहा महिने या मार्गाने गेलेला योगी चंद्राची ज्योती (स्वर्गसुख) मिळवून परत येतो.

core_meaning: The Path of Darkness (Krishna Gati): Departing during periods associated with darkness or the southern course of the sun leads to temporary heavenly rewards (like the moon) but eventually requires coming back to Earth.
use_cases: recognizing that 'heaven' is only a temporary stop
distinguishing between liberation and temporary pious rewards
embedding_text: passing away during smoke, night, and southern sun leads to return

sanskrit:
श‍ुक्ल‍कृष्णे गती ह्येते जगत: शाश्वते मते |
एकया यात्यनावृत्तिमन्ययावर्तते पुन: ॥ ६ ॥
transliteration:
śukla-kṛṣṇe gatī hy ete jagataḥ śāśvate mate
ekayā yāty anāvṛttim anyayāvartate punaḥ

meanings.english: According to Vedic opinion, there are two ways of passing from this world – one in light and one in darkness. When one passes in light, he does not come back; but when one passes in darkness, he returns.
meanings.hindi: वेदों के अनुसार इस संसार से जाने के दो ही मार्ग हैं—एक प्रकाश का और दूसरा अंधकार का। प्रकाश के मार्ग से जाने वाला वापस नहीं आता, जबकि अंधकार के मार्ग वाला वापस लौटता है।
meanings.hinglish: Duniya chhodne ke do hi permanent raaste hain: Light (Ek baar gaye toh wapas nahi) aur Dark (Wapas aana padega).
meanings.marathi: जगाचे हे शुक्ल आणि कृष्ण असे दोन मार्ग सनातन मानले गेले आहेत. एकाने गेला असता परत यावे लागत नाही आणि दुसऱ्याने गेला असता पुन्हा परत यावे लागते.

core_meaning: The Binary of Existence: Light (Knowledge/Bhakti) leads to freedom. Darkness (Ignorance/Attachment) leads to repetition. This choice is made by our consciousness every single day.
use_cases: simplifying the complex soul-journey into two paths
choosing the 'Path of Light' in daily life
understanding the Vedic view on the soul's exit
embedding_text: two paths of light and darkness lead to no return or return

sanskrit:
नैते सृती पार्थ जानन्योगी मुह्यति कश्चन |
तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु योगयुक्तो भवार्जुन ॥ २७ ॥
transliteration:
naite sṛtī pārtha jānan yogī muhyati kaścana
tasmāt sarveṣu kāleṣu yoga-yukto bhavārjuna

meanings.english: Although the devotees know these two paths, O Arjuna, they are never bewildered. Therefore be always fixed in devotion.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन! इन दोनों मार्गों को जानने वाला भक्त कभी भ्रमित नहीं होता। इसलिए तुम हर समय भक्ति (योग) में स्थिर रहो।
meanings.hinglish: In dono raasto ko janne wala devotee kabhi confuse nahi hota. Isliye tum bas hamesha mujhse jude raho (Yoga-yukta).
meanings.marathi: हे पार्था, हे दोन्ही मार्ग जाणणारा कोणताही योगी मोह पावत नाही; म्हणून हे अर्जुना, तू सर्वकाळी योगयुक्त हो.

core_meaning: Transcending the Calendar: A true devotee doesn't check the moon's phase or the sun's position before dying. Because they are *always* connected to Krishna (Yoga-yukta), Krishna takes care of their exit regardless of the time.
use_cases: relying on faith over ritual technicalities
embedding_text: devotees are not bewildered by these paths, always fixed in devotion

sanskrit:
वेदेषु यज्ञेषु तप:सु चैव
दानेषु यत्पुण्यफलं प्रदिष्टम् |
अत्येति तत्सर्वमिदं विदित्वा
योगी परं स्थानमुपैति चाद्यम् ॥ २८ ॥
transliteration:
vedeṣu yajñeṣu tapaḥsu caiva dāneṣu yat puṇya-phalaṁ pradiṣṭam
atyeti tat sarvam idaṁ viditvā yogī paraṁ sthānam upaiti cādyam

meanings.english: A person who accepts the path of devotional service is not bereft of the results derived from studying the Vedas, performing sacrifices, undergoing austerities or giving charity. Simply by performing devotional service, he attains all these and reaches the supreme eternal abode.
meanings.hindi: जो मनुष्य भक्ति मार्ग को अपनाता है, उसे वेदों के अध्ययन, यज्ञ, तप और दान से मिलने वाले सभी पुण्य फलों की प्राप्ति स्वतः हो जाती है और अंत में वह परम धाम को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Bhakti karne wale ko wo sab mil jata hai jo Ved padhne, daan dene ya tapashya karne se milta hai. Wo sabse aage nikal kar seedha mere ghar pahunch jata hai.
meanings.marathi: वेदाभ्यास, यज्ञ, तप आणि दान यांच्यापासून जे काही पुण्यफळ मिळते, ते सर्व योगी पुरुष हे सर्व जाणून ओलांडून जातो आणि सनातन परम पदाला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: The Master Key: Bhakti-yoga is the "All-in-One" solution. You don't lose the benefits of other spiritual practices; you surpass them. It is the ultimate shortcut and the highest perfection.
use_cases: summarizing the power of devotional service
understanding that Bhakti includes all other spiritual merits
ending the search for multiple complex rituals
embedding_text: devotional service surpasses all results of Vedas, sacrifices, and charity

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच इदं तु ते गुह्यतमं प्रवक्ष्याम्यनसूयवे । ज्ञानं विज्ञानसहितं यज्ज्ञात्वा मोक्ष्यसेऽशुभात् ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca idaṁ tu te guhya-tamaṁ pravakṣyāmy anasūyave jñānaṁ vijñāna-sahitaṁ yaj jñātvā mokṣyase ’śubhāt

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: I shall now declare to you the most confidential knowledge, along with realization, knowing which you shall be free from all suffering.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: मैं तुम्हें यह अत्यंत गोपनीय ज्ञान विज्ञान सहित बताऊँगा, जिसे जानकर तुम सभी अशुभ से मुक्त हो जाओगे।
meanings.hinglish: Main tumhe sabse deep knowledge (theory + experience) bataunga, jise jaanne ke baad tum problems se free ho jaoge.
meanings.marathi: मी तुला सर्वात गुप्त ज्ञान आणि विज्ञान सांगणार आहे, जे जाणून तू सर्व अशुभातून मुक्त होशील.

core_meaning: The highest knowledge combined with realization leads to complete freedom from negativity and suffering
use_cases: achieving clarity and freedom from confusion
embedding_text: highest confidential knowledge with realization leading to freedom, deep learning and transformation, combining theory and experience, removing negativity and limitations, achieving clarity and liberation

sanskrit: राजविद्या राजगुह्यं पवित्रमिदमुत्तमम् । प्रत्यक्षावगमं धर्म्यं सुसुखं कर्तुमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: rāja-vidyā rāja-guhyaṁ pavitram idam uttamam pratyakṣāvagamaṁ dharmyaṁ su-sukhaṁ kartum avyayam

meanings.english: This knowledge is the king of education, the most secret, the purest, and the highest. It is directly realizable, righteous, easy to practice, and everlasting.
meanings.hindi: यह ज्ञान विद्याओं का राजा, अत्यंत गोपनीय, पवित्र और उत्तम है। यह प्रत्यक्ष अनुभव करने योग्य, धर्मयुक्त, करने में सरल और अविनाशी है।
meanings.hinglish: Ye knowledge sabse powerful hai—easy to apply, directly experience hone wala aur permanent result dene wala.
meanings.marathi: हे ज्ञान विद्यांचा राजा, अत्यंत गुप्त, पवित्र आणि सर्वोत्तम आहे. हे प्रत्यक्ष अनुभवण्यासारखे, धर्मयुक्त, सहज आचरण करण्यासारखे आणि अविनाशी आहे.

core_meaning: The highest knowledge is practical, directly experienceable, easy to apply, and leads to lasting transformation
use_cases: building practical and usable knowledge systems
embedding_text: highest knowledge that is practical experiential easy and everlasting, simple yet powerful systems, directly testable and applicable knowledge, sustainable long term solutions, user friendly and effective frameworks

sanskrit: अश्रद्दधानाः पुरुषा धर्मस्यास्य परन्तप । अप्राप्य मां निवर्तन्ते मृत्युसंसारवर्त्मनि ॥
transliteration: aśraddadhānāḥ puruṣā dharmasyāsya paran-tapa aprāpya māṁ nivartante mṛtyu-saṁsāra-vartmani

meanings.english: Those who lack faith in this knowledge do not attain Me and return to the cycle of birth and death.
meanings.hindi: हे परन्तप, जो लोग इस धर्म में श्रद्धा नहीं रखते, वे मुझे प्राप्त नहीं करते और जन्म-मरण के चक्र में लौट आते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jinke paas belief nahi hota, wo progress nahi kar pate aur same loop me fase rehte hain.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांना या धर्मावर श्रद्धा नाही ते मला प्राप्त होत नाहीत आणि जन्म-मृत्यूच्या चक्रात परत जातात.

core_meaning: Without faith and trust in the process, transformation does not occur, leading to repeated cycles of the same problems
use_cases: understanding importance of belief in systems
embedding_text: lack of faith leading to stagnation and repetitive cycles, importance of trust in transformation processes, breaking negative loops and patterns, commitment and belief in systems, avoiding repeated failure cycles

sanskrit: मया ततमिदं सर्वं जगदव्यक्तमूर्तिना । मत्स्थानि सर्वभूतानि न चाहं तेष्ववस्थितः ॥
transliteration: mayā tatam idaṁ sarvaṁ jagad avyakta-mūrtinā mat-sthāni sarva-bhūtāni na cāhaṁ teṣv avasthitaḥ

meanings.english: By Me, in My unmanifest form, this entire universe is pervaded. All beings exist in Me, yet I am not confined within them.
meanings.hindi: मेरे अव्यक्त रूप से यह सम्पूर्ण जगत व्याप्त है। सभी प्राणी मुझमें स्थित हैं, परन्तु मैं उनमें सीमित नहीं हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Sab kuch ek system ke andar exist karta hai, lekin system un sab se limited nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: माझ्या अव्यक्त रूपाने हे संपूर्ण जग व्यापलेले आहे. सर्व प्राणी माझ्यात आहेत, पण मी त्यांच्यात मर्यादित नाही.

core_meaning: Everything exists within a unified system, yet the system itself remains independent and not limited by its components
embedding_text: everything exists within a unified system yet system remains independent, system vs component relationship, scalable architecture and dependency modeling, holistic and interconnected systems, independence within integration

sanskrit: न च मत्स्थानि भूतानि पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम् । भूतभृन्न च भूतस्थो ममात्मा भूतभावनः ॥
transliteration: na ca mat-sthāni bhūtāni paśya me yogam aiśvaram bhūta-bhṛn na ca bhūta-stho mamātmā bhūta-bhāvanaḥ

meanings.english: And yet, the beings do not reside in Me—behold My divine mystery. I sustain all beings, yet I am not contained within them.
meanings.hindi: और वास्तव में प्राणी मुझमें स्थित नहीं हैं—मेरी इस दिव्य योग शक्ति को देखो। मैं सभी प्राणियों को धारण करता हूँ, फिर भी उनमें स्थित नहीं हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: System sabko support karta hai, lekin unke andar bound nahi hota—ye paradox hai.
meanings.marathi: प्रत्यक्षात प्राणी माझ्यात नाहीत—ही माझी दिव्य योगशक्ती आहे. मी सर्वांना धारण करतो, पण त्यांच्यात मर्यादित नाही.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality both supports everything and remains independent, revealing a deeper paradox beyond simple logic
embedding_text: paradox of supporting system without being contained, advanced abstract reasoning, handling contradictions and complex systems, non linear thinking and flexible architecture, deeper understanding beyond simple logic

sanskrit: यथाकाशस्थितो नित्यं वायुः सर्वत्रगो महान् । तथा सर्वाणि भूतानि मत्स्थानीत्युपधारय ॥
transliteration: yathākāśa-sthito nityaṁ vāyuḥ sarvatra-go mahān tathā sarvāṇi bhūtāni mat-sthānīty upadhāraya

meanings.english: Just as the mighty wind moves everywhere but always rests in space, similarly all beings exist within Me.
meanings.hindi: जैसे महान वायु आकाश में स्थित होकर सर्वत्र घूमती है, वैसे ही सभी प्राणी मुझमें स्थित हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise air space ke andar move karti hai, waise hi sab system ke andar exist karte hain.
meanings.marathi: जसा वायू आकाशात राहून सर्वत्र फिरतो, तसाच सर्व भूत माझ्यात आहेत.

core_meaning: All entities operate within a larger system, just as movement happens within space
use_cases: modeling entities within a larger framework
embedding_text: analogy of air in space to explain system containment, entities operating within larger frameworks, simplifying complex concepts using real world examples, understanding environment and system relationships, teaching abstract ideas clearly

sanskrit: सर्वभूतानि कौन्तेय प्रकृतिं यान्ति मामिकाम् । कल्पक्षये पुनस्तानि कल्पादौ विसृजाम्यहम् ॥
transliteration: sarva-bhūtāni kaunteya prakṛtiṁ yānti māmikām kalpa-kṣaye punas tāni kalpādau visṛjāmy aham

meanings.english: O Arjuna, at the end of a cycle all beings enter into My nature, and at the beginning of the next cycle, I create them again.
meanings.hindi: हे कौन्तेय, कल्प के अंत में सभी प्राणी मेरी प्रकृति में लीन हो जाते हैं और अगले कल्प के आरंभ में मैं उन्हें फिर से उत्पन्न करता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: System me sab kuch cycle me chalta hai—end par merge aur phir start par recreate hota hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कौन्तेय, कल्पाच्या शेवटी सर्व भूत माझ्या प्रकृतीत विलीन होतात आणि पुढील कल्पाच्या आरंभी मी त्यांना पुन्हा निर्माण करतो.

core_meaning: Existence operates in continuous cycles of creation, dissolution, and recreation within a unified system
use_cases: designing systems with reset and restart capabilities
embedding_text: cycle of creation dissolution and recreation, lifecycle systems and cyclic processes, system reset and restart models, long term patterns and sustainability, continuous system operation

sanskrit: प्रकृतिं स्वामवष्टभ्य विसृजामि पुनः पुनः । भूतग्राममिमं कृत्स्नमवशं प्रकृतेर्वशात् ॥
transliteration: prakṛtiṁ svām avaṣṭabhya visṛjāmi punaḥ punaḥ bhūta-grāmam imaṁ kṛtsnam avaśaṁ prakṛter vaśāt

meanings.english: Controlling My material nature, I repeatedly create all beings, who act helplessly according to their nature.
meanings.hindi: मैं अपनी प्रकृति को नियंत्रित करके बार-बार समस्त प्राणियों की सृष्टि करता हूँ, जो अपनी प्रकृति के अनुसार कार्य करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: System automatically create hota rehta hai, aur entities apni nature ke according act karti hain.
meanings.marathi: मी माझ्या प्रकृतीवर नियंत्रण ठेवून पुन्हा पुन्हा सर्व भूतांची निर्मिती करतो, आणि ते त्यांच्या स्वभावानुसार वागतात.

core_meaning: Creation operates automatically through underlying nature, with entities behaving according to inherent patterns
use_cases: modeling behavior based on inherent patterns
embedding_text: automated creation through natural processes, behavior based on inherent patterns and nature, self operating and scalable systems, predicting actions based on system rules, repeated automated system cycles

sanskrit: न च मां तानि कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनञ्जय । उदासीनवदासीनमसक्तं तेषु कर्मसु ॥
transliteration: na ca māṁ tāni karmāṇi nibadhnanti dhanañ-jaya udāsīna-vad āsīnam asaktaṁ teṣu karmasu

meanings.english: O Arjuna, these actions do not bind Me. I remain detached, like one unconcerned, without attachment to these activities.
meanings.hindi: हे धनंजय, ये कर्म मुझे बाँधते नहीं हैं। मैं इन कर्मों में आसक्ति रहित और उदासीन की भाँति स्थित रहता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: System operate karta hai, lekin usme attachment nahi hota—isi wajah se wo bound nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: हे धनंजय, हे कर्म मला बांधत नाहीत. मी त्यांच्यात आसक्तीविना उदासीनासारखा राहतो.

core_meaning: Actions performed without attachment do not create bondage, allowing freedom and independence
use_cases: performing tasks without stress or attachment
embedding_text: detached action without attachment leading to freedom, unbiased and independent system operation, reducing emotional influence in decisions, stable and balanced performance, avoiding binding effects of actions

sanskrit: मयाध्यक्षेण प्रकृतिः सूयते सचराचरम् । हेतुनानेन कौन्तेय जगद्विपरिवर्तते ॥
transliteration: mayādhyakṣeṇa prakṛtiḥ sūyate sa-carācaram hetunānena kaunteya jagad viparivartate

meanings.english: Under My supervision, material nature produces all moving and non-moving beings; by this arrangement, the universe operates.
meanings.hindi: मेरे अधीन प्रकृति समस्त चर और अचर प्राणियों की सृष्टि करती है; इसी कारण से यह जगत चलता रहता है।
meanings.hinglish: Nature automatic hai, lekin ek higher control system ke under operate karti hai.
meanings.marathi: माझ्या अधिपत्याखाली प्रकृती सर्व चल-अचल प्राणी निर्माण करते आणि त्यामुळे जग चालते.

core_meaning: Natural processes operate under an underlying supervisory intelligence that governs the system
embedding_text: supervised automation where nature operates under higher control, governance and control layers in systems, managing complex processes with oversight, ensuring stability and order, structured system operation

sanskrit: अवजानन्ति मां मूढा मानुषीं तनुमाश्रितम् । परं भावमजानन्तो मम भूतमहेश्वरम् ॥
transliteration: avajānanti māṁ mūḍhā mānuṣīṁ tanum āśritam paraṁ bhāvam ajānanto mama bhūta-maheśvaram

meanings.english: Foolish people disregard Me when I appear in human form, not knowing My higher nature as the supreme Lord of all beings.
meanings.hindi: मूर्ख लोग मुझे मनुष्य रूप में देखकर तुच्छ समझते हैं और मेरे परम स्वरूप को नहीं जानते, जो सभी प्राणियों का स्वामी है।
meanings.hinglish: Log surface appearance dekhkar judge karte hain aur deeper reality ko miss kar dete hain.
meanings.marathi: मूर्ख लोक मला मानवी रूपात पाहून तुच्छ समजतात आणि माझ्या परम स्वरूपाला ओळखत नाहीत.

core_meaning: Judging based on external appearance leads to misunderstanding of deeper reality
embedding_text: misjudging based on appearance, deeper reality vs surface perception, avoiding superficial analysis, understanding hidden potential and true nature, improving perception and interpretation

sanskrit: मोघाशा मोघकर्माणो मोघज्ञाना विचेतसः । राक्षसीमासुरीं चैव प्रकृतिं मोहिनीं श्रिताः ॥
transliteration: moghāśā mogha-karmāṇo mogha-jñānā vicetasaḥ rākṣasīm āsurīṁ caiva prakṛtiṁ mohinīṁ śritāḥ

meanings.english: Those who are deluded take shelter in demonic nature; their hopes, actions, and knowledge become futile and misguided.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग मोह में पड़े हैं, वे आसुरी प्रकृति को अपनाते हैं; उनकी आशाएँ, कर्म और ज्ञान सब व्यर्थ हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jab understanding galat hoti hai, to hopes, actions aur knowledge sab waste ho jaate hain.
meanings.marathi: मोहित लोक आसुरी प्रकृतीचा स्वीकार करतात; त्यांची आशा, कर्म आणि ज्ञान व्यर्थ ठरते.

core_meaning: Distorted understanding leads to wasted effort, misguided actions, and unproductive outcomes
use_cases: understanding failure due to wrong assumptions
embedding_text: failure due to distorted understanding leading to wasted effort and misguided actions, identifying ineffective strategies and wrong assumptions, improving decision accuracy, avoiding unproductive outcomes, correcting flawed thinking

sanskrit: महात्मानस्तु मां पार्थ दैवीं प्रकृतिमाश्रिताः । भजन्त्यनन्यमनसो ज्ञात्वा भूतादिमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: mahātmānas tu māṁ pārtha daivīṁ prakṛtim āśritāḥ bhajanty ananya-manaso jñātvā bhūtādim avyayam

meanings.english: O Arjuna, the great souls, who take refuge in the divine nature, worship Me with undivided minds, knowing Me as the origin of all beings and imperishable.
meanings.hindi: हे पार्थ, महात्मा लोग दैवी प्रकृति को अपनाकर, मुझे सभी प्राणियों का मूल और अविनाशी जानकर, एकाग्र मन से मेरी भक्ति करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: High-level log divine nature follow karte hain aur full focus ke saath truth ko understand karte hain.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्थ, महात्मे दैवी प्रकृतीचा स्वीकार करून, मला सर्वांचा मूल आणि अविनाशी जाणून एकाग्रतेने भक्ति करतात.

core_meaning: Those aligned with higher nature focus with clarity and recognize the true source of existence
embedding_text: high quality users aligned with higher nature focusing with clarity and stability, understanding true source of existence, deep focus and purpose driven systems, identifying advanced thinkers and behaviors, optimizing for high value outcomes

sanskrit: सततं कीर्तयन्तो मां यतन्तश्च दृढव्रताः । नमस्यन्तश्च मां भक्त्या नित्ययुक्ता उपासते ॥
transliteration: satataṁ kīrtayanto māṁ yatantaś ca dṛḍha-vratāḥ namasyantaś ca māṁ bhaktyā nitya-yuktā upāsate

meanings.english: Constantly chanting My glories, striving with determination, bowing down to Me with devotion, they remain ever connected and worship Me.
meanings.hindi: वे निरंतर मेरा कीर्तन करते हैं, दृढ़ निश्चय के साथ प्रयास करते हैं, भक्ति से मुझे नमस्कार करते हैं और सदा मुझसे जुड़े रहते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: High-level users consistent effort, focus aur connection maintain karte hain—without break.
meanings.marathi: ते सतत माझे कीर्तन करतात, दृढनिश्चयाने प्रयत्न करतात, भक्तीने नमस्कार करतात आणि सदैव माझ्याशी जोडलेले राहतात.

core_meaning: Consistency, dedication, and continuous connection define high-level performance and growth
embedding_text: consistent effort discipline and continuous connection for high level performance, habit building and long term focus, disciplined systems and engagement models, repetition and consistency for optimization, sustained growth and stability

sanskrit: ज्ञानयज्ञेन चाप्यन्ये यजन्तो मामुपासते । एकत्वेन पृथक्त्वेन बहुधा विश्वतोमुखम् ॥
transliteration: jñāna-yajñena cāpy anye yajanto mām upāsate ekatvena pṛthaktvena bahudhā viśvato-mukham

meanings.english: Others worship Me through the sacrifice of knowledge, seeing Me as one, as different, or in many forms everywhere.
meanings.hindi: कुछ लोग ज्ञानयज्ञ के द्वारा मेरी उपासना करते हैं—मुझे एक रूप में, भिन्न रूप में या अनेक रूपों में सर्वत्र देखते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Log truth ko alag-alag ways me samajhte hain—ek, different ya multiple forms me.
meanings.marathi: काही लोक ज्ञानयज्ञाने माझी उपासना करतात—मला एक, भिन्न किंवा अनेक रूपांत सर्वत्र पाहतात.

core_meaning: Truth can be approached and understood through multiple perspectives, all leading to the same underlying reality
embedding_text: multiple approaches to understanding truth as one different or many, flexible and inclusive system design, handling diverse perspectives and viewpoints, integrating different models into one system, multi perspective reasoning

sanskrit: अहं क्रतुरहं यज्ञः स्वधाहमहमौषधम् । मन्त्रॊऽहमहमेवाज्यमहमग्निरहं हुतम् ॥
transliteration: ahaṁ kratur ahaṁ yajñaḥ svadhāham aham auṣadham mantro ’ham aham evājyam aham agnir ahaṁ hutam

meanings.english: I am the ritual, the sacrifice, the offering, the herb, the mantra, the clarified butter, the fire, and the act of offering.
meanings.hindi: मैं ही क्रतु, यज्ञ, स्वधा, औषधि, मंत्र, घी, अग्नि और आहुति हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: System ke andar jo bhi process hai—input, process, output—sab ek hi source se hai.
meanings.marathi: मीच क्रतु, यज्ञ, स्वधा, औषध, मंत्र, आज्य, अग्नि आणि आहुती आहे.

core_meaning: The entire process—from input to execution to output—is part of a single unified system
embedding_text: complete system integration where input process and output are unified, end to end workflow understanding, holistic system design, mapping full process pipelines, unified architecture thinking

sanskrit: पिताहमस्य जगतो माता धाता पितामहः । वेद्यं पवित्रम् ॐकार ऋक् साम यजुरेव च ॥
transliteration: pitāham asya jagato mātā dhātā pitāmahaḥ vedyaṁ pavitram oṁ-kāra ṛk sāma yajur eva ca

meanings.english: I am the father of this universe, the mother, the sustainer, and the grandsire. I am the object of knowledge, the purifier, the sacred Om, and the Vedas.
meanings.hindi: मैं इस जगत का पिता, माता, धारण करने वाला और पितामह हूँ। मैं ही जानने योग्य, पवित्र, ॐकार और वेद हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main system ka origin, support aur knowledge source sab hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी जगाचा पिता, माता, धारण करणारा आणि पितामह आहे. मीच वेद्य, पवित्र, ॐकार आणि वेद आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality is the source, sustainer, and knowledge foundation of everything
embedding_text: source sustainer and knowledge foundation of system, full system ownership and architecture, root and support layers in systems, unified knowledge centered frameworks, holistic system design

sanskrit: गतिर्भर्ता प्रभुः साक्षी निवासः शरणं सुहृत् । प्रभवः प्रलयः स्थानं निधानं बीजमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: gatir bhartā prabhuḥ sākṣī nivāsaḥ śaraṇaṁ suhṛt prabhavaḥ pralayaḥ sthānaṁ nidhānaṁ bījam avyayam

meanings.english: I am the goal, the sustainer, the master, the witness, the abode, the refuge, the friend, the origin, the dissolution, the foundation, and the imperishable seed.
meanings.hindi: मैं ही लक्ष्य, भरण-पोषण करने वाला, स्वामी, साक्षी, निवास, शरण, मित्र, उत्पत्ति, प्रलय, आधार और अविनाशी बीज हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main system ka goal, support, observer, base aur origin sab hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी लक्ष्य, भरणकर्ता, स्वामी, साक्षी, निवास, शरण, मित्र, उत्पत्ती, प्रलय, आधार आणि अविनाशी बीज आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality serves every role in existence—from origin and support to goal and witness
embedding_text: multi role system as goal support witness origin and foundation, comprehensive system frameworks, lifecycle and goal integration, monitoring and support systems, stable and secure architecture design

sanskrit: तपाम्यहमहं वर्षं निगृह्णाम्युत्सृजामि च । अमृतं चैव मृत्युश्च सदसच्चाहमर्जुन ॥
transliteration: tapāmy aham ahaṁ varṣaṁ nigṛhṇāmy utsṛjāmi ca amṛtaṁ caiva mṛtyuś ca sad asac cāham arjuna

meanings.english: I give heat, I send and withhold rain; I am immortality and death, and I am both being and non-being, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: मैं ही ऊष्मा देता हूँ, वर्षा करता हूँ और रोकता भी हूँ। मैं अमृत भी हूँ और मृत्यु भी, तथा सत और असत भी हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main system ke sab dynamic forces hoon—creation, destruction, balance sab mere through hota hai.
meanings.marathi: मी उष्णता देतो, पाऊस पाडतो आणि थांबवतो. मी अमृत आणि मृत्यू, तसेच सत आणि असत आहे.

core_meaning: All dynamic forces—creation, destruction, balance, existence, and non-existence—are part of a unified system
embedding_text: dynamic forces of system including creation destruction balance existence and non existence, modeling opposing forces and equilibrium, adaptive and resilient system design, handling cycles and change, understanding system dynamics

sanskrit: त्रैविद्या मां सोमपाः पूतपापा यज्ञैरिष्ट्वा स्वर्गतिं प्रार्थयन्ते । ते पुण्यमासाद्य सुरेन्द्रलोकमश्नन्ति दिव्यान्दिवि देवभोगान् ॥
transliteration: trai-vidyā māṁ soma-pāḥ pūta-pāpā yajñair iṣṭvā svar-gatiṁ prārthayante te puṇyam āsādya surendra-lokam aśnanti divyān divi deva-bhogān

meanings.english: Those who follow the Vedic rituals, drink the soma, and are purified of sins seek heaven. They attain the celestial world and enjoy divine pleasures there.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग वेदों के अनुसार यज्ञ करते हैं और सोमरस पीते हैं, वे स्वर्ग की कामना करते हैं। वे पुण्य प्राप्त करके स्वर्ग लोक में दिव्य भोगों का आनंद लेते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Log rituals follow karke reward (heaven-like outcomes) paate hain, lekin ye temporary system hai.
meanings.marathi: जे वेदांनुसार यज्ञ करतात आणि सोमपान करतात ते स्वर्गाची इच्छा करतात. ते पुण्य मिळवून स्वर्गात दिव्य सुखांचा आनंद घेतात.

core_meaning: Action-based efforts can lead to rewards, but these outcomes are limited to temporary experiences
embedding_text: reward based system where actions lead to temporary benefits, incentive driven behavior and motivation, short term rewards and outcomes, designing reward loops and incentive systems, evaluating temporary gains

sanskrit: ते तं भुक्त्वा स्वर्गलोकं विशालं क्षीणे पुण्ये मर्त्यलोकं विशन्ति । एवं त्रयीधर्ममनुप्रपन्ना गतागतं कामकामा लभन्ते ॥
transliteration: te taṁ bhuktvā svarga-lokaṁ viśālaṁ kṣīṇe puṇye martya-lokaṁ viśanti evaṁ trayī-dharmam anuprapannā gatāgataṁ kāma-kāmā labhante

meanings.english: After enjoying the vast heavenly pleasures, when their merit is exhausted, they return to the mortal world. Thus, those who seek desires follow a cycle of coming and going.
meanings.hindi: स्वर्गलोक के सुखों का भोग करने के बाद, जब उनका पुण्य समाप्त हो जाता है, तो वे पुनः मृत्युलोक में लौट आते हैं। इस प्रकार कामनाओं वाले लोग आवागमन के चक्र में पड़े रहते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Temporary rewards khatam hone ke baad system reset ho jata hai aur cycle repeat hota hai.
meanings.marathi: स्वर्गातील सुखांचा भोग घेतल्यानंतर पुण्य संपल्यावर ते पुन्हा मृत्युलोकात येतात. अशा प्रकारे इच्छाधारी लोक जन्म-मृत्यूच्या चक्रात अडकतात.

core_meaning: Desire-driven rewards are temporary and lead to repetitive cycles without lasting progress
embedding_text: temporary rewards leading to repetitive cycles, loop of gain and loss in systems, breaking recurring patterns and cycles, designing long term strategies, avoiding short term traps and limitations

sanskrit: अनन्याश्चिन्तयन्तो मां ये जनाः पर्युपासते । तेषां नित्याभियुक्तानां योगक्षेमं वहाम्यहम् ॥
transliteration: ananyāś cintayanto māṁ ye janāḥ paryupāsate teṣāṁ nityābhiyuktānāṁ yoga-kṣemaṁ vahāmy aham

meanings.english: Those who always think of Me with exclusive devotion and remain constantly connected, I take care of what they lack and preserve what they have.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग निरंतर अनन्य भाव से मेरी उपासना करते हैं, उनके योग-क्षेम (जो नहीं है उसे देना और जो है उसकी रक्षा करना) का भार मैं स्वयं उठाता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log continuously connected rehte hain, unka system automatically manage hota hai—needs bhi aur protection bhi.
meanings.marathi: जे लोक सतत माझा विचार करतात आणि अनन्य भावाने उपासना करतात, त्यांच्या योगक्षेमाची जबाबदारी मी घेतो.

core_meaning: Consistent alignment with the source ensures stability, fulfillment, and protection without falling into repetitive cycles
embedding_text: continuous alignment leading to stability and protection, self sustaining systems without dependency on external rewards, ensuring fulfillment and maintenance, reliable and trust based system design, avoiding repetitive cycles

sanskrit: येऽप्यन्यदेवताभक्ता यजन्ते श्रद्धयान्विताः । तेऽपि मामेव कौन्तेय यजन्त्यविधिपूर्वकम् ॥
transliteration: ye ’py anya-devatā-bhaktā yajante śraddhayānvitāḥ te ’pi mām eva kaunteya yajanty avidhi-pūrvakam

meanings.english: Even those who worship other deities with faith actually worship Me alone, O Arjuna, but in an indirect or improper way.
meanings.hindi: हे कौन्तेय, जो लोग श्रद्धा से अन्य देवताओं की पूजा करते हैं, वे भी वास्तव में मेरी ही पूजा करते हैं, परंतु विधि के अनुसार नहीं।
meanings.hinglish: Different paths bhi same system tak le jaate hain, lekin sab efficient nahi hote.
meanings.marathi: हे कौन्तेय, जे इतर देवतांची श्रद्धेने उपासना करतात, तेही प्रत्यक्षात माझीच उपासना करतात, पण योग्य पद्धतीने नाही.

core_meaning: All paths may lead to the same source, but not all approaches are equally direct or efficient
use_cases: analyzing different pathways to the same goal
embedding_text: indirect vs direct approaches to same goal, multiple paths leading to one system but varying efficiency, optimizing process effectiveness and strategy, understanding different pathways and their impact, improving efficiency and outcomes

sanskrit: अहं हि सर्वयज्ञानां भोक्ता च प्रभुरेव च । न तु मामभिजानन्ति तत्त्वेनातश्च्यवन्ति ते ॥
transliteration: ahaṁ hi sarva-yajñānāṁ bhoktā ca prabhur eva ca na tu mām abhijānanti tattvenātaś cyavanti te

meanings.english: I am the sole enjoyer and master of all sacrifices, but those who do not recognize Me in truth fall away from the correct understanding.
meanings.hindi: मैं सभी यज्ञों का भोक्ता और स्वामी हूँ, लेकिन जो लोग मुझे तत्त्व से नहीं जानते, वे सही मार्ग से विचलित हो जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: System ka real owner samajh na paane se process galat direction me chala jata hai.
meanings.marathi: मी सर्व यज्ञांचा भोक्ता आणि स्वामी आहे, पण जे मला तत्त्वाने ओळखत नाहीत ते मार्गभ्रष्ट होतात.

core_meaning: Without understanding the true source and purpose, actions lose direction and lead to ineffective outcomes
embedding_text: understanding true source and ownership of system, avoiding misaligned efforts and wrong direction, aligning actions with correct purpose, improving clarity and effectiveness, preventing inefficiency due to lack of understanding

sanskrit: यान्ति देवव्रता देवान्पितॄन्यान्ति पितृव्रताः । भूतानि यान्ति भूतेज्या यान्ति मद्याजिनोऽपि माम् ॥
transliteration: yānti deva-vratā devān pitṝn yānti pitṛ-vratāḥ bhūtāni yānti bhūtejyā yānti mad-yājino ’pi mām

meanings.english: Those who worship the gods go to the gods; those who worship ancestors go to the ancestors; those who worship spirits go to them; but those who worship Me come to Me.
meanings.hindi: देवताओं की पूजा करने वाले देवताओं के पास जाते हैं, पितरों की पूजा करने वाले पितरों के पास जाते हैं, भूतों की पूजा करने वाले भूतों के पास जाते हैं, और मेरी पूजा करने वाले मेरे पास आते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jis goal par focus karte ho, wahi final destination ban jata hai.
meanings.marathi: देवतांची उपासना करणारे देवांकडे, पितरांची करणारे पितरांकडे, भूतांची करणारे भूतांकडे जातात, आणि माझी उपासना करणारे माझ्याकडे येतात.

core_meaning: The focus of your actions and devotion determines your final destination and outcome
embedding_text: focus determines destination and outcome, goal oriented behavior and results, aligning actions with desired outcomes, strategic planning and decision making, direction based system design

sanskrit: पत्रं पुष्पं फलं तोयं यो मे भक्त्या प्रयच्छति । तदहं भक्त्युपहृतमश्नामि प्रयतात्मनः ॥
transliteration: patraṁ puṣpaṁ phalaṁ toyaṁ yo me bhaktyā prayacchati tad ahaṁ bhakty-upahṛtam aśnāmi prayatātmanaḥ

meanings.english: If one offers Me with devotion a leaf, a flower, a fruit, or water, I accept that offering made with pure intention.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति मुझे श्रद्धा से पत्र, पुष्प, फल या जल अर्पित करता है, मैं उस शुद्ध भाव से दिए गए अर्पण को स्वीकार करता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Input chhota ho ya bada matter nahi karta—intention pure hona chahiye.
meanings.marathi: जो कोणी भक्तीने पत्र, पुष्प, फल किंवा पाणी अर्पण करतो, त्याचे शुद्ध भावाने दिलेले अर्पण मी स्वीकारतो.

core_meaning: The value of an offering lies in the intention behind it, not in its size or complexity
use_cases: building accessible systems for all users
embedding_text: simple input with pure intention is valuable, focusing on intent over complexity, accessible systems design, reducing barriers and enabling participation, quality over quantity in actions

sanskrit: यत्करोषि यदश्नासि यज्जुहोषि ददासि यत् । यत्तपस्यसि कौन्तेय तत्कुरुष्व मदर्पणम् ॥
transliteration: yat karoṣi yad aśnāsi yaj juhoṣi dadāsi yat yat tapasyasi kaunteya tat kuruṣva mad-arpaṇam

meanings.english: Whatever you do, whatever you eat, whatever you offer or give, whatever austerity you perform—do that as an offering to Me.
meanings.hindi: हे कौन्तेय, तुम जो भी करते हो, जो खाते हो, जो यज्ञ करते हो, जो दान देते हो, और जो तप करते हो—उसे मुझे अर्पण करो।
meanings.hinglish: Har action ko system se connect karo—tab sab meaningful ban jata hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कौन्तेय, तू जे काही करतोस, खातोस, यज्ञ करतोस, दान देतोस किंवा तप करतोस ते सर्व मला अर्पण कर.

core_meaning: Transform all actions into meaningful contributions by aligning them with a higher purpose
use_cases: integrating actions into a unified system
aligning daily tasks with higher goals
improving consistency and meaning in work
embedding_text: integrating all actions into a unified purpose driven system, aligning daily tasks with higher goals, meaningful workflows and consistency, holistic system integration, purpose based action design

sanskrit: शुभाशुभफलैरेवं मोक्ष्यसे कर्मबन्धनैः । सन्न्यासयोगयुक्तात्मा विमुक्तो मामुपैष्यसि ॥
transliteration: śubhāśubha-phalair evaṁ mokṣyase karma-bandhanaiḥ sannyāsa-yoga-yuktātmā vimukto mām upaiṣyasi

meanings.english: Thus you will be freed from the bonds of good and bad results. With your mind united in renunciation and yoga, you shall be liberated and come to Me.
meanings.hindi: इस प्रकार तुम शुभ और अशुभ फल के बंधनों से मुक्त हो जाओगे। संन्यास और योग से युक्त होकर तुम मुक्त होकर मेरे पास आओगे।
meanings.hinglish: Jab actions aligned hote hain, tab result ka burden khatam ho jata hai—freedom milti hai.
meanings.marathi: अशा प्रकारे तू शुभ-अशुभ फळांच्या बंधनातून मुक्त होशील आणि योगयुक्त होऊन माझ्याकडे येशील.

core_meaning: Aligning actions with a higher purpose frees one from attachment to outcomes, leading to true freedom
embedding_text: freedom from good and bad outcomes through alignment, outcome independent systems and decision making, reducing stress and achieving balance, mental clarity and liberation, stable and unbiased workflows

sanskrit: समोऽहं सर्वभूतेषु न मे द्वेष्योऽस्ति न प्रियः । ये भजन्ति तु मां भक्त्या मयि ते तेषु चाप्यहम् ॥
transliteration: samo ’haṁ sarva-bhūteṣu na me dveṣyo ’sti na priyaḥ ye bhajanti tu māṁ bhaktyā mayi te teṣu cāpy aham

meanings.english: I am equal to all beings; I have no one as dear or hateful. But those who worship Me with devotion are in Me, and I am in them.
meanings.hindi: मैं सभी प्राणियों के प्रति समान हूँ; न कोई मेरा प्रिय है न अप्रिय। परन्तु जो मेरी भक्ति करते हैं, वे मुझमें हैं और मैं उनमें हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: System sabke liye equal hai, lekin jo connect karta hai uske saath deeper integration ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: मी सर्वांप्रती समान आहे; मला कोणी प्रिय किंवा अप्रिय नाही. पण जे भक्ती करतात ते माझ्यात आहेत आणि मी त्यांच्यात आहे.

core_meaning: The system is unbiased and equal for all, but deeper connection creates stronger integration
use_cases: understanding equal treatment with adaptive response
embedding_text: unbiased and equal system with adaptive connection, fairness and neutrality in system design, trust based interactions and deeper integration, balancing equal treatment with responsiveness, fair and scalable architectures

sanskrit: अपि चेत्सुदुराचारो भजते मामनन्यभाक् । साधुरेव स मन्तव्यः सम्यग्व्यवसितो हि सः ॥
transliteration: api cet su-durācāro bhajate mām ananya-bhāk sādhur eva sa mantavyaḥ samyag vyavasito hi saḥ

meanings.english: Even if a person of very bad conduct worships Me with exclusive devotion, they should be considered righteous, for they are rightly determined.
meanings.hindi: यदि कोई अत्यंत दुराचारी भी अनन्य भाव से मेरी भक्ति करता है, तो उसे साधु ही मानना चाहिए, क्योंकि उसका संकल्प सही दिशा में है।
meanings.hinglish: Even flawed users agar correct direction le lete hain, to unka transformation start ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: अगदी दुराचारी व्यक्ती देखील जर अनन्य भावाने माझी भक्ति करत असेल, तर त्याला साधु मानावे, कारण तो योग्य दिशेने चालला आहे.

core_meaning: Right intention and direction matter more than past flaws, enabling transformation and growth
use_cases: reducing bias based on past behavior
embedding_text: transformation system where correct direction matters more than past flaws, enabling growth and improvement, reducing bias based on history, recovery and learning systems, supporting positive change and development

sanskrit: क्षिप्रं भवति धर्मात्मा शश्वच्छान्तिं निगच्छति । कौन्तेय प्रतिजानीहि न मे भक्तः प्रणश्यति ॥
transliteration: kṣipraṁ bhavati dharmātmā śaśvac-chāntiṁ nigacchati kaunteya pratijānīhi na me bhaktaḥ praṇaśyati

meanings.english: Quickly he becomes righteous and attains lasting peace. O Arjuna, declare it boldly that My devotee never perishes.
meanings.hindi: वह शीघ्र ही धर्मात्मा बन जाता है और स्थायी शांति को प्राप्त करता है। हे अर्जुन, तुम घोषणा करो कि मेरा भक्त कभी नष्ट नहीं होता।
meanings.hinglish: Correct direction lene ke baad fast improvement hota hai aur long-term stability milti hai.
meanings.marathi: तो लवकरच धर्मात्मा होतो आणि कायमची शांती प्राप्त करतो. हे अर्जुन, माझा भक्त कधीही नष्ट होत नाही.

core_meaning: Positive transformation leads to rapid improvement and lasting stability, with assurance of protection
embedding_text: guaranteed transformation leading to rapid improvement and lasting stability, assurance based systems, building trust and confidence in recovery, consistent improvement and long term peace, reliable and protected systems

sanskrit: मां हि पार्थ व्यपाश्रित्य येऽपि स्युः पापयोनयः । स्त्रियो वैश्यास्तथा शूद्रास्तेऽपि यान्ति परां गतिम् ॥
transliteration: māṁ hi pārtha vyapāśritya ye ’pi syuḥ pāpa-yonayaḥ striyo vaiśyās tathā śūdrās te ’pi yānti parāṁ gatim

meanings.english: O Arjuna, those who take refuge in Me—even those considered of lower birth, women, merchants, and workers—can attain the supreme goal.
meanings.hindi: हे पार्थ, जो लोग मेरी शरण में आते हैं—चाहे वे किसी भी निम्न जन्म के हों, स्त्रियाँ, वैश्य या शूद्र—वे भी परम गति को प्राप्त करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: System sabke liye open hai—background matter nahi karta, connection matter karta hai.
meanings.marathi: हे पार्थ, जे कोणी माझ्या शरण येतात—ते कोणत्याही जन्माचे असोत—ते सर्व परमगतीला पोहोचतात.

core_meaning: Access to the highest goal is universal and not limited by background or status
use_cases: ensuring equal access for all users
embedding_text: universal access system open to all regardless of background, inclusive and equal opportunity design, removing barriers and enabling participation, fairness and accessibility in systems, equal access to highest outcomes

sanskrit: किं पुनर्ब्राह्मणाः पुण्या भक्ता राजर्षयस्तथा । अनित्यमसुखं लोकमिमं प्राप्य भजस्व माम् ॥
transliteration: kiṁ punar brāhmaṇāḥ puṇyā bhaktā rājarṣayas tathā anityam asukhaṁ lokam imaṁ prāpya bhajasva mām

meanings.english: How much more then the righteous brāhmaṇas, devotees, and saintly kings! Having come into this temporary and unhappy world, engage in devotion to Me.
meanings.hindi: तो फिर पुण्यवान ब्राह्मण, भक्त और राजर्षि तो निश्चित ही! इस अनित्य और दुखमय संसार में आकर मेरी भक्ति करो।
meanings.hinglish: Jab world temporary aur unstable hai, to long-term stable system ko choose karna best strategy hai.
meanings.marathi: मग पुण्यवान ब्राह्मण, भक्त आणि राजर्षी तर नक्कीच! या अनित्य आणि दुःखमय जगात येऊन माझी भक्ति कर.

core_meaning: In a temporary and unstable world, choosing a stable and higher path is the most effective approach
use_cases: prioritizing long-term stability over short-term gains
embedding_text: temporary and unstable systems vs long term stable solutions, strategic decision making in uncertain environments, prioritizing sustainable approaches, resilience and long term thinking, choosing stability over short term gains

sanskrit: मन्मना भव मद्भक्तो मद्याजी मां नमस्कुरु । मामेवैष्यसि युक्त्वैवमात्मानं मत्परायणः ॥
transliteration: man-manā bhava mad-bhakto mad-yājī māṁ namaskuru mām evaiṣyasi yuktvaivam ātmānaṁ mat-parāyaṇaḥ

meanings.english: Fix your mind on Me, become My devotee, worship Me, and offer your homage to Me. Thus, being fully absorbed in Me, you will surely come to Me.
meanings.hindi: मेरा स्मरण करो, मेरे भक्त बनो, मेरी पूजा करो और मुझे नमस्कार करो। इस प्रकार मुझमें स्थित होकर तुम निश्चित रूप से मुझे प्राप्त करोगे।
meanings.hinglish: Mind, action aur intention ko align karo—tab final connection guaranteed hai.
meanings.marathi: माझा विचार कर, माझा भक्त हो, माझी पूजा कर आणि मला नमस्कार कर. अशा प्रकारे माझ्यात स्थिर होऊन तू मला प्राप्त होशील.

core_meaning: Complete alignment of mind, action, and intention leads to ultimate connection and fulfillment
embedding_text: complete alignment of mind action and intention leading to final connection and fulfillment, integrated system design and focus, aligning thought and behavior for consistent outcomes, end to end alignment models, achieving goal completion

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच |
भूय एव महाबाहो श‍ृणु मे परमं वच: |
यत्तेऽहं प्रीयमाणाय वक्ष्यामि हितकाम्यया ॥ १ ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
bhūya eva mahā-bāho śṛṇu me paramaṁ vacaḥ
yat te ’haṁ prīyamāṇāya vakṣyāmi hita-kāmyayā

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: Listen again, O mighty-armed Arjuna. Because you are My dear friend, for your benefit I shall speak to you further, giving knowledge that is better than what I have already explained.
meanings.hindi: श्रीभगवान् ने कहा: हे महाबाहो अर्जुन! तुम मेरे प्रिय मित्र हो, इसलिए तुम्हारे हित के लिए मैं तुम्हें और भी रहस्यमयी ज्ञान दूंगा, जो पहले बताए गए ज्ञान से भी श्रेष्ठ है।
meanings.hinglish: Kṛṣṇa ne kaha: Mere pyare dost Arjuna, tumhare bhale ke liye main tumhe aur gehri baatein bataunga. Dhyaan se suno kyunki ye pehle se bhi behtar gyaan hai.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान् म्हणाले: हे महाबाहो अर्जुना, तू माझा अत्यंत प्रिय मित्र आहेस, म्हणून तुझ्या हितासाठी मी तुला पुन्हा माझे श्रेष्ठ वचन सांगतो, ते तू ऐक.

core_meaning: Divine Affection: Knowledge is shared where there is love. Krishna continues His instruction not out of duty, but because He cares for Arjuna’s well-being.
use_cases: realizing that spiritual knowledge is a gift of grace
listening with an open heart to a well-wisher
understanding the personal bond between God and the seeker
embedding_text: Krishna speaks further knowledge for the benefit of His dear friend Arjuna

sanskrit:
न मे विदु: सुरगणा: प्रभवं न महर्षय: |
अहमादिर्हि देवानां महर्षीणां च सर्वश: ॥ २ ॥
transliteration:
na me viduḥ sura-gaṇāḥ prabhavaṁ na maharṣayaḥ
aham ādir hi devānāṁ maharṣīṇāṁ ca sarvaśaḥ

meanings.english: Neither the hosts of demigods nor the great sages know My origin or opulences, for, in every respect, I am the source of the demigods and sages.
meanings.hindi: न तो देवता गण और न ही महर्षि मेरी उत्पत्ति या ऐश्वर्य को जानते हैं, क्योंकि मैं ही उन सब का आदि कारण (Source) हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Na toh Devta aur na hi bade Rishi-muni meri shuruaat ko jaante hain, kyunki un sabka janm mujhse hi hua hai.
meanings.marathi: माझी उत्पत्ती किंवा माझे ऐश्वर्य देवांना माहीत नाही आणि महर्षींनाही माहीत नाही; कारण मी सर्व प्रकारे देवांचा आणि महर्षींचाही उगम आहे.

core_meaning: The Source of Sources: You cannot fully measure the origin of something if you are a product of that origin. Krishna exists before the 'gods' and 'sages' were even conceived.
use_cases: recognizing the limits of human (and even divine) logic
approaching the divine with wonder rather than dry analysis
embedding_text: neither demigods nor sages know Krishna's origin as He is their source

sanskrit:
यो मामजमनादिं च वेत्ति लोकमहेश्वरम् |
असम्मूढ: स मर्त्येषु सर्वपापै: प्रमुच्यते ॥ ३ ॥
transliteration:
yo mām ajam anādiṁ ca vetti loka-maheśvaram
asammūḍhaḥ sa martyeṣu sarva-pāpaiḥ pramucyate

meanings.english: He who knows Me as the unborn, as the beginningless, as the Supreme Lord of all the worlds – he only, undeluded among men, is freed from all sins.
meanings.hindi: जो मुझे अजन्मा, अनादि और समस्त लोकों के परमेश्वर के रूप में जानता है, वह मनुष्यों में मोह-रहित होकर सभी पापों से मुक्त हो जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo mujhe 'Ajanma' (unborn) aur sabhi worlds ka maalik samajhta hai, wahi asli gyaani hai aur wo har paap se chhoot jata hai.
meanings.marathi: जो मला जन्मरहित, अनादी आणि सर्व लोकांचा महान ईश्वर म्हणून जाणतो, तो मनुष्यांमध्ये मोहमुक्त होऊन सर्व पापांपासून मुक्त होतो.

core_meaning: The Freedom of Truth: Knowing God's actual position (not just as a historical person, but as the unborn source) acts as a spiritual reset button, dissolving past karma.
use_cases: seeking liberation from guilt and past mistakes
defining the correct philosophical view of the Divine
embedding_text: knowing Krishna as unborn and Supreme Lord frees one from sins

sanskrit:
बुद्धिर्ज्ञानमसम्मोह: क्षमा सत्यं दम: शम: |
सुखं दु:खं भवोऽभावो भयं चाभयमेव च ॥ ४ ॥
अहिंसा समता तुष्टिस्तपो दानं यशोऽयश: |
भवन्ति भावा भूतानां मत्त एव पृथग्विधा: ॥ ५ ॥
transliteration:
buddhir jñānam asammohaḥ kṣamā satyaṁ damaḥ śamaḥ
sukhaṁ duḥkhaṁ bhavo ’bhāvo bhayaṁ cābhayam eva ca
ahiṁsā samatā tuṣṭis tapo dānaṁ yaśo ’yaśaḥ
bhavanti bhāvā bhūtānāṁ matta eva pṛthag-vidhāḥ

meanings.english: Intelligence, knowledge, freedom from doubt, forgiveness, truthfulness, control of senses/mind, happiness/distress, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, nonviolence, equanimity, satisfaction, austerity, charity, fame and infamy – all these qualities of living beings are created by Me alone.
meanings.hindi: बुद्धि, ज्ञान, मोह-मुक्ति, क्षमा, सत्य, इन्द्रिय-निग्रह, मन की शांति, सुख-दुःख, जन्म-मृत्यु, भय-अभय, अहिंसा, समता, संतोष, तप, दान, यश और अपयश—प्राणियों के ये विविध भाव मुझसे ही उत्पन्न होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Akkal, gyaan, maafi, sachai, dukh-sukh, dar aur nidarta—ye sab alag-alag qualities Mujhse hi aati hain.
meanings.marathi: बुद्धी, ज्ञान, मोहमुक्ती, क्षमा, सत्य, इंद्रियदमन, मनःशांती, सुख-दुःख, उत्पत्ती-विनाश, भय आणि अभय, अहिंसा, समता, संतोष, तप, दान, यश आणि अपयश हे प्राण्यांचे विविध भाव माझ्यापासूनच निर्माण होतात.

core_meaning: The Psychological Source: Krishna claims ownership of all internal states. Whether we are feeling peaceful or fearful, or exhibiting intelligence or charity, the 'raw material' for these emotions and traits comes from the Divine.
use_cases: recognizing God in our own thoughts and emotions
understanding that even dualities (fame/infamy) have a divine origin
practicing gratitude for positive mental traits
embedding_text: various qualities and states of living beings are created by Krishna alone

sanskrit:
महर्षय: सप्‍त पूर्वे चत्वारो मनवस्तथा |
मद्भ‍ावा मानसा जाता येषां लोक इमा: प्रजा: ॥ ६ ॥
transliteration:
maharṣayaḥ sapta pūrve catvāro manavas tathā
mad-bhāvā mānasā jātā yeṣāṁ loka imāḥ prajāḥ

meanings.english: The seven great sages and before them the four other great sages and the Manus [progenitors of mankind] come from Me, born from My mind, and all the living beings populating the various planets descend from them.
meanings.hindi: सातों महर्षि, उनसे भी पूर्व होने वाले चारों महर्षि (सनकादि) और चौदह मनु—ये सब मेरे मन से उत्पन्न हुए हैं, और संसार की सारी प्रजा इन्हीं की संतान है।
meanings.hinglish: Saptarishi, Sanak-Sanandan aur saare Manus mere mann se paida hue hain. Is duniya ki saari population unhi ki aulad hai.
meanings.marathi: सात महर्षी, त्यांच्याही पूर्वीचे चार महर्षी आणि मनू हे सर्व माझ्यापासून (माझ्या संकल्पातून) निर्माण झाले आहेत, ज्यांची ही सर्व जगातील प्रजा आहे.

core_meaning: Universal Ancestry: Krishna provides a genealogical map. All of humanity and beyond are descendants of great beings who were originally conceived in the mind of God.
use_cases: understanding the Vedic origin of human population
feeling a sense of universal brotherhood
visualizing the hierarchy of the universe
embedding_text: sages and Manus are born from Krishna's mind as progenitors of all beings

sanskrit:
एतां विभूतिं योगं च मम यो वेत्ति तत्त्वत: |
सोऽविकल्पेन योगेन युज्यते नात्र संशय: ॥ ७ ॥
transliteration:
etāṁ vibhūtiṁ yogaṁ ca mama yo vetti tattvataḥ
so ’vikalpena yogena yujyate nātra saṁśayaḥ

meanings.english: One who is factually convinced of this opulence and mystic power of Mine engages in unalloyed devotional service; of this there is no doubt.
meanings.hindi: जो मेरे इस ऐश्वर्य और योग-शक्ति को तत्व से (सचमुच) जानता है, वह निश्चल भक्ति में लग जाता है; इसमें कोई संशय नहीं है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo meri is power aur greatness ko sahi dhang se samajh leta hai, wo bina kisi doubt ke meri pakki bhakti karne lagta hai.
meanings.marathi: जो माझी ही विभूती आणि योगसामर्थ्य तत्त्वतः जाणतो, तो अविचल भक्तीने युक्त होतो, यात शंका नाही.

core_meaning: Awe Leads to Devotion: Factual knowledge isn't dry; it's a catalyst. When you realize how truly magnificent God is, devotion isn't a struggle—it's a natural response.
use_cases: strengthening one's faith through technical understanding
removing doubts about the necessity of devotion
moving from ritual to deep, unalloyed service
embedding_text: knowing Krishna's opulence and power leads to unalloyed devotional service

sanskrit:
अहं सर्वस्य प्रभवो मत्त: सर्वं प्रवर्तते |
इति मत्वा भजन्ते मां बुधा भावसमन्विता: ॥ ८ ॥
transliteration:
ahaṁ sarvasya prabhavo mattaḥ sarvaṁ pravartate
iti matvā bhajante māṁ budhā bhāva-samanvitāḥ

meanings.english: I am the source of all spiritual and material worlds. Everything emanates from Me. The wise who perfectly know this engage in My devotional service and worship Me with all their hearts.
meanings.hindi: मैं ही समस्त आध्यात्मिक और भौतिक जगतों का कारण हूँ। प्रत्येक वस्तु मुझ ही से उद्भूत है। जो विद्वान इस बात को भली-भाँति जानते हैं, वे प्रेमपूर्वक मेरी भक्ति में लगते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Main hi har cheez ka source hoon. Sab kuch Mujhse hi nikalta hai. Ye samajhkar samajhdaar log poore dil se meri puja karte hain.
meanings.marathi: मी सर्वांचा उगम आहे, माझ्यापासूनच सर्व काही प्रवर्तित होते (चालते); असे जाणून बुद्धिमान लोक प्रेमाने मला भजतात.

core_meaning: The Grand Summary: This is the first of the four essential verses. It establishes Krishna as the absolute origin. 'Budha' (the wise) don't just know this as a fact—they feel it in their hearts ('Bhava').
use_cases: meditating on the source of everything
recognizing the intelligent design behind the universe
embedding_text: Krishna is the source of all worlds; the wise worship Him with all their hearts

sanskrit:
मच्च‍ित्ता मद्ग‍तप्राणा बोधयन्त: परस्परम् |
कथयन्तश्च मां नित्यं तुष्यन्ति च रमन्ति च ॥ ९ ॥
transliteration:
mac-cittā mad-gata-prāṇā bodhayantaḥ parasparam
kathayantaś ca māṁ nityaṁ tuष्यन्ति च रमन्ति च

meanings.english: The thoughts of My pure devotees dwell in Me, their lives are fully devoted to My service, and they derive great satisfaction and bliss from always enlightening one another and conversing about Me.
meanings.hindi: मेरे शुद्ध भक्तों के विचार मुझमें वास करते हैं, उनके प्राण मुझमें अर्पित होते हैं, और वे परस्पर मेरे विषय में चर्चा करते हुए परम संतोष और आनंद का अनुभव करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Mere bhakt hamesha mere baare mein sochte hain, unki life mujh par dedicated hoti hai. Wo aapas mein meri baatein karke khush hote hain.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांची चित्ते माझ्या ठायी जडलेली आहेत, ज्यांचे प्राण मला अर्पण झालेले आहेत, असे माझे भक्त एकमेकांना बोध करीत आणि माझ्या कथा सांगत नेहमी संतुष्ट आणि आनंदी असतात.

core_meaning: The Joy of Community: Devotion is not just a lonely path. Devotees find their greatest joy in sharing their realizations with others. Their 'satisfaction' (tushyanti) and 'bliss' (ramanti) come from this constant divine exchange.
use_cases: making God the center of all conversations
understanding the internal state of a pure devotee
embedding_text: devotees derive bliss from conversing about Krishna and enlightening each other

sanskrit:
तेषामेवानुकम्पार्थमहमज्ञानजं तम: |
नाशयाम्यात्मभावस्थो ज्ञानदीपेन भास्वता ॥ ११ ॥
transliteration:
teṣām evānukampārtham aham ajñāna-jaṁ tamaḥ
nāśayāmy ātma-bhāva-stho jñāna-dīpena bhāsvatā

meanings.english: To show them special mercy, I, dwelling in their hearts, destroy with the shining lamp of knowledge the darkness born of ignorance.
meanings.hindi: उन पर विशेष कृपा करने के लिए, उनके हृदयों में स्थित होकर, मैं ज्ञान के प्रकाशमान दीपक द्वारा अज्ञान से उत्पन्न अंधकार को नष्ट कर देता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Unpe kripa karne ke liye, Main unke dil mein baithkar gyaan ka diya jala deta hoon, jisse saara andhera khatam ho jata hai.
meanings.marathi: त्यांच्यावर अनुग्रह करण्यासाठी त्यांच्या अंतःकरणात राहून मी ज्ञानाच्या प्रकाशमान दिव्याने अज्ञानामुळे निर्माण झालेला अंधकार नष्ट करतो.

core_meaning: The Internal Compass: This concludes the Chatur-shloki. Krishna promises that for a sincere devotee, He personally takes charge of their spiritual education from within, acting as a light in the dark.
use_cases: trusting in inner guidance and intuition
realizing that God helps those who sincerely love Him
embedding_text: Krishna destroys the darkness of ignorance in His devotees' hearts with the lamp of knowledge

sanskrit:
अर्जुन उवाच |
परं ब्रह्म परं धाम पवित्रं परमं भवान् |
पुरुषं शाश्वतं दिव्यमादिदेवमजं विभुम् ॥ १२ ॥
आहुस्त्वामृषय: सर्वे देवर्षिर्नारदस्तथा |
असितो देवलो व्यास: स्वयं चैव ब्रवीषि मे ॥ १३ ॥
transliteration:
arjuna uvāca
paraṁ brahma paraṁ dhāma pavitraṁ paramaṁ bhavān
puruṣaṁ śāśvataṁ divyam ādi-devam ajaṁ vibhum
āhus tvām ṛṣayaḥ sarve devarṣir nāradas tathā
asito devalo vyāsaḥ svayaṁ caiva bravīṣi me

meanings.english: Arjuna said: You are the Supreme Personality of Godhead, the ultimate abode, the purest, the Absolute Truth. You are the eternal, transcendental, original person, the unborn, the greatest. All the great sages confirm this, and now You Yourself are declaring it to me.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: आप ही परब्रह्म, परम धाम और परम पवित्र हैं। आप शाश्वत, दिव्य, आदिदेव, अजन्मा और महान हैं। नारद, असित, देवल और व्यास जैसे ऋषि भी यही कहते हैं, और अब आप स्वयं भी मुझसे यही कह रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Arjuna ne kaha: Aap hi sabse bade Bhagwan hain, sabse pavitra aur sachai hain. Saare bade Rishi-muni bhi yahi kehte hain aur ab Aapne khud bhi ye bataya hai.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला, आपण परब्रह्म, परम धाम आणि परम पवित्र आहात. आपण शाश्वत, दिव्य पुरुष, आदिदेव, अजन्मा आणि सर्वव्यापी आहात. नारद, असित, देवल आणि व्यास यांसारखे सर्व ऋषी आपल्याबद्दल असेच सांगतात आणि आता आपण स्वतःही मला तेच सांगत आहात.

core_meaning: The Acceptance: Arjuna validates Krishna’s claims by citing authority (the sages) and his own realization. He acknowledges Krishna not just as a friend, but as the 'Param Brahma' (Supreme Reality).
use_cases: confirming faith through scripture and realized masters
moving from personal friendship to spiritual discipleship
embedding_text: Arjuna accepts Krishna as the Supreme Brahman, eternal and original person

sanskrit:
सर्वमेतदृतं मन्ये यन्मां वदसि केशव |
न हि ते भगवन्व्यक्तिं विदुर्देवा न दानवा: ॥ १४ ॥
transliteration:
sarvam etad ṛtaṁ manye yan māṁ vadasi keśava
na hi te bhagavan vyaktiṁ vidur devā na dānavāḥ

meanings.english: O Krishna, I totally accept as truth all that You have told me. Neither the demigods nor the demons, O Lord, can understand Your personality.
meanings.hindi: हे केशव! आप जो कुछ भी मुझसे कह रहे हैं, उसे मैं पूर्णतः सत्य मानता हूँ। हे प्रभु! न तो देवता और न ही दानव आपके व्यक्तित्व को समझ सकते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna, Aap jo bhi keh rahe hain main use sach manta hoon. Aapko samajhna na toh Devtao ke bas ki baat hai na hi Danavo ki.
meanings.marathi: हे केशवा, आपण मला जे काही सांगत आहात ते सर्व मी सत्य मानतो. हे भगवंता, आपला प्रभाव (स्वरूप) देव किंवा दानवही जाणू शकत नाहीत.

core_meaning: Unconditional Faith: Arjuna emphasizes that intellect alone (whether divine or demonic) isn't enough to grasp God. Only the 'Parampara' (succession) and devotion allow this understanding.
use_cases: choosing faith over endless intellectual speculation
understanding the exclusivity of divine revelation
adopting the mood of a true student
embedding_text: Arjuna accepts Krishna's words as absolute truth, noting that gods and demons cannot know Him

sanskrit:
स्वयमेवात्मनात्मानं वेत्थ त्वं पुरुषोत्तम |
भूतभावन भूतेश देवदेव जगत्पते ॥ १५ ॥
transliteration:
svayam evātmanātmānaṁ vettha tvaṁ puruṣottama
bhūta-bhāvana bhūteśa deva-deva jagat-pate

meanings.english: Indeed, You alone know Yourself by Your own internal potency, O Supreme Person, origin of all, Lord of all beings, God of gods, Lord of the universe!
meanings.hindi: हे पुरुषोत्तम! हे भूतों को उत्पन्न करने वाले! हे भूतों के ईश्वर! हे देवों के देव! हे जगत के स्वामी! केवल आप ही अपने आप को अपनी शक्ति से जानते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Hey Purushottama, Aap hi apne aap ko jaante hain. Aap hi sabko banane wale aur is duniya ke maalik hain.
meanings.marathi: हे पुरुषोत्तमा, हे भूतभावने, हे भूतेशा, हे देवदेवा, हे जगत्पते, आपण स्वतःच स्वतःला आपल्या स्वतःच्या योगाने (शक्तीने) जाणता.

core_meaning: Self-Knowledge of the Divine: No external entity can define God. Krishna is his own witness. Arjuna uses five powerful titles to address Krishna's various roles as creator, controller, and proprietor.
use_cases: contemplating the various roles of the Divine
embedding_text: Krishna alone knows Himself through His own potency

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच |
हन्त ते कथयिष्यामि दिव्या ह्यात्मविभूतय: |
प्राधान्यत: कुरुश्रेष्ठ नास्त्यन्तो विस्तरस्य मे ॥ १९ ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
hanta te kathayiṣyāmi divyā hy ātma-vibhūtayaḥ
prādhānyataḥ kuru-śreṣṭha nāsty anto vistarasya me

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: Yes, I will tell you of My splendorous manifestations, but only of those which are prominent, O Arjuna, for My opulence is limitless.
meanings.hindi: श्रीभगवान् ने कहा: हाँ, मैं तुम्हें अपने दिव्य ऐश्वर्यों के विषय में बताऊंगा, परंतु केवल मुख्य-मुख्य के बारे में, क्योंकि हे कुरुश्रेष्ठ! मेरे विस्तार का कोई अंत नहीं है।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan ne kaha: Theek hai, main tumhe apni khaas-khaas powers ke baare mein bataunga, kyunki meri powers ka toh koi end hi nahi hai.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान् म्हणाले, ठीक आहे, हे कुरुश्रेष्ठा, मी तुला माझी दिव्य आत्मवैभवे सांगेन, परंतु त्यातील प्रमुख तीच सांगेन; कारण माझ्या विस्ताराला अंत नाही.

core_meaning: The Infinite Catalog: Krishna agrees to speak but adds a disclaimer: His opulences are infinite. He will only list the 'highlights' (Pradhanyatah) because the human mind cannot process the totality of the infinite.
use_cases: acknowledging that we can only know a fraction of the Divine
focusing on the most prominent signs of God in nature
embedding_text: Krishna agrees to describe His prominent opulences as they are limitless

sanskrit:
अहमात्मा गुडाकेश सर्वभूताशयस्थित: |
अहमादिश्च मध्यं च भूतानामन्त एव च ॥ २० ॥
transliteration:
aham ātmā guḍākeśa sarva-bhūtāśaya-sthitaḥ
aham ādiś ca madhyaṁ ca bhūtānām anta eva ca

meanings.english: I am the Supersoul, O Arjuna, seated in the hearts of all living entities. I am the beginning, the middle and the end of all beings.
meanings.hindi: हे गुडाकेश (अर्जुन)! मैं समस्त जीवों के हृदयों में स्थित परमात्मा हूँ। मैं ही समस्त जीवों का आदि, मध्य और अंत हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main har ek living being ke dil mein baitha hoon. Main hi shuruaat hoon, main hi beech ka hissa hoon aur main hi end hoon.
meanings.marathi: हे गुडाकेशा, सर्व भूतांच्या अंतःकरणात स्थित असलेला 'आत्मा' मीच आहे; तसेच सर्व भूतांचा प्रारंभ, मध्य आणि अंतही मीच आहे.

core_meaning: The Core Opulence: Before listing external things, Krishna gives the most important one: He is the 'Self' within. He is the timeline of existence—the creator, the sustainer, and the destroyer.
use_cases: meditating on the presence of God within oneself
seeing the Divine in every living creature
finding stability in the face of birth, life, and death
embedding_text: Krishna is the Supersoul in all hearts and the beginning, middle, and end of all beings

sanskrit:
आदित्यानामहं विष्णुर्ज्योतिषां रविरंश‍ुमान् |
मरीचिर्मरुतामस्मि नक्षत्राणामहं शशी ॥ २१ ॥
transliteration:
ādityānām ahaṁ viṣṇur jyotiṣāṁ ravir aṁśumān
marīcir marutām asmi nakṣatrāṇām ahaṁ śaśī

meanings.english: Of the Ādityas I am Viṣṇu, of lights I am the radiant sun, of the Maruts I am Marīci, and among the stars I am the moon.
meanings.hindi: मैं आदित्यों में विष्णु, ज्योतियों में तेजस्वी सूर्य, मरुतों में मरीचि और नक्षत्रों में चंद्रमा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main Adityas mein Vishnu hoon, roshni mein chamakta Suraj hoon, hawaon mein Marichi aur sitaron mein Chandamama hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी आदित्यांमध्ये विष्णू, तेजांमध्ये प्रकाशमान सूर्य, मरुतांमध्ये मरीची आणि नक्षत्रांमध्ये चंद्रमा आहे.

core_meaning: The Chief of Lights: Krishna identifies as the most prominent entities in the sky—the Sun by day and the Moon by night—signifying He is the source of all illumination.
use_cases: recognizing the divine energy in natural light
meditating on the source of planetary energy
viewing the moon as a reflection of divine calm
embedding_text: Krishna is Vishnu among Adityas, the sun among lights, and the moon among stars.

sanskrit:
वेदानां सामवेदोऽस्मि देवानामस्मि वासव: |
इन्द्रियाणां मनश्चास्मि भूतानामस्मि चेतना ॥ २२ ॥
transliteration:
vedānāṁ sāma-vedo ’smi devānām asmi vāsavaḥ
indriyāṇāṁ manaś cāsmi bhūtānām asmi cetanā

meanings.english: Of the Vedas I am the Sāma Veda; of the demigods I am Indra, the king of heaven; of the senses I am the mind; and in living beings I am the living force [consciousness].
meanings.hindi: वेदों में मैं सामवेद हूँ, देवों में इंद्र हूँ, इंद्रियों में मन हूँ और जीवित प्राणियों में चेतना (जीवन-शक्ति) हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Vedas mein Main Sama Veda hoon, devtao mein Indra, senses mein mann hoon aur har living being mein unki consciousness hoon.
meanings.marathi: वेदांमध्ये मी सामवेद आहे, देवांमध्ये मी इंद्र आहे, इंद्रियांमध्ये मी मन आहे आणि प्राण्यांमधील चेतना (जीवनशक्ती) मीच आहे.

core_meaning: The Internal Essence: Krishna identifies as the 'Chetana' (consciousness) that distinguishes life from matter, and the 'Manas' (mind) which controls the senses.
use_cases: understanding the distinction between soul and body
mastering the senses by focusing the mind on the divine
appreciating the gift of life and awareness
embedding_text: Krishna is the Sama Veda, Indra, the mind, and consciousness in all beings.

sanskrit:
रुद्राणां शङ्करश्चास्मि वित्तेशो यक्षरक्षसाम् |
वसूनां पावकश्चास्मि मेरु: शिखरिणामहम् ॥ २३ ॥
transliteration:
rudrāṇāṁ śaṅkaraś cāsmi vitteśo yakṣa-rakṣasām
vasūnāṁ pāvakaś cāsmi meruḥ śikhariṇām aham

meanings.english: Of all the Rudras I am Lord Śiva, of the Yakṣas and Rākṣasas I am the Lord of wealth [Kuvera], of the Vasus I am fire [Agni], and of mountains I am Meru.
meanings.hindi: रुद्रों में मैं शंकर हूँ, यक्षों और राक्षसों में कुबेर हूँ, वसुओं में अग्नि हूँ और शिखरों वाले पर्वतों में सुमेरु हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Rudras mein Main Shankar hoon, khazane ke maalik Kuber hoon, Vasus mein aag hoon aur pahaado mein Meru parvat hoon.
meanings.marathi: रुद्रांमध्ये मी शंकर आहे, यक्ष आणि राक्षसांमध्ये मी कुबेर आहे, वसूमध्ये मी अग्नी आहे आणि शिखरयुक्त पर्वतांमध्ये मी मेरू पर्वत आहे.

core_meaning: The Elemental Powers: Krishna represents the peak of power (Shiva), wealth (Kuvera), energy (Fire), and stability (Meru).
use_cases: seeking spiritual wealth over material wealth
meditating on the purifying nature of fire
embedding_text: Krishna is Lord Shiva, Kuvera, fire, and Mount Meru.

sanskrit:
पुरोधसां च मुख्यं मां विद्धि पार्थ बृहस्पतिम् |
सेनानीनामहं स्कन्द: सरसामस्मि सागर: ॥ २४ ॥
transliteration:
purodhasāṁ ca mukhyaṁ māṁ viddhi pārtha bṛhaspatim
senānīnām ahaṁ skandaḥ sarasām asmi sāgaraḥ

meanings.english: Of priests, O Arjuna, know Me to be the chief, Bṛhaspati. Of generals I am Kārttikeya, and of bodies of water I am the ocean.
meanings.hindi: पुरोहितों में मुझे मुख्य बृहस्पति समझो। सेनापतियों में मैं कार्तिकेय हूँ और जलाशयों में मैं समुद्र हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Priests mein Main Brihaspati hoon, generals mein Kartikeya aur paani ke sroton mein samudra hoon.
meanings.marathi: पुरोहितांमध्ये तू मला मुख्य बृहस्पती समज. सेनापतींमध्ये मी कार्तिकेय आहे आणि जलाशयांमध्ये मी समुद्र आहे.

core_meaning: Leadership and Depth: Krishna identifies as the priest of gods, the general of divine armies, and the infinite depth of the ocean.
use_cases: understanding the vastness of spiritual knowledge
embedding_text: Krishna is Brihaspati among priests, Kartikeya among generals, and the ocean among waters.

sanskrit:
महर्षीणां भृगुरहं गिरामस्म्येकमक्षरम् |
यज्ञानां जपयज्ञोऽस्मि स्थावराणां हिमालय: ॥ २५ ॥
transliteration:
maharṣīṇāṁ bhṛgur ahaṁ girām asmy ekam akṣaram
yajñānāṁ japa-yajño ’smi sthāvarāṇām himālayaḥ

meanings.english: Of the great sages I am Bhṛgu; of vibrations I am the transcendental oṁ. Of sacrifices I am the chanting of the holy names [japa], and of immovable things I am the Himālayas.
meanings.hindi: महर्षियों में मैं भृगु हूँ, वाणी में एक अक्षर 'ओम्' हूँ। यज्ञों में मैं जप-यज्ञ हूँ और अचल रहने वालों में हिमालय पर्वत हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Sages mein Main Bhrigu hoon, awaaz mein 'Om' hoon. Yajnas mein Main Japa-yajna hoon aur pahaado mein Himalaya hoon.
meanings.marathi: महर्षींमध्ये मी भृगू आहे, शब्दांमध्ये मी एक अक्षर 'ॐ' आहे, यज्ञांमध्ये मी जपयज्ञ आहे आणि स्थितांमध्ये (अचलांमध्ये) मी हिमालय आहे.

core_meaning: Purity of Practice: Krishna highlights 'Japa' (chanting) as the highest sacrifice because it involves no violence and connects the soul directly to God through sound (Om).
use_cases: establishing a daily Japa meditation practice
understanding the power of the syllable 'Om'
cultivating unshakeable faith like the Himalayas
embedding_text: Krishna is Bhrigu, the syllable Om, Japa-yajna, and the Himalayas.

sanskrit:
अश्वत्थ: सर्ववृक्षाणां देवर्षीणां च नारद: |
गन्धर्वाणां चित्ररथ: सिद्धानां कपिलो मुनि: ॥ २६ ॥
transliteration:
aśvatthaḥ sarva-vṛkṣāṇāṁ devarṣīṇāṁ ca nāradaḥ
gandharvāṇāṁ citrarathaḥ siddhānāṁ kapilo muniḥ

meanings.english: Of all trees I am the banyan tree, and of the sages among the demigods I am Nārada. Of the Gandharvas I am Citraratha, and among perfected beings I am the sage Kapila.
meanings.hindi: मैं समस्त वृक्षों में अश्वत्थ (पीपल), देवर्षियों में नारद, गन्धर्वों में चित्ररथ और सिद्ध पुरुषों में कपिल मुनि हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Saare pedo mein Peepal ka ped, dev-rishiyo mein Narad muni, Gandharvas mein Citraratha aur Siddha logo mein Kapila muni hoon.
meanings.marathi: सर्व वृक्षांमध्ये मी अश्वत्थ (पिंपळ), देवर्षींमध्ये नारद, गंधर्वांमध्ये चित्ररथ आणि सिद्धांमध्ये कपिल मुनी आहे.

core_meaning: Perfection in Expression: Krishna is the most sacred tree, the most talented celestial singer, and the most analytically perfect philosopher (Kapila).
use_cases: studying the analytical philosophy of the self
embedding_text: Krishna is the banyan tree, Narada, Citraratha, and Kapila Muni.

sanskrit:
उच्‍चैःश्रवसमश्वानां विद्धि माममृतोद्भ‍वम् |
ऐरावतं गजेन्द्राणां नराणां च नराधिपम् ॥ २७ ॥
transliteration:
uccaiḥśravasam aśvānāṁ viddhi mām amṛtodbhavam
airāvataṁ gajendrāṇāṁ narāṇāṁ ca narādhipam

meanings.english: Of horses know Me to be Uccaiḥśravā, produced during the churning of the ocean for nectar. Of lordly elephants I am Airāvata, and among men I am the monarch.
meanings.hindi: घोड़ों में मुझे उच्चैःश्रवा समझो, जो अमृत के लिए समुद्र मंथन से उत्पन्न हुआ था। हाथियों में मैं ऐरावत हूँ और मनुष्यों में राजा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Ghodon mein Main Ucchaishrava hoon, hathiyo mein Airavat aur insaano mein Raja hoon.
meanings.marathi: घोड्यांमध्ये मला अमृतासाठी केलेल्या समुद्रमंथनातून निघालेला उच्चैःश्रवा समज, हत्तींमध्ये मी ऐरावत आणि मनुष्यांमध्ये राजा आहे.

core_meaning: The Sovereign Power: Krishna identifies with the 'best of their kind' produced from the churning of the ocean, emphasizing He is the majesty in royalty and strength.
use_cases: recognizing that true power comes from a divine source
viewing the best in any category as a reflection of God
embedding_text: Krishna is Ucchaishrava, Airavata, and the king among men.

sanskrit:
आयुधानामहं वज्रं धेनूनामस्मि कामधुक् |
प्रजनश्चास्मि कन्दर्प: सर्पाणामस्मि वासुकि: ॥ २८ ॥
transliteration:
āyudhānām ahaṁ vajraṁ dhenūnām asmi kāma-dhuk
prajanaś cāsmi kandarpaḥ sarpāṇām asmi vāsukiḥ

meanings.english: Of weapons I am the thunderbolt; among cows I am the surabhi. Of causes for procreation I am Kandarpa, the god of love, and of serpents I am Vāsuki.
meanings.hindi: मैं शस्त्रों में वज्र, गौओं में कामधेनु, संतानोत्पत्ति का कारण कामदेव और सर्पों में वासुकि हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Hathi yaaro mein Vajra hoon, gaayo mein Kamadhenu, bache paida karne wali shakti Kamdev hoon aur saapo mein Vasuki hoon.
meanings.marathi: शस्त्रांमध्ये मी वज्र आहे, गाईंमध्ये मी कामधेनू आहे, प्रजोत्पत्तीचे कारण असलेला कामदेव मी आहे आणि सर्पांमध्ये मी वासुकी आहे.

core_meaning: Force and Fertility: Krishna is the ultimate weapon (Vajra) and the source of all abundance (Surabhi cow). He also defines sex life as divine when governed by the purpose of procreation.
use_cases: respecting the sanctity of life and procreation
recognizing divine power in defensive strength
connecting with the concept of spiritual abundance
embedding_text: Krishna is the thunderbolt, the Surabhi cow, Kandarpa, and Vasuki.

sanskrit:
अनन्तश्चास्मि नागानां वरुणो यादसामहम् |
पितॄणामर्यमा चास्मि यम: संयमतामहम् ॥ २९ ॥
transliteration:
anantaś cāsmi nāgānāṁ varuṇo yādasām aham
pitṝṇām aryamā cāsmi yamaḥ saṁyamatām aham

meanings.english: Of the many-hooded Nāgas I am Ananta, and among the aquatics I am the demigod Varuṇa. Of departed ancestors I am Aryamā, and among the dispensers of law I am Yama, the lord of death.
meanings.hindi: मैं अनेक फणों वाले नागों में अनंत, जलचरों में वरुण देव, पितरों में अर्यमा और नियमन करने वालों में यमराज हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Naago mein Main Ananta hoon, paani ke jeevo mein Varuna, purvajo mein Aryama aur kanoon maanne walo mein Yamraj hoon.
meanings.marathi: नागांमध्ये मी अनंत (शेषनाग) आहे, जलचरांमध्ये मी वरुण आहे, पितरांमध्ये मी अर्यमा आहे आणि नियमन करणाऱ्यांमध्ये मी यमराज आहे.

core_meaning: Order and Infinity: Krishna is the support of the universe (Ananta) and the administrator of justice (Yama).
use_cases: accepting the natural laws of life and death
embedding_text: Krishna is Ananta, Varuna, Aryama, and Yama.

sanskrit:
प्रह्लादश्चास्मि दैत्यानां काल: कलयतामहम् |
मृगाणां च मृगेन्द्रोऽहं वैनतेयश्च पक्षिणाम् ॥ ३० ॥
transliteration:
prahlādaś cāsmi daityānāṁ kālaḥ kalayatām aham
mṛgāṇāṁ ca mṛgendro ’haṁ vainateyaś ca pakṣiṇām

meanings.english: Among the Daitya demons I am the devoted Prahlāda, among subduers I am time, among beasts I am the lion, and among birds I am Garuḍa.
meanings.hindi: मैं दैत्यों में भक्त प्रह्लाद, दमन करने वालों में समय, पशुओं में सिंह और पक्षियों में गरुड़ हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Daityon mein Main Prahlada hoon, sabko badalne wala Samay hoon, jaanwaro mein Sher aur pakshiyo mein Garuda hoon.
meanings.marathi: दैत्यांमध्ये मी प्रह्लाद आहे, मोजणाऱ्यांमध्ये (दमन करणाऱ्यांमध्ये) मी काळ आहे, पशूंमध्ये मी सिंह आहे आणि पक्ष्यांमध्ये मी गरुड आहे.

core_meaning: The Power of Devotion and Time: Even in a family of demons, the best (the devotee Prahlada) is Krishna. He is also 'Kala' (Time), which eventually subdues everything in the material world.
use_cases: staying devoted even in difficult surroundings
respecting the inevitable power of time
observing majesty in the animal kingdom
embedding_text: Krishna is Prahlada, time, the lion, and Garuda.

sanskrit:
पवन: पवतामस्मि राम: शस्त्रभृतामहम् |
झषाणां मकरश्चास्मि स्रोतसामस्मि जाह्नवी ॥ ३१ ॥
transliteration:
pavanaḥ pavatām asmi rāmaḥ śastra-bhṛtām aham
jhaṣāṇāṁ makaraś cāsmi srotasām asmi jāhnavī

meanings.english: Of purifiers I am the wind, of the wielders of weapons I am Rāma, of fishes I am the shark, and of flowing rivers I am the Ganges.
meanings.hindi: मैं पवित्र करने वालों में वायु, शस्त्रधारियों में श्री राम, मछलियों में मगरमच्छ (शार्क) और नदियों में गंगा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Saaf karne wali cheezon mein Main hawa hoon, weapons uthane walon mein Shri Ram, machliyon mein shark aur nadiyon mein Ganga hoon.
meanings.marathi: पवन करणाऱ्यांमध्ये मी वायू आहे, शस्त्रधार्यांमध्ये मी श्रीराम आहे, माशांमध्ये मी मकर (शार्क) आहे आणि नद्यांमध्ये मी गंगा आहे.

core_meaning: The Power of Purity: Krishna identifies with the ultimate purifier (Wind), the most righteous warrior (Rama), and the most sacred river (Ganges).
use_cases: respecting the sanctity of natural resources
embedding_text: Krishna is the wind, Lord Rama, the shark, and the Ganges.

sanskrit:
सर्गाणामादिरन्तश्च मध्यं चैवाहमर्जुन |
अध्यात्मविद्या विद्यानां वाद: प्रवदतामहम् ॥ ३२ ॥
transliteration:
sargāṇām ādir antaś ca madhyaṁ caivāham arjuna
adhyātma-vidyā vidyānāṁ vādaḥ pravadatām aham

meanings.english: Of all creations I am the beginning and the end and also the middle, O Arjuna. Of all sciences I am the spiritual science of the self, and among logicians I am the conclusive truth.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन! मैं सृष्टियों का आदि, अंत और मध्य भी हूँ। विद्याओं में मैं अध्यात्म विद्या (आत्म-ज्ञान) हूँ और तर्क करने वालों का संवाद (निष्कर्ष) हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Har cheez ki shuruaat, beech aur anth Main hoon. Saari studies mein Main self-knowledge hoon aur debates mein Main final logic hoon.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुना, सृष्टीचा प्रारंभ, मध्य आणि अंत मीच आहे. विद्यांमध्ये मी अध्यात्मविद्या आहे आणि वाद घालणाऱ्यांचा 'वाद' (निर्णायक तर्क) मी आहे.

core_meaning: The Alpha and Omega: Krishna is the entire timeline of existence. Among all knowledge, He is the science of the Soul—the only knowledge that leads to liberation.
use_cases: finding the objective truth in complex discussions
understanding the cyclical nature of time
embedding_text: Krishna is the beginning, middle, and end of creation, spiritual science, and conclusive logic.

sanskrit:
अक्षराणामकारोऽस्मि द्वन्द्व: सामासिकस्य च |
अहमेवाक्षय: कालो धाताहं विश्वतोमुख: ॥ ३३ ॥
transliteration:
akṣarāṇām a-kāro ’smi dvandvaḥ sāmāsikasya ca
aham evākṣayaḥ kālo dhātāhaṁ viśvato-mukhaḥ

meanings.english: Of letters I am the letter A, and among compound words I am the dual compound. I am also inexhaustible time, and of creators I am Brahmā.
meanings.hindi: अक्षरों में मैं 'अ' कार हूँ और समासों में द्वंद्व समास हूँ। मैं ही अक्षय काल (अविनाशी समय) हूँ और सब ओर मुख वाला धाता (स्रष्टा) हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Alphabets mein Main 'A' hoon, grammar mein dvandva samas hoon. Main kabhi na khatam hone wala time hoon aur sabka khayal rakhne wala creator hoon.
meanings.marathi: अक्षरांमध्ये मी 'अ' आहे आणि समासांमध्ये मी द्वंद्व समास आहे. अक्षय काळ मीच आहे आणि सर्व बाजूंनी मुख असलेला विधाता मीच आहे.

core_meaning: Fundamental Elements: Krishna is the foundation of language (the letter A) and the eternal dimension of time that survives even the destruction of the universe.
use_cases: meditating on the foundational sounds of existence
recognizing the source of all creative work
embedding_text: Krishna is the letter A, the dual compound, eternal time, and Brahma.

sanskrit:
मृत्यु: सर्वहरश्चाहमुद्भ‍वश्च भविष्यताम् |
कीर्ति: श्रीर्वाक्‍च नारीणां स्मृतिर्मेधा धृति: क्षमा ॥ ३४ ॥
transliteration:
mṛtyuḥ sarva-haraś cāham udbhavaś ca bhaviṣyatām
kīrtiḥ śrīr vāk ca nārīṇāṁ smṛtir medhā dhṛtiḥ kṣamā

meanings.english: I am all-devouring death, and I am the generating principle of all that is yet to be. Among women I am fame, fortune, fine speech, memory, intelligence, steadfastness and patience.
meanings.hindi: मैं सबको हरने वाली मृत्यु हूँ और भविष्य में होने वालों का जन्म-हेतु हूँ। स्त्रियों में मैं कीर्ति, श्री, वाक्, स्मृति, मेधा, धृति और क्षमा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main sabko le jaane wali death hoon aur aane wale kal ki wajah hoon. Aurton mein jo qualities hoti hain—fame, wealth, speech, memory, intelligence, patience—wo Main hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी सर्वांचे हरण करणारा मृत्यू आणि पुढे होणाऱ्यांचा उत्पत्तीहेतू आहे. स्त्रियांमध्ये कीर्ती, लक्ष्मी, वाणी, स्मृती, मेधा, धृती आणि क्षमा मीच आहे.

core_meaning: The Grand Duality: Krishna is both the 'reaper' (Death) and the 'seed' (Birth). He also embodies the seven sublime qualities of character that bring glory to a person.
use_cases: cultivating mental qualities like patience and memory
embedding_text: Krishna is death, the source of the future, and the seven feminine virtues.

sanskrit:
बृहत्साम तथा साम्न‍ां गायत्री छन्दसामहम् |
मासानां मार्गशीर्षोऽहमृतूनां कुसुमाकर: ॥ ३५ ॥
transliteration:
bṛhat-sāma tathā sāmnāṁ gāyatrī chandasām aham
māsānāṁ mārga-śīrṣo ’ham ṛtūnāṁ kusumākaraḥ

meanings.english: Of the hymns in the Sāma Veda I am the Bṛhat-sāma, and of poetry I am the Gāyatrī. Of months I am Mārgaśīrṣa, and of seasons I am flower-bearing spring.
meanings.hindi: सामवेद के गीतों में मैं बृहत्साम हूँ, छंदों में गायत्री हूँ। महीनों में मार्गशीर्ष (अगहन) हूँ और ऋतुओं में वसंत हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Sama Veda ke gaano mein Main Brihat-sama hoon, poetry mein Gayatri mantra. Mahino mein Margashirsha aur mausam mein Basant hoon.
meanings.marathi: सामवेदातील गीतात मी बृहत्साम आहे आणि छंदांमध्ये मी गायत्री छंद आहे. महिन्यांमध्ये मी मार्गशीर्ष आणि ऋतूंमध्ये मी वसंत ऋतू आहे.

core_meaning: Harmony and Beauty: Krishna is found in the most beautiful music, the most sacred mantra, and the most pleasant time of the year.
use_cases: appreciating the renewal of nature in spring
finding rhythm and melody in spiritual life
embedding_text: Krishna is Brihat-sama, the Gayatri mantra, the month of Margashirsha, and spring.

sanskrit:
द्यूतं छलयतामस्मि तेजस्तेजस्विनामहम् |
जयोऽस्मि व्यवसायोऽस्मि सत्त्वं सत्त्ववतामहम् ॥ ३६ ॥
transliteration:
dyūtaṁ chalayatām asmi tejas tejasvinām aham
jayo ’smi vyavasāyo ’smi sattvaṁ sattvavatām aham

meanings.english: I am also the gambling of cheats, and of the splendid I am the splendor. I am victory, I am adventure, and I am the strength of the strong.
meanings.hindi: मैं छल करने वालों में जुआ हूँ और तेजस्वियों में तेज हूँ। मैं विजय हूँ, मैं निश्चय हूँ और सात्विक पुरुषों में सत्त्व गुण हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Dhokebaazo mein Main gambling hoon, aur bright logo mein unki brilliance. Main jeet hoon, koshish hoon aur taqatwaro mein unki taqat hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी कपटी लोकांमध्ये द्यूत (जुगार) आहे आणि तेजस्वी लोकांमध्ये मी तेज आहे. मी विजय आहे, मी निश्चय (प्रयत्न) आहे आणि सात्त्विक पुरुषांमध्ये मी सत्त्वगुण आहे.

core_meaning: The All-Pervading Splendor: Krishna is even the 'peak' of negative acts like gambling, but also the essence of success, determination, and physical/moral strength.
use_cases: recognizing that all talent and brilliance comes from a single source
avoiding the trap of gambling by recognizing its overwhelming power
