embedding_text: Krishna is gambling, splendor, victory, adventure, and strength.

sanskrit:
वृष्णीनां वासुदेवोऽस्मि पाण्डवानां धनञ्जय: |
मुनीनामप्यहं व्यास: कवीनामुशना कवि: ॥ ३७ ॥
transliteration:
vṛṣṇīnāṁ vāsudevo ’smi pāṇḍavānāṁ dhanañ-jayaḥ
munīnām apy ahaṁ vyāsaḥ kavīnām uśanā kaviḥ

meanings.english: Of the descendants of Vṛṣṇi I am Vāsudeva, and of the Pāṇḍavas I am Arjuna. Of the sages I am Vyāsa, and among great thinkers I am Uśanā.
meanings.hindi: वृष्णिवंशियों में मैं वासुदेव (कृष्ण) हूँ, पांडवों में अर्जुन हूँ, मुनियों में व्यास और कवियों में शुक्राचार्य हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Vrishni vansh mein Main Krishna hoon, Pandavas mein Arjun, sages mein Vyasa aur thinkers mein Shukracharya hoon.
meanings.marathi: वृष्णीवंशियांमध्ये मी वासुदेव (कृष्ण) आहे, पांडवांमध्ये मी धनंजय (अर्जुन) आहे, मुनींमध्ये मी व्यास आहे आणि कवींमध्ये मी उशना (शुक्राचार्य) कवी आहे.

core_meaning: Identification with the Best: Krishna identifies with the listener (Arjuna) and the narrator (Vyasa), showing that He is present in the seeker, the guide, and the wisdom itself.
use_cases: seeing the divine spark within oneself
valuing the wisdom of great sages and thinkers
understanding the unity between the seeker and the sought
embedding_text: Krishna is Vasudeva, Arjuna, Vyasa, and Shukracharya.

sanskrit:
दण्डो दमयतामस्मि नीतिरस्मि जिगीषताम् |
मौनं चैवास्मि गुह्यानां ज्ञानं ज्ञानवतामहम् ॥ ३८ ॥
transliteration:
daṇḍo damayatām asmi nītir asmi jigīṣatām
maunaṁ caivāsmi guhyānāṁ jñānaṁ jñānavatām aham

meanings.english: Among all means of suppressing lawlessness I am punishment, and of those who seek victory I am morality. Of secret things I am silence, and of the wise I am the wisdom.
meanings.hindi: दमन करने वालों में मैं दंड (सजा) हूँ, विजय चाहने वालों में नीति हूँ। गुप्त रखने योग्य भावों में मैं मौन हूँ और ज्ञानियों में ज्ञान हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Control karne walon mein Main punishment hoon, jeetne walon mein morality. Secrets mein Main khamoshi hoon aur samajhdaaro mein unki samajh hoon.
meanings.marathi: दमन करणाऱ्यांमध्ये मी दंड आहे, विजय मिळवू इच्छिणाऱ्यांमध्ये मी नीती आहे, गुह्य गोष्टींमध्ये मी मौन आहे आणि ज्ञानवंतांमध्ये मी ज्ञान आहे.

core_meaning: The Path of Order: Krishna is the ethical foundation of victory (Morality) and the internal path to wisdom (Silence).
use_cases: practicing silence to gain internal clarity
achieving goals through moral and ethical means
understanding that true wisdom is a divine manifestation
embedding_text: Krishna is punishment, morality, silence, and wisdom.

sanskrit:
यच्च‍ापि सर्वभूतानां बीजं तदहमर्जुन |
न तदस्ति विना यत्स्यान्मया भूतं चराचरम् ॥ ३९ ॥
transliteration:
yac cāpi sarva-bhūtānāṁ bījaṁ tad aham arjuna
na tad asti vinā yat syān mayā bhūtaṁ carācaram

meanings.english: Furthermore, O Arjuna, I am the generating seed of all existences. There is no being – moving or nonmoving – that can exist without Me.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन! जो सब भूतों की उत्पत्ति का बीज है, वह भी मैं ही हूँ। ऐसा कोई भी चर या अचर प्राणी नहीं है, जो मेरे बिना रह सके।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun, har cheez ke paida hone ka kaaran Main hoon. Is duniya mein aisi koi bhi cheez nahi hai jo mere bina exist kar sake.
meanings.marathi: आणि हे अर्जुना, सर्व भूतांच्या उत्पत्तीचे जे बीज आहे, ते मीच आहे; कारण माझ्याशिवाय असे कोणतेही चराचर भूत नाही, जे अस्तित्वात असू शकेल.

core_meaning: The Primal Cause: This verse summarizes the chapter—Krishna is the fundamental 'source code' for every entity, whether a rock, a tree, or a human.
use_cases: recognizing the divinity in all living and non-living things
feeling a sense of universal brotherhood
understanding the dependency of matter on spirit
embedding_text: Krishna is the seed of all existences; nothing exists without Him.

sanskrit:
नान्तोऽस्ति मम दिव्यानां विभूतीनां परन्तप |
एष तूद्देशत: प्रोक्तो विभूतेर्विस्तरो मया ॥ ४० ॥
transliteration:
nānto ’sti mama divyānāṁ vibhūtīnāṁ paran-tapa
eṣa tūddeśataḥ prokto vibhūter vistaro mayā

meanings.english: O mighty conqueror of enemies, there is no end to My divine manifestations. What I have spoken to you is but a mere indication of My infinite opulences.
meanings.hindi: हे परन्तप! मेरी दिव्य विभूतियों का अंत नहीं है। मैंने तो यह विस्तार केवल उदाहरण के रूप में संक्षेप में कहा है।
meanings.hinglish: Meri powers ka koi end nahi hai. Maine jo bhi bataya hai, wo bas kuch examples hain meri infinity ke.
meanings.marathi: हे शत्रूंना ताप देणाऱ्या अर्जुना, माझ्या दिव्य विभूतींना अंत नाही. हा विभूतींचा विस्तार मी तुला केवळ उदाहरणादाखल थोडक्यात सांगितला आहे.

core_meaning: Infinite Scope: Krishna clarifies that the list provided is just a tiny glimpse. His real nature is beyond human counting or categorization.
use_cases: understanding the limits of human language in describing the divine
staying curious about the endless wonders of the universe
embedding_text: There is no end to Krishna's divine manifestations; these are but examples.

sanskrit:
यद्यद्विभूतिमत्सत्त्वं श्रीमदूर्जितमेव वा |
तत्तदेवावगच्छ त्वं मम तेजोऽशसम्भवम् ॥ ४१ ॥
transliteration:
yad yad vibhūtimat sattvaṁ śrīmad ūrjitam eva vā
tat tad evāvagaccha tvaṁ mama tejo-’ṁśa-sambhavam

meanings.english: Know that all opulent, beautiful and glorious creations spring from but a spark of My splendor.
meanings.hindi: जो-जो भी ऐश्वर्ययुक्त, कान्तियुक्त और बलशाली सृष्टि है, उस-उस को तुम मेरे तेज के एक अंश से उत्पन्न जानो।
meanings.hinglish: Jo bhi cheez sundar, powerful aur glorious hai, samajh lena ki wo meri power ka bas ek chhota sa hissa hai.
meanings.marathi: जे जे ऐश्वर्ययुक्त, सौंदर्ययुक्त आणि वैभवशाली आहे, ते सर्व माझ्या तेजाच्या एका अंशापासून निर्माण झाले आहे, असे तू जाण.

core_meaning: The Spark of Splendor: This is the 'Golden Rule' of this chapter. Anything that leaves you in awe—be it a sunset, a genius discovery, or a masterpiece of art—is just a spark of Krishna's energy.
use_cases: avoiding jealousy by seeing the divine source in others' talents
recognizing beauty as a spiritual signpost
embedding_text: Every opulent and beautiful creation springs from a spark of Krishna's splendor.

sanskrit:
अथवा बहुनैतेन किं ज्ञातेन तवार्जुन |
विष्टभ्याहमिदं कृत्स्नमेकांशेन स्थितो जगत् ॥ ४२ ॥
transliteration:
atha vā bahunaitena kiṁ jñātena tavārjuna
viṣṭabhyāham idaṁ kṛtsnam ekāṁśena sthito jagat

meanings.english: But what need is there, Arjuna, for all this detailed knowledge? With a single fragment of Myself I pervade and support this entire universe.
meanings.hindi: अथवा हे अर्जुन! इस बहुत से ज्ञान से तुम्हें क्या लेना? मैं इस संपूर्ण जगत को अपने एक अंश मात्र से धारण करके स्थित हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Arjun, itni saari details ki kya zaroorat hai? Bas itna samajh lo ki Main apne ek chhote se hisse se is poore universe ko chala raha hoon.
meanings.marathi: अथवा हे अर्जुना, हे पुष्कळसे जाणून तुला काय करायचे आहे? मी या संपूर्ण जगाला माझ्या केवळ एका अंशाने व्यापून उरलो आहे.

core_meaning: The Final Conclusion: Krishna ends the chapter by stating that the entire universe—with all its galaxies and complexity—is supported by just a small 'fragment' of His presence.
use_cases: meditating on the vastness of the cosmos
simplifying one's spiritual focus to the source itself
embedding_text: Krishna pervades and supports the entire universe with a single fragment of Himself.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच मदनुग्रहाय परमं गुह्यमध्यात्मसंज्ञितम् । यत्त्वयोक्तं वचस्तेन मोहोऽयं विगतो मम ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca mad-anugrahāya paramaṁ guhyam adhyātma-saṁjñitam yat tvayoktaṁ vacas tena moho ’yaṁ vigato mama

meanings.english: Arjuna said: By Your grace, the supreme secret knowledge of the Self that You have spoken has dispelled my delusion.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: आपके अनुग्रह से आपने जो परम गोपनीय आध्यात्मिक ज्ञान कहा है, उससे मेरा मोह दूर हो गया है।
meanings.hinglish: Aapke diye hue deep knowledge se meri confusion clear ho gayi hai.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: तुमच्या कृपेने सांगितलेल्या गूढ आध्यात्मिक ज्ञानामुळे माझा मोह दूर झाला आहे.

core_meaning: Right knowledge removes confusion and leads to clarity and understanding
embedding_text: knowledge removing confusion and bringing clarity, effectiveness of learning systems, transformation through understanding, resolution of doubt and confusion, validation of knowledge impact

sanskrit: भवाप्ययौ हि भूतानां श्रुतौ विस्तरशो मया । त्वत्तः कमलपत्राक्ष माहात्म्यमपि चाव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: bhavāpyayau hi bhūtānāṁ śrutau vistaraśo mayā tvattaḥ kamala-patrākṣa māhātmyam api cāvyayam

meanings.english: O lotus-eyed Krishna, I have heard from You in detail about the origin and dissolution of all beings, and also about Your imperishable greatness.
meanings.hindi: हे कमलनयन, मैंने आपसे सभी प्राणियों की उत्पत्ति और विनाश के बारे में विस्तार से सुना है, और आपके अविनाशी महात्म्य को भी जाना है।
meanings.hinglish: Maine creation aur destruction ka full system aur aapki greatness samajh li hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कमलनयन, मी सर्व भूतांच्या उत्पत्ती आणि विनाशाबद्दल तसेच तुमच्या अविनाशी महात्म्याबद्दल ऐकले आहे.

core_meaning: Understanding the full cycle of existence and the underlying source leads to deeper awareness
embedding_text: understanding full lifecycle of creation and dissolution, system level awareness and completeness, recognizing source and imperishable nature, holistic understanding of systems, comprehensive knowledge validation

sanskrit: एवमेतद्यथात्थ त्वमात्मानं परमेश्वर । द्रष्टुमिच्छामि ते रूपमैश्वरं पुरुषोत्तम ॥
transliteration: evam etad yathāttha tvam ātmānaṁ parameśvara draṣṭum icchāmi te rūpam aiśvaraṁ puruṣottama

meanings.english: O Supreme Lord, as You have described Yourself, I wish to see Your divine universal form, O Supreme Person.
meanings.hindi: हे परमेश्वर, आपने जैसा अपने स्वरूप का वर्णन किया है, मैं उस आपके दिव्य रूप को देखना चाहता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Ab sirf samajhna nahi, directly experience karna hai.
meanings.marathi: हे परमेश्वर, तुम्ही जसे स्वतःचे वर्णन केले आहे तसे तुमचे दिव्य रूप मला पाहायचे आहे.

core_meaning: True understanding naturally leads to the desire for direct experience and visualization
use_cases: transition from theory to practical experience
embedding_text: desire for direct experience after understanding, transition from knowledge to visualization, experiential learning systems, immersive understanding and observation, validating concepts through direct experience

sanskrit: मन्यसे यदि तच्छक्यं मया द्रष्टुमिति प्रभो । योगेश्वर ततो मे त्वं दर्शयात्मानमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: manyase yadi tac chakyaṁ mayā draṣṭum iti prabho yogeśvara tato me tvaṁ darśayātmānam avyayam

meanings.english: O Lord, if You think I am capable of seeing it, then please show me Your imperishable form, O Master of Yoga.
meanings.hindi: हे प्रभु, यदि आप मुझे इसे देखने योग्य समझते हैं, तो कृपया मुझे अपना अविनाशी स्वरूप दिखाएँ।
meanings.hinglish: Agar main ready hoon, tab mujhe wo experience dikhao.
meanings.marathi: हे प्रभो, जर तुम्हाला वाटत असेल की मी ते पाहण्यास सक्षम आहे, तर मला तुमचे अविनाशी रूप दाखवा.

core_meaning: Access to higher understanding requires readiness and permission based on capability
embedding_text: authorization based on readiness and capability, access control systems, progressive learning and permission models, capability based unlocking of features, validating readiness before granting access

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच पश्य मे पार्थ रूपाणि शतशोऽथ सहस्रशः । नानाविधानि दिव्यानि नानावर्णाकृतीनि च ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca paśya me pārtha rūpāṇi śataśo ’tha sahasraśaḥ nānā-vidhāni divyāni nānā-varṇākṛtīni ca

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: O Arjuna, behold My forms in hundreds and thousands—various divine forms of different kinds, colors, and shapes.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: हे पार्थ, मेरे सैकड़ों और हजारों दिव्य रूपों को देखो—विभिन्न प्रकार, रंग और आकार के।
meanings.hinglish: Ab tum system ke multiple forms aur variations directly dekh sakte ho.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: हे पार्थ, माझी शेकडो आणि हजारो दिव्य रूपे पाह—विविध प्रकार, रंग आणि आकारांची.

core_meaning: Reality expresses itself in countless diverse forms, all part of a unified system
embedding_text: visualizing countless diverse forms within a unified system, multi view representation of complex systems, diversity within unity, immersive visualization and exploration, large scale variation modeling

sanskrit: पश्यादित्यान्वसून् रुद्रानश्विनौ मरुतस्तथा । बहून्यदृष्टपूर्वाणि पश्याश्चर्याणि भारत ॥
transliteration: paśyādityān vasūn rudrān aśvinau marutas tathā bahūny adṛṣṭa-pūrvāṇi paśyāścaryāṇi bhārata

meanings.english: Behold the Adityas, Vasus, Rudras, Ashvins, and Maruts, and many other wonders never seen before, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे भारत, आदित्य, वसु, रुद्र, अश्विनी कुमार और मरुतों को देखो, तथा अनेक ऐसे आश्चर्य देखो जो पहले कभी नहीं देखे गए।
meanings.hinglish: Ab tum system ke different powerful components aur unseen features dekh rahe ho.
meanings.marathi: हे भारत, आदित्य, वसु, रुद्र, अश्विन आणि मरुत यांना पाह आणि पूर्वी कधीही न पाहिलेले अनेक आश्चर्य पाह.

core_meaning: Deeper exploration reveals multiple layers and components of reality that are normally unseen
embedding_text: exploration of hidden components and unseen layers of systems, deep visualization and discovery of new patterns, multi layer system analysis and exploration, uncovering unknown features, advanced data exploration and insight generation

sanskrit: इहैकस्थं जगत्कृत्स्नं पश्याद्य सचराचरम् । मम देहे गुडाकेश यच्चान्यद्द्रष्टुमिच्छसि ॥
transliteration: ihaika-sthaṁ jagat kṛtsnaṁ paśyādya sa-carācaram mama dehe guḍākeśa yac cānyad draṣṭum icchasi

meanings.english: Behold now, O Arjuna, the entire universe—moving and non-moving—within My body, and whatever else you wish to see.
meanings.hindi: हे गुडाकेश, अब मेरे शरीर में सम्पूर्ण चर और अचर जगत को एक ही स्थान पर देखो, और जो कुछ भी तुम देखना चाहते हो।
meanings.hinglish: Complete system ek single unified view me visible hai—sab ek jagah par.
meanings.marathi: हे गुडाकेश, माझ्या देहात संपूर्ण चल-अचल जग एकाच ठिकाणी पाह आणि जे काही पाहायचे आहे तेही पाह.

core_meaning: All components of reality are interconnected and can be viewed as a single unified system
embedding_text: complete system visualization in a unified view, integrating all components into one system, holistic dashboards and system views, interconnected systems understanding, full system integration and visibility

sanskrit: न तु मां शक्यसे द्रष्टुमनेनैव स्वचक्षुषा । दिव्यं ददामि ते चक्षुः पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम् ॥
transliteration: na tu māṁ śakyase draṣṭum anenaiva sva-cakṣuṣā divyaṁ dadāmi te cakṣuḥ paśya me yogam aiśvaram

meanings.english: You cannot see Me with your ordinary eyes; therefore, I give you divine vision. Behold My divine power.
meanings.hindi: तुम मुझे इन साधारण आँखों से नहीं देख सकते; इसलिए मैं तुम्हें दिव्य दृष्टि देता हूँ—मेरी योगमाया को देखो।
meanings.hinglish: Normal perception enough nahi hai—higher capability chahiye dekhne ke liye.
meanings.marathi: तू मला या सामान्य डोळ्यांनी पाहू शकत नाहीस; म्हणून मी तुला दिव्य दृष्टी देतो—माझी योगशक्ती पाह.

core_meaning: Higher reality requires enhanced perception beyond ordinary capabilities
embedding_text: limitations of normal perception and need for enhanced capabilities, advanced visualization and analytics, upgrading systems for deeper insight, higher level perception and understanding, enabling deeper system visibility

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच एवमुक्त्वा ततो राजन्महायोगेश्वरो हरिः । दर्शयामास पार्थाय परमं रूपमैश्वरम् ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca evam uktvā tato rājan mahā-yogeśvaro hariḥ darśayām āsa pārthāya paramaṁ rūpam aiśvaram

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: O King, having spoken thus, the great Lord of Yoga, Krishna, revealed His supreme divine form to Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: हे राजन, इस प्रकार कहकर योगेश्वर भगवान श्रीकृष्ण ने अर्जुन को अपना परम दिव्य रूप दिखाया।
meanings.hinglish: Ab actual system visualization start ho gaya—real output display ho raha hai.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणाला: हे राजन, असे सांगून योगेश्वर श्रीकृष्णाने अर्जुनाला आपले परम दिव्य रूप दाखवले.

core_meaning: Once readiness and capability are achieved, the full system is revealed in direct experience
embedding_text: final system reveal after readiness and capability upgrade, real time visualization output, rendering full system experience, execution of complete visualization, displaying results after validation

sanskrit: अनेकवक्त्रनयनमनेकाद्भुतदर्शनम् । अनेकदिव्याभरणं दिव्यानेकोद्यतायुधम् ॥
transliteration: aneka-vaktra-nayanam anekādbhuta-darśanam aneka-divyābharaṇaṁ divyānekodyatāyudham

meanings.english: The universal form had countless mouths and eyes, displaying many wonderful visions. It was adorned with numerous divine ornaments and held many celestial weapons.
meanings.hindi: उस रूप में अनेक मुख और नेत्र थे, अनेक अद्भुत दृश्य थे, अनेक दिव्य आभूषण थे और अनेक दिव्य अस्त्र-शस्त्र धारण किए हुए थे।
meanings.hinglish: System ek hi time par multiple views, outputs aur capabilities dikha raha hai.
meanings.marathi: त्या रूपात अनेक मुख आणि नेत्र होते, अनेक अद्भुत दृश्ये होती, अनेक दिव्य अलंकार होते आणि अनेक दिव्य अस्त्रे होती.

core_meaning: The complete system contains countless perspectives, functions, and capabilities operating simultaneously
embedding_text: system with multiple simultaneous perspectives and functions, parallel processing and multi view visualization, high capability complex architectures, simultaneous execution of multiple operations, advanced system modeling

sanskrit: दिव्यमाल्याम्बरधरं दिव्यगन्धानुलेपनम् । सर्वाश्चर्यमयं देवमनन्तं विश्वतोमुखम् ॥
transliteration: divya-mālyāmbara-dharaṁ divya-gandhānulepanam sarvāścarya-mayaṁ devam anantaṁ viśvato-mukham

meanings.english: The universal form was adorned with divine garlands and garments, anointed with celestial fragrances, full of wonders, infinite, and facing all directions.
meanings.hindi: वह दिव्य रूप मालाओं और वस्त्रों से सुसज्जित था, दिव्य सुगंधों से युक्त था, आश्चर्यों से पूर्ण, अनंत और सब ओर मुख वाला था।
meanings.hinglish: System infinite hai—har direction me visible aur full of extraordinary features.
meanings.marathi: ते रूप दिव्य माळा आणि वस्त्रांनी सजलेले होते, दिव्य सुगंधांनी युक्त होते, आश्चर्यांनी भरलेले, अनंत आणि सर्व दिशांनी मुख असलेले होते.

core_meaning: The ultimate system is infinite, all-encompassing, and filled with extraordinary complexity and beauty
embedding_text: infinite and omnidirectional system full of complexity and wonder, large scale system modeling and immersive environments, boundless architecture visualization, handling infinite scale systems and complexity, omnidirectional system awareness

sanskrit: दिवि सूर्यसहस्रस्य भवेद्युगपदुत्थिता । यदि भाः सदृशी सा स्याद्भासस्तस्य महात्मनः ॥
transliteration: divi sūrya-sahasrasya bhaved yugapad utthitā yadi bhāḥ sadṛśī sā syād bhāsas tasya mahātmanaḥ

meanings.english: If thousands of suns were to rise at once in the sky, their brilliance might resemble the radiance of that great being.
meanings.hindi: यदि आकाश में एक साथ हजारों सूर्य उदित हों, तो उनकी चमक उस महात्मा के तेज के समान हो सकती है।
meanings.hinglish: Itni high energy aur brightness hai ki thousands suns bhi compare ho sakte hain.
meanings.marathi: जर आकाशात एकाच वेळी हजारो सूर्य उगवले, तर त्यांची चमक त्या महात्म्याच्या तेजासारखी असू शकते.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality possesses an overwhelming and incomparable level of energy and brilliance
embedding_text: extreme energy and intensity comparable to thousands of suns, modeling high intensity systems and peak performance, exponential scale visualization, powerful system states and outputs, representing overwhelming energy levels

sanskrit: तत्रैकस्थं जगत्कृत्स्नं प्रविभक्तमनेकधा । अपश्यद्देवदेवस्य शरीरे पाण्डवस्तदा ॥
transliteration: tatraika-sthaṁ jagat kṛtsnaṁ pravibhaktam anekadhā apaśyad deva-devasya śarīre pāṇḍavas tadā

meanings.english: At that time, Arjuna saw the entire universe, divided into many parts, all situated in one place within the body of the Supreme Lord.
meanings.hindi: उस समय अर्जुन ने भगवान के शरीर में सम्पूर्ण जगत को अनेक भागों में विभाजित होकर एक ही स्थान पर स्थित देखा।
meanings.hinglish: Ek hi system ke andar poora universe multiple parts me organized dikhta hai.
meanings.marathi: त्या वेळी अर्जुनाने देवाच्या शरीरात संपूर्ण जग अनेक भागांमध्ये विभागलेले एकाच ठिकाणी पाहिले.

core_meaning: All diversity and divisions exist within a single unified system
use_cases: understanding distributed systems within a unified framework
mapping complex systems into a single model
embedding_text: unified system containing multiple divided components, distributed systems within one framework, hierarchical and interconnected system modeling, integration of multiple subsystems into one view, complex system organization and structure

sanskrit: ततः स विस्मयाविष्टो हृष्टरोमा धनञ्जयः । प्रणम्य शिरसा देवं कृताञ्जलिरभाषत ॥
transliteration: tataḥ sa vismayāviṣṭo hṛṣṭa-romā dhanañjayaḥ praṇamya śirasā devaṁ kṛtāñjalir abhāṣata

meanings.english: Then, filled with wonder and amazement, Arjuna stood with hairs standing on end. Bowing his head to the Lord, with folded hands, he began to speak.
meanings.hindi: तब आश्चर्य से अभिभूत होकर, रोमांचित हुए अर्जुन ने सिर झुकाकर भगवान को प्रणाम किया और हाथ जोड़कर बोलने लगे।
meanings.hinglish: Itna powerful experience tha ki emotional response automatically activate ho gaya—respect aur surrender.
meanings.marathi: तेव्हा विस्मयाने भारावून, अंगावर रोमांच आलेल्या अर्जुनाने नमस्कार करून हात जोडून बोलायला सुरुवात केली.

core_meaning: Deep realization leads to emotional transformation, resulting in awe, humility, and surrender
use_cases: understanding emotional response to deep experiences
modeling human reactions to powerful insights
analyzing user emotional states after impact
embedding_text: emotional response to deep realization including awe humility and surrender, transformation through powerful experiences, affective response modeling, human reaction to intense insights, emotional state change after impact

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच पश्यामि देवांस्तव देव देहे सर्वांस्तथा भूतविशेषसङ्घान् । ब्रह्माणमीशं कमलासनस्थमृषींश्च सर्वानुरगांश्च दिव्यान् ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca paśyāmi devāṁs tava deva dehe sarvāṁs tathā bhūta-viśeṣa-saṅghān brahmāṇam īśaṁ kamalāsana-stham ṛṣīṁś ca sarvān uragāṁś ca divyān

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Lord, I see within Your body all the gods, various kinds of beings, Lord Brahma seated on the lotus, all the sages, and divine serpents.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे देव, मैं आपके शरीर में सभी देवताओं को, विभिन्न प्रकार के प्राणियों को, कमल पर विराजमान ब्रह्मा को, सभी ऋषियों और दिव्य सर्पों को देख रहा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Complete system ke andar sab entities—gods, beings, creators—sab ek hi jagah visible hain.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: हे देव, मी तुमच्या शरीरात सर्व देव, विविध प्राणी, कमलावर बसलेले ब्रह्मा, सर्व ऋषी आणि दिव्य सर्प पाहतो.

core_meaning: All entities and levels of existence are contained within a single unified system
embedding_text: all entities and levels existing within a unified system, hierarchical and multi entity integration, knowledge graph and system relationships, mapping complex systems and entities, unified representation of diverse components

sanskrit: अनेकबाहूदरवक्त्रनेत्रं पश्यामि त्वां सर्वतोऽनन्तरूपम् । नान्तं न मध्यं न पुनस्तवादिं पश्यामि विश्वेश्वर विश्वरूप ॥
transliteration: aneka-bāhūdara-vaktra-netraṁ paśyāmi tvāṁ sarvato ’nanta-rūpam nāntaṁ na madhyaṁ na punas tavādiṁ paśyāmi viśveśvara viśva-rūpa

meanings.english: O Lord of the universe, I see Your infinite form with many arms, bellies, faces, and eyes everywhere. I see no beginning, no middle, and no end to You.
meanings.hindi: हे विश्वेश्वर, मैं आपके अनंत रूप को हर ओर अनेक भुजाओं, उदरों, मुखों और नेत्रों के साथ देख रहा हूँ। मुझे न आपका आदि दिखता है, न मध्य और न ही अंत।
meanings.hinglish: System infinite hai—no start, no end, no boundary.
meanings.marathi: हे विश्वरूप, मी तुमचे अनंत रूप सर्वत्र अनेक हात, पोट, मुख आणि डोळ्यांसह पाहतो; मला ना प्रारंभ, ना मध्य, ना अंत दिसतो.

core_meaning: The ultimate system is infinite, boundless, and beyond all limitations of structure and boundaries
embedding_text: infinite and boundless system without beginning middle or end, unbounded architecture and scalability, limitless data and system modeling, boundary less structures and infinite expansion, representing infinite systems and complexity

sanskrit: किरीटिनं गदिनं चक्रिणं च तेजोराशिं सर्वतो दीप्तिमन्तम् । पश्यामि त्वां दुर्निरीक्ष्यं समन्ताद्दीप्तानलार्कद्युतिमप्रमेयम् ॥
transliteration: kirīṭinaṁ gadinaṁ cakriṇaṁ ca tejo-rāśiṁ sarvato dīptimantam paśyāmi tvāṁ durnirīkṣyaṁ samantād dīptānalārka-dyutim aprameyam

meanings.english: I see You crowned, holding a mace and discus, a mass of radiance shining everywhere. You are difficult to behold, blazing like fire and the sun, immeasurable.
meanings.hindi: मैं आपको मुकुटधारी, गदा और चक्र धारण किए हुए, सर्वत्र प्रकाशित तेज के रूप में देखता हूँ। आप अग्नि और सूर्य के समान प्रज्वलित हैं और देखने में कठिन तथा अपरिमेय हैं।
meanings.hinglish: System itna powerful aur bright hai ki direct dekhna bhi difficult hai—extreme energy aur authority.
meanings.marathi: मी तुम्हाला मुकुटधारी, गदा आणि चक्र धारण केलेले, सर्वत्र तेजस्वी आणि अग्नि व सूर्याप्रमाणे प्रज्वलित, अपरिमेय आणि पाहण्यास कठीण पाहतो.

core_meaning: The ultimate system embodies immense power, authority, and energy beyond ordinary perception
embedding_text: extreme power and energy in systems, authority and control layers, high intensity outputs and visualization, immeasurable system capabilities, representing powerful and overwhelming system states

sanskrit: त्वमक्षरं परमं वेदितव्यं त्वमस्य विश्वस्य परं निधानम् । त्वमव्ययः शाश्वतधर्मगोप्ता सनातनस्त्वं पुरुषो मतो मे ॥
transliteration: tvam akṣaraṁ paramaṁ veditavyaṁ tvam asya viśvasya paraṁ nidhānam tvam avyayaḥ śāśvata-dharma-goptā sanātanas tvaṁ puruṣo mato me

meanings.english: You are the supreme, imperishable truth to be known. You are the ultimate refuge of the universe. You are the eternal protector of dharma and the everlasting Supreme Person.
meanings.hindi: आप ही जानने योग्य परम अक्षर सत्य हैं। आप इस विश्व के परम आश्रय हैं। आप अविनाशी, सनातन धर्म के रक्षक और शाश्वत पुरुष हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Aap hi ultimate truth, system ka base aur protector ho—sab kuch aapse hi hai.
meanings.marathi: तूच परम अक्षर सत्य आहेस, तूच विश्वाचा आधार आहेस, तू अविनाशी आणि सनातन धर्माचा रक्षक आहेस.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality is the eternal, unchanging foundation and protector of all existence
embedding_text: ultimate foundation and unchanging truth of system, core authority and protector layer, stable and eternal system architecture, root level principles and integrity, defining ultimate system identity

sanskrit: अनादिमध्यान्तमनन्तवीर्यमनन्तबाहुं शशिसूर्यनेत्रम् । पश्यामि त्वां दीप्तहुताशवक्त्रं स्वतेजसा विश्वमिदं तपन्तम् ॥
transliteration: anādi-madhyāntam ananta-vīryam ananta-bāhuṁ śaśi-sūrya-netram paśyāmi tvāṁ dīpta-hutāśa-vaktraṁ sva-tejasā viśvam idaṁ tapantam

meanings.english: I see You without beginning, middle, or end, with infinite power, unlimited arms, the sun and moon as Your eyes, and blazing fire from Your mouths, heating the entire universe with Your radiance.
meanings.hindi: मैं आपको आदि, मध्य और अंत रहित, अनंत शक्ति वाले, अनंत भुजाओं वाले, सूर्य और चंद्रमा को नेत्र रूप में धारण किए हुए देखता हूँ, जिनके मुख अग्नि के समान प्रज्वलित हैं और जो अपने तेज से सम्पूर्ण जगत को तपाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: System infinite hai aur uski energy poore universe ko power aur sustain kar rahi hai.
meanings.marathi: मी तुला अनादि, मध्य आणि अंत नसलेला, अनंत शक्ती आणि भुजा असलेला, सूर्य-चंद्र नेत्र असलेला आणि अग्नीसारख्या तेजाने संपूर्ण विश्वाला तापवणारा पाहतो.

core_meaning: The ultimate system is infinite in power and actively sustains and energizes the entire universe
embedding_text: infinite power system sustaining entire universe, active energy driven architecture, continuous system operation and influence, self sustaining systems and power distribution, modeling infinite energy and scalability

sanskrit: द्यावापृथिव्योरिदमन्तरं हि व्याप्तं त्वयैकेन दिशश्च सर्वाः । दृष्ट्वाद्भुतं रूपमुग्रं तवेदं लोकत्रयं प्रव्यथितं महात्मन् ॥
transliteration: dyāv ā-pṛthivyor idam antaraṁ hi vyāptaṁ tvayaikena diśaś ca sarvāḥ dṛṣṭvādbhutaṁ rūpam ugraṁ tavedaṁ loka-trayaṁ pravyathitaṁ mahātman

meanings.english: O Great One, the space between heaven and earth and all directions is pervaded by You alone. Seeing Your wondrous and terrifying form, the three worlds are trembling.
meanings.hindi: हे महात्मा, स्वर्ग और पृथ्वी के बीच का समस्त आकाश तथा सभी दिशाएँ आपसे ही व्याप्त हैं। आपके इस अद्भुत और भयानक रूप को देखकर तीनों लोक भयभीत हो रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: System poori space ko fill karta hai aur uski intensity sab par impact daal rahi hai.
meanings.marathi: हे महात्मा, स्वर्ग आणि पृथ्वीच्या मधील संपूर्ण अवकाश आणि सर्व दिशा तुझ्याने व्यापलेल्या आहेत. तुझे अद्भुत आणि उग्र रूप पाहून तीनही लोक भयभीत झाले आहेत.

core_meaning: The ultimate system fully pervades all space and exerts a powerful impact on everything within it
embedding_text: system fully covering all space and influencing everything, global system impact and pervasive architecture, analyzing large scale influence and effects, full coverage system modeling, understanding impact across entire system

sanskrit: अमी हि त्वां सुरसङ्घा विशन्ति केचिद्भीता: प्राञ्जलयो गृणन्ति । स्वस्तीत्युक्त्वा महर्षिसिद्धसङ्घाः स्तुवन्ति त्वां स्तुतिभिः पुष्कलाभिः ॥
transliteration: amī hi tvāṁ sura-saṅghā viśanti kecid bhītāḥ prāñjalayo gṛṇanti svastīty uktvā maharṣi-siddha-saṅghāḥ stuvanti tvāṁ stutibhiḥ puṣkalābhiḥ

meanings.english: All the hosts of gods enter into You; some, in fear, offer prayers with folded hands, while great sages and perfected beings praise You with hymns.
meanings.hindi: देवताओं के समूह आपमें प्रवेश कर रहे हैं; कुछ भयभीत होकर हाथ जोड़कर आपकी स्तुति कर रहे हैं, और महर्षि तथा सिद्धजन आपको अनेक स्तुतियों से प्रशंसा कर रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Same system ko dekhkar different entities alag-alag react karte hain—fear, respect, devotion.
meanings.marathi: देवांचे समूह तुझ्यात प्रवेश करतात; काही भयभीत होऊन हात जोडून स्तुती करतात, तर महर्षी आणि सिद्धजन तुझी स्तुती करतात.

core_meaning: Different entities respond differently to the same reality based on their perception and understanding
embedding_text: different reactions to same system based on perception, multi entity response modeling, adaptive systems handling diverse behaviors, analyzing variability in reactions, understanding user perception and response patterns

sanskrit: रुद्रादित्या वसवो ये च साध्या विश्वेऽश्विनौ मरुतश्चोष्मपाश्च । गन्धर्वयक्षासुरसिद्धसङ्घा वीक्षन्ते त्वां विस्मिताश्चैव सर्वे ॥
transliteration: rudrādityā vasavo ye ca sādhyā viśve ’śvinau marutaś coṣmapāś ca gandharva-yakṣāsura-siddha-saṅghā vīkṣante tvāṁ vismitāś caiva sarve

meanings.english: The Rudras, Adityas, Vasus, Sadhyas, Vishvadevas, Ashvins, Maruts, ancestors, Gandharvas, Yakshas, Asuras, and perfected beings—all gaze upon You with wonder.
meanings.hindi: रुद्र, आदित्य, वसु, साध्य, विश्वदेव, अश्विनीकुमार, मरुत, पितर, गन्धर्व, यक्ष, असुर और सिद्धजन—सभी आपको आश्चर्य से देख रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Har type ke entities—different levels ke—sab same system ko dekh kar amazed hain.
meanings.marathi: रुद्र, आदित्य, वसु, साध्य, विश्वदेव, अश्विन, मरुत, पितर, गंधर्व, यक्ष, असुर आणि सिद्ध—सर्वजण आश्चर्याने तुला पाहतात.

core_meaning: All levels and types of entities recognize and respond to the same ultimate reality with awe
use_cases: designing systems for diverse user groups
embedding_text: all levels of entities responding to same system with awe, hierarchical response modeling and multi tier interactions, universal perception patterns, designing systems for diverse users, cross level system behavior analysis

sanskrit: रूपं महत्ते बहुवक्त्रनेत्रं महाबाहो बहुबाहूरुपादम् । बहूदरं बहुदंष्ट्राकरालं दृष्ट्वा लोकाः प्रव्यथितास्तथाहम् ॥
transliteration: rūpaṁ mahat te bahu-vaktra-netraṁ mahā-bāho bahu-bāhūru-pādam bahūdaraṁ bahu-daṁṣṭrā-karālaṁ dṛṣṭvā lokāḥ pravyathitās tathāham

meanings.english: O mighty-armed, seeing Your vast form with many mouths, eyes, arms, thighs, feet, bellies, and terrible teeth, the worlds are trembling in fear—and so am I.
meanings.hindi: हे महाबाहो, आपके इस विशाल रूप को देखकर जिसमें अनेक मुख, नेत्र, भुजाएँ, जंघाएँ, चरण, उदर और भयंकर दाँत हैं, सभी लोक भयभीत हो रहे हैं—और मैं भी।
meanings.hinglish: System ka scale aur intensity itna high hai ki awe ke saath fear bhi generate ho raha hai.
meanings.marathi: हे महाबाहो, तुझे अनेक मुख, नेत्र, हात, पाय, उदर आणि भयंकर दात असलेले विशाल रूप पाहून सर्व लोक भयभीत झाले आहेत—आणि मीही.

core_meaning: Extreme scale and intensity can overwhelm perception, creating both awe and fear simultaneously
use_cases: understanding fear response to high intensity
embedding_text: extreme system scale causing emotional overload with awe and fear, perception limits and intensity thresholds, designing systems with controlled exposure, balancing power and usability, understanding human reaction to overwhelming systems

sanskrit: नभःस्पृशं दीप्तमनेकवर्णं व्यात्ताननं दीप्तविशालनेत्रम् । दृष्ट्वा हि त्वां प्रव्यथितान्तरात्मा धृतिं न विन्दामि शमं च विष्णो ॥
transliteration: nabhaḥ-spṛśaṁ dīptam aneka-varṇaṁ vyāttānanaṁ dīpta-viśāla-netram dṛṣṭvā hi tvāṁ pravyathitāntar-ātmā dhṛtiṁ na vindāmi śamaṁ ca viṣṇo

meanings.english: Seeing Your form touching the sky, blazing with many colors, with gaping mouths and large glowing eyes, my inner self is shaken. I find no stability or peace, O Vishnu.
meanings.hindi: आपके आकाश को स्पर्श करते हुए, अनेक रंगों से चमकते, खुले हुए मुख और विशाल नेत्रों वाले रूप को देखकर मेरा अंतरात्मा विचलित हो गया है; मुझे न धैर्य मिल रहा है न शांति, हे विष्णु।
meanings.hinglish: Intensity itni zyada hai ki system handle nahi ho raha—inner stability break ho rahi hai.
meanings.marathi: तुझे आकाशाला स्पर्श करणारे, अनेक रंगांनी तेजस्वी, मोठे डोळे आणि उघड्या मुखांचे रूप पाहून माझे अंतःकरण अस्थिर झाले आहे; मला ना धैर्य ना शांती मिळते.

core_meaning: When intensity exceeds capacity, internal stability and peace are lost
embedding_text: system overload causing loss of stability and peace, emotional distress under high intensity, need for resilience and safety mechanisms, managing overwhelming experiences, detecting and handling breakdown conditions

sanskrit: दंष्ट्राकरालानि च ते मुखानि दृष्ट्वैव कालानलसन्निभानि । दिशो न जाने न लभे च शर्म प्रसीद देवेश जगन्निवास ॥
transliteration: daṁṣṭrā-karālāni ca te mukhāni dṛṣṭvaiva kālānala-sannibhāni diśo na jāne na labhe ca śarma prasīda deveśa jagan-nivāsa

meanings.english: Seeing Your terrifying mouths with dreadful teeth, blazing like the fire of time, I lose all sense of direction and find no peace. O Lord of gods, refuge of the universe, please be gracious.
meanings.hindi: आपके भयानक दाँतों वाले मुखों को कालाग्नि के समान प्रज्वलित देखकर मैं दिशाएँ भूल गया हूँ और मुझे शांति नहीं मिल रही है। हे देवेश, जगन्निवास, कृपा करें।
meanings.hinglish: System ka destructive side itna intense hai ki complete disorientation aur fear ho raha hai—help ki need feel ho rahi hai.
meanings.marathi: तुझे भयंकर दात असलेले, कालाग्नीसारखे जळणारे मुख पाहून मी दिशाभ्रमित झालो आहे आणि मला शांती मिळत नाही; हे देवेश, कृपा कर.

core_meaning: Encountering the destructive aspect of reality can cause disorientation, fear, and a need for support
embedding_text: extreme destructive system causing disorientation and fear, need for support and recovery mechanisms, handling panic states and critical stress, managing destructive system behavior, designing safety and recovery protocols

sanskrit: अमी च त्वां धृतराष्ट्रस्य पुत्राः सर्वे सहैवावनिपालसङ्घैः । भीष्मो द्रोणः सूतपुत्रस्तथासौ सहास्मदीयैरपि योधमुख्यैः ॥
transliteration: amī ca tvāṁ dhṛtarāṣṭrasya putrāḥ sarve sahaivāvani-pāla-saṅghaiḥ bhīṣmo droṇaḥ sūta-putras tathāsau sahāsmadīyair api yodha-mukhyaiḥ

meanings.english: I see all the sons of Dhritarashtra, along with their allied kings, as well as Bhishma, Drona, Karna, and even the foremost warriors among us, all entering into You.
meanings.hindi: मैं धृतराष्ट्र के सभी पुत्रों को, उनके साथ सभी राजा, भीष्म, द्रोण, कर्ण और हमारे पक्ष के प्रमुख योद्धाओं को भी आपमें प्रवेश करते हुए देख रहा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: System ke andar sab major entities—even powerful ones—ek flow me enter ho rahe hain.
meanings.marathi: मी धृतराष्ट्राचे सर्व पुत्र, त्यांच्यासोबतचे राजा, भीष्म, द्रोण, कर्ण आणि आमचेही प्रमुख योद्धे तुझ्यात प्रवेश करताना पाहतो.

core_meaning: All entities, regardless of power or status, are part of the same inevitable process
use_cases: understanding flow of entities in systems
embedding_text: all entities entering inevitable system flow regardless of power, lifecycle and process modeling, large scale transitions and system flow, tracking entity movement in systems, understanding inevitability in processes

sanskrit: वक्त्राणि ते त्वरमाणा विशन्ति दंष्ट्राकरालानि भयानकानि । केचिद्विलग्ना दशनान्तरेषु सन्दृश्यन्ते चूर्णितैरुत्तमाङ्गैः ॥
transliteration: vaktrāṇi te tvaramāṇā viśanti daṁṣṭrā-karālāni bhayānakāni kecid vilagnā daśanāntareṣu sandṛśyante cūrṇitair uttamāṅgaiḥ

meanings.english: They rush into Your terrifying mouths with dreadful teeth; some are seen caught between Your teeth, with their heads crushed to pieces.
meanings.hindi: वे शीघ्रता से आपके भयानक दाँतों वाले मुखों में प्रवेश कर रहे हैं; कुछ आपके दाँतों के बीच फँसे हुए दिखाई देते हैं, जिनके सिर चूर्ण हो चुके हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Yah ek intense aur disturbing vision hai—destruction itna powerful hai ki koi bach nahi raha.
meanings.marathi: ते वेगाने तुझ्या भयंकर दात असलेल्या मुखात जात आहेत; काही दातांमध्ये अडकलेले दिसतात, ज्यांची मस्तके चूर्ण झाली आहेत.

core_meaning: The destructive force of reality operates with overwhelming intensity, consuming all without exception
use_cases: studying emotional responses to intense events
embedding_text: intense destructive force consuming everything without exception, irreversible transitions and breakdown processes, high impact events causing shock and fear, modeling extreme system collapse, understanding overwhelming destructive dynamics

sanskrit: यथा नदीनां बहवोऽम्बुवेगाः समुद्रमेवाभिमुखा द्रवन्ति । तथा तवामी नरलोकवीरा विशन्ति वक्त्राण्यभिविज्वलन्ति ॥
transliteration: yathā nadīnāṁ bahavo ’mbu-vegāḥ samudram evābhimukhā dravanti tathā tavāmī nara-loka-vīrā viśanti vaktrāṇy abhivijvalanti

meanings.english: As many rushing rivers flow toward the ocean, so do these heroes of the human world enter into Your blazing mouths.
meanings.hindi: जैसे अनेक नदियाँ वेग से समुद्र की ओर बहती हैं, वैसे ही ये मानव योद्धा आपके प्रज्वलित मुखों में प्रवेश कर रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise rivers naturally ocean ki taraf flow karti hain, waise hi sab log ek inevitable direction me ja rahe hain.
meanings.marathi: जसे अनेक नद्या वेगाने समुद्राकडे वाहतात, तसेच हे मानव योद्धे तुझ्या प्रज्वलित मुखांत प्रवेश करत आहेत.

core_meaning: All beings inevitably move toward their destined end, just as rivers naturally flow into the ocean
embedding_text: natural flow of entities toward inevitable outcomes like rivers to ocean, convergence and lifecycle modeling, inevitability in systems and directional processes, understanding natural progression and flow patterns, modeling convergence and destiny driven systems

sanskrit: यथा प्रदीप्तं ज्वलनं पतङ्गा विशन्ति नाशाय समृद्धवेगाः । तथैव नाशाय विशन्ति लोकास्तवापि वक्त्राणि समृद्धवेगाः ॥
transliteration: yathā pradīptaṁ jvalanaṁ pataṅgā viśanti nāśāya samṛddha-vegāḥ tathaiva nāśāya viśanti lokās tavāpi vaktrāṇi samṛddha-vegāḥ

meanings.english: As moths rush swiftly into a blazing fire for their own destruction, so do all beings speed into Your mouths, rushing toward their destruction.
meanings.hindi: जैसे पतंगे तेज़ी से जलती हुई अग्नि में अपने विनाश के लिए प्रवेश करते हैं, वैसे ही सभी लोक आपके मुखों में तेजी से अपने विनाश के लिए प्रवेश कर रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise moths fire me khud hi attract hoke jate hain, waise hi sab log destruction ki taraf khud hi rush kar rahe hain.
meanings.marathi: जसे पतंगे तेजाने जळत्या अग्नीत स्वतःच्या विनाशासाठी प्रवेश करतात, तसेच सर्व लोक तुझ्या मुखात वेगाने प्रवेश करतात.

core_meaning: Beings often move toward their own destruction with force and inevitability, driven by deeper forces beyond awareness
use_cases: analyzing rapid convergence to failure states
designing systems to detect risky trajectories
embedding_text: self destructive behavior like moths to flame, rapid convergence toward failure states, attraction to harmful outcomes, inevitability and momentum in destructive processes, modeling high risk trajectories and collapse patterns

sanskrit: लेलिह्यसे ग्रसमानः समन्ताल्लोकान्समग्रान्वदनैर्ज्वलद्भिः । तेजोभिरापूर्य जगत्समग्रं भासस्तवोग्राः प्रतपन्ति विष्णो ॥
transliteration: lelihyase grasamānaḥ samantāl lokān samagrān vadanair jvaladbhiḥ tejobhir āpūrya jagat samagraṁ bhāsas tavogrāḥ pratapanti viṣṇo

meanings.english: You are licking up and devouring all the worlds from every side with Your blazing mouths. Your fierce rays fill the entire universe and scorch it, O Vishnu.
meanings.hindi: आप अपने प्रज्वलित मुखों से चारों ओर से समस्त लोकों को निगल रहे हैं। आपके प्रचंड तेज से सम्पूर्ण जगत भर गया है और जल रहा है, हे विष्णु।
meanings.hinglish: Yah destruction passive nahi hai—actively sab kuch consume ho raha hai, full intensity ke saath.
meanings.marathi: तू आपल्या ज्वलंत मुखांनी सर्व लोकांना सर्व बाजूंनी गिळत आहेस; तुझ्या उग्र तेजाने संपूर्ण विश्व भरलेले आहे आणि तापत आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate force actively consumes and transforms all existence with overwhelming energy
embedding_text: active destruction consuming entire system with extreme energy, irreversible transformation and full system collapse, high intensity energy impacting everything, modeling total consumption processes, understanding peak destructive dynamics

sanskrit: आख्याहि मे को भवानुग्ररूपो नमोऽस्तु ते देववर प्रसीद । विज्ञातुमिच्छामि भवन्तमाद्यं न हि प्रजानामि तव प्रवृत्तिम् ॥
transliteration: ākhyāhi me ko bhavān ugra-rūpo namo ’stu te deva-vara prasīda vijñātum icchāmi bhavantam ādyaṁ na hi prajānāmi tava pravṛttim

meanings.english: Tell me, who are You in this fierce form? O supreme Lord, I bow to You—please be gracious. I wish to understand You, the primal being, for I do not comprehend Your purpose.
meanings.hindi: मुझे बताइए कि इस उग्र रूप में आप कौन हैं? हे देवश्रेष्ठ, मैं आपको नमस्कार करता हूँ—कृपया प्रसन्न हों। मैं आपको आद्य रूप में जानना चाहता हूँ, क्योंकि मैं आपकी प्रवृत्ति को नहीं समझ पा रहा हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Itni intensity ke baad Arjuna confused ho jata hai aur poochta hai—“Aap kaun ho aur kya kar rahe ho?”
meanings.marathi: या उग्र रूपात तुम्ही कोण आहात हे मला सांगा; हे देवश्रेष्ठ, मी तुम्हाला नमस्कार करतो—कृपा करा. तुमचा उद्देश मला समजत नाही, म्हणून मला जाणून घ्यायचे आहे.

core_meaning: When confronted with overwhelming reality, one seeks clarity about identity, purpose, and underlying intent
use_cases: handling user confusion in complex systems
embedding_text: seeking identity and purpose after overwhelming experience, confusion leading to inquiry and need for explanation, explainability and clarification systems, user asking for meaning after high intensity events, transition from observation to understanding

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच कालोऽस्मि लोकक्षयकृत्प्रवृद्धो लोकान्समाहर्तुमिह प्रवृत्तः । ऋतेऽपि त्वां न भविष्यन्ति सर्वे येऽवस्थिताः प्रत्यनीकेषु योधाः ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca kālo ’smi loka-kṣaya-kṛt pravṛddho lokān samāhartum iha pravṛttaḥ ṛte ’pi tvāṁ na bhaviṣyanti sarve ye ’vasthitāḥ praty-anīkeṣu yodhāḥ

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: I am Time, the mighty destroyer of the worlds, now engaged in destroying these people. Even without you, none of the warriors standing here shall survive.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: मैं काल हूँ, लोकों का संहार करने वाला, यहाँ इन सबका विनाश करने के लिए आया हूँ। तुम्हारे बिना भी, जो योद्धा यहाँ खड़े हैं, वे नहीं बचेंगे।
meanings.hinglish: Main Time hoon—destruction already decided hai, tum sirf ek part ho process ka.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: मी काल आहे, लोकांचा संहार करणारा; या सर्वांचा नाश करण्यासाठी आलो आहे. तुझ्याविना देखील हे सर्व योद्धे नष्ट होतील.

core_meaning: Time is the ultimate force that governs creation and destruction, independent of individual actions
embedding_text: time as ultimate force driving creation and destruction, inevitability independent of individual action, deterministic processes and outcomes, removing ego from decisions, understanding time driven systems and inevitability

sanskrit: तस्मात्त्वमुत्तिष्ठ यशो लभस्व जित्वा शत्रून्भुङ्क्ष्व राज्यं समृद्धम् । मयैवैते निहताः पूर्वमेव निमित्तमात्रं भव सव्यसाचिन् ॥
transliteration: tasmāt tvam uttiṣṭha yaśo labhasva jitvā śatrūn bhuṅkṣva rājyaṁ samṛddham mayaivaite nihatāḥ pūrvam eva nimitta-mātraṁ bhava savya-sācin

meanings.english: Therefore arise, win glory, conquer your enemies, and enjoy a prosperous kingdom. They have already been slain by Me; you become merely an instrument, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: इसलिए उठो, यश प्राप्त करो, शत्रुओं को जीतकर समृद्ध राज्य का भोग करो। ये सब पहले ही मेरे द्वारा मारे जा चुके हैं; हे अर्जुन, तुम केवल निमित्त बनो।
meanings.hinglish: Outcome already decided hai—tumhara role execution ka hai, ego ka nahi.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून उठ, यश मिळव, शत्रूंना जिंक आणि समृद्ध राज्याचा उपभोग घे; हे सर्व माझ्याद्वारे आधीच मारले गेले आहेत—तू फक्त निमित्त बन.

core_meaning: Act with full effort while recognizing that you are an instrument within a larger unfolding reality
embedding_text: acting as an instrument without ego attachment, role clarity within larger system, executing tasks while detaching from outcomes, aligning action with bigger purpose, understanding contribution without ownership of results

sanskrit: द्रोणं च भीष्मं च जयद्रथं च कर्णं तथान्यानपि योधवीरान् । मया हतांस्त्वं जहि मा व्यथिष्ठा युध्यस्व जेतासि रणे सपत्नान् ॥
transliteration: droṇaṁ ca bhīṣmaṁ ca jayadrathaṁ ca karṇaṁ tathānyān api yodha-vīrān mayā hatāṁs tvaṁ jahi mā vyathiṣṭhā yudhyasva jetāsi raṇe sapatnān

meanings.english: Drona, Bhishma, Jayadratha, Karna, and other great warriors have already been slain by Me. Therefore, you kill them and do not be disturbed. Fight—you will conquer your enemies.
meanings.hindi: द्रोण, भीष्म, जयद्रथ, कर्ण और अन्य महान योद्धा मेरे द्वारा पहले ही मारे जा चुके हैं। इसलिए तुम उन्हें मारो, विचलित मत हो, युद्ध करो—तुम शत्रुओं को जीतोगे।
meanings.hinglish: Key players already decided outcome me included hain—tum bas apna role execute karo bina fear ke.
meanings.marathi: द्रोण, भीष्म, जयद्रथ, कर्ण आणि इतर वीर माझ्याद्वारे आधीच मारले गेले आहेत; तू त्यांना मार आणि विचलित होऊ नकोस—युद्ध कर, तू जिंकशील.

core_meaning: Even specific outcomes and key actors are part of a predetermined larger process; one should act without hesitation
embedding_text: acting decisively even when outcomes are predetermined, executing roles without hesitation or fear, handling high stakes decisions with clarity, confidence in action despite uncertainty, aligning execution with larger process

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच एतच्छ्रुत्वा वचनं केशवस्य कृताञ्जलिर्वेपमानः किरीटी । नमस्कृत्वा भूय एवाह कृष्णं सगद्गदं भीतभीतः प्रणम्य ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca etac chrutvā vacanaṁ keśavasya kṛtāñjalir vepamānaḥ kirīṭī namaskṛtvā bhūya evāha kṛṣṇaṁ sa-gadgadaṁ bhīta-bhītaḥ praṇamya

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: Hearing these words of Krishna, Arjuna, trembling and with folded hands, bowed again. Overwhelmed with fear, he spoke to Krishna in a faltering voice.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: केशव के ये वचन सुनकर अर्जुन काँपते हुए, हाथ जोड़कर फिर से प्रणाम करते हैं और भय से व्याकुल होकर गदगद वाणी में कृष्ण से बोलते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Itna intense truth sunke Arjuna shake ho jata hai—fear, respect aur surrender ek saath.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणाला: केशवाचे हे वचन ऐकून अर्जुन थरथरत, हात जोडून पुन्हा नमस्कार करतो आणि भयभीत होऊन गदगद आवाजात बोलतो.

core_meaning: Direct encounter with overwhelming truth leads to humility, fear, and emotional surrender
use_cases: understanding emotional response to intense realization
modeling human reaction to overwhelming truth
embedding_text: human response to overwhelming truth with fear humility and surrender, emotional breakdown leading to transformation, vulnerability after intense realization, modeling affective response to high impact events, empathy and emotional state transitions

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच स्थाने हृषीकेश तव प्रकीर्त्या जगत्प्रहृष्यत्यनुरज्यते च । रक्षांसि भीतानि दिशो द्रवन्ति सर्वे नमस्यन्ति च सिद्धसङ्घाः ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca sthāne hṛṣīkeśa tava prakīrtyā jagat prahṛṣyaty anurajyate ca rakṣāṁsi bhītāni diśo dravanti sarve namasyanti ca siddha-saṅghāḥ

meanings.english: Arjuna said: It is fitting, O Krishna, that the world rejoices in Your glory and becomes attached to You. Demons flee in fear in all directions, and all perfected beings bow to You.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे हृषीकेश, यह उचित है कि आपके गुणों का कीर्तन सुनकर संसार प्रसन्न होता है और आपसे प्रेम करता है। राक्षस भय से भागते हैं और सिद्धजन आपको नमस्कार करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Same reality ko alag-alag log alag tarike se react karte hain—koi joy se, koi fear se, koi devotion se.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: हे हृषीकेश, तुझ्या कीर्तीमुळे जग आनंदित होते आणि तुझ्यावर प्रेम करते; राक्षस भयाने पळतात आणि सिद्धजन तुला नमस्कार करतात.

core_meaning: The same ultimate reality evokes different responses—joy, fear, or devotion—depending on the nature of the observer
use_cases: modeling varied responses to the same input
designing adaptive systems for diverse users
embedding_text: different emotional responses to same reality including joy fear and devotion, perception based behavior modeling, adaptive systems handling diverse reactions, multi perspective interpretation of same input, emotional diversity and response variability

sanskrit: कस्माच्च ते न नमेरन्महात्मन् गरीयसे ब्रह्मणोऽप्यादिकर्त्रे । अनन्त देवेश जगन्निवास त्वमक्षरं सदसत्तत्परं यत् ॥
transliteration: kasmāc ca te na nameran mahātman garīyase brahmaṇo ’py ādi-kartre ananta deveśa jagan-nivāsa tvam akṣaraṁ sad-asat tat paraṁ yat

meanings.english: O Great One, why should they not bow to You? You are greater than even Brahma, the original creator. O infinite Lord of gods, refuge of the universe, You are the imperishable reality beyond both the manifest and the unmanifest.
meanings.hindi: हे महात्मा, वे आपको नमस्कार क्यों न करें? आप ब्रह्मा से भी श्रेष्ठ, सृष्टि के आदि कारण हैं। हे अनंत देवेश, जगन्निवास, आप ही अक्षर, साकार और निराकार से भी परे परम सत्य हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Aap sirf system ka part nahi ho—Aap system ka source aur usse bhi beyond ho.
meanings.marathi: हे महात्मा, तुला नमस्कार का करू नयेत? तू ब्रह्मापेक्षाही श्रेष्ठ आणि सृष्टीचा आदिकारण आहेस; तू साकार-निराकारापलीकडील परम अक्षर आहेस.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality is the source of all creation and exists beyond both the manifest and unmanifest realms
embedding_text: ultimate source beyond manifest and unmanifest reality, root cause of all systems, hierarchical supremacy and foundational principle, understanding source vs expression, modeling ultimate origin beyond observable layers

sanskrit: त्वमादिदेवः पुरुषः पुराणस्त्वमस्य विश्वस्य परं निधानम् । वेत्तासि वेद्यं च परं च धाम त्वया ततं विश्वमनन्तरूप ॥
transliteration: tvam ādi-devaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇas tvam asya viśvasya paraṁ nidhānam vettāsi vedyaṁ ca paraṁ ca dhāma tvayā tataṁ viśvam ananta-rūpa

meanings.english: You are the original Supreme Person, the primal God. You are the ultimate resting place of the universe. You are the knower, the object of knowledge, and the supreme abode. O infinite form, the entire universe is pervaded by You.
meanings.hindi: आप आदिदेव, सनातन पुरुष हैं। आप इस विश्व के परम आश्रय हैं। आप जानने वाले भी हैं, जानने योग्य भी, और परम धाम भी। हे अनंत रूप, सम्पूर्ण जगत आपसे व्याप्त है।
meanings.hinglish: Aap hi knower ho, knowledge ho, aur system bhi ho—sab kuch aap hi ho.
meanings.marathi: तू आदिदेव आणि सनातन पुरुष आहेस; तू विश्वाचा आधार आहेस; तू ज्ञाता, ज्ञेय आणि परम धाम आहेस—संपूर्ण विश्व तुझ्याने व्यापलेले आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality encompasses all roles—source, knower, known, and the total existence itself
use_cases: integrating multiple roles into one structure
embedding_text: unified reality as knower known and existence itself, holistic system integration, observer and observed relationship modeling, complete system representation, understanding total unified frameworks

sanskrit: वायुर्यमोऽग्निर्वरुणः शशाङ्कः प्रजापतिस्त्वं प्रपितामहश्च । नमो नमस्तेऽस्तु सहस्रकृत्वः पुनश्च भूयोऽपि नमो नमस्ते ॥
transliteration: vāyur yamo ’gnir varuṇaḥ śaśāṅkaḥ prajāpatis tvaṁ prapitāmahaś ca namo namas te ’stu sahasra-kṛtvaḥ punaś ca bhūyo ’pi namo namas te

meanings.english: You are Vayu (air), Yama (death), Agni (fire), Varuna (water), the moon, Prajapati (creator), and the great-grandfather. I offer You thousands of salutations, again and again.
meanings.hindi: आप वायु, यम, अग्नि, वरुण, चंद्रमा, प्रजापति और प्रपितामह हैं। मैं आपको हजारों बार नमस्कार करता हूँ, बार-बार नमस्कार करता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Jo alag-alag forces lagte hain—sab ek hi source ke different forms hain.
meanings.marathi: तू वायु, यम, अग्नि, वरुण, चंद्र, प्रजापती आणि प्रपितामह आहेस; तुला हजारो वेळा नमस्कार, पुन्हा पुन्हा नमस्कार.

core_meaning: All diverse forces and functions are manifestations of one unified reality
use_cases: understanding unified systems behind diverse functions
mapping multiple roles to a single source
designing modular systems with common origin
embedding_text: multiple forces and functions as expressions of one unified reality, mapping diverse roles to single source, modular systems with common origin, functional diversity within unity, integrated system components and unified structure

sanskrit: नमः पुरस्तादथ पृष्ठतस्ते नमोऽस्तु ते सर्वत एव सर्व । अनन्तवीर्यामितविक्रमस्त्वं सर्वं समाप्नोषि ततोऽसि सर्वः ॥
transliteration: namaḥ purastād atha pṛṣṭhatas te namo ’stu te sarvata eva sarva ananta-vīryāmita-vikramas tvaṁ sarvaṁ samāpnoṣi tato ’si sarvaḥ

meanings.english: Salutations to You from the front and from behind; indeed, from all sides, O all-pervading One. You possess infinite power and immeasurable might; You pervade everything, and therefore You are everything.
meanings.hindi: आपको आगे से, पीछे से और सभी दिशाओं से नमस्कार है, हे सर्वव्यापी। आप अनंत शक्ति और अपरिमेय पराक्रम वाले हैं; आप सबको व्याप्त करते हैं, इसलिए आप ही सब कुछ हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Har direction se surrender—kyunki aap har jagah ho aur sab kuch aap hi ho.
meanings.marathi: तुला पुढून, मागून आणि सर्व दिशांनी नमस्कार; तू अनंत शक्तीचा आहेस, सर्वत्र व्यापलेला आहेस, म्हणून तूच सर्व आहेस.

core_meaning: Complete realization of all-pervasiveness leads to total surrender in every direction
embedding_text: complete all pervading system and total surrender, omnipresence and full coverage modeling, integrated architecture covering all directions, understanding all encompassing systems, total influence and unity across all dimensions

sanskrit: सखेति मत्वा प्रसभं यदुक्तं हे कृष्ण हे यादव हे सखेति । अजानता महिमानं तवेदं मया प्रमादात्प्रणयेन वापि ॥
transliteration: sakheti matvā prasabhaṁ yad uktaṁ he kṛṣṇa he yādava he sakheti ajānatā mahimānaṁ tavedaṁ mayā pramādāt praṇayena vāpi

meanings.english: Thinking of You as my friend, whatever I have rashly said—‘O Krishna,’ ‘O Yadava,’ ‘O my friend’—without knowing Your greatness, out of carelessness or affection, I ask forgiveness.
meanings.hindi: आपको अपना मित्र समझकर मैंने जो भी असावधानी या स्नेहवश ‘हे कृष्ण’, ‘हे यादव’, ‘हे सखे’ कहकर कहा, आपके इस महिमामय स्वरूप को न जानने के कारण, उसके लिए मैं क्षमा चाहता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Maine aapko sirf friend samajhkar casual treat kiya—ab samajh aa raha hai ki aap kitne great ho.
meanings.marathi: तुला मित्र समजून मी जे काही ‘हे कृष्ण’, ‘हे यादव’, ‘हे सखे’ असे म्हटले—तुझा महिमा न कळल्याने, चुकून किंवा स्नेहाने—त्याबद्दल मी क्षमा मागतो.

core_meaning: Real understanding brings humility and recognition of one’s past ignorance
use_cases: understanding shift from familiarity to reverence
embedding_text: humility after realization of truth, recognizing past ignorance and mistakes, shift from casual familiarity to reverence, reflective awareness and correction, learning driven humility and growth

sanskrit: यच्चावहासार्थमसत्कृतोऽसि विहारशय्यासनभोजनेषु । एकोऽथवाप्यच्युत तत्समक्षं तत्क्षामये त्वामहमप्रमेयम् ॥
transliteration: yac cāvahāsārtham asat-kṛto ’si vihāra-śayyāsana-bhojaneṣu eko ’tha vāpy acyuta tat-samakṣaṁ tat kṣāmaye tvām aham aprameyam

meanings.english: And if I have ever disrespected You for the sake of jest while playing, resting, sitting, or eating—whether alone or in the presence of others—O infallible one, I ask forgiveness from You, the immeasurable.
meanings.hindi: यदि मैंने कभी खेलते, विश्राम करते, बैठते या भोजन करते समय, मजाक में या असम्मानपूर्वक, अकेले या दूसरों के सामने आपको अनादर किया हो, हे अच्युत, उस सबके लिए मैं आपसे क्षमा चाहता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Daily life me bhi maine casual ya disrespectful behavior kiya—ab us sab ke liye sincerely sorry bol raha hoon.
meanings.marathi: खेळताना, विश्रांती घेताना, बसताना किंवा जेवत असताना, विनोदाने किंवा अनादराने—एकटे किंवा इतरांसमोर—जर मी तुला कमी लेखले असेल, तर हे अच्युत, त्याबद्दल मी क्षमा मागतो.

core_meaning: True realization leads to detailed self-reflection and sincere accountability for past behavior
embedding_text: detailed self reflection and accountability for past actions, sincere apology for specific behaviors, humility and regret after realization, correcting behavior through awareness, modeling accountability and growth

sanskrit: पितासि लोकस्य चराचरस्य त्वमस्य पूज्यश्च गुरुर्गरीयान् । न त्वत्समोऽस्त्यभ्यधिकः कुतोऽन्यो लोकत्रयेऽप्यप्रतिमप्रभाव ॥
transliteration: pitāsi lokasya carācarasya tvam asya pūjyaś ca gurur garīyān na tvat-samo ’sty abhyadhikaḥ kuto ’nyo loka-traye ’py apratima-prabhāva

meanings.english: You are the father of this world, of all that moves and does not move. You are the most worthy of worship, the supreme teacher. No one is equal to You, and how could there be anyone greater than You in all the three worlds?
meanings.hindi: आप इस समस्त चराचर जगत के पिता हैं। आप पूज्य और सर्वोच्च गुरु हैं। तीनों लोकों में न कोई आपके समान है और न ही आपसे बढ़कर कोई हो सकता है।
meanings.hinglish: Aap source bhi ho, teacher bhi ho, aur sabse upar authority bhi ho—koi equal ya greater nahi.
meanings.marathi: तू या चराचर जगाचा पिता आहेस; तू पूज्य आणि सर्वोच्च गुरु आहेस; तुझ्यासारखा किंवा तुझ्यापेक्षा श्रेष्ठ कोणीही नाही.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality is the source, guide, and highest authority beyond all comparison
embedding_text: ultimate authority as source guide and teacher, hierarchical system with highest level control, defining top level leadership and guidance, source and governance modeling, understanding supreme role beyond comparison

sanskrit: तस्मात्प्रणम्य प्रणिधाय कायं प्रसादये त्वामहमीशमीड्यम् । पितेव पुत्रस्य सखेव सख्यु: प्रियः प्रियायार्हसि देव सोढुम् ॥
transliteration: tasmāt praṇamya praṇidhāya kāyaṁ prasādaye tvām aham īśam īḍyam piteva putrasya sakheva sakhyuḥ priyaḥ priyāyārhasi deva soḍhum

meanings.english: Therefore, bowing down and prostrating my body, I seek Your grace, O worshipable Lord. As a father forgives his son, a friend forgives a friend, and a beloved forgives the beloved, please forgive me, O Lord.
meanings.hindi: इसलिए मैं शरीर को झुकाकर आपको प्रणाम करता हूँ और आपकी कृपा चाहता हूँ, हे पूज्य प्रभु। जैसे पिता पुत्र को, मित्र मित्र को और प्रिय अपने प्रिय को क्षमा करता है, वैसे ही आप भी मुझे क्षमा करें।
meanings.hinglish: Main fully surrender karta hoon—jaise father, friend ya loved one forgive karta hai, waise hi aap bhi mujhe forgive karo.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून मी पूर्ण शरीराने नमस्कार करून तुझी कृपा मागतो; जसा पिता पुत्राला, मित्र मित्राला आणि प्रिय आपल्या प्रियाला क्षमा करतो, तसा तूही मला क्षमा कर.

core_meaning: True surrender combines humility with a personal relationship, seeking grace through love and trust
embedding_text: complete surrender with trust love and humility, seeking forgiveness through personal relationship, emotional connection with authority, empathy and compassion in systems, trust based interaction and forgiveness modeling

sanskrit: अदृष्टपूर्वं हृषितोऽस्मि दृष्ट्वा भयेन च प्रव्यथितं मनो मे । तदेव मे दर्शय देव रूपं प्रसीद देवेश जगन्निवास ॥
transliteration: adṛṣṭa-pūrvaṁ hṛṣito ’smi dṛṣṭvā bhayena ca pravyathitaṁ mano me tad eva me darśaya deva rūpaṁ prasīda deveśa jagan-nivāsa

meanings.english: Seeing what has never been seen before, I am delighted; yet my mind is also disturbed with fear. Therefore, O Lord, please show me Your gentle form again. O Lord of gods, O refuge of the universe, be gracious.
meanings.hindi: जो पहले कभी नहीं देखा, उसे देखकर मैं प्रसन्न हूँ, पर मेरा मन भय से व्याकुल भी हो गया है। इसलिए हे देव, कृपया अपना वही सौम्य रूप दिखाइए। हे देवेश, जगन्निवास, कृपा करें।
meanings.hinglish: Experience amazing bhi tha aur scary bhi—ab main calm aur gentle form dekhna chahta hoon.
meanings.marathi: जे कधी पाहिले नव्हते ते पाहून मला आनंद झाला, पण माझे मन भयाने व्याकुळ झाले आहे; म्हणून कृपया तुमचे सौम्य रूप दाखवा.

core_meaning: Human capacity has limits—after intense exposure, the mind seeks balance, comfort, and a relatable form
embedding_text: human response to overwhelming experience seeking balance and comfort, limits of perception and need for gentler interface, managing intensity and usability, designing adaptive systems for user comfort, balancing extreme exposure with relatability

sanskrit: किरीटिनं गदिनं चक्रहस्तमिच्छामि त्वां द्रष्टुमहं तथैव । तेनैव रूपेण चतुर्भुजेन सहस्रबाहो भव विश्वमूर्ते ॥
transliteration: kirīṭinaṁ gadinaṁ cakra-hastam icchāmi tvāṁ draṣṭum ahaṁ tathaiva tenaiva rūpeṇa catur-bhujena sahasra-bāho bhava viśva-mūrte

meanings.english: I wish to see You as before, crowned, holding a mace and discus. O universal form with countless arms, please appear in that four-armed form.
meanings.hindi: मैं आपको उसी रूप में देखना चाहता हूँ—मुकुटधारी, गदा और चक्र धारण किए हुए। हे सहस्रबाहु विश्वरूप, कृपया उसी चतुर्भुज रूप में प्रकट हों।
meanings.hinglish: Mujhe woh familiar divine form dekhna hai—jo samajhne aur connect karne me easy ho.
meanings.marathi: मला तुला पूर्वीप्रमाणे मुकुटधारी, गदा आणि चक्र धारण केलेल्या चतुर्भुज रूपात पाहायचे आहे.

core_meaning: After experiencing the infinite, the mind seeks a structured and familiar representation to relate and connect
use_cases: designing user-friendly representations of complex systems
providing simplified interfaces for complex realities
embedding_text: seeking familiar representation after complex exposure, simplified interface for complex systems, structured and interpretable models, bridging complexity and usability, human need for relatable forms after infinite scale experience

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच मया प्रसन्नेन तवार्जुनेदं रूपं परं दर्शितमात्मयोगात् । तेजोमयं विश्वमनन्तमाद्यं यन्मे त्वदन्येन न दृष्टपूर्वम् ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca mayā prasannena tavārjunedaṁ rūpaṁ paraṁ darśitam ātma-yogāt tejo-mayaṁ viśvam anantam ādyaṁ yan me tvad anyena na dṛṣṭa-pūrvam

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: Out of My grace, I have shown you this supreme form by My own power—this radiant, universal, infinite, and primal form, which no one before you has ever seen.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: मेरी कृपा से और अपनी योगशक्ति से मैंने तुम्हें यह परम, तेजोमय, अनंत और आद्य रूप दिखाया है, जिसे तुमसे पहले किसी ने नहीं देखा।
meanings.hinglish: Yeh vision normal nahi tha—special grace aur power se hi possible hai.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: माझ्या कृपेने आणि योगशक्तीने मी तुला हे तेजोमय, अनंत आणि आद्य रूप दाखवले, जे तुझ्यापूर्वी कुणीही पाहिले नव्हते.

core_meaning: Higher realities are revealed through grace and are not accessible through ordinary means alone
use_cases: understanding access control in advanced systems
embedding_text: rare access to higher reality through grace not ordinary means, permission based visibility and privileged access, limitations of independent capability, exceptional experiences requiring special enablement, understanding controlled access to advanced systems

sanskrit: न वेदयज्ञाध्ययनैर्न दानैर्न च क्रियाभिर्न तपोभिरुग्रैः । एवंरूपः शक्य अहं नृलोके द्रष्टुं त्वदन्येन कुरुप्रवीर ॥
transliteration: na veda-yajñādhyayanair na dānair na ca kriyābhir na tapobhir ugraiḥ evaṁ-rūpaḥ śakya ahaṁ nṛ-loke draṣṭuṁ tvad anyena kuru-pravīra

meanings.english: Not by studying the Vedas, nor by sacrifices, nor by charity, nor by rituals, nor by severe austerities can I be seen in this form in the human world by anyone other than you, O best of the Kurus.
meanings.hindi: हे कुरुश्रेष्ठ, न वेदों के अध्ययन से, न यज्ञों से, न दान से, न कर्मकांड से, और न ही कठोर तप से—इस प्रकार का मेरा यह रूप मनुष्यों द्वारा देखा जा सकता है, सिवाय तुम्हारे।
meanings.hinglish: Sirf effort-based methods se yeh level achieve nahi hota—yeh beyond standard processes hai.
meanings.marathi: हे कुरुप्रवीर, वेदाध्ययन, यज्ञ, दान, क्रिया किंवा कठोर तप यांद्वारे माझे हे रूप मनुष्यलोकात पाहता येत नाही—तुझ्याशिवाय कोणीही पाहू शकत नाही.

core_meaning: External practices and effort alone are insufficient to access the highest realization
use_cases: recognizing gaps between effort and outcome
embedding_text: limitations of effort based methods in reaching highest realization, difference between procedural approach and true access, non linear achievement beyond rituals and study, understanding gap between effort and outcome, systems beyond rule based processes

sanskrit: मा ते व्यथा मा च विमूढभावो दृष्ट्वा रूपं घोरमीदृङ्ममेदम् । व्यपेतभीः प्रीतमनाः पुनस्त्वं तदेव मे रूपमिदं प्रपश्य ॥
transliteration: mā te vyathā mā ca vimūḍha-bhāvo dṛṣṭvā rūpaṁ ghoram īdṛṅ mamedam vyapeta-bhīḥ prīta-manāḥ punas tvaṁ tad eva me rūpam idaṁ prapaśya

meanings.english: Do not be afraid or bewildered upon seeing this terrifying form of Mine. Be free from fear and with a joyful mind, behold again My familiar form.
meanings.hindi: मेरे इस भयानक रूप को देखकर भयभीत या भ्रमित मत हो। भय से मुक्त होकर प्रसन्न मन से मेरे उस सौम्य रूप को फिर से देखो।
meanings.hinglish: Darne ki zarurat nahi—ab calm ho jao aur familiar form dekho.
meanings.marathi: माझे हे भयानक रूप पाहून भयभीत किंवा गोंधळलेले होऊ नकोस; भयमुक्त होऊन आनंदी मनाने माझे सौम्य रूप पुन्हा पाह.

core_meaning: After overwhelming experiences, reassurance and emotional stabilization are necessary
use_cases: designing calming mechanisms after intense experiences
embedding_text: calming and reassurance after overwhelming experience, emotional stabilization and recovery, handling fear and confusion, designing comfort mechanisms, transitioning from intensity to stability

sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच इत्यर्जुनं वासुदेवस्तथोक्त्वा स्वकं रूपं दर्शयामास भूयः । आश्वासयामास च भीतमेनं भूत्वा पुनः सौम्यवपुर्महात्मा ॥
transliteration: sañjaya uvāca ity arjunaṁ vāsudevas tathoktvā svakaṁ rūpaṁ darśayām āsa bhūyaḥ āśvāsayām āsa ca bhītam enaṁ bhūtvā punaḥ saumya-vapur mahātmā

meanings.english: Sanjaya said: Having spoken thus to Arjuna, Krishna again revealed His own gentle form and reassured the frightened Arjuna, becoming calm and soothing.
meanings.hindi: संजय ने कहा: इस प्रकार अर्जुन से कहकर वासुदेव ने अपना सौम्य रूप फिर से दिखाया और भयभीत अर्जुन को आश्वस्त किया, स्वयं शांत और कोमल रूप धारण किया।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna ne apna calm form wapas dikhaya aur Arjuna ko fully reassure kiya.
meanings.marathi: संजय म्हणाला: असे सांगून वासुदेवाने पुन्हा आपले सौम्य रूप दाखवले आणि भयभीत अर्जुनाला धीर दिला.

core_meaning: After intense revelation, returning to a calm and relatable state is essential for integration and understanding
use_cases: restoring normal state after high intensity exposure
integrating extreme experiences into stable states
embedding_text: returning to calm state after intense experience, reassurance and emotional recovery, restoring stability and comfort, integrating high intensity exposure into normal state, designing safe and adaptive systems

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच दृष्ट्वेदं मानुषं रूपं तव सौम्यं जनार्दन । इदानीमस्मि संवृत्तः सचेता: प्रकृतिं गतः ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca dṛṣṭvedaṁ mānuṣaṁ rūpaṁ tava saumyaṁ janārdana idānīm asmi saṁvṛttaḥ sa-cetāḥ prakṛtiṁ gataḥ

meanings.english: Arjuna said: Seeing Your gentle human form, O Krishna, I have now regained my composure and returned to my normal state of mind.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे जनार्दन, आपके इस सौम्य मानव रूप को देखकर मैं अब स्थिर हो गया हूँ और अपनी सामान्य अवस्था में लौट आया हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Ab main stable ho gaya hoon—normal state me wapas aa gaya hoon.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: तुझे हे सौम्य मानवी रूप पाहून मी आता स्थिर झालो आहे आणि माझ्या नैसर्गिक अवस्थेत परत आलो आहे.

core_meaning: Stability and clarity are restored when overwhelming complexity is presented in a relatable and manageable form
use_cases: designing systems with safe fallback states
embedding_text: restoration of stability after overwhelming experience, returning to normal state through relatable representation, confirming emotional recovery and clarity, safe fallback and usability, managing complexity through simplification

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच सुदुर्दर्शमिदं रूपं दृष्टवानसि यन्मम । देवा अप्यस्य रूपस्य नित्यं दर्शनकाङ्क्षिणः ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca su-durdarśam idaṁ rūpaṁ dṛṣṭavān asi yan mama devā apy asya rūpasya nityaṁ darśana-kāṅkṣiṇaḥ

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: This form of Mine that you have seen is extremely difficult to behold; even the gods are always eager to see this form.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: मेरा यह रूप जो तुमने देखा है, अत्यंत दुर्लभ है; देवता भी इस रूप के दर्शन की सदा इच्छा रखते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Yeh vision itna rare hai ki higher beings bhi isse dekhna chahte hain.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: तू जे माझे रूप पाहिले आहेस ते अत्यंत दुर्मिळ आहे; देवतादेखील त्याच्या दर्शनाची नेहमी इच्छा करतात.

core_meaning: The highest reality is exceedingly rare to perceive and is sought even by elevated beings
embedding_text: extremely rare access to highest reality, value of privileged experience, exclusive system states and rare insights, understanding rarity and desirability of high level perception, modeling unique and exceptional access

sanskrit: नाहं वेदैर्न तपसा न दानेन न चेज्यया । शक्य एवंविधो द्रष्टुं दृष्टवानसि मां यथा ॥
transliteration: nāhaṁ vedair na tapasā na dānena na cejyayā śakya evaṁ-vidho draṣṭuṁ dṛṣṭavān asi māṁ yathā

meanings.english: Not by the Vedas, nor by austerity, nor by charity, nor by rituals can I be seen in this form as you have seen Me.
meanings.hindi: न वेदों से, न तपस्या से, न दान से और न ही यज्ञ से—मेरे इस रूप को वैसे नहीं देखा जा सकता जैसा तुमने देखा है।
meanings.hinglish: Traditional methods se yeh level ka experience directly achieve nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: वेद, तप, दान किंवा यज्ञ यांद्वारे माझे हे रूप तसे पाहता येत नाही, जसे तू पाहिले आहेस.

core_meaning: The highest realization cannot be obtained solely through external practices or conventional methods
use_cases: recognizing need for deeper connection beyond process
embedding_text: limitations of traditional methods in achieving highest realization, difference between process and true access, non linear path beyond rituals and effort, understanding gap between method and realization, deeper connection required beyond standard approaches

sanskrit: भक्त्या त्वनन्यया शक्य अहमेवंविधोऽर्जुन । ज्ञातुं द्रष्टुं च तत्त्वेन प्रवेष्टुं च परन्तप ॥
transliteration: bhaktyā tv ananyayā śakya aham evaṁ-vidho ’rjuna jñātuṁ draṣṭuṁ ca tattvena praveṣṭuṁ ca paran-tapa

meanings.english: But by undivided devotion alone, I can be truly known, seen in reality, and entered into, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: परन्तु हे अर्जुन, केवल अनन्य भक्ति से ही मुझे तत्त्वतः जाना जा सकता है, देखा जा सकता है और मुझमें प्रवेश किया जा सकता है।
meanings.hinglish: Single-pointed devotion hi real access deta hai—sirf methods nahi.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, अनन्य भक्तीनेच मला तत्त्वतः जाणता येते, पाहता येते आणि माझ्यात प्रवेश करता येतो.

core_meaning: Undivided devotion is the direct means to truly know, perceive, and unite with the ultimate reality
use_cases: understanding focused engagement over scattered effort
designing systems based on alignment rather than process
modeling deep connection over procedural execution
building systems that prioritize intent and alignment
embedding_text: undivided devotion as direct path to realization, focused alignment over procedural effort, deep connection leading to true understanding, single point focus enabling access, beyond method realization through devotion

sanskrit: मत्कर्मकृन्मत्परमो मद्भक्तः सङ्गवर्जितः । निर्वैरः सर्वभूतेषु यः स मामेति पाण्डव ॥
transliteration: mat-karma-kṛn mat-paramo mad-bhaktaḥ saṅga-varjitaḥ nirvairaḥ sarva-bhūteṣu yaḥ sa mām eti pāṇḍava

meanings.english: He who works for Me, regards Me as the supreme goal, is devoted to Me, free from attachment, and without hatred toward any being—he comes to Me, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: हे पाण्डव, जो मेरे लिए कर्म करता है, मुझे परम लक्ष्य मानता है, मेरा भक्त है, आसक्ति से रहित है और सभी प्राणियों के प्रति द्वेष रहित है—वह मुझे प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Right living = right action + right focus + devotion + no attachment + no hatred.
meanings.marathi: जो माझ्यासाठी कर्म करतो, मला परम मानतो, माझा भक्त आहे, आसक्ती सोडलेली आहे आणि सर्व प्राणिमात्रांशी निर्वैर आहे—तो मला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: Union with the ultimate comes through aligned action, devotion, detachment, and universal goodwill
embedding_text: aligned action with devotion detachment and universal goodwill, holistic life system integrating purpose and ethics, non attachment and compassion in action, balanced approach to achieving ultimate goal, integration of action focus and emotional neutrality

sanskrit:
अर्जुन उवाच
एवं सततयुक्ता ये भक्तास्त्वां पर्युपासते ।
ये चाप्यक्षरमव्यक्तं तेषां के योगवित्तमा: ॥ १ ॥
transliteration:
arjuna uvāca
evaṁ satata-yuktā ye bhaktās tvāṁ paryupāsate
ye cāpy akṣaram avyaktaṁ teṣāṁ ke yoga-vittamāḥ

meanings.english: Arjuna inquired: Which are considered to be more perfect, those who are always properly engaged in Your devotional service or those who worship the impersonal Brahman, the unmanifested?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने पूछा: जो आपकी भक्ति में निरंतर लगे रहते हैं और जो उस निर्गुण ब्रह्म की उपासना करते हैं जो अव्यक्त है, इन दोनों में से योग का अधिक ज्ञाता कौन है?
meanings.hinglish: Arjuna ne pucha: Jo log hamesha Aapki bhakti mein lage rehte hain, aur jo log us 'Impersonal Brahman' (niraakaar) ki puja karte hain, inme se sabse best kaun hai?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन विचारतो: जे भक्त निरंतर आपल्या भक्तीत दंग असतात आणि जे त्या अव्यक्त अक्षराची उपासना करतात, या दोघांपैकी योगामध्ये श्रेष्ठ कोण?

core_meaning: The Grand Inquiry: Arjuna seeks to settle the debate between Personalism (God as a person) and Impersonalism (God as an energy). It sets the stage for the hierarchy of yoga.
use_cases: starting a comparative study of Bhakti vs. Jnana
seeking a clear direction in spiritual practice
embedding_text: Arjuna asks whether personal devotees or impersonal meditators are more perfect.

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच
मय्यावेश्य मनो ये मां नित्ययुक्ता उपासते ।
श्रद्धया परयोपेतास्ते मे युक्ततमा मता: ॥ २ ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
mayy āveśya mano ye māṁ nitya-yuktā upāsate
śraddhayā parayopetās te me yukta-tamā matāḥ

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: Those who fix their minds on My personal form and are always engaged in worshiping Me with great and transcendental faith are considered by Me to be most perfect.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: जो अपने मन को मेरे साकार रूप में एकाग्र करते हैं और अत्यंत श्रद्धा के साथ मेरी पूजा करते हैं, वे मेरे द्वारा परम पूर्ण माने जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan bole: Jo log apna mann mujh par (personal form) lagate hain aur poori shraddha ke saath meri bhakti karte hain, wahi mere hisab se sabse bade yogi hain.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान म्हणाले: जे आपल्या मनाला माझ्या ठायी स्थिर करून अत्यंत श्रद्धेने माझी उपासना करतात, त्यांना मी श्रेष्ठ योगी मानतो.

core_meaning: The Divine Verdict: Krishna explicitly favors the path of Personal Devotion (Bhakti). Direct connection with the Person is deemed the highest state of Yoga.
use_cases: confirming the validity of personal worship
focusing the mind on a specific divine form
building faith in the process of Bhakti
embedding_text: Krishna considers those who worship His personal form with faith to be most perfect.

sanskrit:
ये त्वक्षरमनिर्देश्यमव्यक्तं पर्युपासते ।
सर्वत्रगमचिन्त्यं च कूटस्थमचलं ध्रुवम् ॥ ३ ॥
सन्नियम्येन्द्रियग्रामं सर्वत्र समबुद्धय: ।
ते प्राप्‍नुवन्ति मामेव सर्वभूतहिते रता: ॥ ४ ॥
transliteration:
ye tv akṣaram anirdeśyam avyaktaṁ paryupāsate
sarvatra-gam acintyaṁ ca kūṭa-stham acalaṁ dhruvam
sanniyamyendriya-grāmaṁ sarvatra sama-buddhayaḥ
te prāpnuvanti mām eva sarva-bhūta-hite ratāḥ

meanings.english: But those who fully worship the unmanifested... by controlling the various senses and being equally disposed to everyone, such persons, engaged in the welfare of all, at last achieve Me.
meanings.hindi: किन्तु जो अपनी इन्द्रियों को वश में करके, सब के प्रति समान भाव रखकर उस अविनाशी, अनिर्देश्य, अव्यक्त, सर्वव्यापी, अचिन्त्य, कूटस्थ, अचल और ध्रुव की उपासना करते हैं, वे भी मुझे ही प्राप्त करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Lekin jo log apni senses ko control karke aur sabke liye achha soch kar us 'Inconceivable/Formless' ki puja karte hain, wo bhi end mein mujh tak hi pahunchte hain.
meanings.marathi: परंतु जे आपल्या इंद्रियांना रोखून, सर्वांविषयी समबुद्धी ठेवून, त्या अव्यक्त, सर्वव्यापी आणि अचिंत्य स्वरूपाची उपासना करतात, ते देखील मलाच प्राप्त होतात.

core_meaning: The Long Road: Impersonal worship is valid and leads to the same goal, but it requires extreme sensory control and a non-discriminatory mindset toward all living beings.
use_cases: understanding the universality of spiritual goals
recognizing the importance of sensory control
embedding_text: Impersonalists also reach Krishna but through sensory control and universal welfare.

sanskrit:
क्ल‍ेशोऽधिकतरस्तेषामव्यक्तासक्तचेतसाम् ।
अव्यक्ता हि गतिर्दु:खं देहवद्भ‍िरवाप्यते ॥ ५ ॥
transliteration:
kleśo ’dhika-taras teṣām avyaktāsakta-cetasām
avyaktā hi gatir duḥkhaṁ dehavadbhir avāpyate

meanings.english: For those whose minds are attached to the unmanifested, impersonal feature of the Supreme, advancement is very troublesome. To make progress in that discipline is always difficult for those who are embodied.
meanings.hindi: जिनका मन निराकार ब्रह्म में लगा है, उनके लिए प्रगति करना अत्यंत कष्टकारी है। देहधारी जीवों के लिए इस मार्ग पर चलना सदा कठिन होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log niraakaar (invisible/formless) ke peeche bhagte hain, unka rasta bahut mushkil hai. Jab tak humare paas sharir hai, bina kisi form ke meditation karna bahut dukh-dayak hota hai.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांचे चित्त अव्यक्तामध्ये (निराकारात) आसक्त आहे, त्यांना कष्ट जास्त आहेत; कारण देहधारी मनुष्याला अव्यक्त गती दुःखाने प्राप्त होते.

core_meaning: The Practical Reality: As long as we have bodies, our psychology needs form. Meditating on 'nothingness' or 'void' is an uphill battle compared to loving a Person.
use_cases: choosing an easier spiritual process for daily life
aligning spiritual practice with human psychology
embedding_text: The path of the unmanifested is troublesome and difficult for embodied souls.

sanskrit:
ये तु सर्वाणि कर्माणि मयि सन्न्यस्य मत्परा: ।
अनन्येनैव योगेन मां ध्यायन्त उपासते ॥ ६ ॥
तेषामहं समुद्धर्ता मृत्युसंसारसागरात् ।
भवामि न चिरात्पार्थ मय्यावेशितचेतसाम् ॥ ७ ॥
transliteration:
ye tu sarvāṇi karmāṇi mayi sannyasya mat-parāḥ
ananyenaiva yogena māṁ dhyāyanta upāsate
teṣām ahaṁ samuddhartā mṛtyu-saṁsāra-sāgarāt
bhavāmi na cirāt pārtha mayy āveśita-cetasām

meanings.english: But those who worship Me, giving up all their activities unto Me... for them I am the swift deliverer from the ocean of birth and death.
