meanings.hindi: परन्तु जो अपने सारे कार्यों को मुझे अर्पित कर देते हैं और मेरा ध्यान करते हैं, उन्हें मैं जन्म-मृत्यु के सागर से तुरंत निकालने वाला बनता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Lekin jo log apne saare kaam mujhe dedicate kar dete hain aur mera dhyaan karte hain, unhe main is sansar ke chakkar se khud bacha kar nikaalta hoon.
meanings.marathi: जे सर्व कर्मे मला अर्पण करून माझेच चिंतन करतात, अशा भक्तांचा मी या जन्म-मृत्यूच्या संसारसागरातून उद्धार करतो.

core_meaning: The Divine Rescue: You don't have to save yourself; Krishna personally intervenes. Like a lifeguard picking up a swimmer, He delivers the devotee from material struggle.
use_cases: overcoming fear of failure or death
relying on Divine grace rather than just self-effort
finding hope in difficult material circumstances
embedding_text: Krishna personally delivers His devotees from the ocean of birth and death.

sanskrit:
मय्येव मन आधत्स्व मयि बुद्धिं निवेशय ।
निवसिष्यसि मय्येव अत ऊर्ध्वं न संशय: ॥ ८ ॥
transliteration:
mayy eva mana ādhatsva mayi buddhiṁ niveśaya
nivasiṣyasi mayy eva ata ūrdhvaṁ na saṁśayaḥ

meanings.english: Just fix your mind upon Me, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, and engage all your intelligence in Me. Thus you will live in Me always, without a doubt.
meanings.hindi: अपने मन को मुझमें स्थिर करो और अपनी बुद्धि को मुझमें लगाओ। इस प्रकार तुम सदैव मुझमें ही निवास करोगे, इसमें कोई संशय नहीं है।
meanings.hinglish: Apna mann mujh par lagao aur apni akal (intelligence) mujh mein invest karo. Phir tum hamesha mere saath rahoge, isme koi doubt nahi hai.
meanings.marathi: माझ्यावरच मन स्थिर कर, माझ्यावरच बुद्धी ठेव; म्हणजे तू माझ्यामध्येच निवास करशील, यात शंका नाही.

core_meaning: The Ideal State: Full mental and intellectual absorption. This is the 'Direct Union' where there is no gap between the soul and the Divine.
use_cases: aligning professional intelligence with spiritual goals
attaining a state of constant Divine presence
embedding_text: Fixing mind and intelligence on Krishna leads to living in Him eternally.

sanskrit:
अथ चित्तं समाधातुं न शक्न‍ोषि मयि स्थिरम् ।
अभ्यासयोगेन ततो मामिच्छाप्‍तुं धनञ्जय ॥ ९ ॥
transliteration:
atha cittaṁ samādhātuṁ na śaknoṣi mayi sthiram
abhyāsa-yogena tato mām icchāptuṁ dhanañ-jaya

meanings.english: My dear Arjuna, if you cannot fix your mind upon Me without deviation, then follow the regulative principles of bhakti-yoga. In this way develop a desire to attain Me.
meanings.hindi: हे धनंजय! यदि तुम अपने चित्त को मुझमें स्थिर नहीं कर सकते, तो भक्ति-योग के नियमों का पालन करो। इस प्रकार तुम मुझे पाने की इच्छा विकसित करो।
meanings.hinglish: Agar tum apna mann mujh par hamesha nahi tika sakte, toh 'Abhyasa-yoga' (practice) ke rules follow karo. Isse tumhare andar mujhe paane ki chahat badhegi.
meanings.marathi: हे धनंजया, जर तू तुझे चित्त माझ्या ठायी स्थिर करू शकत नशील, तर अभ्यासयोगाने मला प्राप्त करण्याची इच्छा धर.

core_meaning: Training the Mind: Devotion isn't always spontaneous; it can be built through discipline (Sadhana). If the mind wanders, use habits to bring it back.
use_cases: dealing with a distracted mind during prayer
embedding_text: If spontaneous focus is hard, use regulative practice to build devotion.

sanskrit:
अभ्यासेऽप्यसमर्थोऽसि मत्कर्मपरमो भव ।
मदर्थमपि कर्माणि कुर्वन्सिद्धिमवाप्स्यसि ॥ १० ॥
transliteration:
abhyāse ’py asamartho ’si mat-karma-paramo bhava
mad-artham api karmāṇi kurvan siddhim avāpsyasi

meanings.english: If you cannot practice the regulations of bhakti-yoga, then just try to work for Me, because by working for Me you will come to the perfect stage.
meanings.hindi: यदि तुम भक्ति-योग के नियमों का पालन नहीं कर सकते, तो मेरे लिए कर्म करने का प्रयत्न करो, क्योंकि मेरे लिए कर्म करने से भी तुम सिद्धि प्राप्त करोगे।
meanings.hinglish: Agar tum rules follow nahi kar sakte, toh mere liye kaam karo. Mere mission mein help karne se bhi tumhe perfection mil jayegi.
meanings.marathi: जर तू अभ्यासालाही (नियमांना) असमर्थ असशील, तर माझ्यासाठी कर्मे करणारा हो; माझ्यासाठी कर्मे करूनही तुला सिद्धी प्राप्त होईल.

core_meaning: The Professional's Path: If meditation and ritual are too hard, convert your work into service. Working for the 'Lord's Cause' (Helping others, spreading truth) is a valid shortcut to perfection.
use_cases: finding spiritual meaning in a busy career
transforming daily labor into a spiritual sacrifice
embedding_text: If practice is difficult, work for Krishna's sake to attain perfection.

sanskrit:
अथैतदप्यशक्तोऽसि कर्तुं मद्योगमाश्रित: ।
सर्वकर्मफलत्यागं तत: कुरु यतात्मवान् ॥ ११ ॥
transliteration:
athaitad apy aśakto ’si kartuṁ mad-yogam āśritaḥ
sarva-karma-phala-tyāgaṁ tataḥ kuru yatātmavān

meanings.english: If, however, you are unable to work in this consciousness of Me, then try to act giving up all results of your work and try to be self-situated.
meanings.hindi: यदि तुम मेरे इस भाव में रहकर कर्म करने में भी असमर्थ हो, तो अपने कर्मों के सभी फलों का त्याग करने का प्रयत्न करो और आत्म-स्थित होने का प्रयास करो।
meanings.hinglish: Agar tum mere liye kaam bhi nahi kar sakte, toh apne kaam ke results (fal) ko tyag do aur khud ko control mein rakhne ki koshish karo.
meanings.marathi: जर तू माझ्या योगानुसार कर्म करण्यास असमर्थ असशील, तर सर्व कर्मांच्या फळांचा त्याग कर आणि संयमी हो.

core_meaning: The Foundation of Detachment: For those who can't yet link their work to God directly, the next step is Karma-phala-tyaga—donating the fruits of labor to a good cause (social service, charity) to purify the heart.
use_cases: practicing charity when direct devotion feels difficult
learning to let go of work-related anxiety
starting the journey of selfless service
embedding_text: Giving up the fruits of action is the starting point for those unable to practice direct yoga.

sanskrit:
श्रेयो हि ज्ञानमभ्यासाज्ज्ञानाद्ध्यानं विशिष्यते ।
ध्यानात्कर्मफलत्यागस्त्यागाच्छान्तिरनन्तरम् ॥ १२ ॥
transliteration:
śreyo hi jñānam abhyāsāj jñānād dhyānaṁ viśiṣyate
dhyānāt karma-phala-tyāgas tyāgāc śāntir anantaram

meanings.english: If you cannot take to this practice, then engage yourself in the cultivation of knowledge. Better than knowledge, however, is meditation, and better than meditation is renunciation of the fruits of action, for by such renunciation one can attain peace of mind.
meanings.hindi: अभ्यास से ज्ञान श्रेष्ठ है, ज्ञान से ध्यान श्रेष्ठ है, और ध्यान से भी श्रेष्ठ है कर्मफलों का त्याग, क्योंकि ऐसे त्याग से तुरंत शांति प्राप्त होती है।
meanings.hinglish: Practice se achha gyan hai, gyan se achha meditation hai, aur meditation se bhi achha apne kaam ke results ko tyag dena hai, kyunki tyag se hi mann ki shanti milti hai.
meanings.marathi: अभ्यासापेक्षा ज्ञान श्रेष्ठ आहे, ज्ञानापेक्षा ध्यान श्रेष्ठ आहे आणि ध्यानापेक्षाही कर्मफळत्याग श्रेष्ठ आहे; कारण त्यागामुळे तत्काळ शांती मिळते.

core_meaning: The Path to Peace: Krishna lays out a hierarchy of spiritual steps. Ultimately, 'Tyaga' (renunciation of results) is praised as the quickest route to immediate peace of mind.
use_cases: understanding the sequence of mental purification
embedding_text: Renunciation of the fruits of action is superior to meditation for attaining immediate peace.

sanskrit:
अद्वेष्टा सर्वभूतानां मैत्र: करुण एव च ।
निर्ममो निरहङ्कार: समदु:खसुख: क्षमी ॥ १३ ॥
सन्तुष्ट: सततं योगी यतात्मा दृढनिश्चय: ।
मय्यर्पितमनोबुद्धिर्यो मद्भ‍क्त: स मे प्रिय: ॥ १४ ॥
transliteration:
adveṣṭā sarva-bhūtānāṁ maitraḥ karuṇa eva ca...
mayy arpita-mano-buddhir yo mad-bhaktaḥ sa me priyaḥ

meanings.english: One who is not envious but is a kind friend to all living entities, who does not think himself a proprietor and is free from false ego, who is equal in both happiness and distress... such a devotee of Mine is very dear to Me.
meanings.hindi: जो किसी से द्वेष नहीं करता, सबका मित्र है, दयालु है, ममता और अहंकार से मुक्त है, सुख-दुःख में समान रहता है... ऐसा भक्त मुझे अत्यंत प्रिय है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo kisi se nafrat nahi karta, sabka dost hai, jisme 'ego' nahi hai, aur jo dukh-sukh mein ek jaisa rehta hai... aisa mera bhakt mujhe bahut pyara hai.
meanings.marathi: जो कोणाचाही द्वेष करत नाही, जो दयाळू व सर्वांचा मित्र आहे, अहंकाररहित आहे, सुख-दुःखात समान राहतो... असा भक्त मला प्रिय आहे.

core_meaning: The Profile of a Devotee: Krishna defines the character of those He loves. It’s not just about ritual; it’s about being kind, egoless, and emotionally balanced.
use_cases: understanding the internal qualities of a spiritual person
embedding_text: A non-envious, friendly, and egoless devotee who is equal in happiness and distress is dear to Krishna.

sanskrit:
यस्मान्नोद्विजते लोको लोकान्नोद्विजते च य: ।
हर्षामर्षभयोद्वेगैर्मुक्तो य: स च मे प्रिय: ॥ १५ ॥
transliteration:
yasmān nodvijate loko lokān nodvijate ca yaḥ
harṣāmarṣa-bhayodvegair mukto yaḥ sa ca me priyaḥ

meanings.english: He by whom no one is put into difficulty and who is not disturbed by anyone, who is equipoised in happiness and distress, fear and anxiety, is very dear to Me.
meanings.hindi: जिसके द्वारा कोई कष्ट में नहीं पड़ता और जो स्वयं भी किसी से विचलित नहीं होता, जो हर्ष, क्रोध, भय और चिंता से मुक्त है, वह मुझे प्रिय है।
meanings.hinglish: Jisne kisi ko pareshan nahi kiya aur jo khud bhi kisi se pareshan nahi hota, jo khushi, darr aur tension se upar uth chuka hai, wo mujhe bahut pyara hai.
meanings.marathi: ज्याला कोणीही घाबरत नाही आणि जो कोणालाही घाबरत नाही, जो आनंद, क्रोध, भय आणि उद्वेग यांपासून मुक्त आहे, तो मला प्रिय आहे.

core_meaning: Social and Emotional Intelligence: A true devotee is a 'Safe Space' for others and has an 'Unshakable Mind' themselves. They transcend the volatility of human emotions.
use_cases: becoming a more stable and reliable person
embedding_text: One who neither disturbs others nor is disturbed by them is dear to Krishna.

sanskrit:
अनपेक्ष: श‍ुचिर्दक्ष उदासीनो गतव्यथ: ।
सर्वारम्भपरित्यागी यो मद्भ‍क्त: स मे प्रिय: ॥ १६ ॥
transliteration:
anapekṣaḥ śucir dakṣa udāsīno gata-vyathaḥ
sarvārambha-parityāgī yo mad-bhaktaḥ sa me priyaḥ

meanings.english: My devotee who is not dependent on the ordinary course of activities, who is pure, expert, without cares, free from all pains, and not striving for some result, is very dear to Me.
meanings.hindi: मेरा वह भक्त जो किसी पर निर्भर नहीं है, जो शुद्ध है, चतुर है, चिंताओं से मुक्त है और फल की इच्छा के बिना कर्म करता है, वह मुझे अत्यंत प्रिय है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo kisi par depend nahi hota, jo saaf-sutra aur expert hai, jise koi chinta nahi hai aur jo sirf result ke liye kaam nahi karta, wo bhakt mujhe bahut pyara hai.
meanings.marathi: जो अपेक्षाविरहित, बाह्य-अभ्यंतर शुद्ध, चतुर, चिंतामुक्त आणि व्यथाशून्य आहे, असा भक्त मला प्रिय आहे.

core_meaning: Efficiency and Purity: Krishna values expertise ('Dakṣa') and cleanliness, but combined with an internal detachment from outcomes.
use_cases: becoming an 'Expert' at work while staying detached
maintaining personal hygiene and mental clarity
embedding_text: An expert, pure, and carefree devotee who doesn't strive for results is dear to Krishna.

sanskrit:
सम: शत्रौ च मित्रे च तथा मानापमानयो: ।
शीतोष्णसुखदु:खेषु सम: सङ्गविवर्जित: ॥ १८ ॥
तुल्यनिन्दास्तुतिर्मौनी सन्तुष्टो येन केनचित् ।
अनिकेत: स्थिरमतिर्भक्तिमान्मे प्रियो नर: ॥ १९ ॥
transliteration:
samaḥ śatrau ca mitre ca tathā mānāpamānayoḥ...
aniketaḥ sthira-matir bhaktimān me priyo naraḥ

meanings.english: One who is equal to friends and enemies, who is equipoised in honor and dishonor... always silent and satisfied with anything... such a person is very dear to Me.
meanings.hindi: जो शत्रु और मित्र में समान है, मान और अपमान में एक जैसा रहता है, जो मौन रहता है और जो भी मिले उसमें संतुष्ट रहता है... वह मनुष्य मुझे प्रिय है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo dushman aur dost ko ek jaisa dekhta hai, jise izzat ya beizzati se farak nahi padta, jo shaant rehta hai aur jo mile usme khush rehta hai... wo mujhe bahut pyara hai.
meanings.marathi: जो शत्रू-मित्र, मान-अपमान, सुख-दुःख यात समान राहतो आणि जे मिळेल त्यात संतुष्ट राहतो, तो भक्त मला प्रिय आहे.

core_meaning: The Stoic Devotee: High-level emotional regulation. Whether praised or insulted, in a palace or under a tree, the devotee's internal satisfaction remains unchanged.
use_cases: handling criticism and praise at work
finding contentment in any living condition
embedding_text: Equality in honor and dishonor and satisfaction with whatever comes is a mark of a dear devotee.

sanskrit:
ये तु धर्मामृतमिदं यथोक्तं पर्युपासते ।
श्रद्धाना मत्परमा भक्तास्तेऽतीव मे प्रिया: ॥ २० ॥
transliteration:
ye tu dharmāmṛtam idaṁ yathoktaṁ paryupāsate
śraddhadhānā mat-paramā bhaktās te ’tīva me priyāḥ

meanings.english: Those who follow this imperishable path of devotional service and who completely engage themselves with faith, making Me the supreme goal, are very, very dear to Me.
meanings.hindi: जो इस भक्ति रूपी अमृत के मार्ग का पालन करते हैं और मुझे ही अपना परम लक्ष्य मानकर श्रद्धापूर्वक लगे रहते हैं, वे मुझे अत्यंत प्रिय हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo is 'Dharma-Amrit' (bhakti ke amrit) ke raste par chalte hain aur mujhe hi apna sab kuch maante hain, wo mere 'Ati-Priya' (sabse pyaare) hain.
meanings.marathi: जे या धर्मामृताचे यथायोग्य पालन करतात आणि मलाच श्रेष्ठ मानून भक्तीत दंग असतात, ते मला अत्यंत प्रिय आहेत.

core_meaning: The Ultimate Benediction: Krishna concludes the chapter by calling this path 'Dharmāmṛtam' (The Nectar of Religion). Those who embrace it fully aren't just 'dear,' they are 'very, very dear' (atīva priyāḥ).
use_cases: realizing the ultimate result of the Bhakti path
embedding_text: Those who follow this path of nectar with faith are very, very dear to Krishna.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच प्रकृतिं पुरुषं चैव क्षेत्रं क्षेत्रज्ञमेव च । एतद्वेदितुमिच्छामि ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं च केशव ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca prakṛtiṁ puruṣaṁ caiva kṣetraṁ kṣetra-jñam eva ca etad veditum icchāmi jñānaṁ jñeyaṁ ca keśava

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Krishna, I wish to understand prakriti (nature), purusha (consciousness), the field (body), the knower of the field, knowledge, and that which is to be known.
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे केशव, मैं प्रकृति, पुरुष, क्षेत्र, क्षेत्रज्ञ, ज्ञान और ज्ञेय को जानना चाहता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Mujhe reality ke core components samajhne hain—nature, consciousness, body, knower, knowledge aur what to know.
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: हे केशव, मला प्रकृती, पुरुष, क्षेत्र, क्षेत्रज्ञ, ज्ञान आणि ज्ञेय जाणून घ्यायचे आहे.

core_meaning: Understanding reality requires distinguishing between matter, consciousness, the body, the observer, knowledge, and the object of knowledge
embedding_text: distinguishing nature consciousness body and observer, defining system components and roles, knowledge and object of knowledge separation, observer vs system modeling, conceptual architecture for understanding reality

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच इदं शरीरं कौन्तेय क्षेत्रमित्यभिधीयते । एतद्यो वेत्ति तं प्राहुः क्षेत्रज्ञ इति तद्विदः ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca idaṁ śarīraṁ kaunteya kṣetram ity abhidhīyate etad yo vetti taṁ prāhuḥ kṣetra-jña iti tad-vidaḥ

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: O Arjuna, this body is called the field (kshetra), and one who knows this body is called the knower of the field (kshetrajna) by those who understand.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: हे अर्जुन, यह शरीर ‘क्षेत्र’ कहलाता है, और जो इसे जानता है, उसे ‘क्षेत्रज्ञ’ कहा जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Body ek field hai, aur jo isko observe karta hai wahi knower hai.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: हे अर्जुन, हे शरीर ‘क्षेत्र’ आहे आणि जो त्याला जाणतो तो ‘क्षेत्रज्ञ’ आहे.

core_meaning: The body is the field of experience, and the observer of it is distinct as the knower
embedding_text: body as field and observer as knower distinction, subject object separation, system vs observer modeling, consciousness observing system, understanding awareness separate from physical structure

sanskrit: क्षेत्रज्ञं चापि मां विद्धि सर्वक्षेत्रेषु भारत । क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञयोर्ज्ञानं यत्तज्ज्ञानं मतं मम ॥
transliteration: kṣetra-jñaṁ cāpi māṁ viddhi sarva-kṣetreṣu bhārata kṣetra-kṣetrajñayor jñānaṁ yat taj jñānaṁ mataṁ mama

meanings.english: Know Me also as the knower in all fields, O Arjuna. The understanding of the field and the knower of the field is what I consider true knowledge.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, सभी शरीरों में मुझे ही क्षेत्रज्ञ जानो। क्षेत्र और क्षेत्रज्ञ का ज्ञान ही मेरे मत में वास्तविक ज्ञान है।
meanings.hinglish: Sirf tum hi knower nahi ho—sab bodies me same ultimate knower bhi present hai.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, सर्व शरीरांमध्ये मला क्षेत्रज्ञ समज; क्षेत्र आणि क्षेत्रज्ञ यांचे ज्ञानच खरे ज्ञान आहे.

core_meaning: True knowledge is understanding both the field (body) and the universal knower present in all beings
use_cases: designing systems with central intelligence across nodes
embedding_text: universal knower present in all bodies, shared consciousness across systems, field and knower distinction as true knowledge, distributed awareness with central intelligence, unity across individual systems

sanskrit: तत्क्षेत्रं यच्च यादृक्च यद्विकारि यतश्च यत् । स च यो यत्प्रभावश्च तत्समासेन मे शृणु ॥
transliteration: tat kṣetraṁ yac ca yādṛk ca yad-vikāri yataś ca yat sa ca yo yat-prabhāvaś ca tat samāsena me śṛṇu

meanings.english: What that field is, what its nature is, how it changes, from what it arises, who the knower is, and what its effects are—hear all this from Me in brief.
meanings.hindi: यह क्षेत्र क्या है, उसका स्वरूप कैसा है, उसमें क्या-क्या परिवर्तन होते हैं, वह किससे उत्पन्न होता है, उसका जानने वाला कौन है, और उसका प्रभाव क्या है—यह सब मुझसे संक्षेप में सुनो।
meanings.hinglish: Ab main tumhe pura system explain karunga—structure, changes, origin, knower aur effects sab.
meanings.marathi: हे क्षेत्र काय आहे, त्याचे स्वरूप काय आहे, त्यात कोणते बदल होतात, ते कशातून उत्पन्न होते, त्याचा ज्ञाता कोण आहे आणि त्याचे परिणाम काय आहेत—हे सर्व मी तुला संक्षेपात सांगतो.

core_meaning: Understanding a system requires analyzing its structure, nature, changes, origin, observer, and effects
embedding_text: system analysis including structure nature changes origin observer and effects, decomposition of complex system into components, lifecycle and transformation modeling, cause and effect relationships, structured framework for understanding systems

sanskrit: ऋषिभिर्बहुधा गीतं छन्दोभिर्विविधैः पृथक् । ब्रह्मसूत्रपदैश्चैव हेतुमद्भिर्विनिश्चितैः ॥
transliteration: ṛṣibhir bahudhā gītaṁ chandobhir vividhaiḥ pṛthak brahma-sūtra-padaiś caiva hetumadbhir viniścitaiḥ

meanings.english: This knowledge has been sung by sages in many ways, described in various Vedic hymns, and also explained logically and conclusively in the Brahma Sutras.
meanings.hindi: इस ज्ञान को ऋषियों ने अनेक प्रकार से कहा है, विभिन्न वेदों में वर्णित किया है और ब्रह्मसूत्रों में तर्क सहित स्पष्ट रूप से स्थापित किया है।
meanings.hinglish: Yeh knowledge random nahi hai—sages, Vedas aur logic sab isko confirm karte hain.
meanings.marathi: हे ज्ञान ऋषींनी विविध प्रकारे सांगितले आहे, वेदांत वर्णन केले आहे आणि ब्रह्मसूत्रांत तर्कासह निश्चित केले आहे.

core_meaning: True knowledge is validated through multiple perspectives, traditions, and logical reasoning
embedding_text: knowledge validated by multiple sources sages scriptures and logic, cross verification and credibility, combining tradition and reasoning, reliable knowledge systems, multi source validation and confirmation

sanskrit: महाभूतान्यहङ्कारो बुद्धिरव्यक्तमेव च । इन्द्रियाणि दशैकं च पञ्च चेन्द्रियगोचराः ॥
transliteration: mahā-bhūtāny ahaṅkāro buddhir avyaktam eva ca indriyāṇi daśaikaṁ ca pañca cendriya-gocarāḥ

meanings.english: The five great elements, ego, intellect, the unmanifest, the ten senses, the mind, and the five sense objects—these constitute the field.
meanings.hindi: पांच महाभूत, अहंकार, बुद्धि, अव्यक्त, दस इन्द्रियां, मन और पांच इन्द्रिय विषय—ये सब मिलकर क्षेत्र (शरीर) बनाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Body sirf physical nahi hai—isme elements, mind, ego, senses aur objects sab included hain.
meanings.marathi: पाच महाभूत, अहंकार, बुद्धी, अव्यक्त, दहा इंद्रिये, मन आणि पाच इंद्रिय विषय—हे सर्व मिळून क्षेत्र बनते.

core_meaning: The human system (field) is a complex combination of physical elements, mental structures, sensory systems, and external inputs
embedding_text: human system composed of elements ego intellect mind senses and inputs, multi layer architecture of body and mind, sensory processing and external interaction, system breakdown of human structure, integration of physical and mental components

sanskrit: इच्छा द्वेषः सुखं दुःखं सङ्घातश्चेतना धृतिः । एतत्क्षेत्रं समासेन सविकारमुदाहृतम् ॥
transliteration: icchā dveṣaḥ sukhaṁ duḥkhaṁ saṅghātaś cetanā dhṛtiḥ etat kṣetraṁ samāsena sa-vikāram udāhṛtam

meanings.english: Desire, aversion, pleasure, pain, the body (aggregate), consciousness, and determination—these, along with their modifications, are briefly described as the field.
meanings.hindi: इच्छा, द्वेष, सुख, दुःख, शरीर (संघात), चेतना और धृति—इन सबको उनके विकारों सहित संक्षेप में क्षेत्र कहा गया है।
meanings.hinglish: Sirf structure hi nahi—feelings, reactions aur experiences bhi system ka part hain.
meanings.marathi: इच्छा, द्वेष, सुख, दुःख, शरीर, चेतना आणि धृती—हे सर्व विकारांसह क्षेत्रात येतात.

core_meaning: The field includes not only structure but also experiences, emotions, and dynamic states
embedding_text: human system including emotions desire aversion pleasure pain consciousness and determination, dynamic internal states and behavior modeling, experiential layer of system, integration of emotional and cognitive states, full system including structure and experience

sanskrit: अमानित्वमदम्भित्वमहिंसा क्षान्तिरार्जवम् । आचार्योपासनं शौचं स्थैर्यमात्मविनिग्रहः ॥
transliteration: amānitvam adambhitvam ahiṁsā kṣāntir ārjavam ācāryopāsanaṁ śaucaṁ sthairyam ātma-vinigrahaḥ

meanings.english: Humility, absence of pride, non-violence, forgiveness, simplicity, service to the teacher, purity, steadiness, and self-control—these are aspects of knowledge.
meanings.hindi: अहंकार का अभाव, दंभ का अभाव, अहिंसा, क्षमा, सरलता, आचार्य की सेवा, शुद्धता, स्थिरता और आत्मसंयम—ये सब ज्ञान के अंग हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Real knowledge = behavior aur character, sirf information nahi.
meanings.marathi: अमानित्व, अदंभ, अहिंसा, क्षमा, सरलता, आचार्य सेवा, शुद्धता, स्थैर्य आणि आत्मसंयम—हे ज्ञानाचे गुण आहेत.

core_meaning: True knowledge is expressed through inner qualities like humility, discipline, and ethical behavior
embedding_text: true knowledge as humility non violence discipline and purity, character based intelligence and ethical behavior, knowledge beyond information into values, building integrity and self control, value driven system design

sanskrit: इन्द्रियार्थेषु वैराग्यमनहङ्कार एव च । जन्ममृत्युजराव्याधिदुःखदोषानुदर्शनम् ॥
transliteration: indriyārtheṣu vairāgyam anahaṅkāra eva ca janma-mṛtyu-jarā-vyādhi-duḥkha-doṣānudarśanam

meanings.english: Detachment from sense objects, absence of ego, and constant awareness of the suffering inherent in birth, death, old age, and disease—these are aspects of knowledge.
meanings.hindi: इन्द्रियों के विषयों से वैराग्य, अहंकार का अभाव, और जन्म, मृत्यु, बुढ़ापा और रोग के दुःखों का निरंतर विचार—ये ज्ञान के अंग हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Attachment kam karna, ego control karna, aur life ke real struggles ko samajhna—yeh hi real knowledge hai.
meanings.marathi: इंद्रिय विषयांपासून वैराग्य, अहंकाराचा अभाव आणि जन्म-मृत्यू-वृद्धत्व-रोग यांच्या दुःखांचा विचार—हे ज्ञानाचे लक्षण आहेत.

core_meaning: True knowledge involves detachment, freedom from ego, and clear awareness of life’s inherent limitations and suffering
embedding_text: detachment from sensory objects absence of ego and awareness of suffering in life cycle, realistic understanding of birth death aging and disease, ego free system modeling, grounded decision making through detachment, awareness of limitations and human condition

sanskrit: असक्तिरनभिष्वङ्गः पुत्रदारगृहादिषु । नित्यं च समचित्तत्वमिष्टानिष्टोपपत्तिषु ॥
transliteration: asaktir anabhiṣvaṅgaḥ putra-dāra-gṛhādiṣu nityaṁ ca sama-cittatvam iṣṭāniṣṭopapattiṣu

meanings.english: Non-attachment and absence of possessiveness toward family and home, along with constant equanimity in favorable and unfavorable situations—these are aspects of knowledge.
meanings.hindi: पुत्र, पत्नी, घर आदि में आसक्ति और मोह का अभाव तथा सुख-दुःख में सदा समभाव रखना—ये ज्ञान के लक्षण हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Attachment kam rakhna aur good-bad situations me stable rehna hi real maturity hai.
meanings.marathi: पुत्र, पत्नी, घर यांबद्दल आसक्तीचा अभाव आणि सुख-दुःखात समत्व ठेवणे—हे ज्ञानाचे लक्षण आहे.

core_meaning: True knowledge is maintaining inner balance and non-attachment even in relationships and changing life situations
embedding_text: non attachment in relationships and equanimity in success and failure, emotional balance in changing situations, stability and resilience in decision making, reducing possessiveness and maintaining calm, balanced response to favorable and unfavorable outcomes

sanskrit: मयि चानन्ययोगेन भक्तिरव्यभिचारिणी । विविक्तदेशसेवित्वमरतिर्जनसंसदि ॥
transliteration: mayi cānanya-yogena bhaktir avyabhicāriṇī vivikta-deśa-sevitvam aratir jana-saṁsadi

meanings.english: Unwavering devotion to Me through exclusive focus, preference for solitude, and lack of attraction to crowded social gatherings—these are aspects of knowledge.
meanings.hindi: मुझमें अनन्य योग से अविचल भक्ति, एकांत स्थानों में रहने की प्रवृत्ति और भीड़-भाड़ में अरुचि—ये ज्ञान के लक्षण हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Focused devotion + thoda solitude + unnecessary crowd se distance = deeper understanding.
meanings.marathi: माझ्यात अनन्य भक्ती, एकांताची आवड आणि गर्दीत अरुचि—हे ज्ञानाचे लक्षण आहेत.

core_meaning: True knowledge requires focused devotion, inner stillness, and freedom from unnecessary external distractions
embedding_text: focused devotion and distraction free environment, importance of solitude for clarity, reducing unnecessary social noise, deep attention and mindfulness, sustaining connection and focus for understanding

sanskrit: अध्यात्मज्ञाननित्यत्वं तत्त्वज्ञानार्थदर्शनम् । एतज्ज्ञानमिति प्रोक्तमज्ञानं यदतोऽन्यथा ॥
transliteration: adhyātma-jñāna-nityatvaṁ tattva-jñānārtha-darśanam etaj jñānam iti proktam ajñānaṁ yad ato ’nyathā

meanings.english: Constancy in spiritual knowledge and insight into the purpose of truth—this is declared to be knowledge; anything contrary to this is ignorance.
meanings.hindi: आत्मज्ञान में स्थिर रहना और तत्त्वज्ञान के उद्देश्य को समझना—इसे ही ज्ञान कहा गया है; इसके विपरीत जो कुछ है वह अज्ञान है।
meanings.hinglish: True knowledge = self-awareness + truth understanding; baaki sab ignorance hai.
meanings.marathi: आध्यात्मिक ज्ञानात स्थिरता आणि तत्त्वज्ञानाच्या उद्देशाचे दर्शन—हेच ज्ञान आहे; याच्या विरुद्ध सर्व अज्ञान आहे.

core_meaning: True knowledge is steady self-awareness and understanding of ultimate truth; anything else is ignorance
embedding_text: true knowledge as steady self awareness and understanding of ultimate truth, distinction between knowledge and ignorance, clarity and focus on essential understanding, filtering meaningful knowledge from noise, truth oriented system design

sanskrit: ज्ञेयं यत्तत्प्रवक्ष्यामि यज्ज्ञात्वामृतमश्नुते । अनादिमत्परं ब्रह्म न सत्तन्नासदुच्यते ॥
transliteration: jñeyaṁ yat tat pravakṣyāmi yaj jñātvāmṛtam aśnute anādi mat-paraṁ brahma na sat tan nāsad ucyate

meanings.english: I will now explain that which is to be known, knowing which one attains immortality. It is beginningless, the supreme Brahman, beyond both existence and non-existence.
meanings.hindi: अब मैं उस ज्ञेय का वर्णन करूँगा, जिसे जानकर अमरत्व प्राप्त होता है। वह अनादि, परम ब्रह्म है, जो न सत है न असत कहा जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Ab Krishna ultimate reality explain kar rahe hain—jo time, existence aur non-existence se bhi beyond hai.
meanings.marathi: आता मी त्या ज्ञेयाचे वर्णन करतो, ज्याला जाणून अमरत्व प्राप्त होते; ते अनादि परम ब्रह्म आहे, जे ना सत आहे ना असत.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality (Brahman) is beyond time, beyond duality, and knowing it leads to liberation
embedding_text: ultimate reality beyond existence and non existence, non dual and timeless system, understanding brahman and liberation, beyond binary logic and duality, abstract infinite system modeling

sanskrit: सर्वतः पाणिपादं तत्सर्वतोऽक्षिशिरोमुखम् । सर्वतःश्रुतिमल्लोके सर्वमावृत्य तिष्ठति ॥
transliteration: sarvataḥ pāṇi-pādaṁ tat sarvato ’kṣi-śiro-mukham sarvataḥ śrutimal loke sarvam āvṛtya tiṣṭhati

meanings.english: That (Brahman) has hands and feet everywhere, eyes, heads, and faces everywhere, and ears everywhere; it pervades everything in the universe.
meanings.hindi: वह (ब्रह्म) सब ओर हाथ-पैर, आँखें, सिर, मुख और कान रखता है; वह सम्पूर्ण जगत में व्याप्त होकर स्थित है।
meanings.hinglish: Ultimate reality har jagah present hai—har being ke through function karti hai.
meanings.marathi: ते (ब्रह्म) सर्वत्र हात-पाय, डोळे, मस्तक, मुख आणि कान असलेले आहे; ते संपूर्ण विश्व व्यापून आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality pervades all beings and operates through every form in existence
embedding_text: ultimate reality present everywhere operating through all beings, distributed intelligence across system, interconnected universal network, unified system functioning through multiple nodes, decentralized awareness across all forms

sanskrit: सर्वेन्द्रियगुणाभासं सर्वेन्द्रियविवर्जितम् । असक्तं सर्वभृच्चैव निर्गुणं गुणभोक्तृ च ॥
transliteration: sarvendriya-guṇābhāsaṁ sarvendriya-vivarjitam asaktaṁ sarva-bhṛc caiva nirguṇaṁ guṇa-bhoktṛ ca

meanings.english: It appears to possess the functions of all senses, yet is without senses; unattached, yet sustaining all; beyond qualities, yet experiencing the qualities.
meanings.hindi: वह सभी इन्द्रियों के गुणों को प्रकट करता हुआ प्रतीत होता है, फिर भी इन्द्रियों से रहित है; आसक्त नहीं है, फिर भी सबका धारक है; निर्गुण होते हुए भी गुणों का भोक्ता है।
meanings.hinglish: Ultimate reality sab kuch operate karti hai, par khud kisi cheez me bound nahi hoti.
meanings.marathi: ते सर्व इंद्रियांचे गुण दर्शवते पण स्वतः इंद्रियांपासून मुक्त आहे; आसक्त नसूनही सर्वांचा आधार आहे; निर्गुण असूनही गुणांचा अनुभव घेते.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality functions through all systems yet remains independent, unattached, and beyond their limitations
use_cases: modeling systems that operate without direct involvement
embedding_text: ultimate reality operates through senses but remains independent, abstraction layer functioning without attachment, system supporting all without being bound, observer separate from system yet enabling it, non dependent universal control architecture

sanskrit: बहिरन्तश्च भूतानामचरं चरमेव च । सूक्ष्मत्वात्तदविज्ञेयं दूरस्थं चान्तिके च तत् ॥
transliteration: bahir antaś ca bhūtānām acaraṁ caram eva ca sūkṣmatvāt tad avijñeyaṁ dūra-sthaṁ cāntike ca tat

meanings.english: It exists both outside and inside all beings; it is both moving and unmoving. Because of its subtlety, it is incomprehensible; it is far away, yet also very near.
meanings.hindi: वह सभी प्राणियों के बाहर और भीतर दोनों है; वह चलने वाला भी है और अचल भी है। अपनी सूक्ष्मता के कारण वह समझ में नहीं आता; वह दूर भी है और पास भी।
meanings.hinglish: Ultimate reality har jagah hai—andar bhi, bahar bhi—par itni subtle hai ki easily samajh nahi aati.
meanings.marathi: ते सर्व प्राण्यांच्या बाहेर आणि आत आहे; ते चल आणि अचल दोन्ही आहे; सूक्ष्म असल्यामुळे ते समजण्यास कठीण आहे; ते दूर असूनही जवळ आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality transcends spatial, dynamic, and perceptual limitations—it is everywhere, subtle, and beyond ordinary comprehension
embedding_text: ultimate reality inside and outside all systems moving and unmoving subtle and beyond perception, non local distributed system, hidden layer architecture, pervasive presence beyond spatial limits, abstract system beyond comprehension

sanskrit: अविभक्तं च भूतेषु विभक्तमिव च स्थितम् । भूतभर्तृ च तज्ज्ञेयं ग्रसिष्णु प्रभविष्णु च ॥
transliteration: avibhaktaṁ ca bhūteṣu vibhaktam iva ca sthitam bhūta-bhartṛ ca taj jñeyaṁ grasiṣṇu prabhaviṣṇu ca

meanings.english: It is undivided in all beings, yet appears to be divided. It is the sustainer of all beings, and also that which devours and generates them.
meanings.hindi: वह सभी प्राणियों में अविभाजित है, फिर भी विभाजित सा प्रतीत होता है; वह सबका धारक है और उत्पत्ति तथा विनाश का कारण भी है।
meanings.hinglish: Reality ek hi hai, par alag-alag forms me dikhti hai—aur wahi create, sustain aur destroy karti hai.
meanings.marathi: ते सर्व प्राण्यांमध्ये अविभक्त असूनही विभक्त भासते; ते सर्वांचे पालन करते आणि निर्माण व विनाशही करते.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality is one and indivisible, yet appears as many, and is the source, sustainer, and dissolver of all existence
use_cases: modeling distributed systems with a single source
designing unified architectures across multiple instances
embedding_text: one reality appearing as many forms, unity behind diversity, system that creates sustains and dissolves, distributed instances with single underlying source, non dual system architecture and lifecycle

sanskrit: ज्योतिषामपि तज्ज्योतिस्तमसः परमुच्यते । ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं ज्ञानगम्यं हृदि सर्वस्य विष्ठितम् ॥
transliteration: jyotiṣām api taj jyotis tamasaḥ param ucyate jñānaṁ jñeyaṁ jñāna-gamyaṁ hṛdi sarvasya viṣṭhitam

meanings.english: It is the light of all lights and is said to be beyond darkness. It is knowledge, the object of knowledge, and the goal of knowledge; it resides in the heart of all beings.
meanings.hindi: वह सभी प्रकाशों का प्रकाश है और अज्ञान रूपी अंधकार से परे है; वही ज्ञान है, ज्ञेय है और ज्ञान से प्राप्त होने वाला लक्ष्य भी है; वह सभी के हृदय में स्थित है।
meanings.hinglish: Ultimate reality hi light hai, knowledge hai aur goal bhi—aur woh har kisi ke andar present hai.
meanings.marathi: ते सर्व प्रकाशांचे प्रकाश आहे आणि अज्ञानाच्या अंधारापलीकडे आहे; ते ज्ञान, ज्ञेय आणि ज्ञानाने प्राप्त होणारे ध्येय आहे; ते सर्वांच्या हृदयात आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality is the source of all illumination, beyond ignorance, and is both the means, object, and goal of knowledge residing within all beings
use_cases: integrating source, process, and goal in systems
embedding_text: ultimate reality as source of all light and awareness beyond ignorance, knowledge object and goal unified, consciousness present in all beings, self referential system integrating source process and outcome, illumination and awareness as core system

sanskrit: इति क्षेत्रं तथा ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं चोक्तं समासत: । मद्भक्त एतद्विज्ञाय मद्भावायोपपद्यते ॥
transliteration: iti kṣetraṁ tathā jñānaṁ jñeyaṁ coktaṁ samāsataḥ mad-bhakta etad vijñāya mad-bhāvāyopapadyate

meanings.english: Thus the field, knowledge, and the knowable have been briefly explained. One who understands this truly becomes My devotee and attains My nature.
meanings.hindi: इस प्रकार क्षेत्र, ज्ञान और ज्ञेय का संक्षेप में वर्णन किया गया है; जो इसे तत्त्वतः समझता है, वह मेरा भक्त बनकर मेरे स्वरूप को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Field + knowledge + ultimate reality ko samajhne wala finally divine state achieve karta hai.
meanings.marathi: अशा प्रकारे क्षेत्र, ज्ञान आणि ज्ञेय यांचे संक्षिप्त वर्णन झाले; जो हे समजतो तो माझ्या स्वरूपाला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: Understanding the field, knowledge, and the ultimate reality leads to alignment with the divine nature
embedding_text: integration of field knowledge and ultimate reality leading to transformation, holistic system understanding and alignment, complete knowledge framework with purpose, learning leading to realization and alignment with higher state

sanskrit: प्रकृतिं पुरुषं चैव विद्ध्यनादी उभावपि । विकारांश्च गुणांश्चैव विद्धि प्रकृतिसम्भवान् ॥
transliteration: prakṛtiṁ puruṣaṁ caiva viddhy anādī ubhāv api vikārāṁś ca guṇāṁś caiva viddhi prakṛti-sambhavān

meanings.english: Know that both nature (prakriti) and consciousness (purusha) are beginningless. Also understand that all transformations and qualities arise from prakriti.
meanings.hindi: प्रकृति और पुरुष दोनों ही अनादि हैं; और सभी विकार तथा गुण प्रकृति से उत्पन्न होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Nature aur consciousness dono eternal hain, par changes aur qualities nature se aate hain.
meanings.marathi: प्रकृती आणि पुरुष दोन्ही अनादि आहेत; आणि सर्व विकार व गुण प्रकृतीतून उत्पन्न होतात.

core_meaning: Nature and consciousness are both eternal, but all changes and qualities originate from nature alone
use_cases: modeling source of change in systems
understanding origin of behavior and qualities
designing systems with static observer and dynamic environment
embedding_text: prakriti as source of all changes and qualities and purusha as eternal observer, distinction between dynamic system and static consciousness, origin of behavior from nature, system vs observer architecture, transformation and qualities emerging from nature

sanskrit: कार्यकारणकर्तृत्वे हेतुः प्रकृतिरुच्यते । पुरुषः सुखदुःखानां भोक्तृत्वे हेतुरुच्यते ॥
transliteration: kārya-kāraṇa-kartṛtve hetuḥ prakṛtir ucyate puruṣaḥ sukha-duḥkhānāṁ bhoktṛtve hetur ucyate

meanings.english: Nature (prakriti) is said to be the cause of all actions and effects, while consciousness (purusha) is the cause of experiencing pleasure and pain.
meanings.hindi: कार्य और कारण के कर्तृत्व का कारण प्रकृति है, और सुख-दुःख का अनुभव करने का कारण पुरुष है।
meanings.hinglish: Action nature karti hai, experience consciousness karti hai.
meanings.marathi: कार्य आणि कारण यांचे कर्तृत्व प्रकृतीचे आहे, आणि सुख-दुःख भोगण्याचे कारण पुरुष आहे.

core_meaning: Nature performs actions and generates outcomes, while consciousness experiences those outcomes
use_cases: separating execution from experience in systems
understanding responsibility of actions vs perception
designing systems with execution and feedback layers
embedding_text: prakriti performs actions and generates effects while purusha experiences pleasure and pain, separation of execution and experience, system vs observer architecture, cause and effect vs perception, dynamic system with observing consciousness

sanskrit: पुरुषः प्रकृतिस्थो हि भुङ्क्ते प्रकृतिजान्गुणान् । कारणं गुणसङ्गोऽस्य सदसद्योनिजन्मसु ॥
transliteration: puruṣaḥ prakṛti-stho hi bhuṅkte prakṛti-jān guṇān kāraṇaṁ guṇa-saṅgo ’sya sad-asad-yoni-janmasu

meanings.english: The soul, situated in nature, experiences the qualities born of nature. Attachment to these qualities is the cause of its birth in higher and lower forms.
meanings.hindi: पुरुष प्रकृति में स्थित होकर प्रकृति से उत्पन्न गुणों का अनुभव करता है; और इन गुणों में आसक्ति ही उसके उच्च और निम्न जन्मों का कारण बनती है।
meanings.hinglish: Experience problem nahi hai—attachment problem hai, jo cycle create karti hai.
meanings.marathi: पुरुष प्रकृतीत राहून तिच्या गुणांचा अनुभव घेतो; पण त्या गुणांशी आसक्ती हीच जन्म-मृत्यूच्या चक्राचे कारण आहे.

core_meaning: Attachment to the qualities of nature binds consciousness to repeated cycles of experience and rebirth
use_cases: understanding cause of repeated behavioral patterns
designing systems to reduce dependency loops
modeling feedback loops in experience systems
embedding_text: attachment to qualities causing repeated cycles and rebirth, feedback loop of experience and attachment, breaking dependency loops, understanding behavioral patterns from attachment, consciousness bound by nature through attachment

sanskrit: उपद्रष्टानुमन्ता च भर्ता भोक्ता महेश्वरः । परमात्मेति चाप्युक्तो देहेऽस्मिन्पुरुषः परः ॥
transliteration: upadraṣṭānumantā ca bhartā bhoktā maheśvaraḥ paramātmeti cāpy ukto dehe ’smin puruṣaḥ paraḥ

meanings.english: In this body, the Supreme Purusha is said to be the witness, the permitter, the supporter, the experiencer, the great Lord, and also called the Supreme Self (Paramatma).
meanings.hindi: इस शरीर में स्थित पुरुष परमात्मा साक्षी, अनुमन्ता, धारक, भोक्ता, महेश्वर और परमात्मा कहलाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Tum sirf experiencer nahi ho—tum witness bhi ho, supporter bhi ho aur deeper level par supreme presence bhi ho.
meanings.marathi: या शरीरात असलेला पुरुष हा साक्षी, अनुमन्ता, धारक, भोक्ता, महेश्वर आणि परमात्मा आहे.

core_meaning: The Supreme Consciousness within the body performs multiple roles—witnessing, permitting, supporting, and experiencing all processes
use_cases: designing systems with monitoring and control layers
embedding_text: supreme consciousness as witness permitter supporter and experiencer, layered roles of observer in system, hierarchical control with monitoring and permission, paramatma concept within body, multi functional observer architecture

sanskrit: य एवं वेत्ति पुरुषं प्रकृतिं च गुणैः सह । सर्वथा वर्तमानोऽपि न स भूयोऽभिजायते ॥
transliteration: ya evaṁ vetti puruṣaṁ prakṛtiṁ ca guṇaiḥ saha sarvathā vartamāno ’pi na sa bhūyo ’bhijāyate

meanings.english: One who truly understands Purusha and Prakriti along with the qualities (gunas), even while living in all conditions, is not born again.
meanings.hindi: जो पुरुष और प्रकृति को उनके गुणों सहित तत्त्वतः जानता है, वह किसी भी अवस्था में रहते हुए पुनर्जन्म को प्राप्त नहीं होता।
meanings.hinglish: Sahi understanding mil jaaye to life jeete hue bhi cycle se free ho sakte ho.
meanings.marathi: जो पुरुष आणि प्रकृतीला गुणांसह तत्त्वतः जाणतो, तो कोणत्याही अवस्थेत राहून पुन्हा जन्म घेत नाही.

core_meaning: True understanding of consciousness, nature, and their interaction frees one from the cycle of repeated existence
use_cases: designing systems that avoid infinite loops
embedding_text: understanding purusha and prakriti breaking cycle of rebirth and repetition, awareness leading to freedom from loops, separation of observer and system enabling liberation, clarity removing cyclical patterns, knowledge leading to non repetition

sanskrit: ध्यानेनात्मनि पश्यन्ति केचिदात्मानमात्मना । अन्ये सांख्येन योगेन कर्मयोगेन चापरे ॥
transliteration: dhyānenātmani paśyanti kecid ātmānam ātmanā anye sāṅkhyena yogena karma-yogena cāpare

meanings.english: Some perceive the Self within themselves through meditation, others through the path of knowledge (Sankhya), and still others through the path of action (Karma Yoga).
meanings.hindi: कुछ लोग ध्यान द्वारा अपने भीतर आत्मा को देखते हैं, कुछ सांख्य ज्ञान से और अन्य कर्मयोग के माध्यम से उसे प्राप्त करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Alag log alag methods se same truth tak pahunchte hain—meditation, knowledge ya action.
meanings.marathi: काही जण ध्यानाने आत्मा पाहतात, काही सांख्य योगाने आणि काही कर्मयोगाने त्याला प्राप्त करतात.

core_meaning: Different paths—meditation, knowledge, and action—can all lead to realization of the Self
embedding_text: multiple paths to realization including meditation knowledge and action, flexible system design for different users, inclusive approach to achieving goals, diverse methods leading to same outcome, adaptive learning and understanding frameworks

sanskrit: अन्ये त्वेवमजानन्तः श्रुत्वान्येभ्य उपासते । तेऽपि चातितरन्त्येव मृत्युं श्रुतिपरायणाः ॥
transliteration: anye tv evam ajānantaḥ śrutvānyebhya upāsate te ’pi cātitaranty eva mṛtyuṁ śruti-parāyaṇāḥ

meanings.english: Others, who do not know this directly, learn from others and engage in worship based on what they hear; they too transcend death through their devotion to what they have heard.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग इसे सीधे नहीं जानते, वे दूसरों से सुनकर उपासना करते हैं; वे भी श्रवण में निष्ठा के कारण मृत्यु को पार कर जाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Agar direct understanding nahi hai, tab bhi sincere learning aur faith se progress possible hai.
meanings.marathi: जे स्वतः समजत नाहीत ते इतरांकडून ऐकून उपासना करतात; तेही श्रवणनिष्ठेमुळे मृत्यू पार करतात.

core_meaning: Even without direct realization, sincere learning through guidance and faith can lead to liberation
embedding_text: learning through guidance and hearing leading to realization, indirect knowledge pathways, mentorship based learning and faith, inclusive system allowing beginners to progress, devotion and trust enabling transformation

sanskrit: यावत्सञ्जायते किञ्चित्सत्त्वं स्थावरजङ्गमम् । क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञसंयोगात्तद्विद्धि भरतर्षभ ॥
transliteration: yāvat sañjāyate kiñcit sattvaṁ sthāvara-jaṅgamam kṣetra-kṣetrajña-saṁyogāt tad viddhi bharatarṣabha

meanings.english: Whatever is born, whether moving or unmoving, know that it arises from the union of the field and the knower of the field.
meanings.hindi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठ, जो कुछ भी उत्पन्न होता है—चाहे स्थावर हो या जंगम—वह क्षेत्र और क्षेत्रज्ञ के संयोग से उत्पन्न होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Har living ya non-living system field aur consciousness ke combination se hi exist karta hai.
meanings.marathi: जे काही स्थावर किंवा जंगम निर्माण होते ते क्षेत्र आणि क्षेत्रज्ञ यांच्या संयोगातूनच होते.

core_meaning: All forms of existence arise from the interaction between matter (field) and consciousness (knower)
use_cases: modeling interaction between system and observer
embedding_text: all existence arises from interaction between field and knower, matter and consciousness interaction, system and observer combination creating reality, integrated architecture of existence, origin of all forms from dual interaction

sanskrit: समं सर्वेषु भूतेषु तिष्ठन्तं परमेश्वरम् । विनश्यत्स्वविनश्यन्तं यः पश्यति स पश्यति ॥
transliteration: samaṁ sarveṣu bhūteṣu tiṣṭhantaṁ parameśvaram vinaśyatsv avinaśyantaṁ yaḥ paśyati sa paśyati

meanings.english: He truly sees who perceives the Supreme Lord equally present in all beings, the imperishable within the perishing.
meanings.hindi: जो सभी प्राणियों में समान रूप से स्थित परमेश्वर को देखता है, जो नाशवान में भी अविनाशी को देखता है—वही वास्तव में देखता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo sab me same consciousness dekhta hai—even changing bodies ke andar—wahi real vision rakhta hai.
meanings.marathi: जो सर्व प्राण्यांमध्ये समान असलेल्या परमेश्वराला पाहतो, नाशवान शरीरातही अविनाशी पाहतो—तोच खरे पाहतो.

core_meaning: True perception is seeing the same eternal consciousness in all beings despite external differences and changes
use_cases: modeling invariant core across changing states
embedding_text: seeing same consciousness in all beings despite changing forms, invariant core within dynamic systems, equality and non discrimination in perception, recognizing eternal within temporary, unified awareness across diverse entities

sanskrit: समं पश्यन्हि सर्वत्र समवस्थितमीश्वरम् । न हिनस्त्यात्मनात्मानं ततो याति परां गतिम् ॥
transliteration: samaṁ paśyan hi sarvatra samavasthitam īśvaram na hinasty ātmanātmānaṁ tato yāti parāṁ gatim

meanings.english: Seeing the Supreme Lord equally present everywhere, one does not harm oneself by the self, and thus attains the supreme goal.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति हर जगह समान रूप से स्थित ईश्वर को देखता है, वह अपने द्वारा अपने को हानि नहीं पहुँचाता और इस प्रकार परम गति को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab tum sab me same consciousness dekhte ho, to tum kisi ko harm nahi karte—aur khud bhi free ho jaate ho.
meanings.marathi: जो सर्वत्र समान परमेश्वर पाहतो, तो स्वतःला इजा करत नाही आणि त्यामुळे परम गती प्राप्त करतो.

core_meaning: Seeing unity in all beings leads to non-harm and ultimately to liberation
embedding_text: seeing unity leading to non harm and liberation, equal vision reducing harm, compassion based systems, self harm as harming others concept, harmony driven awareness and behavior

sanskrit: प्रकृत्यैव च कर्माणि क्रियमाणानि सर्वशः । यः पश्यति तथात्मानमकर्तारं स पश्यति ॥
transliteration: prakṛtyaiva ca karmāṇi kriyamāṇāni sarvaśaḥ yaḥ paśyati tathātmānam akartāraṁ sa paśyati

meanings.english: All actions are performed by nature alone; one who sees the Self as non-doer truly sees.
meanings.hindi: सभी कर्म केवल प्रकृति द्वारा किए जाते हैं; जो आत्मा को अकर्ता देखता है, वही सही देखता है।
meanings.hinglish: Actions nature karti hai, tum real me doer nahi ho—yeh samajhna hi true vision hai.
meanings.marathi: सर्व कर्म प्रकृतीच करते; जो आत्म्याला अकर्ता मानतो तोच खरे पाहतो.

core_meaning: Recognizing that all actions belong to nature and not to the Self leads to true understanding
embedding_text: actions performed by nature not self, self as non doer, reducing ego ownership of actions, system driven behavior vs observer, detached execution and awareness model

sanskrit: यदा भूतपृथग्भावमेकस्थमनुपश्यति । तत एव च विस्तारं ब्रह्म सम्पद्यते तदा ॥
transliteration: yadā bhūta-pṛthag-bhāvam eka-stham anupaśyati tata eva ca vistāraṁ brahma sampadyate tadā

meanings.english: When one perceives the diverse existence of beings as rooted in one and also sees their expansion from that one, then one attains Brahman.
meanings.hindi: जब कोई सभी भिन्न-भिन्न प्राणियों को एक में स्थित देखता है और उसी से उनका विस्तार भी देखता है, तब वह ब्रह्म को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab tum diversity ke andar unity aur unity se diversity dono dekhte ho, tab realization hoti hai.
meanings.marathi: जेव्हा सर्व भिन्न प्राणी एका ठिकाणी आहेत आणि त्याचपासून विस्तारले आहेत असे पाहतो, तेव्हा तो ब्रह्म प्राप्त करतो.

core_meaning: Realization comes from seeing unity behind diversity and diversity emerging from unity
use_cases: understanding systems with single source and multiple outputs
building unified frameworks with diverse expressions
embedding_text: unity behind diversity and diversity emerging from one source, root system expanding into multiple forms, non dual understanding of existence, scalable architecture from single source, realization through unity perception

sanskrit: अनादित्वान्निर्गुणत्वात्परमात्मायमव्ययः । शरीरस्थोऽपि कौन्तेय न करोति न लिप्यते ॥
transliteration: anāditvān nirguṇatvāt paramātmāyam avyayaḥ śarīra-stho ’pi kaunteya na karoti na lipyate

meanings.english: Being beginningless and beyond qualities, this Supreme Self is imperishable; though residing in the body, it neither acts nor is affected.
meanings.hindi: यह परमात्मा अनादि और निर्गुण होने के कारण अविनाशी है; शरीर में रहते हुए भी यह न करता है और न ही उससे प्रभावित होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Self body ke andar hote hue bhi actions nahi karta aur unse affected bhi nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: परमात्मा अनादि आणि निर्गुण असल्यामुळे अविनाशी आहे; शरीरात असूनही तो काही करत नाही आणि त्याला काही लागून राहत नाही.

core_meaning: The Self is eternal, unaffected, and remains untouched by actions even while present in the body
use_cases: modeling immutable core within dynamic systems
embedding_text: self as immutable and unaffected core within changing system, non attachment and non doership, separation of identity from actions, resilient core architecture unaffected by processes, eternal consciousness beyond qualities

sanskrit: यथा सर्वगतं सौक्ष्म्यादाकाशं नोपलिप्यते । सर्वत्रावस्थितो देहे तथात्मा नोपलिप्यते ॥
transliteration: yathā sarva-gataṁ saukṣmyād ākāśaṁ nopalipyate sarvatrāvasthito dehe tathātmā nopalipyate

meanings.english: Just as space, due to its subtle nature, is not affected though it pervades everything, so the Self, though present in the body, is not affected.
meanings.hindi: जैसे सूक्ष्म होने के कारण आकाश सर्वत्र व्याप्त होकर भी प्रभावित नहीं होता, वैसे ही शरीर में स्थित आत्मा भी प्रभावित नहीं होती।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise space sab jagah hai par kuch usko affect nahi karta, waise hi Self body me hote hue bhi unaffected rehta hai.
meanings.marathi: जसे सूक्ष्म आकाश सर्वत्र असूनही प्रभावित होत नाही, तसेच शरीरात असलेला आत्माही प्रभावित होत नाही.

core_meaning: The Self remains unaffected by bodily actions, just as space remains untouched despite being everywhere
use_cases: designing systems with isolated core layers
embedding_text: self as space like unaffected presence, core identity not impacted by system changes, non interfering observer, resilient architecture with isolated core, subtle and pervasive yet independent system

sanskrit: यथा प्रकाशयत्येकः कृत्स्नं लोकमिमं रविः । क्षेत्रं क्षेत्री तथा कृत्स्नं प्रकाशयति भारत ॥
transliteration: yathā prakāśayaty ekaḥ kṛtsnaṁ lokam imaṁ raviḥ kṣetraṁ kṣetrī tathā kṛtsnaṁ prakāśayati bhārata

meanings.english: Just as one sun illumines the entire world, so does the knower of the field illuminate the entire field, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: जैसे एक सूर्य पूरे संसार को प्रकाशित करता है, वैसे ही क्षेत्रज्ञ पूरे क्षेत्र को प्रकाशित करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise ek sun poori duniya ko light deta hai, waise hi consciousness poore body-mind system ko illuminate karti hai.
meanings.marathi: जसा एक सूर्य संपूर्ण जग प्रकाशित करतो, तसा क्षेत्रज्ञ संपूर्ण क्षेत्र प्रकाशित करतो.

core_meaning: Consciousness illuminates and makes the entire body-mind system knowable, just as the sun illuminates the world
use_cases: understanding source of awareness in systems
embedding_text: consciousness as illuminating principle of system, awareness making body and mind knowable, central source of perception like sun lighting world, observer illuminating entire system, knowledge arising through awareness

sanskrit: क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञयोरेवमन्तरं ज्ञानचक्षुषा । भूतप्रकृतिमोक्षं च ये विदुर्यान्ति ते परम् ॥
transliteration: kṣetra-kṣetrajñayor evam antaraṁ jñāna-cakṣuṣā bhūta-prakṛti-mokṣaṁ ca ye vidur yānti te param

meanings.english: Those who perceive with the eye of knowledge the distinction between the field and the knower of the field, and also understand liberation from material nature, attain the supreme.
meanings.hindi: जो ज्ञान की दृष्टि से क्षेत्र और क्षेत्रज्ञ के अंतर को समझते हैं और प्रकृति से मुक्ति को जानते हैं, वे परम को प्राप्त होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo field aur observer ka difference samajh lete hain aur nature se detach ho jaate hain, woh ultimate state tak pahunch jaate hain.
meanings.marathi: जे ज्ञानाच्या दृष्टीने क्षेत्र आणि क्षेत्रज्ञ यांचा भेद समजतात आणि प्रकृतीपासून मुक्ती जाणतात, ते परम प्राप्त करतात.

core_meaning: Realization comes from clearly distinguishing between the field and the knower and becoming free from nature’s influence
embedding_text: distinction between field and knower leading to liberation from nature, observer vs system separation, freedom from identification with nature, knowledge based liberation, clear boundary between system and consciousness

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच परं भूयः प्रवक्ष्यामि ज्ञानानां ज्ञानमुत्तमम् । यज्ज्ञात्वा मुनयः सर्वे परां सिद्धिमितो गताः ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca paraṁ bhūyaḥ pravakṣyāmi jñānānāṁ jñānam uttamam yaj jñātvā munayaḥ sarve parāṁ siddhim ito gatāḥ

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: I shall again declare the supreme knowledge, the highest of all knowledge, knowing which all sages have attained the highest perfection.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: मैं फिर से सर्वोच्च ज्ञान का वर्णन करूँगा, जिसे जानकर सभी मुनि परम सिद्धि को प्राप्त हुए हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Ab Krishna sabse highest knowledge batane wale hain—jo directly perfection tak le jata hai.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: मी पुन्हा सर्व ज्ञानांपैकी सर्वोच्च ज्ञान सांगणार आहे, ज्याला जाणून सर्व मुनि परम सिद्धीला पोहोचले.

core_meaning: There exists a highest form of knowledge that leads directly to ultimate perfection and realization
embedding_text: highest knowledge leading to ultimate perfection, foundational principles for realization, prioritizing essential truths, core abstraction layer for understanding, knowledge that leads to transformation and completion

sanskrit: इदं ज्ञानमुपाश्रित्य मम साधर्म्यमागताः । सर्गेऽपि नोपजायन्ते प्रलये न व्यथन्ति च ॥
transliteration: idaṁ jñānam upāśritya mama sādharmyam āgatāḥ sarge ’pi nopajāyante pralaye na vyathanti ca

meanings.english: Taking refuge in this knowledge, they attain a nature like Mine; they are not born at creation nor disturbed at dissolution.
meanings.hindi: इस ज्ञान को धारण करके वे मेरे समान स्वरूप को प्राप्त होते हैं; सृष्टि में उनका जन्म नहीं होता और प्रलय में वे व्याकुल नहीं होते।
meanings.hinglish: Is knowledge se tum divine nature achieve karte ho—aur phir birth-death cycle se free ho jaate ho.
meanings.marathi: या ज्ञानाचा आधार घेतल्यावर ते माझ्यासारखे स्वरूप प्राप्त करतात; सृष्टीत त्यांचा जन्म होत नाही आणि प्रलयात ते व्यथित होत नाहीत.

core_meaning: By realizing this knowledge, one transcends the cycle of creation and dissolution and attains divine nature
use_cases: designing systems resilient to lifecycle changes
embedding_text: transcending creation and destruction cycles through knowledge, attaining divine nature and independence, freedom from lifecycle fluctuations, stable core unaffected by system changes, liberation through highest understanding

sanskrit: मम योनिर्महद्ब्रह्म तस्मिन्गर्भं दधाम्यहम् । सम्भवः सर्वभूतानां ततो भवति भारत ॥
transliteration: mama yonir mahad brahma tasmin garbhaṁ dadhāmy aham sambhavaḥ sarva-bhūtānāṁ tato bhavati bhārata

meanings.english: My womb is the great Brahman (Prakriti); in that I place the seed, and from that all beings are born, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: महान ब्रह्म (प्रकृति) मेरी योनि है; उसमें मैं गर्भ स्थापित करता हूँ, और उससे सभी प्राणियों की उत्पत्ति होती है।
meanings.hinglish: Nature womb hai aur consciousness seed—dono ke combination se creation hoti hai.
meanings.marathi: महद् ब्रह्म (प्रकृती) ही माझी योनी आहे; त्यात मी बीज ठेवतो आणि त्यातून सर्व प्राणी उत्पन्न होतात.

core_meaning: Creation arises from the interaction of nature (as the womb) and consciousness (as the seed)
use_cases: designing systems with seed and environment
embedding_text: creation through interaction of nature and consciousness, prakriti as womb and consciousness as seed, origin of all beings from this union, generative system with environment and seed input, system initialization through dual components

sanskrit: सर्वयोनिषु कौन्तेय मूर्तयः सम्भवन्ति याः । तासां ब्रह्म महद्योनिरहं बीजप्रदः पिता ॥
transliteration: sarva-yoniṣu kaunteya mūrtayaḥ sambhavanti yāḥ tāsāṁ brahma mahad yonir ahaṁ bīja-pradaḥ pitā

meanings.english: O Arjuna, in whatever forms are produced in all species, the great nature (Prakriti) is their womb, and I am the seed-giving father.
meanings.hindi: हे अर्जुन, सभी योनियों में जितने भी रूप उत्पन्न होते हैं, उनकी योनि प्रकृति है और मैं उनका बीज देने वाला पिता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Sabhi forms same process se aate hain—nature womb hai aur consciousness seed-giver.
meanings.marathi: हे अर्जुन, सर्व योन्यांमध्ये निर्माण होणाऱ्या सर्व रूपांची योनी प्रकृती आहे आणि मी त्यांना बीज देणारा पिता आहे.

core_meaning: All forms of life arise from the same universal combination of nature and consciousness
use_cases: designing systems with shared base architecture
analyzing diversity from a single source
embedding_text: all forms arising from same source of nature and consciousness, universal generation mechanism across species, shared base architecture with diverse outputs, unity behind diversity of forms, consistent creation process across systems

sanskrit: सत्त्वं रजस्तम इति गुणाः प्रकृतिसम्भवाः । निबध्नन्ति महाबाहो देहे देहिनमव्ययम् ॥
transliteration: sattvaṁ rajas tama iti guṇāḥ prakṛti-sambhavāḥ nibadhnanti mahā-bāho dehe dehinam avyayam

meanings.english: Sattva, Rajas, and Tamas are the qualities born of nature; O Arjuna, they bind the imperishable soul to the body.
meanings.hindi: सत्त्व, रजस और तमस ये प्रकृति से उत्पन्न गुण हैं; हे अर्जुन, ये अविनाशी आत्मा को शरीर से बाँधते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Teen qualities—Sattva, Rajas, Tamas—nature ke modes hain jo soul ko body se bind karte hain.
meanings.marathi: सत्त्व, रजस आणि तमस हे प्रकृतीतून उत्पन्न झालेले गुण आहेत; ते अविनाशी आत्म्याला शरीराशी बांधतात.

core_meaning: The three qualities of nature—Sattva, Rajas, and Tamas—bind the eternal self to the material body
embedding_text: three gunas sattva rajas tamas as modes of nature binding consciousness to body, behavior patterns from nature qualities, system modes influencing actions, psychological tendencies from gunas, nature driven binding mechanism

sanskrit: तत्र सत्त्वं निर्मलत्वात्प्रकाशकमनामयम् । सुखसङ्गेन बध्नाति ज्ञानसङ्गेन चानघ ॥
transliteration: tatra sattvaṁ nirmalatvāt prakāśakam anāmayam sukha-saṅgena badhnāti jñāna-saṅgena cānagha

meanings.english: Sattva, being pure, is illuminating and free from affliction; yet it binds by attachment to happiness and attachment to knowledge.
meanings.hindi: सत्त्व गुण शुद्ध, प्रकाशमान और दोषरहित है; फिर भी यह सुख और ज्ञान की आसक्ति से बाँधता है।
meanings.hinglish: Sattva best mode hai—but happiness aur knowledge ki attachment se yeh bhi bind karta hai.
meanings.marathi: सत्त्व शुद्ध, प्रकाशमान आणि दोषरहित आहे; तरीही ते सुख आणि ज्ञानाच्या आसक्तीने बांधते.

core_meaning: Sattva brings clarity and peace but still binds through attachment to happiness and knowledge
use_cases: analyzing attachment even in positive states
recognizing subtle dependencies in optimal states
embedding_text: sattva as pure and illuminating mode binding through attachment to happiness and knowledge, high clarity system with subtle attachment, balanced and peaceful state with dependency, optimal system state with hidden binding, awareness of positive state limitations

sanskrit: रजो रागात्मकं विद्धि तृष्णासङ्गसमुद्भवम् । तन्निबध्नाति कौन्तेय कर्मसङ्गेन देहिनम् ॥
transliteration: rajo rāgātmakaṁ viddhi tṛṣṇā-saṅga-samudbhavam tan nibadhnāti kaunteya karma-saṅgena dehinam

meanings.english: Know Rajas to be of the nature of passion, born of craving and attachment; it binds the soul through attachment to action.
meanings.hindi: रजोगुण को रागात्मक जानो, जो तृष्णा और आसक्ति से उत्पन्न होता है; यह कर्म के प्रति आसक्ति द्वारा जीव को बाँधता है।
meanings.hinglish: Rajas desire aur action-driven mode hai—yeh result aur kaam ki attachment se bind karta hai.
meanings.marathi: रजोगुण हा रागात्मक आहे, जो तृष्णा आणि आसक्तीपासून उत्पन्न होतो; तो कर्माच्या आसक्तीने जीवाला बांधतो.

core_meaning: Rajas is driven by desire and activity and binds through attachment to action and outcomes
embedding_text: rajas as desire driven active mode binding through attachment to action and results, productivity and restlessness cycle, high activity system with craving and attachment, motivation and drive behavior model, action oriented system with dependency on outcomes

sanskrit: तमस्त्वज्ञानजं विद्धि मोहनं सर्वदेहिनाम् । प्रमादालस्यनिद्राभिस्तन्निबध्नाति भारत ॥
transliteration: tamas tv ajñāna-jaṁ viddhi mohanaṁ sarva-dehinām pramādālasya-nidrābhis tan nibadhnāti bhārata

meanings.english: Know Tamas to be born of ignorance, which deludes all embodied beings; it binds through negligence, laziness, and sleep.
meanings.hindi: तमोगुण को अज्ञान से उत्पन्न जानो, जो सभी प्राणियों को मोह में डालता है; यह प्रमाद, आलस्य और निद्रा द्वारा बाँधता है।
meanings.hinglish: Tamas ignorance aur inactivity ka mode hai—yeh laziness aur confusion se bind karta hai.
meanings.marathi: तमोगुण अज्ञानातून उत्पन्न होतो, जो सर्वांना मोहात टाकतो; तो प्रमाद, आळस आणि निद्रेमुळे बांधतो.

core_meaning: Tamas arises from ignorance and binds through inertia, confusion, and lack of awareness
use_cases: identifying failure or idle states in systems
embedding_text: tamas as ignorance and inertia binding through laziness negligence and sleep, low energy system state, stagnation and confusion mode, lack of awareness and inactivity patterns, system idle or failure state modeling

sanskrit: सत्त्वं सुखे सञ्जयति रजः कर्मणि भारत । ज्ञानमावृत्य तु तमः प्रमादे सञ्जयत्युत ॥
transliteration: sattvaṁ sukhe sañjayati rajaḥ karmaṇi bhārata jñānam āvṛtya tu tamaḥ pramāde sañjayaty uta

meanings.english: Sattva attaches one to happiness, Rajas to action, and Tamas, covering knowledge, attaches one to negligence.
meanings.hindi: सत्त्व सुख में लगाता है, रजोगुण कर्म में और तमोगुण ज्ञान को ढककर प्रमाद में लगाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Sattva happiness me, Rajas action me aur Tamas laziness/ignorance me attach karta hai.
meanings.marathi: सत्त्व सुखात गुंतवते, रजोगुण कर्मात आणि तमोगुण ज्ञान झाकून प्रमादात गुंतवतो.

core_meaning: Each guna directs behavior differently—Sattva toward happiness, Rajas toward action, and Tamas toward ignorance and inertia
use_cases: designing adaptive systems based on modes
embedding_text: sattva rajas tamas directing behavior toward happiness action and ignorance respectively, classification of mental states, behavioral mode mapping, influence of nature on decision making, adaptive system based on modes

sanskrit: रजस्तमश्चाभिभूय सत्त्वं भवति भारत । रजः सत्त्वं तमश्चैव तमः सत्त्वं रजस्तथा ॥
transliteration: rajas tamaś cābhibhūya sattvaṁ bhavati bhārata rajaḥ sattvaṁ tamaś caiva tamaḥ sattvaṁ rajas tathā

meanings.english: Sometimes Sattva prevails by overpowering Rajas and Tamas; sometimes Rajas prevails by overpowering Sattva and Tamas; and sometimes Tamas prevails by overpowering Sattva and Rajas.
meanings.hindi: कभी सत्त्व रजस और तमस को दबाकर प्रबल होता है; कभी रजस सत्त्व और तमस को दबाता है; और कभी तमस सत्त्व और रजस को दबाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Kabhi Sattva dominate karta hai, kabhi Rajas aur kabhi Tamas—yeh teen constantly switch hote rehte hain.
meanings.marathi: कधी सत्त्व रजस आणि तमसला दाबून प्रबळ होते, कधी रजस सत्त्व आणि तमसला, तर कधी तमस सत्त्व आणि रजसला दाबते.

core_meaning: The three gunas constantly compete, with one dominating the others at different times
embedding_text: dynamic competition between sattva rajas and tamas with shifting dominance, fluctuating mental and system states, adaptive system behavior with changing modes, state transition modeling, interaction of multiple behavioral modes

sanskrit: सर्वद्वारेषु देहेऽस्मिन्प्रकाश उपजायते । ज्ञानं यदा तदा विद्यात् विवृद्धं सत्त्वमित्युत ॥
transliteration: sarva-dvāreṣu dehe ’smin prakāśa upajāyate jñānaṁ yadā tadā vidyād vivṛddhaṁ sattvam ity uta

meanings.english: When the light of knowledge shines through all the senses in the body, then one should know that Sattva is predominant.
meanings.hindi: जब शरीर के सभी द्वारों (इन्द्रियों) में ज्ञान का प्रकाश प्रकट होता है, तब जानना चाहिए कि सत्त्व की वृद्धि हुई है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab clarity aur awareness sab jagah feel ho—samajh jao Sattva dominate kar raha hai.
meanings.marathi: जेव्हा शरीरातील सर्व इंद्रियांमध्ये ज्ञानाचा प्रकाश प्रकट होतो, तेव्हा समजावे की सत्त्व वाढले आहे.

core_meaning: Sattva is dominant when clarity, awareness, and illumination are present throughout the system
embedding_text: sattva dominance indicated by clarity awareness and knowledge across system, high performance state with illumination, detection of optimal mental state, awareness driven behavior, clarity indicators in system states

sanskrit: लोभः प्रवृत्तिरारम्भः कर्मणामशमः स्पृहा । रजस्येतानि जायन्ते विवृद्धे भरतर्षभ ॥
transliteration: lobhaḥ pravṛttir ārambhaḥ karmaṇām aśamaḥ spṛhā rajasy etāni jāyante vivṛddhe bharatarṣabha

meanings.english: Greed, constant activity, undertaking of actions, restlessness, and desire—these arise when Rajas is predominant.
meanings.hindi: लोभ, प्रवृत्ति, कर्मों का आरम्भ, अशांति और स्पृहा—ये सब रजोगुण की वृद्धि होने पर उत्पन्न होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jab Rajas dominate karta hai to greed, hyper-activity aur restlessness increase ho jati hai.
meanings.marathi: रजोगुण वाढल्यावर लोभ, सततची प्रवृत्ती, कर्मांची सुरुवात, अस्वस्थता आणि इच्छा निर्माण होतात.

core_meaning: Rajas dominance is marked by increased desire, activity, restlessness, and constant engagement in actions
embedding_text: rajas dominance indicated by greed activity restlessness and desire, high activity system with continuous action, productivity and burnout cycle detection, desire driven behavior model, system under constant load and engagement

sanskrit: अप्रकाशोऽप्रवृत्तिश्च प्रमादो मोह एव च । तमस्येतानि जायन्ते विवृद्धे कुरुनन्दन ॥
transliteration: aprakāśo ’pravṛttiś ca pramādo moha eva ca tamasy etāni jāyante vivṛddhe kuru-nandana

meanings.english: Darkness, inactivity, negligence, and delusion—these arise when Tamas is predominant.
meanings.hindi: अंधकार, निष्क्रियता, प्रमाद और मोह—ये सब तमोगुण की वृद्धि होने पर उत्पन्न होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jab Tamas dominate karta hai to confusion, laziness aur inactivity increase ho jati hai.
meanings.marathi: तमोगुण वाढल्यावर अंधकार, निष्क्रियता, प्रमाद आणि मोह निर्माण होतात.

core_meaning: Tamas dominance is marked by lack of clarity, inactivity, negligence, and delusion
use_cases: monitoring system downtime or idle states
embedding_text: tamas dominance indicated by darkness inactivity negligence and delusion, low energy and stagnant system state, confusion and lack of awareness patterns, system idle or failure condition, detection of inactivity and cognitive fog

sanskrit: यदा सत्त्वे प्रवृद्धे तु प्रलयं याति देहभृत् । तदोत्तमविदां लोकानमलान्प्रतिपद्यते ॥
transliteration: yadā sattve pravṛddhe tu pralayaṁ yāti deha-bhṛt tadottama-vidāṁ lokān amalān pratipadyate

meanings.english: When one dies while Sattva is predominant, one attains the pure worlds of those who know the highest truth.
meanings.hindi: जब सत्त्व की वृद्धि के समय देहधारी का अंत होता है, तब वह उत्तम ज्ञानी जनों के निर्मल लोकों को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Agar death ke time Sattva dominate kare, to higher pure states ya realms milte hain.
meanings.marathi: सत्त्व वाढलेल्या अवस्थेत मृत्यू आल्यास, तो उच्च ज्ञानी लोकांच्या निर्मल लोकांना प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: Dominance of Sattva at death leads to higher, pure states associated with knowledge and clarity
use_cases: understanding long-term effects of mental states
modeling outcome based on dominant system state
embedding_text: sattva dominance leading to higher pure states after death, long term impact of clarity and knowledge, system state at end determining outcome, elevation through sustained sattva, clarity driven final state transition

sanskrit: रजसि प्रलयं गत्वा कर्मसङ्गिषु जायते । तथा प्रलीनस्तमसि मूढयोनिषु जायते ॥
transliteration: rajasi pralayaṁ gatvā karma-saṅgiṣu jāyate tathā pralīnas tamasi mūḍha-yoniṣu jāyate

meanings.english: One who dies in Rajas is reborn among those attached to action; one who dies in Tamas is reborn in deluded or lower states.
meanings.hindi: जो रजोगुण में मृत्यु को प्राप्त होता है, वह कर्म में आसक्त लोगों में जन्म लेता है; और जो तमोगुण में लीन होकर मरता है, वह मूढ़ योनियों में जन्म लेता है।
meanings.hinglish: Rajas me death → action-driven life; Tamas me death → confused/lower states.
meanings.marathi: रजोगुणात मृत्यू आल्यास तो कर्माशी आसक्त लोकांमध्ये जन्म घेतो; तमोगुणात लीन होऊन मृत्यू आल्यास तो मूढ योन्यांमध्ये जन्म घेतो.

core_meaning: Rajas leads to rebirth in action-driven states, while Tamas leads to rebirth in deluded or lower states
use_cases: understanding consequence of dominant behavioral states
modeling lifecycle outcomes based on system state
analyzing impact of sustained activity vs inertia
embedding_text: rajas leading to action driven rebirth and tamas leading to delusion and lower states, state dependent transition outcomes, behavior patterns determining future states, system lifecycle outcomes based on dominant mode, impact of sustained activity and inertia

sanskrit: कर्मणः सुकृतस्याहुः सात्त्विकं निर्मलं फलम् । रजसस्तु फलं दुःखमज्ञानं तमसः फलम् ॥
transliteration: karmaṇaḥ sukṛtasyāhuḥ sāttvikaṁ nirmalaṁ phalam rajasas tu phalaṁ duḥkham ajñānaṁ tamasaḥ phalam

meanings.english: The result of good actions is said to be pure and Sattvic; the result of Rajas is suffering; and the result of Tamas is ignorance.
meanings.hindi: सत्कर्मों का फल शुद्ध और सात्त्विक होता है; रजोगुण का फल दुःख और तमोगुण का फल अज्ञान होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Sattva → clean result, Rajas → stress/suffering, Tamas → ignorance/confusion.
meanings.marathi: सत्कर्मांचे फळ शुद्ध आणि सात्त्विक असते; रजोगुणाचे फळ दुःख आणि तमोगुणाचे फळ अज्ञान असते.

core_meaning: Each guna produces a distinct outcome—purity from Sattva, suffering from Rajas, and ignorance from Tamas
use_cases: predicting outcomes based on behavior mode
building decision systems based on input state
embedding_text: sattva leads to pure outcomes rajas leads to suffering and tamas leads to ignorance, mapping behavior modes to results, cause effect relationship between gunas and outcomes, system outputs based on internal state, prediction of results from action type

sanskrit: सत्त्वात्सञ्जायते ज्ञानं रजसो लोभ एव च । प्रमादमोहौ तमसो भवतोऽज्ञानमेव च ॥
transliteration: sattvāt sañjāyate jñānaṁ rajaso lobha eva ca pramāda-mohau tamaso bhavato ’jñānam eva ca

meanings.english: From Sattva arises knowledge; from Rajas arises greed; and from Tamas arise negligence, delusion, and ignorance.
meanings.hindi: सत्त्व से ज्ञान उत्पन्न होता है, रजोगुण से लोभ और तमोगुण से प्रमाद, मोह और अज्ञान उत्पन्न होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Sattva → knowledge, Rajas → greed, Tamas → confusion + ignorance.
meanings.marathi: सत्त्वातून ज्ञान उत्पन्न होते, रजोगुणातून लोभ आणि तमोगुणातून प्रमाद, मोह आणि अज्ञान निर्माण होते.

core_meaning: Each guna generates distinct mental outputs—knowledge from Sattva, greed from Rajas, and ignorance from Tamas
use_cases: modeling cognitive outputs from system states
embedding_text: sattva producing knowledge rajas producing greed and tamas producing ignorance and delusion, mental state generation from gunas, cognitive outputs based on internal modes, behavior prediction from system state, awareness of thought patterns from nature qualities

sanskrit: ऊर्ध्वं गच्छन्ति सत्त्वस्था मध्ये तिष्ठन्ति राजसाः । जघन्यगुणवृत्तिस्था अधो गच्छन्ति तामसाः ॥
transliteration: ūrdhvaṁ gacchanti sattva-sthā madhye tiṣṭhanti rājasāḥ jaghanya-guṇa-vṛtti-sthā adho gacchanti tāmasāḥ

meanings.english: Those established in Sattva rise upward; those in Rajas remain in the middle; and those in Tamas, abiding in the lowest qualities, go downward.
meanings.hindi: सत्त्व में स्थित लोग ऊपर जाते हैं, रजोगुण वाले मध्य में रहते हैं और तमोगुण में स्थित लोग नीचे गिरते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Sattva → upward growth, Rajas → stuck in cycle, Tamas → downward decline.
meanings.marathi: सत्त्वात स्थित लोक वर जातात, रजोगुणी मध्यम स्थितीत राहतात आणि तमोगुणी अधोगतीला जातात.

core_meaning: Each guna directs movement—Sattva elevates, Rajas sustains activity in the middle, and Tamas leads downward
use_cases: understanding direction of growth or decline
modeling system trajectory based on state
embedding_text: sattva leading upward growth rajas maintaining middle activity and tamas leading downward decline, directional movement based on system state, growth stagnation and decline model, trajectory of behavior from gunas, system direction based on internal mode

sanskrit: नान्यं गुणेभ्यः कर्तारं यदा द्रष्टानुपश्यति । गुणेभ्यश्च परं वेत्ति मद्भावं सोऽधिगच्छति ॥
transliteration: nānyaṁ guṇebhyaḥ kartāraṁ yadā draṣṭānupaśyati guṇebhyaś ca paraṁ vetti mad-bhāvaṁ so ’dhigacchati

meanings.english: When one perceives that no agent exists other than the guṇas and knows that which is beyond them, one attains My state.
meanings.hindi: जब व्यक्ति देखता है कि गुणों के अतिरिक्त कोई कर्ता नहीं है और उनसे परे तत्व को जानता है, तब वह मेरे स्वरूप को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab samajh aata hai ki sab kuch guṇas kar rahe hain aur tum unse beyond ho, tab liberation milti hai.
meanings.marathi: जेव्हा मनुष्य पाहतो की गुणांव्यतिरिक्त कोणताही कर्ता नाही आणि त्यांच्यापलीकडील तत्व जाणतो, तेव्हा तो माझ्या स्वरूपाला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: Realization comes from seeing that all actions belong to the gunas and recognizing the Self as beyond them
use_cases: separating system behavior from observer identity
embedding_text: all actions performed by gunas not self, observer beyond system modes, realization through separation of identity from behavior, non doership beyond sattva rajas tamas, transcendence of nature modes leading to liberation

sanskrit: गुणानेतानतीत्य त्रीन्देही देहसमुद्भवान् । जन्ममृत्युजरादुःखैर्विमुक्तोऽमृतमश्नुते ॥
transliteration: guṇān etān atītya trīn dehī deha-samudbhavān janma-mṛtyu-jarā-duḥkhair vimukto ’mṛtam aśnute

meanings.english: Transcending these three guṇas, which arise from the body, the embodied self is freed from birth, death, old age, and suffering, and attains immortality.
meanings.hindi: इन तीन गुणों को पार करके, जो शरीर से उत्पन्न होते हैं, जीव जन्म, मृत्यु, बुढ़ापा और दुःख से मुक्त होकर अमृत को प्राप्त करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab tum teenon guṇas se beyond chale jaate ho, tab birth-death cycle se free ho jaate ho.
meanings.marathi: या तीन गुणांना पार करून, जे शरीरातून उत्पन्न होतात, जीव जन्म, मृत्यू, वार्धक्य आणि दुःखातून मुक्त होऊन अमृत प्राप्त करतो.

core_meaning: Transcending the three gunas leads to complete freedom from the cycle of birth, death, and suffering
embedding_text: transcending sattva rajas tamas leading to freedom from birth death and suffering, system independence beyond operational modes, breaking cyclic processes, ultimate liberation from nature, complete detachment and immortality concept

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच कैर्लिङ्गैस्त्रीन्गुणानेतानतीतो भवति प्रभो । किमाचारः कथं चैतांस्त्रीन्गुणानतिवर्तते ॥
transliteration: arjuna uvāca kair liṅgais trīn guṇān etān atīto bhavati prabho kim-ācāraḥ kathaṁ caitāṁs trīn guṇān ativartate

meanings.english: Arjuna said: O Lord, by what signs is one known who has gone beyond the three guṇas? What is their conduct, and how do they transcend these guṇas?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने कहा: हे प्रभु, किन लक्षणों से ज्ञात होता है कि कोई व्यक्ति तीनों गुणों से परे हो गया है? उसका आचरण कैसा होता है और वह इन गुणों को कैसे पार करता है?
meanings.hinglish: Kaise pata chale koi guṇas ke beyond hai? Woh kaise behave karta hai aur kaise wahan tak pahunchta hai?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन म्हणाला: कोणत्या लक्षणांनी समजते की एखादा मनुष्य तीन गुणांपलीकडे गेला आहे? त्याचे आचरण कसे असते आणि तो हे गुण कसे पार करतो?

core_meaning: Arjuna seeks practical understanding of recognizing, behaving, and transcending beyond the three gunas
embedding_text: how to recognize and achieve transcendence beyond gunas, identifying signs and behavior of advanced state, evaluation criteria for system beyond modes, behavioral benchmarks for transcendence, mechanism of moving beyond nature modes

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच प्रकाशं च प्रवृत्तिं च मोहमेव च पाण्डव । न द्वेष्टि सम्प्रवृत्तानि न निवृत्तानि काङ्क्षति ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca prakāśaṁ ca pravṛttiṁ ca moham eva ca pāṇḍava na dveṣṭi sampravṛttāni na nivṛttāni kāṅkṣati

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: O Arjuna, one who neither hates illumination, activity, or delusion when they arise, nor longs for them when they cease, has transcended the guṇas.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: हे अर्जुन, जो व्यक्ति प्रकाश, प्रवृत्ति या मोह के उत्पन्न होने पर उनसे द्वेष नहीं करता और उनके समाप्त होने पर उनकी इच्छा नहीं करता, वह गुणों से परे है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo clarity, activity ya confusion aane par react nahi karta aur jaane par unko miss nahi karta—woh guṇas se beyond hai.
meanings.marathi: जो प्रकाश, प्रवृत्ती किंवा मोह निर्माण झाल्यावर त्यांचा द्वेष करत नाही आणि ते निघून गेल्यावर त्यांची इच्छा करत नाही, तो गुणांच्या पलीकडे गेलेला असतो.

core_meaning: Transcendence begins with non-reaction—neither resisting nor craving the states produced by the gunas
embedding_text: non reaction to sattva rajas tamas states neither craving nor resisting, equanimity and detachment from system modes, stable observer independent of fluctuations, resilience through neutrality, emotional and cognitive balance beyond modes

sanskrit: उदासीनवदासीनो गुणैर्यो न विचाल्यते । गुणा वर्तन्त इत्येवं योऽवतिष्ठति नेङ्गते ॥
transliteration: udāsīna-vad āsīno guṇair yo na vicālyate guṇā vartanta ity evaṁ yo ’vatiṣṭhati neṅgate

meanings.english: One who sits like a neutral observer, not disturbed by the guṇas, knowing that the guṇas alone act, remains steady and does not waver.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति उदासीन की तरह स्थित रहता है और गुणों से विचलित नहीं होता, यह जानते हुए कि गुण ही कार्य करते हैं, वह स्थिर रहता है और डगमगाता नहीं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo witness mode me rehta hai aur samajhta hai ki sab guṇas kar rahe hain—woh stable rehta hai.
meanings.marathi: जो उदासीनासारखा स्थिर राहतो आणि गुणांनी विचलित होत नाही, गुणच कार्य करतात हे जाणतो, तो अढळ राहतो.

core_meaning: The one established as a neutral witness, recognizing that the gunas alone act, remains steady and unaffected
use_cases: creating resilient systems unaffected by fluctuations
embedding_text: witness consciousness remaining unaffected by gunas, neutral observer not disturbed by system states, recognizing actions belong to nature not self, stability through detachment, resilient observer independent of fluctuations

sanskrit: समदुःखसुखः स्वस्थः समलोष्टाश्मकाञ्चनः । तुल्यप्रियाप्रियो धीरस्तुल्यनिन्दात्मसंस्तुतिः ॥
