transliteration: sama-duḥkha-sukhaḥ sva-sthaḥ sama-loṣṭāśma-kāñcanaḥ tulya-priyāpriyo dhīras tulya-nindātma-saṁstutiḥ

meanings.english: One who is the same in pleasure and pain, established in the Self, who regards a clod, stone, and gold as equal, who is steady in the face of the pleasant and unpleasant, and equal in praise and blame.
meanings.hindi: जो सुख-दुःख में समान रहता है, आत्मस्थित है, मिट्टी, पत्थर और सोने को समान मानता है, प्रिय और अप्रिय में समान रहता है, और निंदा तथा प्रशंसा में भी समान रहता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo sukh-dukh, praise-blame, gain-loss sab me same rehta hai—that is transcendence.
meanings.marathi: जो सुख-दुःखात समान राहतो, आत्मस्थित असतो, माती, दगड आणि सोनं समान मानतो, प्रिय-अप्रियात समान राहतो आणि निंदा-स्तुतीतही समान राहतो.

core_meaning: A transcendent person remains equal in all dualities—pleasure and pain, gain and loss, praise and blame
embedding_text: equanimity in pleasure and pain praise and blame gain and loss, stable system unaffected by external variations, balanced and unbiased response model, resilience against dualities, consistent performance regardless of conditions

sanskrit: मानापमानयोस्तुल्यस्तुल्यो मित्रारिपक्षयोः । सर्वारम्भपरित्यागी गुणातीतः स उच्यते ॥
transliteration: mānāpamānayos tulyas tulyo mitrāri-pakṣayoḥ sarvārambha-parityāgī guṇātītaḥ sa ucyate

meanings.english: One who is equal in honor and dishonor, the same toward friend and enemy, and who has abandoned all ego-driven undertakings, is said to have transcended the guṇas.
meanings.hindi: जो मान और अपमान में समान रहता है, मित्र और शत्रु के प्रति समान भाव रखता है और सभी अहंकार-प्रेरित आरंभों का त्याग कर चुका है, वह गुणातीत कहलाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo honor-dishonor, friend-enemy me same rahe aur ego-based actions chhod de—woh guṇas ke beyond hai.
meanings.marathi: जो मान-अपमानात समान राहतो, मित्र-शत्रूप्रती समान भाव ठेवतो आणि अहंकारातून होणाऱ्या सर्व आरंभांचा त्याग करतो, तो गुणातीत मानला जातो.

core_meaning: A person beyond the guṇas is equal in social dualities and free from ego-driven actions
embedding_text: equality in honor and dishonor friend and enemy, detachment from ego driven actions, neutral and unbiased behavior model, transcending social dualities, consistent system behavior independent of context

sanskrit: मां च योऽव्यभिचारेण भक्तियोगेन सेवते । स गुणान्समतीत्यैतान्ब्रह्मभूयाय कल्पते ॥
transliteration: māṁ ca yo ’vyabhicāreṇa bhakti-yogena sevate sa guṇān samatītyaitān brahma-bhūyāya kalpate

meanings.english: One who serves Me with unwavering devotion, transcending these guṇas, becomes fit for attaining Brahman.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति अविचल भक्ति योग से मेरी सेवा करता है, वह इन गुणों को पार कर ब्रह्म स्वरूप को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo pure devotion se connected rehta hai, woh automatically guṇas se upar chala jata hai.
meanings.marathi: जो अविचल भक्तीयोगाने माझी सेवा करतो, तो या गुणांना पार करून ब्रह्मस्वरूपाला प्राप्त होतो.

core_meaning: Unwavering devotion is the direct path to transcend the guṇas and realize the highest state
use_cases: creating stable connection to core principles
embedding_text: unwavering devotion as direct path beyond gunas, alignment with higher principle leading to transcendence, bhakti yoga as method for liberation, stable connection to core beyond system modes, devotion driven transformation

sanskrit: ब्रह्मणो हि प्रतिष्ठाहममृतस्याव्ययस्य च । शाश्वतस्य च धर्मस्य सुखस्यैकान्तिकस्य च ॥
transliteration: brahmaṇo hi pratiṣṭhāham amṛtasyāvyayasya ca śāśvatasya ca dharmasya sukhasyaikāntikasya ca

meanings.english: For I am the foundation of Brahman, of immortality, of the imperishable, of eternal dharma, and of absolute bliss.
meanings.hindi: मैं ही ब्रह्म का आधार हूँ, अमृत, अविनाशी, शाश्वत धर्म और परम सुख का भी आधार हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Krishna hi ultimate base hai—immortality, truth, aur pure happiness ka.
meanings.marathi: मीच ब्रह्माचा आधार आहे, अमरत्वाचा, अविनाशीपणाचा, शाश्वत धर्माचा आणि परम सुखाचा आधार आहे.

core_meaning: The ultimate reality (Krishna) is the foundation of Brahman, immortality, eternal truth, and absolute bliss
use_cases: designing systems with a central base layer
building frameworks anchored in core truth
embedding_text: ultimate foundation of reality as basis of brahman immortality and eternal truth, absolute source of stability and bliss, central base layer of existence, final reference point for system, highest underlying principle of all states

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच |
ऊर्ध्वमूलमध:शाखमश्वत्थं प्राहुरव्ययम् |
छन्दांसि यस्य पर्णानि यस्तं वेद स वेदवित् ॥ १ ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
ūrdhva-mūlam adhaḥ-śākham aśvatthaṁ prāhur avyayam
chandāṁsi yasya parṇāni yas taṁ veda sa veda-vit

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: It is said that there is an imperishable banyan tree that has its roots upward and its branches down and whose leaves are the Vedic hymns. One who knows this tree is the knower of the Vedas.
meanings.hindi: श्रीभगवान ने कहा: इस भौतिक संसार की तुलना एक उलटे बरगद के पेड़ से की गई है, जिसकी जड़ें ऊपर हैं और शाखाएं नीचे हैं। इसके पत्ते वैदिक स्तोत्र हैं। जो इस पेड़ को जानता है, वह वेदों का ज्ञाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan ne kaha: Is duniya ko ek ulte bargad (banyan) ke ped jaisa samjho, jiski roots upar hain aur branches neeche. Iske patte Vedon ke mantra hain. Jo is ped ke raaz ko samajhta hai, wahi asli gyani hai.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान म्हणाले: हे भौतिक जग एका उलट्या वडाच्या झाडासारखे आहे, ज्याची मुळे वर आणि फांद्या खाली आहेत. वेदातील ऋचा या त्याची पाने आहेत. जो या वृक्षाला जाणतो, तोच खरा वेदवेत्ता होय.

core_meaning: The Perverted Reflection: This world is an upside-down reflection of the spiritual reality. To understand the 'Vedas' is to understand how to disentangle oneself from this complex tree of material desire.
use_cases: visualizing the structure of material existence
understanding the purpose of Vedic knowledge
recognizing that material world is a temporary reflection
embedding_text: The banyan tree with roots upward and branches downward represents the material world.

sanskrit:
अधश्चोर्ध्वं प्रसृतास्तस्य शाखा गुणप्रवृद्धा विषयप्रवाला: |
अधश्च मूलान्यनुसन्ततानि कर्मानुबन्धीनि मनुष्यलोके ॥ २ ॥
transliteration:
adhaś cordhvaṁ prasṛtās tasya śākhā guṇa-pravṛddhā viṣaya-pravālāḥ
adhaś ca mūlāny anusantatāni karmānubandhīni manuṣya-loke

meanings.english: The branches of this tree extend downward and upward, nourished by the three modes of material nature. The twigs are the objects of the senses. This tree also has roots going down, and these are bound to the fruitive actions of human society.
meanings.hindi: इस वृक्ष की शाखाएं ऊपर और नीचे फैली हुई हैं, जो प्रकृति के तीन गुणों द्वारा पोषित हैं। इसकी कोपलें इन्द्रिय विषय हैं। इसकी जड़ें नीचे की ओर भी फैली हुई हैं, जो मानव समाज के सकाम कर्मों से बंधी हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Is ped ki branches upar-neeche faili hui hain aur teen 'Gunas' se badhti hain. Sense objects iski twigs hain aur insaano ke karam (actions) iski neeche wali roots hain.
meanings.marathi: या वृक्षाच्या फांद्या खाली आणि वर पसरलेल्या असून त्या गुणांनी वाढलेल्या आहेत. विषय हे त्याचे अंकुर आहेत आणि खाली मानवी लोकात कर्माला बांधणारी मुळे पसरलेली आहेत.

core_meaning: The Complexity of Karma: The tree is fed by the Gunas (Sattva, Rajas, Tamas). While the main root is above (God), secondary roots (Desires) grow downward, binding the soul to worldly actions.
use_cases: analyzing the cause of addiction to sense objects
understanding how the modes of nature drive our behavior
embedding_text: Branches of the material tree are nourished by the modes of nature and twigs are sense objects.

sanskrit:
न रूपमस्येह तथोपलभ्यते नान्तो न चादिर्न च सम्प्रतिष्ठा |
अश्वत्थमेनं सुविरूढमूलमसङ्गशस्त्रेण दृढेन छित्त्वा ॥ ३ ॥
तत: पदं तत्परिमार्गितव्यं यस्मिन्गता न निवर्तन्ति भूय: |
तमेव चाद्यं पुरुषं प्रपद्ये यतः प्रवृत्तिः प्रसृता पुराणी ॥ ४ ॥
transliteration:
na rūpam asyeha tathopalabhyate nānto na cādir na ca sampratiṣṭhā
aśvattham enaṁ su-virūḍha-mūlam asaṅga-śastreṇa dṛḍhena chittvā
tataḥ padaṁ tat parimārgitavyaṁ yasmin gatā na nivartanti bhūyaḥ
tam eva cādyaṁ puruṣaṁ prapadye yataḥ pravṛttiḥ prasṛtā purāṇī

meanings.english: The real form of this tree cannot be perceived in this world. No one can understand where it ends, where it begins, or where its foundation is. But with determination one must cut down this strongly rooted tree with the weapon of detachment. Thereafter, one must seek that place from which, having gone, one never returns...
meanings.hindi: इस वृक्ष का वास्तविक स्वरूप यहाँ दिखाई नहीं देता। न इसका अंत है, न आदि और न ही आधार। इस सुदृढ़ जड़ों वाले पेड़ को वैराग्य (असंग) रूपी शस्त्र से काटकर उस परम पद की खोज करनी चाहिए, जहाँ से वापस नहीं आना पड़ता।
meanings.hinglish: Is ped ka na koi start hai na end. Is gehri roots wale ped ko 'Detachment' (Asanga) ki talwar se kaat do. Phir us jagah ko dhoondo jahan se koi wapas nahi aata aur us Bhagwan ki sharan lo.
meanings.marathi: या जगामध्ये या वृक्षाचे स्वरूप जसे आहे तसे लक्षात येत नाही, तसेच त्याचा अंत, आरंभ आणि प्रतिष्ठाही समजत नाही. वैराग्यरुपी शस्त्राने या वृक्षाचा छेद करून त्या पदाचा शोध घ्यावा जिथे गेल्यावर माणूस पुन्हा परतत नाही.

core_meaning: The Weapon of Detachment: Since the material world is an endless maze, logic alone cannot solve it. One must use 'Asanga' (detachment) to cut the connection and seek the original source.
use_cases: seeking a permanent solution to life's suffering
practicing spiritual detachment in a materialistic society
embedding_text: Cut the banyan tree of material world with the weapon of detachment and seek the Supreme.

sanskrit:
निर्मानमोहा जितसङ्गदोषा अध्यात्मनित्या विनिवृत्तकामा: |
द्वन्द्वैर्विमुक्ता: सुखदु:खसंज्ञैर्गच्छन्त्यमूढा: पदमव्ययं तत् ॥ ५ ॥
transliteration:
nirmāna-mohā jita-saṅga-doṣā adhyātma-nityā vinivṛtta-kāmāḥ
dvandvair vimuktāḥ sukha-duḥkha-saṁjñair gacchanty amūḍhāḥ padam avyayaṁ tat

meanings.english: Those who are free from false prestige, illusion and false association, who understand the eternal, who are done with material lust, who are freed from the dualities of happiness and distress, and who, unbewildered, know how to surrender unto the Supreme Person attain to that eternal kingdom.
meanings.hindi: जो मान और मोह से रहित हैं, जिन्होंने संगदोष को जीत लिया है, जो निरंतर अध्यात्म में स्थित हैं, जिनकी कामनाएं शांत हो गई हैं और जो सुख-दुःख के द्वंद्वों से मुक्त हैं, वे ज्ञानी उस अविनाशी परम पद को प्राप्त करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jinhe na ghamand hai na koi dhokha, jo hamesha spirituality mein rehte hain, jinki ichhayein khatam ho gayi hain aur jo sukh-dukh se upar uth chuke hain, wahi us eternal dham ko paate hain.
meanings.marathi: ज्यांचा मान आणि मोह गेला आहे, ज्यांनी आसक्तीचा दोष जिंकला आहे, जे नित्य आत्मस्वरूपाच्या ठिकाणी रमतात, ज्यांच्या इच्छा पूर्णपणे निवृत्त झाल्या आहेत आणि जे सुख-दुःख नावाच्या द्वंद्वानी मुक्त झाले आहेत, ते ज्ञानी त्या अविनाशी पदाला प्राप्त होतात.

core_meaning: Qualifications for Liberation: This verse provides a checklist for spiritual success—conquering pride, attachment, and the swings between happiness and distress.
use_cases: developing emotional stability in the face of ups and downs
letting go of the need for external validation
embedding_text: Qualifications for attaining the eternal kingdom include freedom from pride, illusion, and dualities.

sanskrit:
न तद्भ‍ासयते सूर्यो न शशाङ्को न पावक: |
यद्ग‍त्वा न निवर्तन्ते तद्धाम परमं मम ॥ ६ ॥
transliteration:
na tad bhāsayate sūryo na śaśāṅko na pāvakaḥ
yad gatvā na nivartante tad dhāma paramaṁ mama

meanings.english: That supreme abode of Mine is not illumined by the sun or moon, nor by fire or electricity. Those who reach it never return to this material world.
meanings.hindi: मेरे उस परम धाम को न सूर्य प्रकाशित करता है, न चंद्रमा और न ही अग्नि। जहाँ पहुँचकर मनुष्य लौटकर नहीं आते, वही मेरा परम धाम है।
meanings.hinglish: Mere us ghar ko na suraj ki light chahiye na chand ki na aag ki. Wahan jo ek baar pahunch gaya, wo is dukh bhari duniya mein wapas nahi aata.
meanings.marathi: ज्याला सूर्य प्रकाशित करू शकत नाही, चंद्र नाही आणि अग्नीही नाही; जिथे गेल्यावर लोक परत येत नाहीत, ते माझे परम धाम आहे.

core_meaning: The Self-Luminous Goal: The spiritual sky is self-illuminated by the internal energy of God. It is the only 'permanent' destination for the soul.
use_cases: contemplating the nature of the ultimate goal
finding motivation during difficult times in the material world
meditating on the self-effulgent nature of the soul
embedding_text: The supreme abode is not illumined by sun, moon, or fire, and those who reach it never return.

sanskrit:
ममैवांशो जीवलोके जीवभूत: सनातन: |
मन:षष्ठानीन्द्रियाणि प्रकृतिस्थानि कर्षति ॥ ७ ॥
transliteration:
mamaivāṁśo jīva-loke jīva-bhūtaḥ sanātanaḥ
manaḥ-ṣaṣṭhānīndriyāṇi prakṛti-sthāni karṣati

meanings.english: The living entities in this conditioned world are My eternal fragmental parts. Due to conditioned life, they are struggling very hard with the six senses, which include the mind.
meanings.hindi: इस संसार में प्रत्येक जीव मेरा ही सनातन अंश है। लेकिन बद्ध जीवन के कारण वे मन सहित छहों इन्द्रियों के साथ कड़ा संघर्ष कर रहे हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Is duniya ke saare jeev mere hi eternal parts hain. Par is life ki wajah se wo apne mann aur senses ke saath bahut struggle kar rahe hain.
meanings.marathi: या संसारलोकात माझाच सनातन अंश जीव बनला आहे; तो प्रकृतीमध्ये असलेल्या पाच इंद्रिये आणि सहावे मन यांना ओढतो (संघर्ष करतो).

core_meaning: Our Divine Identity: We are not 'god', but we are eternally 'part of God'. Our current suffering is a struggle between our divine nature and the limitations of the mind and body.
use_cases: understanding the relationship between the individual and the Divine
developing empathy for the struggles of all living beings
overcoming the 'identity crisis' by knowing one's spiritual root
embedding_text: Living entities are eternal fragmental parts of Krishna, struggling with the senses and mind.

sanskrit:
शरीरं यदवाप्‍नोति यच्च‍ाप्युत्क्रामतीश्वर: |
गृहीत्वैतानि संयाति वायुर्गन्धानिवाशयात् ॥ ८ ॥
transliteration:
śarīraṁ yad avāpnoti yac cāpy utkrāmatīśvaraḥ
gṛhītvaitāni saṁyāti vāyur gandhān ivāśayāt

meanings.english: The living entity in the material world carries his different conceptions of life from one body to another, as the air carries aromas. Thus he takes one kind of body and again quits it to take another.
meanings.hindi: जैसे वायु सुगंध को एक स्थान से दूसरे स्थान ले जाती है, वैसे ही देह का स्वामी जीवात्मा एक शरीर को त्यागकर दूसरे शरीर में अपने जीवन के विचारों (संस्कारों) को साथ ले जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jaise hawa khushbu ko ek jagah se doosri jagah le jaati hai, waise hi soul (atma) ek body chhod kar doosri body mein apne purane habits aur thoughts le jaati hai.
meanings.marathi: जसा वायू फुलांमधील सुगंध वाहून नेतो, तसाच शरीराचा स्वामी असलेला जीव एका शरीरातून निघून दुसऱ्या शरीरात जाताना ही मन आणि इंद्रिये आपल्यासोबत घेऊन जातो.

core_meaning: The Mechanism of Reincarnation: Death is not the end; it is a transfer. Our current consciousness is the 'scent' that determines our next destination.
use_cases: understanding how habits (Samskaras) affect future lives
taking responsibility for one's current state of mind
viewing death as a transition rather than a termination
embedding_text: The soul carries conceptions of life from one body to another like air carries aromas.

sanskrit:
श्रोत्रं चक्षु: स्पर्शनं च रसनं घ्राणमेव च |
अधिष्ठाय मनश्चायं विषयानुपसेवते ॥ ९ ॥
transliteration:
śrotraṁ cakṣuḥ sparśanaṁ ca rasanam ghrāṇam eva ca
adhiṣṭhāya manaś cāyaṁ viṣayān upasevate

meanings.english: The living entity, thus taking another gross body, obtains a certain type of ear, eye, tongue, nose and sense of touch, which are grouped about the mind. He thus enjoys a particular set of sense objects.
meanings.hindi: एक नया शरीर धारण करके जीव कान, आँख, त्वचा, जीभ और नाक प्राप्त करता है, जो मन के चारों ओर केंद्रित होते हैं। इस प्रकार वह इन्द्रिय विषयों का भोग करता है।
meanings.hinglish: Nayi body milne par soul ko naye kaan, aankh, naak aur skin milti hai jo mann se connected hote hain. Is tarah wo duniya ki cheezon ko enjoy ya suffer karta hai.
meanings.marathi: हा जीव कान, डोळे, त्वचा, जीभ, नाक आणि मन यांचा आश्रय घेऊन विषयांचे सेवन करतो.

core_meaning: The Interface of Experience: The mind is the center of our sensory interface. Based on our past 'scent' (vulnerability/desire), we are given a specific biology to experience the world.
use_cases: understanding the biological basis of sensory experience
realizing the mind's role as the 'sixth sense' that coordinates all others
developing awareness of how we consume sensory data
embedding_text: The soul uses the senses and mind to enjoy sense objects in the material world.

sanskrit:
उत्क्रामन्तं स्थितं वाऽपि भुञ्जानं वा गुणान्वितम् |
विमूढा नानुपश्यन्ति पश्यन्ति ज्ञानचक्षुष: ॥ १० ॥
transliteration:
utkrāmantaṁ sthitaṁ vāpi bhuñjānaṁ vā guṇānvitam
vimūḍhā nānupaśyanti paśyanti jñāna-cakṣuṣaḥ

meanings.english: The foolish cannot understand how a living entity can quit his body, nor can they understand what sort of body he enjoys under the spell of the modes of nature. But one whose eyes are trained in knowledge can see all this.
meanings.hindi: मूर्ख लोग यह नहीं देख पाते कि जीवात्मा शरीर को कैसे छोड़ती है, या प्रकृति के गुणों के प्रभाव में वह किस प्रकार शरीर का भोग करती है। लेकिन जिनके पास ज्ञान के नेत्र हैं, वे यह सब देख सकते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Moorkh log nahi dekh paate ki soul body kaise chhodti hai ya kaise enjoy karti hai. Par jinhe asli gyan hai, wo is poore process ko clear dekh sakte hain.
meanings.marathi: शरीर सोडून जाताना किंवा शरीरात राहताना किंवा गुणांनी युक्त होऊन विषयांचा उपभोग घेताना मूर्ख लोक या आत्म्याला पाहू शकत नाहीत; केवळ ज्ञानरूपी डोळे असलेलेच त्याला पाहू शकतात.

core_meaning: The Eyes of Knowledge: Spiritual intelligence (Jnana-chakshushah) allows one to see the mechanics of life and death that are invisible to the ordinary eye.
use_cases: developing a deeper perspective on life beyond physical appearances
learning to observe one's own habits and their consequences
seeking a teacher who can 'open' these eyes of knowledge
embedding_text: Only those with the eyes of knowledge can see how the soul stays in or leaves the body.

sanskrit:
यतन्तो योगिनश्चैनं पश्यन्त्यात्मन्यवस्थितम् |
यतन्तोऽप्यकृतात्मानो नैनं पश्यन्त्यचेतस: ॥ ११ ॥
transliteration:
yatanto yoginaś cainaṁ paśyanty ātmany avasthitam
yatanto ’py akṛtātmāno nainaṁ paśyanty acetasaḥ

meanings.english: The endeavoring transcendentalists who are situated in self-realization can see all this clearly. But those whose minds are not developed and who are not situated in self-realization cannot see what is taking place, though they may try.
meanings.hindi: यत्न करने वाले योगी अपने आप में स्थित इस आत्मा को देख सकते हैं। किन्तु जिन्होंने आत्म-साक्षात्कार नहीं किया है, वे यत्न करने पर भी यह नहीं देख पाते कि क्या हो रहा है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log mehnat karte hain aur self-realized hain, wo sab kuch clear dekh paate hain. Par jinka mann saaf nahi hai, wo kitni bhi koshish kar lein, sachai nahi dekh sakte.
meanings.marathi: प्रयत्न करणारे योगी आपल्या अंतःकरणात असलेल्या या आत्म्याला पाहू शकतात; परंतु ज्यांचे अंतःकरण शुद्ध नाही, असे अज्ञानी लोक प्रयत्न करूनही याला पाहू शकत नाहीत.

core_meaning: The Necessity of Inner Purity: Spiritual sight isn't just about effort; it's about the 'hardware' (the mind) being refined. Without self-discipline and a clear mind, the truth remains invisible.
use_cases: understanding why some people 'get' spirituality while others don't
emphasizing the need for character building alongside technical study
realizing that information without realization is incomplete
embedding_text: Only self-realized yogis can see the soul's transition; the undeveloped mind cannot.

sanskrit:
यदादित्यगतं तेजो जगद्भ‍ासयतेऽखिलम् |
यच्च‍न्द्रमसि यच्च‍ाग्न‍ौ तत्तेजो विद्धि मामकम् ॥ १२ ॥
transliteration:
yad āditya-gataṁ tejo jagad bhāsayate ’khilam
yac candramasi yac cāgnau tat tejo viddhi māmakam

meanings.english: The splendor of the sun, which dissipates the darkness of this whole world, comes from Me. And the splendor of the moon and the splendor of fire are also from Me.
meanings.hindi: सूर्य का तेज जो पूरे संसार के अंधकार को दूर करता है, वह मुझ से ही आता है। चंद्रमा और अग्नि का तेज भी मुझ से ही है।
meanings.hinglish: Suraj ki roshni jo duniya ka andhera mitati hai, wo mujhse aati hai. Chand ki chandni aur aag ki lapat bhi mere hi tej ka hissa hain.
meanings.marathi: सूर्याचे जे तेज सर्व जगाला प्रकाशित करते आणि जे तेज चंद्रामध्ये अन् अग्नीमध्ये आहे, ते माझेच आहे असे तू जाण.

core_meaning: The Source of Energy: All physical light and energy in the universe are external manifestations of Divine power. This is a bridge for beginners to see God in nature.
use_cases: meditating on the sun or moon as symbols of Divine presence
recognizing that human technology (electricity/fire) has a spiritual origin
practicing gratitude for the basic elements of survival
embedding_text: The light of the sun, moon, and fire emanates from Krishna.

sanskrit:
गामाविश्य च भूतानि धारयाम्यहमोजसा |
पुष्णामि चौषधी: सर्वा: सोमो भूत्वा रसात्मक: ॥ १३ ॥
transliteration:
gām āviśya ca bhūtāni dhārayāmy aham ojasā
puṣṇāmi cauṣadhīḥ sarvāḥ somo bhūtvā rasātmakaḥ

meanings.english: I enter into each planet, and by My energy they stay in orbit. I become the moon and thereby supply the juice of life to all vegetables.
meanings.hindi: मैं प्रत्येक लोक में प्रवेश करता हूँ और मेरी शक्ति से ही वे अपनी कक्षा में टिके रहते हैं। मैं चंद्रमा बनकर समस्त वनस्पतियों को जीवन-रस प्रदान करता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main har planet mein enter karta hoon aur meri power se hi wo tike rehte hain. Main chand ban kar saari ped-paudhon ko taste aur nutrition deta hoon.
meanings.marathi: मीच पृथ्वीत प्रवेश करून आपल्या शक्तीने सर्व भूतांना धारण करतो आणि रसमय चंद्र होऊन सर्व औषधींना (वनस्पतींना) पुष्ट करतो.

core_meaning: Sustenance & Gravity: Beyond just light, the physical laws (like gravity) and biological nutrition are maintained by Divine will. God is the 'operating system' of the universe.
use_cases: contemplating the order and precision of the cosmos
understanding the spiritual side of ecology and food growth
feeling supported by a higher power in daily life
embedding_text: Krishna sustains planets in orbit and nourishes vegetables as the moon.

sanskrit:
अहं वैश्वानरो भूत्वा प्राणिनां देहमाश्रित: |
प्राणापानसमायुक्त: पचाम्यन्नं चतुर्विधम् ॥ १४ ॥
transliteration:
ahaṁ vaiśvānaro bhūtvā prāṇināṁ deham āśritaḥ
prāṇāpāna-samāyuktaḥ pacāmy annaṁ catur-vidham

meanings.english: I am the fire of digestion in the bodies of all living entities, and I join with the air of life, outgoing and incoming, to digest the four kinds of foodstuff.
meanings.hindi: मैं ही समस्त जीवों के शरीरों में पाचन-अग्नि हूँ और मैं ही श्वास-प्रश्वास (प्राण-अपान) के साथ मिलकर चार प्रकार के अन्नों को पचाता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main hi sabke pet ki bhook aur digest karne wali aag (Vaishvanara) hoon. Main saans ke saath milkar tumhare khaane ko pachaata hoon.
meanings.marathi: मी सर्व प्राण्यांच्या शरीरात वैश्वानर (अग्नी) होऊन प्राणापानाशी युक्त होऊन चार प्रकारच्या अन्नाचे पचन करतो.

core_meaning: The Internal Presence: God is not just in the sky; He is in your stomach. Digestion—a process we don't consciously control—is a Divine act happening within us.
use_cases: practicing mindful eating and honoring the 'digestive fire'
recognizing the sacredness of the physical body
understanding our dependence on higher forces for basic survival
embedding_text: Krishna is the fire of digestion (Vaishvanara) within all living beings.

sanskrit:
सर्वस्य चाहं हृदि सन्निविष्टो मत्त: स्मृतिर्ज्ञानमपोहनं च |
वेदैश्च सर्वैरहमेव वेद्यो वेदान्तकृद्वेदविदेव चाहम् ॥ १५ ॥
transliteration:
sarvasya cāhaṁ hṛdi sanniviṣṭo mattaḥ smṛtir jñānam apohanaṁ ca
vedaiś ca sarvair aham eva vedyo vedānta-kṛd veda-vid eva cāham

meanings.english: I am seated in everyone's heart, and from Me come remembrance, knowledge and forgetfulness. By all the Vedas, I am to be known. Indeed, I am the compiler of Vedānta, and I am the knower of the Vedas.
meanings.hindi: मैं प्रत्येक जीव के हृदय में स्थित हूँ और मुझ से ही स्मृति, ज्ञान तथा विस्मृति होती है। समस्त वेदों के द्वारा मैं ही जानने योग्य हूँ। मैं ही वेदान्त का संकलनकर्ता और वेदों का ज्ञाता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Main sabke dil mein rehta hoon. Yaad aana (memory), samajh aana (knowledge) aur bhool jaana (forgetfulness) sab mujhse hota hai. Saare Vedon ka maqsad mujhe jaanna hai.
meanings.marathi: मी सर्वांच्या हृदयात राहतो; माझ्यापासूनच स्मृती, ज्ञान आणि विस्मृती होते. सर्व वेदांच्या द्वारे मीच जाणण्याजोगा आहे आणि मीच वेदांचा कर्ता व ज्ञाता आहे.

core_meaning: The Source of Intellect: Memory and intuition are not just biological functions; they are guided from within. The ultimate 'documentation' of life (Vedas) points directly to Krishna.
use_cases: seeking mental clarity and 'aha' moments during study or work
finding comfort in the fact that God knows our hearts
simplifying spiritual study: the goal of all knowledge is the Divine
embedding_text: Krishna is in the heart, giving memory, knowledge, and forgetfulness; He is the goal of all Vedas.

sanskrit:
द्वाविमौ पुरुषौ लोके क्षरश्चाक्षर एव च |
क्षर: सर्वाणि भूतानि कूटस्थोऽक्षर उच्यते ॥ १६ ॥
transliteration:
dvāv imau puruṣau loke kṣaraś cākṣara eva ca
kṣaraḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni kūṭa-stho ’kṣara ucyate

meanings.english: There are two classes of beings, the fallible and the infallible. In the material world every living entity is fallible, and in the spiritual world every living entity is called infallible.
meanings.hindi: संसार में दो प्रकार के जीव हैं—क्षर (नाशवान) और अक्षर (अविनाशी)। इस भौतिक संसार में हर जीव क्षर है, और आध्यात्मिक जगत में हर जीव अक्षर कहलाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Duniya mein do tarah ke log/beings hote hain: Ek wo jo badalte rehte hain (Fallible) aur ek wo jo kabhi nahi badalte (Infallible).
meanings.marathi: या लोकात क्षर आणि अक्षर असे दोन प्रकारचे पुरुष आहेत. सर्व प्राण्यांची शरीरे क्षर आहेत आणि जीवात्मा हा अक्षर म्हटला जातो.

core_meaning: The Dual Nature of Souls: We have two states—conditioned (trapped in change/death) and liberated (eternally stable). It defines the binary state of spiritual existence.
use_cases: distinguishing between temporary physical identity and eternal spiritual identity
understanding the 'fall' of the soul into the material world
recognizing the potential for absolute stability (liberation)
embedding_text: There are two classes of beings: the fallible (material) and the infallible (spiritual).

sanskrit:
उत्तम: पुरुषस्त्वन्य: परमात्मेत्युदाहृत: |
यो लोकत्रयमाविश्य बिभर्त्यव्यय ईश्वर: ॥ १७ ॥
transliteration:
uttamaḥ puruṣas tv anyaḥ paramātmety udāhṛtaḥ
yo loka-trayam āviśya bibharty avyaya īśvaraḥ

meanings.english: Besides these two, there is the greatest living personality, the Supreme Soul, the imperishable Lord Himself, who has entered the three worlds and is maintaining them.
meanings.hindi: इन दोनों के अतिरिक्त एक उत्तम पुरुष है, जो परमात्मा कहलाता है। वह अविनाशी भगवान तीनों लोकों में प्रवेश करके उनका पालन-पोषण कर रहा है।
meanings.hinglish: In dono ke upar ek 'Uttama Purusha' hai jise Paramatma kehte hain. Wo hi bhagwan hai jo saari duniya ko sambhaal raha hai.
meanings.marathi: या दोघांपेक्षा वेगळा असा जो 'उत्तम पुरुष' आहे, त्यालाच परमात्मा म्हटले जाते, जो तिन्ही लोकांत प्रवेश करून सर्वांचे पोषण करतो.

core_meaning: The Transcendent Third: Above both the trapped and the liberated soul is the 'Puruṣottama'—the Supreme Person who is the source and maintainer of all.
use_cases: identifying the specific position of God compared to the individual soul
feeling secure knowing the universe has a conscious maintainer
embedding_text: The Supreme Soul (Paramatma) is the third, greatest personality who maintains the worlds.

sanskrit:
यस्मात्क्षरमतीतोऽहमक्षरादपि चोत्तम: |
अतोऽस्मि लोके वेदे च प्रथित: पुरुषोत्तम: ॥ १८ ॥
transliteration:
yasmāt kṣaram atīto ’ham akṣarād api cottamaḥ
ato ’smi loke vede ca prathitaḥ puruṣottamaḥ

meanings.english: Because I am transcendental, beyond both the fallible and the infallible, and because I am the greatest, I am celebrated both in the world and in the Vedas as that Supreme Person.
meanings.hindi: चूँकि मैं क्षर और अक्षर दोनों से परे हूँ और सर्वश्रेष्ठ हूँ, इसलिए संसार में तथा वेदों में 'पुरुषोत्तम' के रूप में विख्यात हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Kyunki main badalne wali aur na-badalne wali, dono cheezon se upar aur best hoon, isliye mujhe 'Puruṣottama' kaha jaata hai.
meanings.marathi: ज्याअर्थी मी क्षर आणि अक्षर या दोघांच्याही पलीकडचा आणि श्रेष्ठ आहे, त्याअर्थी जगात आणि वेदात मी 'पुरुषोत्तम' या नावाने प्रसिद्ध आहे.

core_meaning: The Title of Puruṣottama: Krishna explains why He holds the title of 'Supreme Person'. He is the absolute ceiling of excellence and existence.
use_cases: understanding the theological definition of Krishna's name
recognizing the uniqueness of the Supreme Personality
establishing the finality of Krishna's position
embedding_text: Krishna is celebrated as Purushottama because He transcends both fallible and infallible beings.

sanskrit:
यो मामेवमसम्मूढो जानाति पुरुषोत्तमम् |
स सर्वविद्भ‍जति मां सर्वभावेन भारत ॥ १९ ॥
transliteration:
yo mām evam asammūḍho jānāti puruṣottamam
sa sarva-vid bhajati māṁ sarva-bhāvena bhārata

meanings.english: Whoever knows Me as the Supreme Personality of Godhead, without doubting, is the knower of everything. He therefore engages himself in full devotional service to Me.
meanings.hindi: जो कोई भी मुझे बिना किसी संशय के पुरुषोत्तम के रूप में जानता है, वह सब कुछ जानने वाला है। अतः वह पूर्ण भक्ति के साथ मेरी सेवा में लग जाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo bina kisi doubt ke mujhe 'Puruṣottama' maan leta hai, wo sab kuch samajh gaya. Wo phir poore dil se meri bhakti karta hai.
meanings.marathi: हे भारता, जो संदेहरहित होऊन मला अशा प्रकारे पुरुषोत्तम म्हणून जाणतो, तो सर्वज्ञ सर्वभावाने मलाच भजतो.

core_meaning: The Result of Knowledge: Knowing the 'Source Code' (Krishna) makes you the 'Master Coder' (Sarva-vit). Real knowledge naturally leads to love and service.
use_cases: transitioning from theoretical study to practical devotion
overcoming doubts about the nature of God
attaining the essence of all knowledge without needing to read every book
embedding_text: Knowing Krishna as the Supreme Personality makes one the knower of everything.

sanskrit:
इति गुह्यतमं शास्त्रमिदमुक्तं मयानघ |
एतद्‍बुद्ध्वा बुद्धिमान्स्यात्कृतकृत्यश्च भारत ॥ २० ॥
transliteration:
iti guhya-tamaṁ śāstram idam uktaṁ mayānagha
etad buddhvā buddhimān syāt kṛta-kṛtyaś ca bhārata

meanings.english: This is the most confidential part of the Vedic scriptures, O sinless one, and it is disclosed now by Me. Whoever understands this will become wise, and his endeavors will know perfection.
meanings.hindi: हे निष्पाप अर्जुन! यह वैदिक शास्त्रों का सर्वाधिक गुप्त अंश है, जिसे मैंने अब प्रकट किया है। जो इसे समझता है, वह बुद्धिमान हो जाएगा और उसके प्रयास सफल होंगे।
meanings.hinglish: Ye sabse 'Secret' gyan hai jo maine tumhe bataya hai. Isse samajhne wala hi asli buddhiman hai aur wo apne har kaam mein kamyab hoga.
meanings.marathi: हे निष्पाप अर्जुना, अशा प्रकारे हे अतिशय गुह्य शास्त्र मी तुला सांगितले आहे; हे जाणून मनुष्य बुद्धिमान आणि कृतकृत्य होतो.

core_meaning: The Ultimate Success: This chapter is the 'Substance of all Scriptures'. Understanding it is the peak of intelligence and the key to fulfilling all of life's purposes.
use_cases: concluding a deep study with a sense of completion
motivating oneself to apply spiritual wisdom to work/career
cherishing the 'most confidential' knowledge as a rare gift
embedding_text: Understanding this most confidential knowledge makes one wise and perfect in endeavors.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच अभयं सत्त्वसंशुद्धिर्ज्ञानयोगव्यवस्थिति: । दानं दमश्च यज्ञश्च स्वाध्यायस्तप आर्जवम् ॥
transliteration: śrī-bhagavān uvāca abhayaṁ sattva-saṁśuddhir jñāna-yoga-vyavasthitiḥ dānaṁ damaś ca yajñaś ca svādhyāyas tapa ārjavam

meanings.english: The Blessed Lord said: Fearlessness, purity of mind, steadfastness in knowledge and yoga, charity, self-control, sacrifice, study of sacred texts, austerity, and straightforwardness.
meanings.hindi: भगवान ने कहा: निर्भयता, मन की शुद्धता, ज्ञान और योग में स्थिरता, दान, इन्द्रियनिग्रह, यज्ञ, स्वाध्याय, तप और सरलता।
meanings.hinglish: Fearlessness, purity, discipline, charity aur self-control—yeh sab divine qualities hain.
meanings.marathi: भगवान म्हणाले: निर्भयता, अंत:करणाची शुद्धता, ज्ञानयोगात स्थिरता, दान, इंद्रियनिग्रह, यज्ञ, स्वाध्याय, तप आणि सरळपणा.

core_meaning: Divine qualities begin with fearlessness, purity, discipline, and alignment with knowledge and self-control
embedding_text: divine qualities including fearlessness purity knowledge discipline charity self control and simplicity, ethical and value driven behavior model, foundational traits for growth and liberation, character development based on sattvic principles

sanskrit: अहिंसा सत्यमक्रोधस्त्यागः शान्तिरपैशुनम् । दया भूतेष्वलोलुप्त्वं मार्दवं ह्रीरचापलम् ॥
transliteration: ahiṁsā satyam akrodhas tyāgaḥ śāntir apaiśunam dayā bhūteṣv aloluptvaṁ mārdavaṁ hrīr acāpalam

meanings.english: Non-violence, truthfulness, absence of anger, renunciation, peacefulness, absence of fault-finding, compassion for all beings, freedom from greed, gentleness, modesty, and steadiness.
meanings.hindi: अहिंसा, सत्य, क्रोध का अभाव, त्याग, शांति, निंदा का अभाव, सभी प्राणियों के प्रति दया, लोभ का अभाव, कोमलता, लज्जा और स्थिरता।
meanings.hinglish: Non-violence, truth, no anger, compassion aur no greed—yeh sab divine traits hain.
meanings.marathi: अहिंसा, सत्य, क्रोधाचा अभाव, त्याग, शांतता, निंदा न करणे, सर्व प्राण्यांप्रती दया, लोभाचा अभाव, कोमलता, लज्जा आणि स्थिरता.

core_meaning: Divine qualities include compassion, truth, emotional control, and freedom from greed and negativity
embedding_text: divine traits including non violence truth absence of anger compassion and freedom from greed, emotional control and ethical behavior, humane interaction model, peaceful and balanced system design, reducing negativity and conflict

sanskrit: तेजः क्षमा धृतिः शौचमद्रोहो नातिमानिता । भवन्ति सम्पदं दैवीमभिजातस्य भारत ॥
transliteration: tejaḥ kṣamā dhṛtiḥ śaucam adroho nāti-mānitā bhavanti sampadaṁ daivīm abhijātasya bhārata

meanings.english: Vigor, forgiveness, fortitude, purity, absence of hatred, and absence of excessive pride—these are the qualities of one born with divine nature.
meanings.hindi: तेज, क्षमा, धैर्य, शुद्धता, द्वेष का अभाव और अहंकार का अभाव—ये सभी दैवी गुण हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Inner strength, patience, no ego aur no hatred—yeh divine personality ka sign hai.
meanings.marathi: तेज, क्षमा, धैर्य, शुद्धता, द्वेषाचा अभाव आणि अहंकाराचा अभाव—हे दैवी गुण आहेत.

core_meaning: Divine nature is marked by inner strength, patience, purity, and freedom from hatred and ego
use_cases: building strong yet calm system behavior
establishing inner stability in dynamic environments
embedding_text: divine traits including strength forgiveness patience purity and absence of ego and hatred, resilient and balanced system behavior, calm and strong personality model, ego free and conflict free interaction design, inner stability and discipline

sanskrit: दम्भो दर्पोऽभिमानश्च क्रोधः पारुष्यमेव च । अज्ञानं चाभिजातस्य पार्थ सम्पदमासुरीम् ॥
transliteration: dambho darpo ’bhimānaś ca krodhaḥ pāruṣyam eva ca ajñānaṁ cābhijātasya pārtha sampadam āsurīm

meanings.english: Hypocrisy, arrogance, pride, anger, harshness, and ignorance—these are the qualities of one born with a demoniac nature.
meanings.hindi: दम्भ, घमंड, अभिमान, क्रोध, कठोरता और अज्ञान—ये आसुरी गुण हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Hypocrisy, ego, anger aur ignorance—yeh sab negative (asuric) traits hain.
meanings.marathi: दंभ, गर्व, अभिमान, क्रोध, कठोरता आणि अज्ञान—हे आसुरी गुण आहेत.

core_meaning: Asuric nature is defined by ego, anger, harshness, hypocrisy, and ignorance
use_cases: designing systems to avoid bias and ego
embedding_text: asuric traits including hypocrisy arrogance pride anger harshness and ignorance, negative behavior patterns leading to downfall, toxic system traits, ego driven decision making, detection of destructive patterns

sanskrit: दैवी सम्पद्विमोक्षाय निबन्धायासुरी मता । मा शुचः सम्पदं दैवीमभिजातोऽसि पाण्डव ॥
transliteration: daivī sampad vimokṣāya nibandhāyāsurī matā mā śucaḥ sampadaṁ daivīm abhijāto ’si pāṇḍava

meanings.english: Divine qualities lead to liberation, while demoniac qualities lead to bondage. Do not grieve, O Arjuna, for you are born with divine qualities.
meanings.hindi: दैवी गुण मोक्ष की ओर ले जाते हैं और आसुरी गुण बंधन की ओर। इसलिए हे अर्जुन, शोक मत करो क्योंकि तुम दैवी गुणों वाले हो।
meanings.hinglish: Divine traits → freedom, Asuric traits → bondage. Aur Krishna bol rahe hain tum divine ho.
meanings.marathi: दैवी गुण मोक्षासाठी आहेत आणि आसुरी गुण बंधनासाठी. म्हणून, हे अर्जुना, शोक करू नकोस—तू दैवी गुणांनी युक्त आहेस.

core_meaning: Divine qualities lead to liberation, while asuric qualities lead to bondage and limitation
use_cases: designing systems with positive vs negative pathways
building decision frameworks based on values
embedding_text: divine qualities leading to liberation and asuric qualities leading to bondage, outcome mapping of behavior traits, growth vs limitation model, ethical decision pathways, value based system outcomes

sanskrit: द्वौ भूतसर्गौ लोकेऽस्मिन्दैव आसुर एव च । दैवो विस्तरशः प्रोक्त आसुरं पार्थ मे शृणु ॥
transliteration: dvau bhūta-sargau loke ’smin daiva āsura eva ca daivo vistaraśaḥ prokta āsuraṁ pārtha me śṛṇu

meanings.english: There are two types of created beings in this world—the divine and the demoniac. The divine has been explained in detail; now hear from Me about the demoniac, O Arjuna.
meanings.hindi: इस संसार में दो प्रकार के प्राणी होते हैं—दैवी और आसुरी। दैवी का विस्तार से वर्णन किया जा चुका है; अब आसुरी के बारे में सुनो।
meanings.hinglish: Duniya me do types ke nature hote hain—divine aur asuric. Divine explain ho chuka hai, ab asuric samjho.
meanings.marathi: या जगात दोन प्रकारचे स्वभाव आहेत—दैवी आणि आसुरी. दैवी स्वभावाचे वर्णन झाले आहे; आता आसुरी स्वभाव ऐक.

core_meaning: Human tendencies are broadly divided into two types—divine and asuric—each leading to different outcomes
embedding_text: two types of nature divine and asuric classification of behavior patterns, dual mode system model ethical vs unethical tendencies, contrasting system design, classification of human tendencies into positive and negative modes

sanskrit: प्रवृत्तिं च निवृत्तिं च जना न विदुरासुराः । न शौचं नापि चाचारो न सत्यं तेषु विद्यते ॥
transliteration: pravṛttiṁ ca nivṛttiṁ ca janā na vidur āsurāḥ na śaucaṁ nāpi cācāro na satyaṁ teṣu vidyate

meanings.english: The demoniac do not understand what should be done and what should not be done. They lack purity, proper conduct, and truth.
meanings.hindi: आसुरी स्वभाव वाले लोग यह नहीं जानते कि क्या करना चाहिए और क्या नहीं; उनमें न शुद्धता होती है, न आचरण और न ही सत्य।
meanings.hinglish: Asuric nature wale log ko na sahi action pata hota hai na wrong—aur unme purity, discipline aur truth bhi nahi hota.
meanings.marathi: आसुरी स्वभावाचे लोक काय करावे आणि काय करू नये हे जाणत नाहीत; त्यांच्यात शुद्धता, आचरण आणि सत्य नसते.

core_meaning: Asuric nature is marked by confusion about right and wrong, and absence of purity, discipline, and truth
use_cases: building frameworks to enforce discipline and truth
embedding_text: asuric nature lacking understanding of right and wrong actions, absence of purity discipline and truth, flawed decision making patterns, chaotic behavior systems, lack of ethical grounding and structure

sanskrit: असत्यमप्रतिष्ठं ते जगदाहुरनीश्वरम् । अपरस्परसम्भूतं किमन्यत्कामहैतुकम् ॥
transliteration: asatyam apratiṣṭhaṁ te jagad āhur anīśvaram aparaspara-sambhūtaṁ kim anyat kāma-haitukam

meanings.english: They say that the world is unreal, without foundation, without a governing principle; born of mutual desire alone—what else could it be?
meanings.hindi: वे कहते हैं कि यह संसार असत्य है, बिना आधार का है, ईश्वर रहित है और केवल कामना से उत्पन्न हुआ है।
meanings.hinglish: Asuric log bolte hain ki world ka koi base ya higher order nahi—sab bas desire se hi hota hai.
meanings.marathi: ते म्हणतात की जग असत्य आहे, त्याला कोणताही आधार नाही, ईश्वर नाही आणि ते फक्त इच्छेमुळे निर्माण झाले आहे.

core_meaning: Asuric thinking denies truth, order, and higher purpose, reducing existence to desire-driven processes
use_cases: designing systems with strong base logic
building frameworks grounded in truth and order
embedding_text: asuric worldview denying truth order and higher principle, existence seen as random and desire driven, nihilistic and unstructured system model, lack of foundation and governance, consequence of ignoring higher principles

sanskrit: एतां दृष्टिमवष्टभ्य नष्टात्मानोऽल्पबुद्धयः । प्रभवन्त्युग्रकर्माणः क्षयाय जगतोऽहिताः ॥
transliteration: etāṁ dṛṣṭim avaṣṭabhya naṣṭātmāno ’lpa-buddhayaḥ prabhavanty ugra-karmāṇaḥ kṣayāya jagato ’hitāḥ

meanings.english: Holding this view, such people, of lost self and small understanding, engage in fierce actions, working for the destruction of the world.
meanings.hindi: इस दृष्टि को अपनाकर, ऐसे लोग जिनका आत्मज्ञान नष्ट हो चुका है और जिनकी बुद्धि अल्प है, भयंकर कर्म करते हैं और संसार के विनाश का कारण बनते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Galat worldview se log destructive ban jaate hain—unka thinking bhi weak ho jata hai aur actions harmful ho jaate hain.
meanings.marathi: या दृष्टिकोनाला धरून असे लोक, ज्यांचे आत्मज्ञान नष्ट झाले आहे आणि ज्यांची बुद्धी कमी आहे, उग्र कर्म करतात आणि जगाच्या विनाशाला कारणीभूत ठरतात.

core_meaning: A distorted worldview leads to loss of self-awareness, poor judgment, and destructive actions harmful to society
embedding_text: asuric worldview leading to destructive actions and loss of self awareness, flawed decision making from wrong beliefs, harmful system behavior patterns, consequences of poor understanding, need for ethical safeguards

sanskrit: काममाश्रित्य दुष्पूरं दम्भमानमदान्विताः । मोहाद्गृहीत्वासद्ग्राहान्प्रवर्तन्तेऽशुचिव्रताः ॥
transliteration: kāmam āśritya duṣpūraṁ dambha-māna-madānvitāḥ mohād gṛhītvāsad-grāhān pravartante ’śuci-vratāḥ

meanings.english: Driven by insatiable desires, full of hypocrisy, pride, and arrogance, they adopt false views due to delusion and engage in impure actions.
meanings.hindi: अतृप्त कामनाओं से प्रेरित, दंभ, अभिमान और घमंड से युक्त होकर, मोह के कारण असत्य को ग्रहण करते हैं और अशुद्ध आचरण करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Unlimited desires + ego + wrong beliefs = impure actions—that’s asuric pattern.
meanings.marathi: अतृप्त इच्छांनी प्रेरित, दंभ, अभिमान आणि गर्वाने युक्त होऊन, मोहामुळे असत्य धारण करून ते अशुद्ध आचरण करतात.

core_meaning: Asuric behavior is driven by endless desire, ego, and delusion, leading to false beliefs and impure actions
use_cases: identifying false belief adoption in systems
building systems to reduce bias and impurity
embedding_text: insatiable desire ego and delusion leading to impure actions, asuric behavior driven by false beliefs and arrogance, unstable system due to unbounded desire, need for constraint and clarity, harmful patterns from ego and ignorance

sanskrit: चिन्तामपरिमेयां च प्रलयान्तामुपाश्रिताः । कामोपभोगपरमा एतावदिति निश्चिताः ॥
transliteration: cintām aparimeyāṁ ca pralayāntām upāśritāḥ kāmopabhoga-paramā etāvad iti niścitāḥ

meanings.english: They are bound by endless anxieties that last until death, considering sense enjoyment as the highest goal of life.
meanings.hindi: वे अनंत चिंताओं में उलझे रहते हैं जो मृत्यु तक चलती हैं, और भोग को ही जीवन का अंतिम लक्ष्य मानते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Endless tension + desire-driven life—aur unko lagta hai bas enjoyment hi life ka goal hai.
meanings.marathi: ते अनंत चिंतांनी ग्रस्त असतात, ज्या मृत्यूपर्यंत चालतात, आणि भोग हाच जीवनाचा अंतिम उद्देश मानतात.

core_meaning: Asuric mindset leads to endless anxiety and a life focused only on temporary pleasures
use_cases: designing systems to reduce mental overload
embedding_text: endless anxiety and desire driven mindset focused on pleasure as ultimate goal, unsustainable system driven by short term rewards, mental overload and restlessness patterns, imbalance due to lack of higher purpose, need for long term stability

sanskrit: आशापाशशतैर्बद्धाः कामक्रोधपरायणाः । ईहन्ते कामभोगार्थमन्यायेनार्थसञ्चयान् ॥
transliteration: āśā-pāśa-śatair baddhāḥ kāma-krodha-parāyaṇāḥ īhante kāma-bhogārtham anyāyenārtha-sañcayān

meanings.english: Bound by hundreds of cords of desire, devoted to lust and anger, they strive to accumulate wealth unjustly for the sake of enjoyment.
meanings.hindi: सैकड़ों आशाओं के बंधन में बंधे हुए, काम और क्रोध में लगे हुए लोग भोग के लिए अन्यायपूर्वक धन एकत्र करने का प्रयास करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Unlimited desires + anger = log galat tareeke se paisa aur pleasure chase karte hain.
meanings.marathi: असंख्य इच्छांच्या बंधनात अडकलेले, काम आणि क्रोधात गुंतलेले लोक भोगासाठी अन्यायाने संपत्ती गोळा करतात.

core_meaning: Asuric behavior traps individuals in endless desires and anger, leading to unethical actions for material gain and pleasure
use_cases: building systems resistant to corruption and bias
embedding_text: trap of endless desires and anger leading to unethical wealth accumulation, greed driven system behavior, desire anger feedback loop, corruption and bias in decision making, need for ethical constraints and balance

sanskrit: इदमद्य मया लब्धमिमं प्राप्स्ये मनोरथम् । इदमस्तीदमपि मे भविष्यति पुनर्धनम् ॥
transliteration: idam adya mayā labdham imaṁ prāpsye manoratham idam astīdam api me bhaviṣyati punar dhanam

meanings.english: This has been gained by me today; I will fulfill this desire; I have this wealth, and I will gain more in the future.
meanings.hindi: आज मैंने यह प्राप्त किया है; मैं इस इच्छा को भी पूरा करूँगा; यह धन मेरे पास है और भविष्य में और भी धन प्राप्त होगा।
meanings.hinglish: Aaj yeh mila, kal aur milega—continuous gain aur greed mindset.
meanings.marathi: आज मी हे मिळवले आहे; ही इच्छा पूर्ण करीन; हे धन माझ्याकडे आहे आणि पुढे आणखी मिळेल.

core_meaning: Asuric thinking is centered on constant acquisition, future planning, and attachment to wealth and desires
use_cases: designing systems to balance growth and satisfaction
embedding_text: ego driven thinking focused on continuous acquisition and future gains, greed and attachment loop, accumulation mindset without satisfaction, self centered planning behavior, imbalance between growth and contentment

sanskrit: असौ मया हतः शत्रुर्हनिष्ये चापरानपि । ईश्वरोऽहमहं भोगी सिद्धोऽहं बलवान्सुखी ॥
transliteration: asau mayā hataḥ śatrur haniṣye cāparān api īśvaro ’ham ahaṁ bhogī siddho ’haṁ balavān sukhī

meanings.english: That enemy has been destroyed by me, and I will destroy others as well. I am the lord, I am the enjoyer, I am perfect, powerful, and happy.
meanings.hindi: मैंने इस शत्रु को मार दिया है और अन्य को भी मारूँगा। मैं ही ईश्वर हूँ, मैं भोगी हूँ, मैं सिद्ध, बलवान और सुखी हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Maine sab control kiya hai, main powerful hoon, main hi sab kuch hoon—yeh ego mindset hai.
meanings.marathi: मी त्या शत्रूला मारले आहे आणि इतरांनाही मारीन. मीच ईश्वर आहे, मी भोगी आहे, मी सिद्ध, बलवान आणि सुखी आहे.

core_meaning: Asuric mindset is characterized by extreme ego, dominance, self-glorification, and the illusion of absolute control
use_cases: designing systems to reduce overconfidence bias
embedding_text: ego driven mindset of dominance control and self glorification, illusion of absolute power and superiority, aggressive behavior patterns, overconfidence and bias in decision making, need for humility and balance in systems

sanskrit: आढ्योऽभिजनवानस्मि कोऽन्योऽस्ति सदृशो मया । यक्ष्ये दास्यामि मोदिष्य इत्यज्ञानविमोहिताः ॥
transliteration: āḍhyo ’bhijanavān asmi ko ’nyo ’sti sadṛśo mayā yakṣye dāsyāmi modiṣya ity ajñāna-vimohitāḥ

meanings.english: I am wealthy and of high birth; who else is equal to me? I will perform sacrifices, give charity, and enjoy life—thus deluded by ignorance.
meanings.hindi: मैं धनी हूँ और उच्च कुल में जन्मा हूँ; मेरे समान कौन है? मैं यज्ञ करूँगा, दान दूँगा और आनंद लूँगा—इस प्रकार वे अज्ञान से मोहित होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Main rich hoon, powerful hoon—mere jaisa koi nahi. Main charity bhi karunga—but ego ke saath.
meanings.marathi: मी श्रीमंत आणि उच्च वंशात जन्मलेला आहे; माझ्यासारखा दुसरा कोण? मी यज्ञ करीन, दान देईन आणि आनंद घेईन—असे अज्ञानाने मोहित झालेले असतात.

core_meaning: Asuric thinking includes pride in wealth and status, false superiority, and even spiritual or charitable acts done with ego and ignorance
use_cases: designing systems to reduce pride-based decisions
embedding_text: ego driven pride in wealth and status leading to false superiority, delusion through ignorance, even good actions performed with ego, bias from self importance, need for humility and awareness in actions

sanskrit: अनेकचित्तविभ्रान्ता मोहजालसमावृताः । प्रसक्ताः कामभोगेषु पतन्ति नरकेऽशुचौ ॥
transliteration: aneka-citta-vibhrāntā moha-jāla-samāvṛtāḥ prasaktāḥ kāma-bhogeṣu patanti narake ’śucau

meanings.english: Bewildered by many thoughts, entangled in a web of delusion, addicted to sense pleasures, they fall into impure states of suffering.
meanings.hindi: अनेक प्रकार के विचारों से भ्रमित, मोह के जाल में फंसे हुए और भोगों में आसक्त लोग अशुद्ध नरक में गिरते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Confused mind + desire attachment → ultimately downfall.
meanings.marathi: अनेक विचारांनी भ्रमित, मोहाच्या जाळ्यात अडकलेले आणि भोगांमध्ये आसक्त असलेले लोक अशुद्ध नरकात पडतात.

core_meaning: Asuric life leads to mental chaos, delusion, attachment to pleasure, and eventual downfall into suffering
use_cases: detecting mental overload and confusion patterns
designing systems to reduce cognitive chaos
embedding_text: mental confusion and delusion leading to attachment to pleasure and downfall, cognitive overload and instability, addiction driven behavior patterns, consequences of unregulated desires, system collapse due to chaos and lack of clarity

sanskrit: आत्मसम्भाविताः स्तब्धा धनमानमदान्विताः । यजन्ते नामयज्ञैस्ते दम्भेनाविधिपूर्वकम् ॥
transliteration: ātma-sambhāvitāḥ stabdhā dhana-māna-madānvitāḥ yajante nāma-yajñais te dambhenāvidhi-pūrvakam

meanings.english: Self-conceited, stubborn, filled with pride of wealth and arrogance, they perform sacrifices only in name, out of hypocrisy, without following proper principles.
meanings.hindi: वे आत्ममुग्ध, हठी, धन और मान के घमंड से भरे हुए होते हैं और केवल दिखावे के लिए, बिना विधि के, यज्ञ करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Show-off spirituality—ego ke liye rituals karte hain, sach me samajh nahi hoti.
meanings.marathi: ते आत्ममुग्ध, हट्टी, धन आणि मानाच्या गर्वाने युक्त असतात आणि केवळ दिखाव्यासाठी, नियमांशिवाय यज्ञ करतात.

core_meaning: Asuric nature includes performing spiritual or religious acts with ego, hypocrisy, and without true understanding or discipline
embedding_text: performative spirituality driven by ego and hypocrisy, misuse of rituals without understanding, false compliance with systems, ego driven structured behavior, need for authenticity and integrity in processes

sanskrit: अहङ्कारं बलं दर्पं कामं क्रोधं च संश्रिताः । मामात्मपरदेहेषु प्रद्विषन्तोऽभ्यसूयकाः ॥
transliteration: ahaṅkāraṁ balaṁ darpaṁ kāmaṁ krodhaṁ ca saṁśritāḥ mām ātma-para-deheṣu pradviṣanto ’bhyasūyakāḥ

meanings.english: Given to ego, power, arrogance, desire, and anger, they hate Me in their own bodies and in the bodies of others, and are full of malice.
meanings.hindi: अहंकार, बल, घमंड, काम और क्रोध में लिप्त होकर वे अपने और दूसरों के शरीरों में स्थित मुझसे द्वेष करते हैं और दोष ढूँढते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Ego + power + anger → log dusron me bhi aur khud me bhi divine ko reject kar dete hain.
meanings.marathi: अहंकार, बल, गर्व, काम आणि क्रोधात अडकून ते स्वतःमध्ये आणि इतरांमध्ये असलेल्या परमात्म्याचा द्वेष करतात आणि दोष शोधतात.

core_meaning: Asuric nature culminates in ego, power, desire, and anger, leading to hatred and rejection of the divine presence in all beings
use_cases: detecting extreme ego and hostility patterns
analyzing rejection of core principles in systems
designing systems to prevent hatred and bias
building frameworks to maintain ethical alignment
embedding_text: extreme ego power arrogance desire and anger leading to hatred and rejection of higher principles, destructive behavior patterns, bias and hostility in systems, disconnection from core values, need for alignment and awareness

sanskrit: तानहं द्विषतः क्रूरान्संसारेषु नराधमान् । क्षिपाम्यजस्रमशुभानासुरीष्वेव योनिषु ॥
transliteration: tān ahaṁ dviṣataḥ krūrān saṁsāreṣu narādhamān kṣipāmy ajasram aśubhān āsurīṣv eva yoniṣu

meanings.english: Those who are hateful, cruel, and the lowest among men, I continually cast into demoniac states of existence in this cycle of life.
meanings.hindi: जो लोग द्वेषपूर्ण, क्रूर और मनुष्यों में अधम हैं, उन्हें मैं बार-बार संसार में आसुरी योनियों में डालता हूँ।
meanings.hinglish: Jo log hatred aur cruelty me rehte hain, woh baar-baar negative cycles me girte rehte hain.
meanings.marathi: जे द्वेषपूर्ण, क्रूर आणि अधम लोक आहेत, त्यांना मी सतत संसारात आसुरी योनीत टाकतो.

core_meaning: Persistent asuric behavior leads to repeated cycles of lower states and continued suffering
use_cases: modeling negative feedback loops in systems
designing systems to break destructive cycles
analyzing long-term consequences of unethical actions
embedding_text: repeated cycles of negative states due to persistent asuric behavior, destructive feedback loops, consequences of cruelty and hatred, system stuck in downward cycles, need for breaking harmful patterns

sanskrit: आसुरीं योनिमापन्ना मूढा जन्मनि जन्मनि । मामप्राप्यैव कौन्तेय ततो यान्त्यधमां गतिम् ॥
transliteration: āsurīṁ yonim āpannā mūḍhā janmani janmani mām aprāpyaiva kaunteya tato yānty adhamāṁ gatim

meanings.english: Entering demoniac states life after life, the deluded do not reach Me, and thus they sink to even lower conditions.
meanings.hindi: आसुरी योनियों में जन्म लेते हुए, मूर्ख लोग मुझे प्राप्त नहीं कर पाते और इस प्रकार और भी अधम अवस्था को प्राप्त होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Asuric mindset wale log baar-baar same negative cycle me phaste hain aur kabhi higher state tak nahi pahunch paate.
meanings.marathi: आसुरी योनीत जन्म घेत राहून मूढ लोक मला प्राप्त होत नाहीत आणि त्यामुळे ते अधिक अधोगतीला जातात.

core_meaning: Asuric tendencies cause repeated cycles of ignorance, preventing growth and leading to further decline
use_cases: designing systems to enable upward transition
breaking loops of ignorance and decline
embedding_text: repeated cycles of ignorance and decline due to asuric tendencies, blocked growth and stagnation, failure to reach higher states, downward progression loop, need for breaking ignorance cycles and enabling growth

sanskrit: त्रिविधं नरकस्येदं द्वारं नाशनमात्मनः । कामः क्रोधस्तथा लोभस्तस्मादेतत्त्रयं त्यजेत् ॥
transliteration: tri-vidhaṁ narakasyedaṁ dvāraṁ nāśanam ātmanaḥ kāmaḥ krodhas tathā lobhas tasmād etat trayaṁ tyajet

meanings.english: There are three gates leading to self-destruction—desire, anger, and greed. Therefore, one should abandon these three.
meanings.hindi: नरक के तीन द्वार हैं—काम, क्रोध और लोभ। इसलिए इन तीनों का त्याग करना चाहिए।
meanings.hinglish: Teen main problems: desire, anger aur greed—yeh hi downfall ka root hain.
meanings.marathi: नरकाचे तीन दरवाजे आहेत—काम, क्रोध आणि लोभ. म्हणून या तिघांचा त्याग करावा.

core_meaning: Desire, anger, and greed are the three primary forces that lead to self-destruction and must be consciously abandoned
use_cases: identifying root causes of system failure
building stable and balanced system frameworks
creating filters for negative behavior patterns
embedding_text: three root causes of destruction desire anger and greed, core drivers of negative behavior, system failure due to uncontrolled impulses, need for eliminating destructive inputs, foundational rule for stability and growth

sanskrit: एतैर्विमुक्तः कौन्तेय तमोद्वारैस्त्रिभिर्नरः । आचरत्यात्मनः श्रेयस्ततो याति परां गतिम् ॥
transliteration: etair vimuktaḥ kaunteya tamo-dvārais tribhir naraḥ ācaraty ātmanaḥ śreyas tato yāti parāṁ gatim

meanings.english: Freed from these three gates of darkness, a person acts for their true welfare and thereby attains the highest state.
meanings.hindi: इन तीनों अंधकार के द्वारों से मुक्त होकर मनुष्य अपने कल्याण के मार्ग पर चलता है और अंततः परम गति को प्राप्त होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jab desire, anger aur greed se free ho jaate ho, tab life sahi direction me jaati hai aur higher state milti hai.
meanings.marathi: या तीन अंधकाराच्या दरवाज्यांपासून मुक्त झाल्यावर मनुष्य आपल्या कल्याणासाठी वागतो आणि शेवटी परम अवस्थेला पोहोचतो.

core_meaning: Freedom from desire, anger, and greed leads to right action, personal growth, and attainment of the highest state
use_cases: designing systems with stable input filtering
analyzing transformation from negative to positive states
creating decision systems aligned with higher goals
developing balanced and sustainable behavior models
embedding_text: freedom from desire anger and greed leading to right action and highest state, transformation from negative inputs to positive outcomes, stable and balanced system behavior, alignment with higher goals and long term growth, removing destructive inputs for optimal performance

sanskrit: यः शास्त्रविधिमुत्सृज्य वर्तते कामकारतः । न स सिद्धिमवाप्नोति न सुखं न परां गतिम् ॥
transliteration: yaḥ śāstra-vidhim utsṛjya vartate kāma-kārataḥ na sa siddhim avāpnoti na sukhaṁ na parāṁ gatim

meanings.english: One who disregards scriptural guidance and acts according to desires does not attain success, happiness, or the highest state.
meanings.hindi: जो व्यक्ति शास्त्र के नियमों को त्यागकर अपनी इच्छाओं के अनुसार चलता है, वह न सिद्धि प्राप्त करता है, न सुख और न ही परम गति।
meanings.hinglish: Jo sirf desire ke according chalta hai aur guidance ignore karta hai, usse na success milta hai na peace.
meanings.marathi: जो शास्त्राच्या नियमांकडे दुर्लक्ष करून इच्छेनुसार वागतो, त्याला ना सिद्धी, ना सुख आणि ना परम अवस्था मिळते.

core_meaning: Ignoring proper guidance and acting only on desire leads to failure, dissatisfaction, and lack of higher progress
use_cases: analyzing failure due to lack of guidance
building systems aligned with validated frameworks
embedding_text: ignoring structured guidance and acting on desire leads to failure and dissatisfaction, lack of success and growth without rules, importance of following validated frameworks, discipline vs impulse driven systems, consequences of unstructured decision making

sanskrit: तस्माच्छास्त्रं प्रमाणं ते कार्याकार्यव्यवस्थितौ । ज्ञात्वा शास्त्रविधानोक्तं कर्म कर्तुमिहार्हसि ॥
transliteration: tasmāc chāstraṁ pramāṇaṁ te kāryākārya-vyavasthitau jñātvā śāstra-vidhānoktaṁ karma kartum ihārhasi

meanings.english: Therefore, let scripture be your authority in determining what should be done and what should not be done. Knowing this, you should act accordingly.
meanings.hindi: इसलिए क्या करना चाहिए और क्या नहीं, इसका निर्णय करने में शास्त्र को प्रमाण मानो और उसके अनुसार कर्म करो।
meanings.hinglish: Right aur wrong decide karne ke liye proper guidance follow karo—phir uske according act karo.
meanings.marathi: म्हणून काय करावे आणि काय करू नये हे ठरवण्यासाठी शास्त्राला प्रमाण मानून त्यानुसार कर्म करावे.

core_meaning: Right action is determined by proper knowledge and guidance, which must be understood and then applied in action
use_cases: creating systems with validated knowledge sources
embedding_text: use structured knowledge as authority for decision making, determining right and wrong actions through guidance, applying learned principles in execution, rule based and ethical system design, alignment with validated frameworks

sanskrit:
अर्जुन उवाच
ये शास्त्रविधिमुत्सृज्य यजन्ते श्रद्धयान्विता: ।
तेषां निष्ठा तु का कृष्ण सत्त्वमाहो रजस्तम: ॥ १ ॥
transliteration:
arjuna uvāca
ye śāstra-vidhim utsṛjya yajante śraddhayānvitāḥ
teṣāṁ niṣṭhā tu kā kṛṣṇa sattvam āho rajas tamaḥ

meanings.english: Arjuna inquired: O Kṛṣṇa, what is the situation of those who do not follow the principles of scripture but worship according to their own imagination? Are they in goodness, in passion or in ignorance?
meanings.hindi: अर्जुन ने पूछा: हे कृष्ण, जो लोग शास्त्र के नियमों को छोड़कर अपनी कल्पना के अनुसार श्रद्धापूर्वक पूजा करते हैं, उनकी स्थिति क्या है? क्या वे सत्त्वगुणी हैं, रजोगुणी हैं या तमोगुणी?
meanings.hinglish: Arjuna ne pucha: Krishna, jo log shastra ke rules follow nahi karte par apni shraddha se puja karte hain, unka status kya hai? Wo Sattva, Rajas ya Tamas—kis category mein aate hain?
meanings.marathi: अर्जुन विचारतो: हे कृष्णा, जे शास्त्रांचे नियम सोडून केवळ श्रद्धेने युक्त होऊन पूजन करतात, त्यांची निष्ठा कोणती? ती सात्त्विक आहे, राजस आहे की तामस?

core_meaning: The Source of Faith: Arjuna asks whether sincere faith is enough if it deviates from established spiritual science, or if the quality of that faith is still dictated by the three modes of nature.
use_cases: understanding the importance of scriptural guidance
embedding_text: Arjuna asks about the quality of faith of those who disregard scriptures but worship with sincerity.

sanskrit:
श्रीभगवानुवाच
त्रिविधा भवति श्रद्धा देहिनां सा स्वभावजा ।
सात्त्विकी राजसी चैव तामसी चेति तां श‍ृणु ॥ २ ॥
transliteration:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca
tri-vidhā bhavati śraddhā dehināṁ sā svabhāva-jā
sāttvikī rājasī caiva tāmasī ceti tāṁ śṛṇu

meanings.english: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: According to the modes of nature acquired by the embodied soul, one’s faith can be of three kinds—in goodness, in passion or in ignorance. Now hear about this.
meanings.hindi: श्रीभगवान ने कहा: मनुष्य की श्रद्धा उसके स्वभाव के अनुसार तीन प्रकार की होती है—सात्त्विक, राजस और तामस। अब इसके बारे में मुझसे सुनो।
meanings.hinglish: Bhagwan bole: Insaan ki shraddha uske nature (modes) ke hisab se teen tarah ki hoti hai—Sattvik, Rajasic aur Tamasic. Ab iske baare mein detail mein suno.
meanings.marathi: श्रीभगवान म्हणाले: मनुष्याची श्रद्धा ही त्याच्या स्वभावानुसार सात्त्विक, राजस आणि तामस अशी तीन प्रकारची असते. त्याविषयी तू ऐक.

core_meaning: The Tripartite Nature: Faith is not a singular, pure concept. It is a psychological construct shaped by one's internal conditioning and material modes.
embedding_text: Krishna explains that faith is of three kinds—goodness, passion, and ignorance—based on one's nature.

sanskrit:
सत्त्वानुरूपा सर्वस्य श्रद्धा भवति भारत ।
श्रद्धामयोऽयं पुरुषो यो यच्छ्रद्ध: स एव स: ॥ ३ ॥
transliteration:
sattvānurūpā sarvasya śraddhā bhavati bhārata
śraddhā-mayo ’yaṁ puruṣo yo yac-chraddhaḥ sa eva saḥ

meanings.english: O son of Bharata, according to one’s existence under the various modes of nature, one evolves a particular kind of faith. The living being is said to be of a particular faith according to the modes he has acquired.
meanings.hindi: हे भारत! प्रत्येक व्यक्ति की श्रद्धा उसके अंतःकरण के अनुसार होती है। मनुष्य अपनी श्रद्धा से ही बना है; जिसकी जैसी श्रद्धा है, वैसा ही वह स्वयं है।
meanings.hinglish: Bharatvanshi, har insaan ki shraddha uske dil/mann ke hisab se hoti hai. Insaan apni shraddha se hi banta hai; jaisi uski shraddha hogi, waisa hi wo insaan hoga.
meanings.marathi: हे भारता, प्रत्येक मनुष्याची श्रद्धा त्याच्या अंत:करणानुसार असते. हा मनुष्य श्रद्धामय आहे; ज्याची जशी श्रद्धा असते, तसाच तो स्वतः असतो.

core_meaning: You Are Your Faith: This verse highlights that faith is the essence of identity. Our actions, choices, and character are simply the outward manifestation of our core beliefs.
embedding_text: One's faith corresponds to their existence; a person is defined by the quality of their faith.

sanskrit:
यजन्ते सात्त्विका देवान्यक्षरक्षांसि राजसा: ।
प्रेतान्भूतगणांश्चान्ये यजन्ते तामसा जना: ॥ ४ ॥
transliteration:
yajante sāttvikā devān yakṣa-rakṣāṁsi rājasāḥ
pretān bhūta-gaṇāṁś cānye yajante tāmasā janāḥ

meanings.english: Men in the mode of goodness worship the demigods; those in the mode of passion worship the demons; and those in the mode of ignorance worship ghosts and spirits.
meanings.hindi: सात्त्विक पुरुष देवताओं को पूजते हैं, राजसी पुरुष यक्षों और राक्षसों को पूजते हैं, तथा तामसी पुरुष प्रेतों और भूतगणों की पूजा करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Sattvik log devtaon ko pujte hain, Rajasic log takatvar rakshason (power) ko, aur Tamasic log bhoot-preton ki puja karte hain.
meanings.marathi: सात्त्विक लोक देवांना पूजतात, राजस लोक यक्ष आणि राक्षसांना पूजतात आणि तामस लोक प्रेत व भूतगणांची पूजा करतात.

core_meaning: Levels of Aspiration: Our internal mode determines the 'height' of our ideals. We gravitate toward objects of worship that mirror our own internal state.
embedding_text: The object of worship—demigods, demons, or ghosts—reveals whether one is in goodness, passion, or ignorance.

sanskrit:
आयु:सत्त्वबलारोग्यसुखप्रीतिविवर्धना: ।
रस्या: स्‍निग्धा: स्थिरा हृद्या आहारा: सात्त्विकप्रिया: ॥ ८ ॥
transliteration:
āyuḥ-sattva-balārogya-sukha-prīti-vivardhanāḥ
rasyāḥ snigdhāḥ sthirā hṛdyā āhārāḥ sāttvika-priyāḥ

meanings.english: Foods dear to those in the mode of goodness increase the duration of life, purify one’s existence and give strength, health, happiness and satisfaction. Such foods are juicy, fatty, wholesome, and pleasing to the heart.
meanings.hindi: आयु, बुद्धि, बल, आरोग्य, सुख और प्रीति को बढ़ाने वाले भोजन, जो रसयुक्त, चिकने, स्थिर रहने वाले तथा हृदय को प्रिय हों, वे सात्त्विक पुरुष को प्रिय होते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Jo khana umar, taqat, sehat aur khushi badhata hai—jo rasiya, nutritious aur dil ko achha lagne wala ho—wo Sattvik logon ko pasand hota hai.
meanings.marathi: आयुष्य, सत्त्व, बल, आरोग्य, सुख आणि प्रीती वाढवणारे, रसदार, स्निग्ध, टिकाऊ आणि मनाला प्रसन्न करणारे अन्न सात्त्विक लोकांना प्रिय असते.

core_meaning: The Sattvic Diet: Nutrition for the Soul. Food that is fresh and natural doesn't just nourish the body; it stabilizes the mind and increases happiness.
use_cases: understanding the energetic quality of food
embedding_text: Sattvic foods increase longevity and health; they are juicy, wholesome, and pleasing.

sanskrit:
कट्‌वम्ललवणात्युष्णतीक्ष्णरूक्षविदाहिन: ।
आहारा राजसस्येष्टा दु:खशोकामयप्रदा: ॥ ९ ॥
transliteration:
kaṭv-amla-lavaṇāty-uṣṇa-tīkṣṇa-rūkṣa-vidāhinaḥ
āhārā rājasasyeṣṭā duḥkha-śokāmaya-pradāḥ

meanings.english: Foods that are too bitter, too sour, salty, hot, pungent, dry and burning are dear to those in the mode of passion. Such foods cause distress, misery and disease.
meanings.hindi: कड़वे, खट्टे, नमकीन, बहुत गरम, तीखे, रूखे और दाहकारक भोजन रजोगुणी व्यक्ति को प्रिय होते हैं, जो दुःख, शोक और रोग उत्पन्न करते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Bahut kadwa, khatta, namkeen, mirch-masale wala aur jalaane wala khana Rajasic logon ko pasand hota hai, par ye dukh aur bimari lata hai.
meanings.marathi: कडू, आंबट, खारट, अति उष्ण, तिखट, कोरडे आणि जळजळ करणारे अन्न राजस लोकांना प्रिय असते, जे दुःख आणि रोग निर्माण करते.

core_meaning: The Rajasic Trap: Stimulants. Foods that offer intense, temporary sensory pleasure often lead to long-term physical and mental discomfort.
use_cases: identifying causes of stress and agitation
link between spicy food and emotional volatility
embedding_text: Rajasic foods are overly bitter, salty, or spicy, leading to distress and disease.

sanskrit:
यातयामं गतरसं पूति पर्युषितं च यत् ।
उच्छिष्टमपि चामेध्यं भोजनं तामसप्रियम् ॥ १० ॥
transliteration:
yāta-yāmaṁ gata-rasaṁ pūti paryuṣitaṁ ca yat
ucchiṣṭam api cāmedhyaṁ bhojanaṁ tāmasa-priyam

meanings.english: Food prepared more than three hours before being eaten, food that is tasteless, decomposed and putrid, and food consisting of remnants and untouchable things is dear to those in the mode of darkness.
meanings.hindi: जो भोजन अधपका, रसरहित, दुर्गन्धयुक्त, बासी और उच्छिष्ट (जूठा) है, वह तामसी पुरुष को प्रिय होता है।
meanings.hinglish: Baasi (old), badbudar, tasteless aur jhoota khana Tamasic logon ko pasand hota hai. Aisa khana insaan ko sust aur bimar banata hai.
meanings.marathi: शिळे, बेचव, दुर्गंधीयुक्त, विटाळलेले आणि उष्टे अन्न तामस लोकांना प्रिय असते.

core_meaning: The Tamasic Decline: Lethargy. Consuming stale or impure food clouds the consciousness, leading to laziness, ignorance, and a lack of vitality.
use_cases: understanding food hygiene and mental clarity
embedding_text: Tamasic foods are stale, putrid, and impure, favored by those in darkness.

sanskrit:
अफलाकाङ्‌‍क्षिभिर्यज्ञो विधिदिष्टो य इज्यते ।
यष्टव्यमेवेति मन: समाधाय स सात्त्विक: ॥ ११ ॥
transliteration:
aphalākāṅkṣibhir yajño vidhi-diṣṭo ya ijyate
yaṣṭavyam eveti manaḥ samādhāya sa sāttvikaḥ

meanings.english: Of sacrifices, the sacrifice performed according to the directions of scripture, as a matter of duty, by those who desire no reward, is of the nature of goodness.
meanings.hindi: यज्ञों में वही यज्ञ सात्त्विक है, जो शास्त्र के निर्देशानुसार कर्तव्य समझकर उन लोगों द्वारा किया जाता है जो फल की इच्छा नहीं रखते।
meanings.hinglish: Jo yajña bina kisi phal ki lalach ke, sirf apni duty samajhkar aur shastron ke rules ke hisab se kiya jaye, wo Sattvik hai.
meanings.marathi: फलाची अपेक्षा न धरता, शास्त्राच्या विधीप्रमाणे 'यज्ञ करणे हे आपले कर्तव्य आहे' असे मनाशी निश्चित करून जो यज्ञ केला जातो, तो सात्त्विक होय.

core_meaning: Sacrifice in Goodness: Defined by alignment with law (Shastra), a sense of duty, and the absence of selfish motivation.
embedding_text: Sattvic sacrifice is performed as a duty according to scriptural directions without desiring rewards.

sanskrit:
अभिसन्धाय तु फलं दम्भार्थमपि चैव यत् ।
इज्यते भरतश्रेष्ठ तं यज्ञं विद्धि राजसम् ॥ १२ ॥
transliteration:
abhisandhāya tu phalaṁ dambhārtham api caiva yat
ijyate bharata-śreṣṭha taṁ yajñaṁ viddhi rājasam

meanings.english: But the sacrifice performed for some material benefit, or for the sake of pride, O chief of the Bhāratas, you should know to be in the mode of passion.
meanings.hindi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठ! जो यज्ञ किसी भौतिक लाभ के लिए या गर्व के कारण किया जाता है, उसे तुम राजस जानो।
meanings.hinglish: Par jo kaam kisi matlab (result) ke liye ya dikhawe ke liye kiya jaye, use Rajasic samjho.
meanings.marathi: परंतु हे भरतश्रेष्ठा, फलाची अपेक्षा धरून आणि केवळ दंभासाठी (देखाव्यासाठी) जो यज्ञ केला जातो, तो तू राजस समज.

core_meaning: Sacrifice in Passion: Driven by the ego's desire for recognition or specific material outcomes.
embedding_text: Rajasic sacrifice is performed for material benefit or out of pride.

sanskrit:
विधिहीनमसृष्टान्नं मन्‍त्रहीनमदक्षिणम् ।
श्रद्धाविरहितं यज्ञं तामसं परिचक्षते ॥ १३ ॥
transliteration:
vidhi-hīnam asṛṣṭānnaṁ mantra-hīnam adakṣiṇam
śraddhā-virahitaṁ yajñaṁ tāmasaṁ paricakṣate

meanings.english: Any sacrifice performed without regard for the directions of scripture, without distribution of prasādam, without chanting of Vedic hymns and remunerations to the priests, and without faith is considered to be in the mode of ignorance.
meanings.hindi: जो यज्ञ शास्त्र के निर्देशों की अवहेलना करके, बिना प्रसाद बाँटे, बिना मन्त्रों के और बिना श्रद्धा के किया जाता है, वह तामस कहलाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo yajña bina kisi rule ke, bina shraddha ke, aur bina kisi ko kuch baante (prasadam) kiya jaye, wo Tamasic hai.
meanings.marathi: शास्त्राविधी सोडून, अन्नदान न करता, मंत्रहीन, दक्षिणा न देता आणि श्रद्धेशिवाय जो यज्ञ केला जातो, तो तामस म्हटला जातो.

core_meaning: Sacrifice in Ignorance: Characterized by a lack of faith, structure, and generosity; it is hollow and often harmful.
embedding_text: Tamasic sacrifice lacks scriptural direction, distribution of food, and faith.

sanskrit:
देवद्विजगुरुप्राज्ञपूजनं शौचमार्जवम् ।
ब्रह्मचर्यमहिंसा च शारीरं तप उच्यते ॥ १४ ॥
transliteration:
deva-dvija-guru-prājña-pūjanaṁ śaucam ārjavam
brahmacaryam ahiṁsā ca śārīraṁ tapa ucyate

meanings.english: Austerity of the body consists in worship of the Supreme Lord, the brāhmaṇas, the spiritual master, and superiors like the father and mother, and in cleanliness, simplicity, celibacy and nonviolence.
meanings.hindi: परमेश्वर, ब्राह्मणों, गुरु और माता-पिता का पूजन, तथा शुद्धि, सरलता, ब्रह्मचर्य और अहिंसा—ये शरीर की तपस्या कहलाते हैं।
meanings.hinglish: Sharir ka tap: Bhagwan aur badon ki izzat karna, saaf-safai, saadgi, control aur kisi ko chot na pahunchana.
meanings.marathi: देव, ब्राह्मण, गुरु आणि ज्ञानी यांचे पूजन, पावित्र्य, सरळपणा, ब्रह्मचर्य आणि अहिंसा हे शरीराचे तप होय.

core_meaning: Physical Austerity: Refining the physical self through respect, hygiene, and ethical conduct.
embedding_text: Physical austerity includes respect for elders, cleanliness, celibacy, and nonviolence.

sanskrit:
अनुद्वेगकरं वाक्यं सत्यं प्रियहितं च यत् ।
स्वाध्यायाभ्यसनं चैव वाङ्‍मयं तप उच्यते ॥ १५ ॥
transliteration:
anudvega-karaṁ vākyaṁ satyaṁ priya-hitaṁ ca yat
svādhyāyābhyasanaṁ caiva vāṅ-mayaṁ tapa ucyate

meanings.english: Austerity of speech consists in speaking words that are truthful, pleasing, beneficial, and not agitating to others, and also in regularly reciting Vedic literature.
meanings.hindi: वाणी की तपस्या है—ऐसा बोलना जो सत्य हो, सुनने में प्रिय हो, हितकारी हो और जिससे किसी को कष्ट न हो, तथा शास्त्रों का अभ्यास करना।
meanings.hinglish: Wani ka tap: Sach bolna jo kisi ko bura na lage, faydemand ho, aur roz padhai (scriptures) karna.
meanings.marathi: कोणालाही त्रास न देणारे, सत्य, प्रिय आणि हितकारक बोलणे तसेच शास्त्रांचा अभ्यास हे वाचेचे तप होय.

core_meaning: Verbal Austerity: Disciplining speech to be a tool for truth and peace rather than agitation.
embedding_text: Austerity of speech is speaking truthfully and beneficially without agitating others.

sanskrit:
मन:प्रसाद: सौम्यत्वं मौनमात्मविनिग्रह: ।
भावसंश‍ुद्धिरित्येतत्तपो मानसमुच्यते ॥ १६ ॥
transliteration:
manaḥ-prasādaḥ saumyatvaṁ maunam ātma-vinigrahaḥ
bhāva-saṁśuddhir ity etat tapo mānasam ucyate

meanings.english: And satisfaction, simplicity, gravity, self-control and purification of one’s existence are the austerities of the mind.
meanings.hindi: मन की तपस्या है—मन की प्रसन्नता, सौम्यता, मौन (गंभीरता), आत्म-संयम और शुद्ध भाव।
meanings.hinglish: Mann ka tap: Khush rehna, nature mein soft hona, shanti, self-control aur man saaf rakhna.
meanings.marathi: मनाची प्रसन्नता, सौम्यता, मौन, आत्मनिग्रह आणि भावाची शुद्धता हे मनाचे तप होय.

core_meaning: Mental Austerity: Internal mastery through contentment and the removal of mental clutter.
embedding_text: Mental austerity includes mental satisfaction, self-control, and purification of motives.

sanskrit:
श्रद्धया परया तप्‍तं तपस्तत्‍त्रिविधं नरै: ।
अफलाकाङ्‌‍क्षिभिर्युक्तै: सात्त्विकं परिचक्षते ॥ १७ ॥
transliteration:
śraddhayā parayā taptaṁ tapas tat tri-vidham naraiḥ
aphalākāṅkṣibhir yuktaiḥ sāttvikaṁ paricakṣate

meanings.english: This threefold austerity, performed with transcendental faith by men not expecting material benefits but engaged only for the sake of the Supreme, is called austerity in goodness.
meanings.hindi: बिना किसी लाभ की इच्छा के, श्रद्धापूर्वक परमेश्वर के लिए की गई यह तीन प्रकार की तपस्या सात्त्विक कहलाती है।
meanings.hinglish: Bina kisi matlab ke aur gehri shraddha ke saath jab ye teenon tap (body, speech, mind) kiye jaate hain, toh wo Sattvik hain.
meanings.marathi: फलाची इच्छा न धरता आणि परम श्रद्धेने युक्त होऊन मनुष्याने केलेले हे त्रिविध तप सात्त्विक म्हटले जाते.

core_meaning: Transcendental Austerity: When discipline is fueled by faith and directed toward the Divine rather than rewards.
embedding_text: Austerity performed with faith and without desire for reward is in the mode of goodness.

sanskrit:
सत्कारमानपूजार्थं तपो दम्भेन चैव यत् ।
क्रियते तदिह प्रोक्तं राजसं चलमध्रुवम् ॥ १८ ॥
transliteration:
satkāra-māna-pūjārthaṁ tapo dambhena caiva yat
kriyate tad iha proktaṁ rājasaṁ calam adhruvam

meanings.english: Penance performed out of pride and for the sake of gaining respect, honor and worship is said to be in the mode of passion. It is neither stable nor permanent.
meanings.hindi: जो तपस्या सम्मान, सत्कार और पूजा पाने के लिए या पाखण्ड से की जाती है, वह राजसी है और अस्थिर होती है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo tap dikhawe ke liye ya respect paane ke liye kiya jaye, wo Rajasic hai aur wo zyada tikta nahi hai.
meanings.marathi: सत्कार, मान आणि पूजा यासाठी जो तप दंभाने केला जातो, तो येथे राजस म्हटला गेला आहे, जो अनिश्चित आणि क्षणभंगुर असतो.

core_meaning: Unstable Austerity: Discipline motivated by social validation is temporary and lacks depth.
embedding_text: Rajasic penance is done for honor and pride and is unstable.

sanskrit:
मूढग्राहेणात्मनो यत्पीडया क्रियते तप: ।
परस्योत्सादनार्थं वा तत्तामसमुदाहृतम् ॥ १९ ॥
transliteration:
mūḍha-grāheṇātmano yat pīḍayā kriyate tapaḥ
parasyotsādanartham vā tat tāmasam udāhṛtam

meanings.english: Penance performed out of foolishness, with self-torture or to destroy or injure others, is said to be in the mode of ignorance.
meanings.hindi: जो तप मूर्खतापूर्ण हठ से, स्वयं को कष्ट देकर या दूसरों को हानि पहुँचाने के लिए किया जाता है, वह तामसी है।
meanings.hinglish: Apne aap ko dukh dekar ya doosron ka bura karne ke liye jo tap kiya jaye, wo Tamasic hai.
meanings.marathi: मूर्खपणाच्या हट्टाने, स्वतःला पीडा देऊन किंवा दुसऱ्याचा नाश करण्यासाठी जो तप केला जातो, तो तामस म्हटला जातो.

core_meaning: Destructive Austerity: Misguided discipline that involves pain and malice.
use_cases: harming others in the name of religion
embedding_text: Tamasic penance involves self-torture or the goal of hurting others.

sanskrit:
दातव्यमिति यद्दानं दीयतेऽनुपकारिणे ।
देशे काले च पात्रे च तद्दानं सात्त्विकं स्मृतम् ॥ २० ॥
transliteration:
dātavyam iti yad dānaṁ dīyate ’nupakāriṇe
deśe kāle ca pātre ca tad dānaṁ sāttvikaṁ smṛtam

meanings.english: Charity given out of duty, without expectation of return, at the proper time and place, and to a worthy person is considered to be in the mode of goodness.
meanings.hindi: दान देना कर्तव्य है—ऐसा मानकर जो दान बिना बदले की भावना के, उचित स्थान, समय और सुपात्र को दिया जाता है, वह सात्त्विक है।
meanings.hinglish: Daan dena duty hai—aisa samajhkar jab bina kisi umeed ke sahi waqt, jagah aur sahi insaan ko daan diya jaye, wo Sattvik hai.
meanings.marathi: देणे हे कर्तव्य आहे अशा भावनेने, परतफेडीची अपेक्षा न ठेवता, योग्य वेळी, योग्य स्थळी आणि योग्य व्यक्तीला दिलेले दान सात्त्विक मानले जाते.

core_meaning: Ideal Charity: Pure generosity governed by wisdom (Desha, Kala, Patra) and selfless intent.
embedding_text: Sattvic charity is given as duty to a worthy person at the right time and place.

sanskrit:
यत्तु प्रत्युपकारार्थं फलमुद्दिश्य वा पुन: ।
दीयते च परिक्ल‍ि‍ष्टं तद्दानं राजसं स्मृतम् ॥ २१ ॥
transliteration:
yat tu pratyupakārārthaṁ phalam uddiśya vā punaḥ
dīyate ca parikliṣṭaṁ tad dānaṁ rājasaṁ smṛtam

meanings.english: But charity performed with the expectation of some return, or with a desire for fruitive results, or in a grudging mood is said to be charity in the mode of passion.
meanings.hindi: परन्तु जो दान बदले में कुछ पाने की आशा से, या किसी फल की इच्छा से, या फिर दुखी मन से दिया जाता है, वह राजस कहलाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo daan badle mein kuch paane ki umeed se, ya kisi result ke liye, ya bina mann ke (grudgingly) diya jaye, wo Rajasic hai.
meanings.marathi: परंतु जे दान प्रत्युपकाराच्या अपेक्षेने किंवा फलाची इच्छा धरून अथवा रडत-खडत (नाखुशीने) दिले जाते, ते दान राजस मानले जाते.

core_meaning: Transactional Charity: Giving that is motivated by personal gain or performed with mental resistance.
embedding_text: Rajasic charity is performed for a return, for material results, or with a grudging heart.

sanskrit:
अदेशकाले यद्दानमपात्रेभ्यश्च दीयते ।
असत्कृतमवज्ञातं तत्तामसमुदाहृतम् ॥ २२ ॥
transliteration:
adeśa-kāle yad dānam apātrebhyaś ca dīyate
asat-kṛtam avajñātaṁ tat tāmasam udāhṛtam

meanings.english: And charity performed at an impure place, at an improper time, to unworthy persons, or without proper attention and respect is said to be in the mode of ignorance.
meanings.hindi: जो दान अपवित्र स्थान में, अनुचित समय में, अयोग्य पात्रों को और बिना सम्मान या अनादर के साथ दिया जाता है, वह तामस कहलाता है।
meanings.hinglish: Jo daan galat jagah, galat waqt, galat insaan ko aur bina kisi respect ke diya jaye, wo Tamasic hai.
meanings.marathi: अयोग्य स्थळी, अयोग्य काळी आणि अपात्र व्यक्तीला, तसेच सत्कार न करता तिरस्कारपूर्वक दिलेले दान तामस म्हटले जाते.
